Hotel Tagline: A private bay catches the last light on that gold façade, something no photograph holds.
Summary: We keep coming back for the private bay at dusk — the light on that façade does something the photographs never quite capture. Book a sea-view room and you'll understand why this address has defined Abu Dhabi's waterfront for twenty years.
Address: West Corniche Road - Al Ras Al Akhdar - Abu Dhabi - United Arab Emirates
Nearest Airports: AZI · Al Bateen Executive · 21 km; AUH · Abu Dhabi International · 37 km

The St. Regis Abu Dhabi luxury bedroom with floor-to-ceiling windows overlooking the Persian Gulf and city skyline

Hotel Tagline: Suspended between the Nation Towers, with the Corniche, marina, and Grand Mosque spread below.
Summary: The bridge suite between the Nation Towers is one of those rooms worth building a trip around — 360° of Gulf and city, suspended in mid-air. Even a standard Corniche room earns its rate. Azura at the top is where we'd start the evening.
Description ⚙: Situated in the sleek, sky-reaching Nation Towers complex, The St. Regis Abu Dhabi views over Abu Dhabi’s vibrant Corniche, Marina Mall, World Trade Center Mall, and Sheikh Zayed's iconic Mosque (all within nearby distance) are enough to leave you gasping for air. Nowhere is this more true than at the hotel’s rooftop bar, the Azura Panoramic Lounge, as the sun sets over the stunning Abu Dhabi Skyline.
View Subjects: Sheikh Zayed Grand Mosque, The Corniche
Address: Nation Towers - Corniche St - Al Bateen - W44 - Abu Dhabi - United Arab Emirates
Nearest Airports: AZI · Al Bateen Executive · 15 km; AUH · Abu Dhabi International · 34 km

Person working on tablet at high-rise hotel room overlooking pool and Arabian Gulf, Khalidiya Palace Rayhaan, Abu Dhabi

Hotel Tagline: From the water's edge, the domes of Qasr Al Watan sit just far enough away to read as a view.
Summary: From the water's edge here, the domes of Qasr Al Watan sit just far enough away to read as a view rather than a neighbour. The private beach is quieter than Saadiyat — which, depending on what you're after, is exactly the point.
Address: Corniche St - Al Khubeirah - W32 - Abu Dhabi - United Arab Emirates
Nearest Airports: AZI · Al Bateen Executive · 21 km; AUH · Abu Dhabi International · 37 km

Hotel Tagline: Across the creek from the Al Hanah terrace, the Grand Mosque glows at dusk.
Summary: There's a specific moment at the Al Hanah terrace — the call to prayer, the Grand Mosque illuminated across the water — that stays with you. We'd choose a room facing the creek over almost anything else in the city. This is the one Abu Dhabi address we always mention first.
Address: Khor Al Maqta,Qaryat al Beri - Rabdan - RB2 - Abu Dhabi - United Arab Emirates
Nearest Airports: AZI · Al Bateen Executive · 8 km; AUH · Abu Dhabi International · 20 km

Hotel: Four Seasons Hotel Abu Dhabi at Al Maryah Island
Alt Text: Four Seasons Hotel Abu Dhabi at Al Maryah Island features a luxurious pool overlooking the turquoise waters of the marina

Hotel Tagline: At the tip of Al Maryah Island, Arabian Gulf water and Abu Dhabi's skyline stretch in every direction.
Summary: The Eclipse Terrace at sunset earns its reputation — Gulf light, city skyline behind you, and service that reads the room without being asked. We'd request a high floor facing west and stay through dinner. The position at the tip of Al Maryah is genuinely difficult to beat.
Description ⚙: Offering endless views over the glistening waters of the Arabian Gulf and twinkling lights of the ever-expanding Abu Dhabi skyline, the five-star Four Seasons Hotel Abu Dhabi at Al Maryah Island sets itself apart as one of the top-voted hotels to stay at in Abu Dhabi. A relaxing atmosphere lingers here, and guests can enjoy luxurious treatments at the in-house spa, lounge at the pool, or grab a drink on the luxe rooftop terrace while taking in the panoramic views.
Address: Abu Dhabi Global Market - Second St - Al Maryah Island - MI1 - Abu Dhabi - United Arab Emirates
Nearest Airports: AZI · Al Bateen Executive · 14 km; AUH · Abu Dhabi International · 35 km

Alt Text: A guest relaxes by the infinity pool at Rosewood Abu Dhabi with a skyline view, fresh fruit platter, and tropical palm trees

Images.alt: A guest relaxes by the infinity pool at Rosewood Abu Dhabi with a skyline view, fresh fruit platter, and tropical palm trees
Rosewood Abu Dhabi rooftop dining area at dusk with illuminated tables overlooking the cityscape and waterfront
Rosewood Abu Dhabi rooftop lounge at dusk with illuminated mushroom structures, bar seating, and city skyline views

Hotel Tagline: From Al Maryah Island's edge, the Arabian Gulf shifts from pale blue at dawn to gold by sunset.
Summary: Glo is where we'd tell a friend to go for a first evening in Abu Dhabi — the Gulf from Al Maryah's edge at last light is that kind of view. The rooms facing the water shift from pale blue at dawn to something close to gold by the time the sun drops.
Description ⚙: Dripping with luxurious, contemporary design and decor, the Rosewood Abu Dhabi is situated along the highly sought-after Arabian Gulf (which can be viewed from most rooms) on Al Maryah Island - the very heart of the new Abu Dhabi Financial Center. Here, guests can take part in extreme workouts at the in-house gym and relax at The Sense Spa afterward for some much-deserved downtime; or take a dip in the refreshing pool. Few do it better than Rosewood Abu Dhabi regarding meal times. Featuring a staggering eight restaurants in its midst, guests have a fantastic selection of cuisines from all across the world. For those stretching the clock, the fun continues at the La Cava, Glo, or Hidden Bar, where cocktails are a must-try.
Address: Zayed the First Street - Al Maryah Island - MI1 - Abu Dhabi - United Arab Emirates
Nearest Airports: AZI · Al Bateen Executive · 14 km; AUH · Abu Dhabi International · 35 km

Alt Text: The Abu Dhabi EDITION luxury suite with beige furnishings, wooden coffee table, and floor-to-ceiling windows overlooking the illuminated city skyline at night

Images.alt: The Abu Dhabi EDITION luxury suite with beige furnishings, wooden coffee table, and floor-to-ceiling windows overlooking the illuminated city skyline at night
The Abu Dhabi EDITION waterfront dining terrace with modern white architectural elements, wooden tables, rattan chairs, and views of the Arabian Gulf and city skyline
The Abu Dhabi EDITION pool with loungers, umbrellas, and city skyline views in Abu Dhabi

Hotel Tagline: Yachts and city light on the water, seen from a balcony over Al Bateen Marina.
Summary: We'd take a balcony room here over a higher floor anywhere else on this list. Al Bateen marina at night — yachts, city light on the water, the quiet movement of it all — is the kind of view you don't close the curtains on. The Annex rooftop is the right way to end the day.
Description ⚙: Planted in the yacht-filled Al Bateen Marina, The Abu Dhabi EDITION boutique hotel, guests will find a five-star gem that features elegant suites with scenic views over the Marina and Abu Dhabi Skyline from their balconies. Marble bathrooms, luxurious, contemporary finishes, and world-class services await all who check in to The Abu Dhabi EDITION.
Address: Marina - Al Bateen - W35 - Abu Dhabi - United Arab Emirates
Nearest Airports: AZI · Al Bateen Executive · 21 km; AUH · Abu Dhabi International · 37 km

Alt Text: Conrad Abu Dhabi Etihad Towers beachfront with white loungers, umbrellas, turquoise water, and modern curved architecture under blue sky

Hotel Tagline: From the Observation Deck at 300, the whole coastline unfolds at once.
Summary: The Observation Deck at 300 settles the question of Abu Dhabi's scale — you see the whole coastline at once, and it stays with you. The rooms below deliver a version of that same view with a bed in front of it. For sheer vertical drama, nothing else in the city comes close.
Description ⚙: Consisting of five luxuriously sculpted towers overlooking the stunning Arabian Gulf and glittering Abu Dhabi skyline, the Conrad Abu Dhabi Etihad Towers sets a precedent for what a lavish, five-star hotel in the UAE should be. Offering services such as spa treatments in its world-class Talise Spa, delectable dining at Rosewater (for the best hotel buffet breakfasts) along with several other eateries, and complimentary access to the iconic Observation Deck at 300 - guests will feel taken care of in these immaculate serviced apartments & suites.
Address: Corniche St - Al Bateen - W32 - Abu Dhabi - United Arab Emirates
Nearest Airports: AZI · Al Bateen Executive · 21 km; AUH · Abu Dhabi International · 37 km

Hotel: Park Hyatt Abu Dhabi Hotel and Villas
Alt Text: Park Hyatt Abu Dhabi beachfront with white umbrellas, loungers, pristine sand and turquoise Arabian Gulf waters under clear blue sky

Images.alt: Park Hyatt Abu Dhabi beachfront with white umbrellas, loungers, pristine sand and turquoise Arabian Gulf waters under clear blue sky

Hotel Tagline: White sand and the Arabian Gulf to the horizon, with the desert at the doorstep.
Summary: Saadiyat at its best — white sand, the Gulf to the horizon, and none of the urban density that follows you elsewhere. We'd book a villa, spend the morning at the infinity pool before the heat arrives, and make the ten-minute walk to the Louvre before dusk. The sequence works.
Description ⚙: When stepping into the Park Hyatt Abu Dhabi Hotel and Villas beach resort, guests receive world-class, five-star luxuries and treatments. At the same time, they step into a world of duality. We care to explain: there is a contrast between the glorious shores of Saadiyat in the hotel’s backyard and the golden sands of the Arabian desert on the doorstep. Doing a marvelous job of combining tradition with new-age culture, the Park Hyatt Abu Dhabi Hotel and Villas emulate a desert island sanctuary filled with total peace and relaxation. The 306 luxurious rooms, suites, and villas feature splendid views across the Arabian Gulf, pristine gardens, and infinity pools.
Address: Al Saadiyat Island - SDN1 - Abu Dhabi - United Arab Emirates
Nearest Airports: AZI · Al Bateen Executive · 24 km; AUH · Abu Dhabi International · 32 km

Alt Text: Family wading in shallow turquoise waters at Jumeirah Saadiyat Island Resort, Abu Dhabi, with white umbrellas and pristine beach visible

Jumeirah at Saadiyat Island Resort in Abu Dhabi: beachfront room with sheer curtains framing turquoise waters and sandy shore

Jumeirah at Saadiyat Island Resort dining area with striped pergola overlooking turquoise waters and white sandy beach in Abu Dhabi

Hotel Tagline: Open Gulf stretches to the horizon with nothing between you and it.
Summary: The ocean-view suites here face open Gulf with nothing between you and the horizon — and the Louvre Abu Dhabi is ten minutes on foot, which makes for an unexpectedly good afternoon. We'd pair a beach morning with the collection and call it a near-perfect day.
Description ⚙: An understated luxury lingers at the Jumeirah at Saadiyat Island Resort. It caters to everyone: from couples looking for a romantic retreat to families wanting to experience an unforgettable Abu Dhabi holiday together or luxury travelers searching for the next five-star escape. From modernly decorated suites featuring panoramic ocean views over the Arabian Gulf and a 400-meter natural beach to villas with private pools and complementary services, guests staying at this Saadiyat Island Resort Hotel will see their expectations surpassed. The top-notch beachfront hotel has seven unique restaurant and bar experiences, three spectacular pools to splash around in, and a spa that allows guests to disconnect for a few hours.
Address: Al Saadiyat Island - SDN3 - Abu Dhabi - United Arab Emirates
Nearest Airports: AZI · Al Bateen Executive · 26 km; AUH · Abu Dhabi International · 33 km

Hotel: Grand Hyatt Abu Dhabi Hotel & Residences Emirates Pearl
Alt Text: Grand Hyatt Abu Dhabi suite with cream furnishings, orange accents, and panoramic windows overlooking illuminated Emirates Palace at dusk

Images.alt: Grand Hyatt Abu Dhabi suite with cream furnishings, orange accents, and panoramic windows overlooking illuminated Emirates Palace at dusk

Hotel Tagline: From the infinity pool, Emirates Palace sits left, Qasr Al Watan beyond, the Corniche skyline framed between.
Summary: The infinity pool frames the Corniche skyline — Emirates Palace to the left, Qasr Al Watan in the distance — in a way that feels almost composed. We'd use this as a base for exploring the city and return each evening to that view. Quieter than the Corniche properties, and better value for it.
Description ⚙: Welcome to the Grand Hyatt Abu Dhabi Hotel & Residences Emirates Pearl, consistently ranked as one of the top hotels in Abu Dhabi. When enjoying the soaring views over the Arabian Gulf, West Corniche neighborhood, the Abu Dhabi Skyline, and Emirates Palace, guests feel as if they have completely stepped into the heart of Abu Dhabi. Here, one finds plenty of designer shopping experiences and trendy eateries surrounding the hotel - in the bustle of the Abu Dhabi Business District. The hotel features a 24-hour Wellness & Fitness club, a spectacular infinity pool overlooking the Arabian Gulf, a small private beach, and world-class dining & nightlife experience.
Address: West Corniche - Corniche Road - البطين - غرب 32 - أبو ظبي - United Arab Emirates
Nearest Airports: AZI · Al Bateen Executive · 22 km; AUH · Abu Dhabi International · 38 km

Hotel: Royal M Hotel & Resort Abu Dhabi
Alt Text: Luxurious beachfront hotel room at Royal M Hotel & Resort Abu Dhabi with turquoise waterfront views, modern furnishings and elegant coastal décor

Images.alt: Luxurious beachfront hotel room at Royal M Hotel & Resort Abu Dhabi with turquoise waterfront views, modern furnishings and elegant coastal décor
Aerial view of Royal M Hotel & Resort Abu Dhabi showing turquoise pools, beachfront location on Arabian Gulf with pristine sandy beach

Hotel Tagline: Yachts at anchor in Al Bateen Marina, the Abu Dhabi skyline rising behind them.
Summary: The marina view from the rooms here does what a good view should — it gives you something to watch. Yachts come and go, the city skyline sits behind them, and the window becomes the room's focal point without trying. A considered choice at a price that leaves room for the rest of the trip.
Description ⚙: Situated on the highly sought-after Al Bateen Marina, the Royal M Hotel & Resort Abu Dhabi will win visitors over with its distinguished services and luxuries. When choosing this as their temporary address in Abu Dhabi, guests can enjoy spectacular views of the Al Bateen Marina and the Abu Dhabi skyline from selected rooms, suites & villas, all adorned in an unprecedented contemporary chicness. Book some relaxing treatments at the bespoke in-house spa, dip in the irresistible infinity pool, or have a romantic sunset dinner on the beach. Without ever needing to leave the hotel premises, guests are invited to an abundance of gourmet dining experiences under one roof, from feasting at the decadent Mezze Dining Room, splashing out at the Celebrity Restaurant, to living it up on the beachfront Marina Bar and feeling suave at the Cuvee Bar.
Address: Al Bateen Marina King Abdullah Bin Abdulaziz Al Saud Street - شارع القُفَّال - البطين - غرب 35 - أبو ظبي - United Arab Emirates
Nearest Airports: AZI · Al Bateen Executive · 21 km; AUH · Abu Dhabi International · 37 km

Hotel: Martinhal Sagres Beach Family Resort Hotel
Alt Text: Martinhal Sagres Beach Family Resort with blue pool overlooking golden beach and turquoise waters, Algarve, Portugal

Images.alt: Martinhal Sagres Beach Family Resort with blue pool overlooking golden beach and turquoise waters, Algarve, Portugal
Martinhal Sagres Beach Family Resort Hotel dining area with beachfront views, Algarve Portugal

Hotel Tagline: Perched above rocky Atlantic cliffs, the restaurant looks out over Martinhal Beach and the islands beyond.
Summary: Direct access to Martinhal Beach, with the restaurant on a rise above the rocky Atlantic cliffs of Sagres — a different coastal texture from the sandy beaches further east. We’d book this for the family infrastructure, direct surf access, and proximity to Sagres Fortress.
Description ⚙: Designed with families in mind, the five-star Martinhal Sagres Beach Family Resort Hotel offers a haven where parents can truly relax while their children are entertained. Founded by Chitra and Roman Stern, the resort embodies their vision of allowing parents to enjoy a cappuccino with the foam still intact. Guests can embark on kayak trips to the nearby Martinhal islands just in front of the hotel. The restaurant, perched in an elevated position, offers glorious sea views that showcase the stunning rocky cliffs synonymous with Sagres. With direct access to Martinhal Beach, guests can quickly explore the Atlantic. History enthusiasts can also visit the historic Sagres Fortress and the town's rich association with the Portuguese Discoveries era.
Address: R. Baiona la Real Apartado 54, 8650-908 Sagres, Portugal
Nearest Airports: FAO · Faro · 120 km

Alt Text: Vila Vita Parc hotel perched on golden cliffs overlooking a pristine sandy beach and turquoise waters in Algarve, Portugal

Images.alt: Vila Vita Parc hotel perched on golden cliffs overlooking a pristine sandy beach and turquoise waters in Algarve, Portugal

Couple exercising with dumbbells on a sunny terrace overlooking the ocean at Vila Vita Parc, Algarve

Hotel Tagline: Clifftop gardens fall away to nothing but Atlantic from every private terrace.
Summary: Fifty-four acres of subtropical gardens on a cliff above the Atlantic, with every room and suite carrying its own sea-view terrace. Request a clifftop villa for an infinity pool over the water. Two Michelin stars at Ocean Restaurant make a dinner reservation the other essential booking.
Description ⚙: Set on 54 acres of subtropical gardens above the Atlantic in Porches, Vila Vita Parc is a member of The Leading Hotels of the World and one of Portugal's most comprehensive five-star resorts. Every room and suite carries a private terrace facing the sea or the gardens; clifftop villas feature private infinity pools. Ocean Restaurant, helmed by Chef Hans Neuner, holds two Michelin stars. The Sisley Paris spa is the first of its kind in Portugal. A private beach, Praia dos Tremoços, is directly accessible from the resort, and the Armação Beach Club is a short shuttle ride away.
Address: R. Anneliese Pohl, Alporchinhos, 8400-450 Porches, Portugal
Nearest Airports: FAO · Faro · 57 km

Alt Text: Vila Joya, Algarve: Beachfront terrace with woven pendant lights, lounge seating, and panoramic ocean views

Images.alt: Vila Joya, Algarve: Beachfront terrace with woven pendant lights, lounge seating, and panoramic ocean views
Vila Joya bedroom in Algarve with ocean view, carved wooden headboard, white bedding, and terrace overlooking the sea
Vila Joya, Algarve: Beachfront terrace with wicker chairs, dining table, and panoramic ocean view framed by white curtains
Vila Joya, Algarve: Beachfront terrace with wicker seating, breakfast table, palm trees, and views of golden cliffs and turquoise Mediterranean waters

Hotel Tagline: Cliffside above Praia da Galé, every room facing southwest into the Atlantic sunset.
Summary: Thirteen rooms in a Moorish cliffside villa above Praia da Galé — every one faces southwest for the sunset. Chef Dieter Koschina’s two-Michelin-star restaurant has held its distinction since 1995. Suite Joia’s two sea-view terraces, one with a Jacuzzi, are the rooms worth staying for.
Description ⚙: Perched above the golden sands of Praia da Galé west of Albufeira, Vila Joya is a Moorish-style villa with 13 rooms and suites — all facing southwest, guaranteeing an Atlantic view and a sunset from every accommodation. The two-Michelin-star restaurant, helmed by Austrian chef Dieter Koschina and holding its distinction since 1995, anchors the experience; the tasting menu changes daily and is paired from a wine cellar of 12,000 bottles. Suite Joia features two sea-view terraces, one with a Jacuzzi. The Royal Suite Alegria spans 140 sq m with a private garden and heated plunge pool. The spa includes a rooftop sauna, floating room, and Turkish bath. Open March to November.
Address: Estrada da Galé, 8200-416 Albufeira, Portugal
Nearest Airports: FAO · Faro · 53 km

Hotel: The Westin Salgados Beach Resort, Algarve
Alt Text: The Westin Salgados Beach Resort pool overlooking the Algarve coastline with palm trees and loungers

Images.alt: The Westin Salgados Beach Resort pool overlooking the Algarve coastline with palm trees and loungers
The Westin Salgados Beach Resort bedroom with sea view balcony overlooking palm trees and ocean, Algarve

Hotel Tagline: Above the dunes, the balcony looks out over Salgados Beach and the Atlantic.
Summary: The Junior Suite with Sea View delivers a wide balcony above the dunes, gardens, and Salgados Beach. Six outdoor pools serve different moods during the day, and the Rooftop Salgados Lounge @14 earns the evening — panoramic views of the surrounding coast with a cocktail in hand.
Description ⚙: Planted in the prestigious Herdade dos Salgados in Albufeira, the five-star The Westin Salgados Beach Resort, Algarve presents a haven of luxury and tranquility. The hotel offers a direct pathway over the dunes to Salgados Beach. The Junior Suite with Sea View features a balcony with vistas of the gardens, pool, and Atlantic Ocean. Six outdoor pools serve different moods during the day. Salgados Golf, one of the finest 18-hole golf courses in Southern Europe, is a five-minute walk from the hotel. The Rooftop Salgados Lounge @14 offers panoramic views of the surrounding coast.
Address: Herdade dos Salgados, Guia, Rua da Boca da Alagoa, 8200-424 Albufeira, Portugal
Nearest Airports: FAO · Faro · 53 km

Alt Text: Aerial view of VidaMar Resort Hotel Algarve showing curved pool with loungers, palm trees, and sandy beach with ocean beyond

Images.alt: Aerial view of VidaMar Resort Hotel Algarve showing curved pool with loungers, palm trees, and sandy beach with ocean beyond
VidaMar Resort Hotel Algarve: Modern balcony with woven chairs overlooking pool, palm trees, and Mediterranean sea under blue sky

Hotel Tagline: Open Atlantic stretches unbroken from balconies beside a living nature reserve.
Summary: Positioned beside a nature reserve in the exclusive Herdade dos Salgados, VidaMar is a serious oceanfront address. The Club Rooms & Suites come with expansive balconies facing open water and exclusive access to MarClub, the adults-only area. The Ocean Restaurant breakfast frames the Atlantic.
Description ⚙: Situated in the exclusive Herdade dos Salgados, VidaMar Resort Hotel Algarve stands as a five-star oceanfront retreat next to a biodiverse nature reserve. The Club Rooms and Suites feature expansive balconies with unobstructed Atlantic Ocean views and exclusive access to MarClub, a premium adults-only area. The Ocean Restaurant serves breakfast with breathtaking ocean views. The spa circuit includes a pool, jacuzzi, sauna, Turkish bath, ice fountain, and cold-water bath.
Address: Estr. dos Salgados 1, 8200-424 Guia, Portugal
Nearest Airports: FAO · Faro · 54 km

Hotel: Kimpton Atlantico Algarve, an IHG Hotel
Alt Text: Aerial view of Praia da Senhora da Rocha beach in Algarve with golden cliffs, turquoise waters, and white buildings nestled in the landscape

Images.alt: Aerial view of Praia da Senhora da Rocha beach in Algarve with golden cliffs, turquoise waters, and white buildings nestled in the landscape
Kimpton Atlantico Algarve suite with ocean views, red chairs, bed, and balcony overlooking palm trees and Algarve coastline
Kimpton Atlantico Algarve balcony with woven chairs overlooking palm trees, beach and turquoise Atlantic Ocean, Algarve Portugal

Hotel Tagline: From every balcony, sea cliffs and São Rafael's waves or garden green.
Summary: Every room has a balcony — either facing the gardens or the sea cliffs and waves of São Rafael Beach, one of the Algarve’s more secluded stretches. The Arabian Sea Bar on the upper level is the room for sundowners. A direct wooden pathway to the beach removes any friction from the stay.
Description ⚙: Next to São Rafael Beach, renowned for its rugged beauty and secluded character, Kimpton Atlantico Algarve provides a five-star retreat with a direct wooden pathway connecting the hotel to the golden sands. Every room and suite features a balcony, offering views of the gardens or the sea cliffs and waves of São Rafael Beach. The hotel provides two indoor pools, three circular outdoor pools, and a well-equipped gym. The Arabian Sea Bar is positioned to witness glorious sunsets over the Atlantic.
Address: R. dos Corais, 8200-613 Albufeira, Portugal
Nearest Airports: FAO · Faro · 51 km

Alt Text: W Algarve coastal resort with manicured lawn, lounge seating, pine trees, and overlooking the calm Mediterranean Sea

Images.alt: W Algarve coastal resort with manicured lawn, lounge seating, pine trees, and overlooking the calm Mediterranean Sea
W Algarve rooftop terrace overlooking the Mediterranean Sea with lounge chairs and pool in Algarve, Portugal
W Algarve luxury suite in Portugal with ocean view balcony, modern furnishings, and Mediterranean coastal scenery
Aerial view of W Algarve's coastal location showing golden cliffs, turquoise waters, sandy beach, and lush vegetation in Algarve

Hotel Tagline: West-facing windows hold the Atlantic until the sun drops below it.
Summary: The duplex WOW suites — with private rooftop pools over the Atlantic — are what distinguish W Algarve from the standard five-star resort offer. Ask for a west-facing room to anchor the sunset properly. Paper Moon’s terrace and the WET Deck infinity pool fill the hours between.
Description ⚙: W Algarve opened in 2022 as a contemporary five-star boutique hotel close to Balbina, Evaristo, Castelo, and Coelha beaches. All 134 rooms and suites face west to capture the Atlantic sunsets. The duplex WOW suites feature rooftop infinity pools with panoramic ocean views. The WET Deck infinity pool provides an elevated ocean position. Paper Moon Italian restaurant, originating in Milan, serves on a terrace facing the Atlantic. The fitness centre combines outdoor and indoor spaces with Technogym equipment.
Address: Estrada da Galé Sesmarias - CX Postal 290, H, 8200-385 Albufeira, Portugal
Nearest Airports: FAO · Faro · 53 km

Alt Text: Two guests enjoy breakfast on a sunny terrace at EPIC SANA Algarve Hotel with ocean and coastal views in the background

Images.alt: Two guests enjoy breakfast on a sunny terrace at EPIC SANA Algarve Hotel with ocean and coastal views in the background
Beach club at EPIC SANA Algarve Hotel with thatched umbrellas, wooden loungers, and ocean view in Algarve, Portugal
Wooden boardwalk descending through red cliff faces to a sandy beach cove in the Algarve, Portugal
Spacious bedroom at EPIC SANA Algarve Hotel with panoramic windows overlooking the Algarve landscape and coastline, featuring modern furnishings and warm wood accents

Hotel Tagline: Pine forest in the foreground, sea beyond — the 4th floor frames both.
Summary: Adjacent to Falésia Beach — rated the world’s best beach by TripAdvisor in 2024 — and connected by a 10-minute walk through pinewood. The 4th-floor rooms with balconies are the sea-view rooms to request; the pinewood foreground gives the view a depth that pure oceanfront rooms rarely have.
Description ⚙: Situated adjacent to Falésia Beach — ranked the world's best beach by TripAdvisor in 2024 — EPIC SANA Algarve Hotel offers an idyllic seaside retreat in a pinewood setting. The 4th-floor rooms with balconies deliver sea views framed by the surrounding pine forest, a distinctive combination unique to this property. A suspended wooden bridge connects the hotel to Falésia Beach. The Al Quimia fine dining restaurant holds a consistent reputation as one of the Algarve's best culinary experiences. Three outdoor adult pools, two outdoor kids pools, and an indoor pool complete the amenities.
Address: Pinhal do Concelho, Praia da Falésia, 8200-593 Albufeira, Portugal
Nearest Airports: FAO · Faro · 38 km

Hotel: Pine Cliffs Hotel, a Luxury Collection Resort, Algarve
Alt Text: Pine Cliffs Hotel luxury bedroom with sea view terrace overlooking the Algarve coastline and sailboat on blue ocean waters

Hotel Tagline: Ochre cliffs fall to the Atlantic below, the ocean filling every ocean-view window from height.
Summary: Set on ochre cliffs above Falésia Beach, Pine Cliffs spans 72 hectares with every ocean-view room positioned to face the Atlantic from height. The cliff-edge Mirador Champagne Bar is the unhurried spot at the end of any day. Maré at beach level handles lunch with the waves arriving close.
Description ⚙: Set on ochre cliffs above Falésia Beach, Pine Cliffs Hotel spans 72 hectares of resort grounds with every ocean-view room positioned to face the Atlantic. A Luxury Collection Resort since its inception in 1992, the hotel underwent an extensive renovation overseen by London-based designer Lynne Hunt, reopening in 2016. The resort includes a scenic 9-hole golf course where the Devil's Parlour hole carries 197 metres over the cliffs. Maré restaurant sits at beach level, serving seafood on a wooden deck directly above the sand. The Mirador Champagne Bar occupies the clifftop with unobstructed Atlantic panoramas. The Serenity Spa and Porto Pirata, one of the region's largest kids clubs, are on site.
Address: Praia da Falésia, 8200-912 Albufeira, Portugal
Nearest Airports: FAO · Faro · 38 km

Hotel: Bela Vista Hotel & Spa — Relais & Châteaux
Alt Text: Bela Vista Hotel & Spa rooftop dining terrace overlooking the Algarve coastline at sunset, with white-draped tables and ocean views

Hotel Tagline: Balconies above Praia da Rocha, the Atlantic held in the afternoon light.
Summary: The Algarve’s first hotel, built in 1918, now a Relais & Châteaux member with 38 individually decorated rooms above Praia da Rocha. Junior Suite Sea View is the category worth requesting — balcony above the beach, afternoon light. Vista Restaurant holds a Michelin star and faces west.
Description ⚙: The Algarve's first hotel, built in 1918, the Bela Vista Hotel & Spa occupies a Moorish-style mansion above Praia da Rocha in Portimão. A Relais & Châteaux member since 2013, the property holds 38 individually decorated rooms and suites across three distinct houses. Most rooms feature Atlantic Ocean views from private balconies; the Palace building rooms are adorned with hand-painted Portuguese tiles. Vista Restaurant holds a Michelin star and serves on a west-facing terrace directly above the beach. The spa is operated with L'Occitane products. Adults-only throughout the season; open mid-February to late November.
Address: Av. Tomás Cabreira, 8500-802 Portimão, Portugal
Nearest Airports: FAO · Faro · 76 km

Hotel Tagline: South-facing rooms open onto the Atlantic; north-facing rooms look straight into the marina.
Summary: Two distinct views from the same address: south-facing rooms look over open Atlantic, north-facing rooms look directly into Vilamoura’s marina. Higher floors on the south side are the right call for the oceanic view. The Purobeach beachfront area and direct marina access cover the rest of the day.
Description ⚙: The Tivoli Marina Vilamoura offers guests two distinct views: south-facing rooms look over the open Atlantic Ocean, while north-facing rooms look directly into Vilamoura's marina. Higher floors on the south side deliver the clearest oceanic sightlines. The hotel has been a beacon of luxury in the Algarve for years, constantly renovating to maintain its standing. The Purobeach Vilamoura beachfront area provides direct beach access with sun loungers and dining. The hotel's proximity to Vilamoura's Marina ensures excellent dining options within walking distance.
Address: Marina de Vilamoura, 8125-901 Faro, Portugal
Nearest Airports: FAO · Faro · 28 km

Hotel Tagline: Rooftop views sweep across Faro's city and the Ria Formosa beyond.
Summary: Not a beach hotel — the draw here is the rooftop infinity pool with sweeping views over Faro and the Ria Formosa, and the Hábito restaurant’s city-facing terrace. The Michelin Key distinction earned in 2025 confirms the calibre. An easy base for the ferry to the barrier islands.
Description ⚙: 3HB Faro opened in June 2021 as the first five-star hotel in Faro's city centre, earning a Michelin Key distinction in 2025. Interior designer Paulo Lobo, based in Porto, conceived the urban-chic aesthetic throughout the 103 rooms. The rooftop infinity pool delivers sweeping panoramic views over Faro and the Ria Formosa. The Hábito restaurant, specializing in Mediterranean cuisine inspired by Algarve traditions, occupies the rooftop with city-facing views. The hotel provides easy access to Faro's historic downtown and the ferry to the Ria Formosa barrier islands.
Address: R. Vasco da Gama 33 Rooftop, 8000-442 Faro, Portugal
Nearest Airports: FAO · Faro · 11 km

Hotel Tagline: Rooftop plunge pools look out over open ocean and protected parkland in the same unbroken sweep.
Summary: A 220-hectare estate on the Costa Vicentina, set back from some of the Algarve’s least-visited beaches. The rooftop suites are the definitive choice — each has a private plunge pool and a panorama that takes in the ocean and the protected landscape in the same sweep.
Description ⚙: Situated on a 220-hectare estate within the Vicentina Coast Natural Park near Aljezur, Praia do Canal Nature Retreat — a Small Luxury Hotels of the World member — provides access to some of the Algarve's least-visited beaches including Arrifana, Canal, and Bordeira. The rooftop suites each feature a private marble plunge pool with panoramic views of the ocean and the protected landscape. The Azeitona restaurant pays homage to traditional Alentejo and Algarve cuisines using local seasonal produce. The award-winning Esteva Spa offers soothing views of the surrounding nature.
Address: Herdade Vale dos Polvos, 8670-156 Aljezur, Portugal
Nearest Airports: FAO · Faro · 106 km

Hotel Tagline: 360-degree views sweep from Algarve countryside to mountains to the distant ocean.
Summary: A farmhouse retreat inland, 20 minutes from Faro, where the Lounge Terrace Suite stands out with 360-degree views across the countryside and the distant ocean. The À TERRA restaurant draws on its own herb garden. Following a major renovation completed in 2025, the property has been refreshed.
Description ⚙: Cradled in the serene countryside of the Algarve 20 minutes from Faro Airport, the five-star Octant Vila Monte offers a peaceful farmhouse retreat following a major renovation completed in 2025. The crown jewel is the Lounge Terrace Suite, captivating guests with 360-degree views of the surrounding countryside, mountains, and distant ocean. The À TERRA restaurant draws on the property's own herb garden for its honest, flavourful cooking. Guests can access Fuzeta Island in the Ria Formosa via a daily summer shuttle and boat service.
Address: Sitio dos, 8700-069 Moncarapacho, Portugal
Nearest Airports: FAO · Faro · 29 km

Hotel Tagline: From the second and third floors, sunrise breaks over the Guadiana River with Spain on the opposite bank.
Summary: A restored 1926 Belle Époque mansion at the Algarve’s easternmost point, facing the Guadiana River with Spain directly across the water. Rooms on the second and third floors face east for the sunrise over the river and the marina. The hotel’s Beach Club adds Atlantic access a short shuttle away.
Description ⚙: Situated in Vila Real de Santo António at the easternmost point of the Algarve, the Bordoy Grand House Algarve is a restored 1926 Belle Époque mansion — the first five-star hotel in the historic town. The property offers direct views of the Guadiana River and Spain on the opposite bank. Second and third floor rooms face east, providing an ideal vantage point for sunrise over the river and marina. The hotel's Beach Club, a short shuttle drive away, features an infinity pool above the river mouth. The charming, fully-restored boutique hotel, owned by the Bordoy Hotels group, combines Art Nouveau elements with contemporary comforts.
Address: Av. da República 171, 8900-203 Vila Real de Santo António, Portugal
Nearest Airports: FAO · Faro · 70 km

Images.alt: Monchique Resort & Spa infinity pool overlooking forested Algarve hills at golden hour, with loungers and umbrellas
Monchique Resort & Spa bedroom in Algarve with terrace overlooking vineyard landscape under blue sky

Hotel Tagline: From mountain terraces above the coastal plain, the sea appears on clear days.
Summary: The only mountain address on this page: positioned in the Monchique range above the coastal plain, with panoramic terraces that reach to the sea on clear days. The Caldas spring waters run through the spa. Serra restaurant draws on local mountain ingredients. Fóia, at 902 metres, is a short drive.
Description ⚙: Planted in the rugged Monchique mountain range, the Monchique Resort & Spa offers a tranquil inland retreat above the coastal plain. This mountain haven is renowned for its pristine environment and access to one of Europe's most alkaline spring water sources — the Caldas waters. Suites offer balconies and private panoramic terraces with sun loungers facing the mountains, with the sea visible on clear days. The Serra restaurant draws on local mountain ingredients and regional traditions. Part of the Natura 2000 Network, the resort is also a destination for cyclists. The nearby Fóia viewpoint at 902 metres above sea level is the highest point in the Algarve.
Address: Lugar do Montinho, 8550-232, Portugal
Nearest Airports: FAO · Faro · 82 km

Images.alt: Cascade Wellness Resort luxury bedroom in Algarve with four-poster bed, terrace overlooking coastal landscape and archways
Cascade Wellness Resort, Algarve: Curved pool with red umbrellas, palm trees, lounge chairs, and sea view across manicured lawns

Hotel Tagline: Clifftop above the Atlantic, where the light arrives from both sides of the day.
Summary: A clifftop Lagos resort organized across five wings inspired by the Descobrimentos. Rooms on the upper floors catch Atlantic light from both angles; sunsets are unhurried from the balcony. The Senses Restaurant and spa circuit — sauna, Turkish bath, ice fountain — earn a second evening.
Description ⚙: Located in the coastal town of Lagos, Cascade Wellness Resort offers a clifftop retreat organized across five wings inspired by the Portuguese Descobrimentos. Upper-floor rooms and suites deliver Atlantic Ocean views with both sunrise and sunset angles. The hotel sits near Porto de Mós Beach and is within 30 minutes' walk of Dona Ana Beach. The Boavista Golf Course with panoramic sea views is easily accessible. The Senses Restaurant serves fine dining, while the spa includes a sauna, jacuzzi, Turkish bath, and ice fountain. The resort features state-of-the-art Technogym equipment in its fitness centre.
Address: R. das Ilhas, 8600-513 Lagos, Portugal
Nearest Airports: FAO · Faro · 94 km

Hotel Tagline: From a promontory above the Gulf of Salerno, the infinity pool's edge meets open sea below.
Summary: A former 17th-century Dominican monastery on a Conca dei Marini promontory, with 20 rooms over the Gulf of Salerno. Deluxe Terrace suites go furthest toward the horizon. The infinity pool carved into Monte San Pancrazio and Michelin-starred Il Refettorio’s terrace are the two standout views.
Description ⚙: Monastero Santa Rosa Hotel & Spa is a five-star boutique hotel in a 17th-century former Dominican monastery in Conca dei Marini, on a promontory between Praiano and Amalfi. The 20 rooms and suites face the Gulf of Salerno; Deluxe Terrace suites provide the clearest sightline to the horizon. The infinity pool is carved into Monte San Pancrazio, with the Gulf visible directly below its edge — the sensation of swimming above the sea is immediate. Michelin-starred Il Refettorio, led by chef Alfonso Crescenzo, occupies a panoramic terrace above the water with a seasonal Mediterranean menu sourced from the monastery's own garden. The spa uses the original monastery vaults, including an 80-square-metre double-height vaulted space. The Path of the Gods trail begins near the property.
Address: Via Roma, 2, 84010 Conca dei Marini SA, Italy
Nearest Airports: SUF · Salerno · 46 km; NAP · Naples · 65 km

Hotel Tagline: Seventy metres above the beach, with Positano's stacked hillside houses filling the view.
Summary: The Sersale family opened these doors in 1951, and what began as a private villa still feels like one. All 58 rooms face the sea and Positano’s stacked hillside houses. La Sponda, lit each evening by four hundred candles, holds a Michelin star; the Don’t Worry Bar spins vinyl until late. The pool is framed by lemon trees.
Description ⚙: Le Sirenuse is a five-star hotel in Positano, opened by the Sersale family in 1951 in their private villa, 70 metres above the beach. All 58 rooms face the Tyrrhenian Sea, Positano's stacked hillside houses, and the dome of the Chiesa di Santa Maria Assunta. Michelin-starred La Sponda, led by chef Gennaro Russo, is lit each evening by four hundred candles on a sea-view terrace. The Don't Worry Music Bar, in its current vinyl DJ format since 2024, occupies the heart of the hotel. Aldo's Cocktail Bar and Seafood Grill is a further sea-view dining option. The pool is framed by lemon trees. Boat excursions depart from below. Recommended rooms: any sea-facing category; Junior Suites and above for the largest terraces.
Address: Via Cristoforo Colombo, 30, 84017 Positano SA, Italy
Nearest Airports: NAP · Naples · 64 km

Hotel Tagline: Every room on this clifftop faces open sea, the coastline curving toward Praiano.
Summary: A clifftop property south of Positano where every room faces the sea. Room 59 — the Virginia Suite — is the one to request. A lift reaches the beach club in under a minute; the half-moon pool looks toward Praiano. Zass, the Michelin-starred restaurant, does not allow mobile phones inside.
Description ⚙: Il San Pietro di Positano is a five-star boutique hotel on a cliff south of Positano where every room and suite faces the sea and the rugged coastline. Suite 59, the Virginia Suite, is the most photographed room on the property — the room to request. A hotel lift reaches the private beach club in a natural cove in under one minute; orange sun loungers line the exclusive waterfront. The half-moon pool faces Praiano. The tennis court sits between the rocks and the sea. Michelin-starred Zass prohibits mobile phones during service and draws on an organic garden for its ingredients. A complimentary shuttle reaches Positano centre in five minutes.
Address: Via Laurito, 2, 84017 Positano SA, Italy
Nearest Airports: NAP · Naples · 63 km

Hotel Tagline: Valleys, coastline, and the Gulf of Salerno — all visible from 365 metres up.
Summary: Belmond’s 11th-century Ravello palace, 365 metres above the sea, with 50 rooms overlooking the valleys and the coast below. The heated infinity pool mirrors sky and mountains in equal measure — among the most photographed on the Amalfi Coast. Ristorante Belvedere shares the elevation. In summer, complimentary cruises run to Amalfi and Positano.
Description ⚙: Caruso, A Belmond Hotel, Amalfi Coast is a five-star hotel in an 11th-century palace in Ravello, 365 metres above the sea. The 50 rooms and suites overlook the Gulf of Salerno, Minori, Maiori, and the surrounding mountains. The heated infinity pool mirrors sky and mountains simultaneously and is among the most photographed on the Amalfi Coast. Ristorante Belvedere serves Italian cuisine at the same panoramic elevation and is open to non-guests by reservation. In summer, complimentary cruises and shuttles run to Amalfi and Positano below. The wellness centre and spa complete the on-site offer.
Address: Piazza S. Giovanni del Toro, 2, 84010 Ravello SA, Italy
Nearest Airports: NAP · Naples · 61 km; SUF · Salerno · 63 km

Hotel Tagline: Thirty-seven rooms on the Vettica Maggiore cliffs, every window open to the sea toward Positano.
Summary: Thirty-seven rooms on the Vettica Maggiore cliffs, all facing the open sea toward Positano. Un Piano Nel Cielo — a floor in the sky — is the fine-dining restaurant at the top; La Gavitella beach is reached by the hotel’s own boat and reserved for guests alone. The Angelina Suite has a Philippe Starck bathroom and a full sea terrace.
Description ⚙: Casa Angelina is a five-star boutique hotel on the Vettica Maggiore cliffs in Praiano, with 37 rooms all facing the open sea toward Positano. The property underwent significant renovation in 2022. The top-floor Angelina Suite features a bathroom designed by Philippe Starck and a large sea terrace. Un Piano Nel Cielo — a floor in the sky — is the fine-dining restaurant at the top of the property. La Gavitella beach is reserved exclusively for hotel guests and accessible by the private boat Master Angelina. In 2022, a new chef's table experience was added. A complimentary shuttle runs to Positano, approximately 10 minutes away.
Address: Via Gennaro Capriglione, 147, 84010 Praiano SA, Italy
Nearest Airports: SUF · Salerno · 56 km

Hotel Tagline: Wisteria-draped above the Tyrrhenian, with the sea visible from every floor.
Summary: An Amalfi landmark above its own beach club and saltwater pool, with rooms offering partial or complete sea views. Michelin-starred Glicine overlooks the water from its wisteria-draped veranda. Senzafine, a rooftop sushi and Mediterranean grill, opened in June 2025 as a second sea-view option.
Description ⚙: Hotel Santa Caterina is a five-star hotel in Amalfi with a 145-year history. Rooms offer partial or complete sea views. A panoramic lift provides direct access to Amalfi town centre. Michelin-starred Glicine has held its star since 2020; chef Giuseppe Stanzione's menu fuses Campanian cuisine with eastern technique on a wisteria-draped veranda above the sea. In June 2025, the hotel opened Senzafine, a rooftop Mediterranean grill and sushi bar with sea views — the second starred-kitchen dining option. Restaurant Al Mare sits at sea level with Tyrrhenian views. The beach club is accessible by lifts carved into the cliff rock, with a saltwater heated pool. Recommended rooms: sea-view categories on higher floors for unobstructed sightlines.
Address: Via Mauro Comite, 9, 84011 Amalfi SA, Italy
Nearest Airports: SUF · Salerno · 45 km; NAP · Naples · 67 km

Hotel: Anantara Convento di Amalfi Grand Hotel
Alt Text: Anantara Convento di Amalfi terrace at sunset with Mediterranean Sea view, Amalfi Coast village, appetizers and wine

Hotel Tagline: Eighty metres above Amalfi, the infinity pool meets the Mediterranean at the horizon.
Summary: A 13th-century Cappuccini monastery, 80 metres above Amalfi, rebranded as Anantara in 2023 without losing its Baroque church or cloister views. The infinity pool faces the sea; a sunshine butler handles the sunscreen. The Suite Del Priore has original ceiling frescoes alongside sea and cloister vistas.
Description ⚙: Anantara Convento di Amalfi Grand Hotel is a five-star hotel in a 13th-century monastery 80 metres above Amalfi, rebranded as Anantara in 2023. The 52 rooms and suites face either the Mediterranean coast or the preserved cloisters. The infinity pool faces the sea with a sunshine butler service. The Baroque church within the property remains intact and is available for visits. The Suite Del Priore features original ceiling frescoes alongside sea and cloister views. The on-site restaurant is open to non-guest reservations. The hotel is accessible from Amalfi town centre via a cliff-side lift.
Address: SS163, 8, 84011 Amalfi SA, Italy
Nearest Airports: SUF · Salerno · 45 km; NAP · Naples · 67 km

Hotel Tagline: Perched directly above Amalfi's beach, the rooftop pool looks out across the full sweep of the coast.
Summary: The Gargano family’s white-facade hotel, positioned directly over Amalfi’s beach. The rooftop pool gives a front-row view of the coast; the 60-square-metre Master Suite has two expansive balconies and hand-painted Vietri floor tiles. Terrazza 17 faces the port by candlelight.
Description ⚙: Hotel Marina Riviera is a four-star hotel in Amalfi managed by the Gargano family, its white facade positioned directly above Amalfi's beach. The 34 rooms and suites blend modern comforts with handmade Vietri sul Mare ceramics. The rooftop pool provides front-row views of the coast. The 60-square-metre Master Suite has two expansive balconies and hand-painted Vietri ceramic tile floors. Terrazza 17 faces the Amalfi port by candlelight. The hotel is steps from the Duomo Cathedral Square.
Address: Via Pantaleone Comite, 19, 84011 Amalfi SA, Italy
Nearest Airports: SUF · Salerno · 45 km; NAP · Naples · 67 km

Hotel Tagline: Positano, the sea, and the Li Galli islands fill the view from five private villas.
Summary: Five private villas just outside Positano, each with direct views of the village, the sea, and the Li Galli islands. The property was once Franco Zeffirelli’s residence. In season, a boat shuttle runs hourly from Positano pier to an exclusive beach club at Laurito, with a restaurant at the water’s edge.
Description ⚙: Villa Treville is a five-star villa property just outside Positano, formerly the private residence of film and opera director Franco Zeffirelli. Five villas offer one, two, or three-bedroom luxury suites with direct views of Positano, the sea, and the Li Galli islands. Select villas include plunge pools, terraced gardens, and private panoramic terraces. An alfresco gym with Technogym equipment is available. In season, a boat shuttle runs hourly from Positano pier to an exclusive beach club at Laurito, with a restaurant at the water's edge. Recommended: two or three-bedroom villas for the largest terraces and the clearest sightline to Positano.
Address: Via Arienzo, 30, 84017 Positano SA, Italy
Nearest Airports: NAP · Naples · 64 km

Hotel Tagline: From the highest rooftop in Positano, the view spans Amalfi to the Li Galli islands.
Summary: The highest rooftop pool in Positano, with a 360-degree view from Amalfi to Punta Campanella and the Li Galli islands. Below, the Michelin-starred Li Galli restaurant — its star awarded in 2021 — occupies a seven-table room with a glass ceiling. We’d book a Deluxe Special for the sea-view balcony.
Description ⚙: Hotel Villa Franca is a five-star boutique hotel in Positano with 37 rooms and suites. The rooftop pool is the highest in Positano, offering 360-degree views from Amalfi to Punta Campanella and the Li Galli islands. Michelin-starred Li Galli restaurant received its star in 2021; chef Savio Perna leads a seven-table glass-ceiling room with sea views and a Campanian-rooted menu. The GOLD Sky Lounge rooftop bar adds a second elevated sea-view space. Recommended room: Deluxe Special for the private sea-view balcony.
Address: Viale Pasitea, 318, 84017 Positano SA, Italy
Nearest Airports: NAP · Naples · 65 km

Hotel Tagline: Two pools hang above Spiaggia Grande, the Li Galli islands beyond.
Summary: Directly above Spiaggia Grande, with 66 rooms and two pools looking straight down to the beach and the Li Galli islands. The heated pool sits close enough to the sand that the boundary blurs. The Covo restaurant overlooks the bay; a private yacht handles deeper-coast excursions.
Description ⚙: Covo Dei Saraceni is a five-star hotel in Positano with 66 rooms positioned directly above Spiaggia Grande. Two pools overlook the beach: the heated pool blurs the visual boundary with the sand below, while the second infinity pool faces the Li Galli islands. Restaurant The Covo overlooks the bay. Cooking classes are offered on site. A private luxury yacht is available for coastal excursions. Recommended: Junior Suite with terrace on upper floors for the strongest downward view to Spiaggia Grande.
Address: Via Regina Giovanna, 5, 84017 Positano SA, Italy
Nearest Airports: NAP · Naples · 65 km

Hotel Tagline: From an elevated position above Positano, terrace rooms face the church dome and Spiaggia Grande.
Summary: An elevated position above Positano’s vertical village, with sea-view terrace rooms facing the church dome and the beach. The pool sits among carob trees; Il Tridente restaurant faces the same panorama. The kitchen reads Neapolitan gastronomy with strong vegan and vegetarian options.
Description ⚙: Hotel Poseidon is a four-star hotel elevated above Positano's vertical village. Sea-view terrace rooms face the church dome of Santa Maria Assunta and Spiaggia Grande. The pool is set among carob trees. Il Tridente restaurant delivers Neapolitan gastronomy with dedicated vegan and vegetarian menus and an extensive wine cellar. Recommended: sea-view terrace rooms on upper floors for the clearest sightline to the dome and the beach.
Address: Viale Pasitea, 148, 84017 Positano SA, Italy
Nearest Airports: NAP · Naples · 64 km

Hotel Tagline: From the rooftop, Li Galli, Praiano, and Punta Licosa stretch unobstructed across the sea.
Summary: A family-owned boutique on the hillside above Positano, 28 rooms strong. Junior suites have panoramic balconies facing the sea; the rooftop gives an unobstructed line to Li Galli, Praiano, and Punta Licosa. Adamo ed Eva, the main restaurant, pairs Mediterranean cooking with the same panorama.
Description ⚙: Hotel Eden Roc Suites is a four-star family-owned boutique hotel on the hillside above Positano with 28 rooms and suites. Junior suites have panoramic balconies facing the sea. The rooftop offers an unobstructed sightline to Li Galli, Praiano, and Punta Licosa. Restaurant Adamo ed Eva serves Mediterranean cuisine with the same panorama. A sky bar and Roc Pizza & Steak complete the dining offer. Recommended: any Junior Suite or above for the panoramic balcony.
Address: V. G. Marconi, 110, 84017 Positano SA, Italy
Nearest Airports: NAP · Naples · 64 km

Hotel Tagline: From the rooftop pool, the Li Galli islands and Fornillo Tower sit directly across the water.
Summary: Eighteen rooms in a compact boutique above Positano’s Fornillo Beach, with views toward the tower and the Li Galli islands. Deluxe Special suites have a private terrace large enough for a hot tub. Terrace Regina is where breakfast arrives with the full panorama; the rooftop pool faces the same direction.
Description ⚙: Hotel Punta Regina is a four-star boutique hotel in Positano with 18 rooms and suites above Fornillo Beach. Sea views are available from all categories except the standard room. Deluxe Special suites have a large private terrace accommodating an outdoor hot tub with sea views. Terrace Regina on the rooftop is the setting for breakfast with the full panorama. The rooftop pool faces the Li Galli islands and Fornillo Tower. Recommended: Deluxe Special for the terrace hot tub and the clearest unobstructed view.
Address: Viale Pasitea, 224, 84017 Positano SA, Italy
Nearest Airports: NAP · Naples · 64 km

Hotel Tagline: From the rooftop and poolside, the Tyrrhenian Sea fills the horizon over Praiano's centre.
Summary: A family-run four-star in Praiano’s centre, built around an Aragonese watchtower. The heated panoramic pool and the seasonal rooftop restaurant M’Ama! both face the Tyrrhenian Sea. Superior rooms have private sea-view balconies. Free parking and a complimentary shuttle to Marina di Praia beach.
Description ⚙: Hotel Margherita is a four-star family-managed boutique hotel in the centre of Praiano, founded in 1971 within the walls of an Aragonese watchtower. The 28 rooms are in Classic, Superior, and Deluxe categories; Superior and Deluxe rooms have private sea-view balconies, with Deluxe adding a jacuzzi on the balcony. The heated panoramic pool faces the Tyrrhenian Sea directly. Seasonal rooftop restaurant M'Ama! serves Mediterranean cuisine using local organic produce, with over 100 Italian wines. Free on-site parking is available — rare on the Amalfi Coast. A complimentary shuttle runs to Marina di Praia beach. The Sentiero degli Dei trailhead is within walking distance.
Address: Via Umberto I, 70, 84010 Praiano SA, Italy
Nearest Airports: SUF · Salerno · 56 km

Hotel Tagline: Sea-level windows look straight into the open Mediterranean from a cliffside paper mill.
Summary: A 15th-century paper mill built into the Marmorata cliffs at sea level — the only hotel on this list where you swim directly in the Mediterranean from the pool deck. Rooms and L’Antica Cartiera’s restaurant terrace face the water. 800 metres from Minori, 2 kilometres from Amalfi.
Description ⚙: Ravello Art Hotel Marmorata is a four-star hotel built within a 15th-century former paper mill set directly into the Marmorata cliffside at sea level — the only hotel on this list where guests swim directly in the Mediterranean from the pool deck. Stairs from the hydromassage pool deck lead into open water; a private dock is on site. The Marmorata waterfall, from which the locality takes its name, flows within the property. The 37 rooms and 4 apartments feature nautical-style furnishings with antique yacht details and Vietri ceramics. Restaurant L'Antica Cartiera occupies a sea-view terrace. The hotel is 800 metres from Minori and 2 kilometres from Amalfi. Free parking is available.
Address: Via Bizantina, 3, 84010 Marmorata SA, Italy
Nearest Airports: SUF · Salerno · 48 km; NAP · Naples · 64 km

Hotel Tagline: An infinity pool above Spiaggia Grande, the hillside houses spilling down to meet it.
Summary: The only hotel in the heart of Positano with a private beach, reached by a panoramic stairway. Jacqueline Kennedy stayed here in 1961; the Vespoli family still runs it. The infinity pool hangs above Spiaggia Grande and the hillside houses. The sunset terrace is worth timing a stay around.
Description ⚙: Hotel Marincanto is a four-star hotel in the heart of Positano and the only hotel in central Positano with a private beach, reached by a panoramic stairway from the property. The infinity pool hangs above Spiaggia Grande with views of the hillside houses. Jacqueline Kennedy stayed here in 1961; the hotel is managed today by the founding Vespoli family. The sunset terrace overlooks Spiaggia Grande. Recommended: any sea-view room with balcony; the stairway to the private beach is a practical filter — guests who use it frequently value lower-floor rooms for proximity.
Address: Via Cristoforo Colombo, 50, 84017 Positano SA, Italy
Nearest Airports: NAP · Naples · 64 km

Hotel Tagline: Perched on Positano's mountainside, every room looks out across the Tyrrhenian toward the main beach.
Summary: Dating from the 1930s and perched on Positano’s mountainside, with every room category looking toward the sea and the main beach. The Junior Suites have large private terraces with unobstructed views across the Tyrrhenian. The cocktail bar sits about 100 steps from the main road.
Description ⚙: Albergo Miramare Positano is a four-star hotel dating from the 1930s, perched on Positano's mountainside with sea views from all room categories toward the main beach and the Tyrrhenian. Junior Suites have large private terraces with unobstructed views across the bay. A cocktail bar sits approximately 100 steps from the main road. The hotel takes its name — a view to the sea — as an editorial promise: no room category is without it. Recommended: Junior Suite for the largest terrace and the most open sea vista.
Address: Via Trara Genoino, 27, 84017 Positano SA, Italy
Nearest Airports: NAP · Naples · 64 km

Hotel Tagline: Upper floors of a 1665 canal-side palace, facing the Prinsengracht directly.
Summary: Opened May 2025 in the former Palace of Justice on the Prinsengracht — Amsterdam’s last permitted luxury hotel in a heritage building. Grand Premier Canal View rooms on the upper floors face the canal directly. Worth staying for the building alone; the view makes its own case.
Description ⚙: Opened May 2025 in the former Palace of Justice (built 1665), at Prinsengracht 432–436 in Amsterdam’s UNESCO World Heritage-listed canal district. The last new hotel development permitted within a monumental building in Amsterdam, following a decade-long restoration. 134 rooms and suites, including five signature Houses, designed by Studio Piet Boon with over 1,000 artworks throughout; courtyard gardens by landscape architect Piet Oudolf. Premier Canal View rooms and Grand Premier Canal View rooms face the Prinsengracht directly from upper floors. Canal View suites range from Junior to Signature level. Three restaurants and bars: Eeuwen (seasonal Dutch cuisine by chef David Ordóñez, with terrace), The Court (all-day café and patisserie), and Advocatuur bar (in-house Prøvo jenever distillery in former legal chambers). Asaya Spa with Ayurvedic treatments, heated indoor pool, fitness centre. Private salon boat on the Prinsengracht for canal excursions, styled by Studio Piet Boon. Monthly art exhibitions at The Gallery.
Address: Prinsengracht 432 – 436, 1017 KE Amsterdam, Netherlands
Nearest Airports: AMS · Schiphol · 16 km; RTM · Rotterdam The Hague · 67 km

Hotel Tagline: Canal-facing rooms look out across the Keizersgracht water to the heart of Amsterdam's Canal Ring.
Summary: Forty rooms on the Keizersgracht, each interior distinct. Canal-facing rooms look across the water; the candlelit garden terrace catches the evening light. Restaurant Vinkeles, in the building’s 18th-century bakery, holds two Michelin stars. The Serendipity building was renovated in May 2024.
Description ⚙: The Dylan Amsterdam, on the Keizersgracht canal, is a boutique hotel with 40 individually designed rooms and suites, each inspired by the Netherlands’ Asian colonial past. Situated within the Nine Streets complex, the hotel is moments from Dam Square and Leidseplein. The candlelit garden terrace provides an evening setting overlooking the property’s secluded interior. Restaurant Vinkeles, in the building’s 18th-century former bakery, holds two Michelin stars under chef Jurgen van der Zalm. The Serendipity building annex was fully renovated in May 2024. The hotel offers bicycles for local exploration. Green Globe Certified.
Address: Keizersgracht 384, 1016 GA Amsterdam, Netherlands
Nearest Airports: AMS · Schiphol · 16 km; RTM · Rotterdam The Hague · 67 km

Hotel Tagline: Canal light through floor-to-ceiling windows, yellow tulip chairs facing the Prinsengracht directly.
Summary: Housed in the city’s former public library, interior designed by Marcel Wanders studio — the tulip chairs and canal light through tall windows are the signature. Canal view rooms face the Prinsengracht directly. The hotel completed a renovation in 2024 and relaunched its restaurant and bar spaces.
Description ⚙: Andaz Amsterdam Prinsengracht, by Hyatt is housed in the city’s former main library, designed by Marcel Wanders studio. Dutch heritage blends with a whimsical, theatrical ambiance — murals featuring fish and glassware adorn the interiors. Canal view rooms face the Prinsengracht directly, with signature yellow tulip lounge chairs at floor-to-ceiling windows. 122 rooms including five signature suites, with the Prinsengracht Suite featuring the city’s largest hotel terrace overlooking the canal. The hotel completed a renovation in 2024 and relaunched its restaurant (Renvy, by Michelin-starred chef Randy Karman) and bar (Prins & Aap). The Essence Spa offers aromatherapy and massage treatments.
Address: Prinsengracht 587, 1016 HT Amsterdam, Netherlands
Nearest Airports: AMS · Schiphol · 16 km; RTM · Rotterdam The Hague · 67 km

Pulitzer Amsterdam waterfront view with historic canal buildings reflected in water and traditional Dutch boat moored below

Hotel Tagline: Canal windows from two centuries look out over the Prinsengracht and Keizersgracht below.
Summary: Twenty-five interconnected canal houses strung along the Prinsengracht and Keizersgracht. Rooms look onto the water from windows that belong to a different century. The salon boat moored below dates to 1909 and carried Churchill through these canals in 1945 — it’s still in use.
Description ⚙: Pulitzer Amsterdam occupies 25 interconnected 17th- and 18th-century townhouses along the Prinsengracht and Keizersgracht canals. Named the best hotel in Amsterdam by Travel & Leisure in 2022, the hotel offers canal views from windows that span centuries of Amsterdam architecture. Themed suites include book, antique, music, art, and signature Pulitzer options. Located in the Nine Streets area, with Dam Square, Anne Frank’s House, Westerkerk church, and Magna Plaza shopping mall nearby. A classic salon boat dating to 1909, which carried Winston Churchill on a canal tour of Amsterdam after World War II, is moored at the hotel and still in use.
Address: Prinsengracht 323, 1016 GZ Amsterdam, Netherlands
Nearest Airports: AMS · Schiphol · 16 km; RTM · Rotterdam The Hague · 67 km

Hotel Tagline: Five windows frame the longest hotel view of the Herengracht canal in Amsterdam.
Summary: Six 17th-century canal houses on the Herengracht. The Brentano Suite has five windows facing the water — the longest Herengracht canal view from a hotel room in the city. Spectrum holds two Michelin stars; the Guerlain spa and indoor pool are on the lower floor. Opened May 2014.
Description ⚙: The Waldorf Astoria Amsterdam comprises six 17th-century canal houses on the Herengracht. The Brentano Suite has five windows facing the canal, offering one of the finest canal views in the city, with a 200 x 200 cm Super King bed and two original decorative fireplaces. Opened in May 2014. Spectrum, a two Michelin star restaurant by chef Sidney Schutte, is on the lower floor. The Guerlain spa provides an exclusive wellness experience with an indoor pool. Nearby attractions include the H’ART Museum, Tuschinski Theater, and the Magere Brug (Skinny Bridge). Located near Rembrandtplein in the Southern Canal Belt.
Address: Herengracht 542-556, 1017 CG Amsterdam, Netherlands
Nearest Airports: AMS · Schiphol · 17 km; RTM · Rotterdam The Hague · 69 km

Hotel Tagline: Prestige suite balconies hang above the Amstel, the Munttoren marking the bend below.
Summary: Direct views of the Amstel from the prestige suites — balconies on the upper floors, the river running below, the Munttoren at the bend. Request a window table at the riverside restaurant for one of the city’s most romantic meals. Hèt Terras opens to the waterside when the sun arrives.
Description ⚙: De L’Europe Amsterdam is one of the finest five-star properties in Amsterdam, with direct views over the Amstel River from the moment of check-in. Each room is adorned with Dutch artworks. The prestige suites feature balconies with direct views of the Amstel River. The Munttoren clock tower is visible from riverside-facing rooms. Restaurant Bord’Eau offers window tables overlooking the river. Hèt Terras provides a waterside terrace when conditions permit. The hotel’s prime location places guests within easy reach of Dam Square, Rembrandtplein, Tuschinski Theater, Begijnhof, Flower Market, and Kalverstraat shopping street, all less than 10 minutes away.
Address: Nieuwe Doelenstraat 2-14, 1012 CP Amsterdam, Netherlands
Nearest Airports: AMS · Schiphol · 22 km

Hotel Tagline: At dusk, Amstel bridge lights multiply on the water below the French balcony.
Summary: The Royal Suite has bulletproof glass on three sides — two facing the Amstel, one facing the square — and a French balcony above the river. The heated indoor pool sits at eye level with the water. Worth staying for the view of the Amstel at dusk, when the bridge lights multiply on the surface.
Description ⚙: The InterContinental Amstel Amsterdam is positioned elegantly along the Amstel River. The 115-square-meter Royal Suite has bulletproof glass and windows offering sweeping views over the Amstel River on two sides and the square at the front, with a French balcony overlooking the waterside. The heated indoor swimming pool allows guests to swim at eye level with the Amstel. The spa’s riverfront terraces are sought after for sunbathing. The Amstel Restaurant and Amstel Brasserie face the river, offering views of Amsterdam’s nautical activity. The hotel exudes Victorian charm; it opened in 1867 and is a short walk from the Royal Theatre Carré and Weesperplein metro station.
Address: Professor Tulpplein 1, 1018 GX Amsterdam, Netherlands
Nearest Airports: AMS · Schiphol · 29 km

Sofitel Legend The Grand Amsterdam indoor swimming pool with turquoise water, wooden deck, and modern spa facilities
Sofitel Legend The Grand Amsterdam elegant dining room with gold chandeliers, white tablecloths, and canal views through large windows

Hotel Tagline: Between Amsterdam's two oldest canals, balconies hang directly above the water.
Summary: The former Prinsenhof — lodgings for Mary of Burgundy and Peter the Great — sits between two of Amsterdam’s oldest canals. Prestige Suites face the Oudezijds Voorburgwal; Canal House Suites in the adjacent 17th-century houses have balconies above the water. Bridges restaurant has Appel’s 1949 murals.
Description ⚙: Sofitel Legend The Grand Amsterdam occupies a building with a history reaching back to the 15th century — a convent, royal lodging for Mary of Burgundy and Peter the Great, headquarters of the Dutch Admiralty, and Amsterdam’s City Hall for over a century. Situated between two of the oldest canals in Amsterdam: the Oudezijds Voorburgwal and the Oudezijds Achterburgwal. 178 rooms and suites designed by Sybille de Margerie. Prestige Suites face the Oudezijds Voorburgwal or the private walled garden. Canal House Suites in separate 17th-century Admiral’s houses on the Oudezijds Achterburgwal have balconies with direct canal views and original wooden ceiling beams. Restaurant Bridges features Karel Appel’s original 1949 murals; Oriole Garden Bistro opens onto the private garden terrace; Library ‘Or’ serves afternoon tea. Heated indoor pool, hammam, sauna, and Sofitel Spa. 19 meeting rooms, five listed as historical monuments. Green Key certified.
Address: Oudezijds Voorburgwal 197, 1012 EX Amsterdam, Netherlands
Nearest Airports: AMS · Schiphol · 22 km

Alt Text: Banks Mansion hotel in Amsterdam, a cream stone building with mansard roof overlooking a canal with passing tram

Images.alt: Banks Mansion hotel in Amsterdam, a cream stone building with mansard roof overlooking a canal with passing tram
Woman with bicycle and dog at Banks Mansion entrance in Amsterdam, featuring ornate wooden doors and yellow flowers

Hotel Tagline: Canal water below, the Herengracht stretching toward the Gouden Bocht beyond the glass.
Summary: Canal-facing rooms on the Herengracht, minutes from the Gouden Bocht. The all-inclusive format covers breakfast, wine, cheese, and unlimited espresso — the view from the Master Suite comes with a dark-wood interior and stained glass. No extra decisions once you check in.
Description ⚙: Banks Mansion is an all-inclusive hotel on the Herengracht canal in Amsterdam’s Southern Canal Belt. Breakfast, wine, local cheeses, and unlimited espressos are included in the room rate. The Master suite with canal view features warm décor with dark wood furniture, fluffy carpets, and stained glass windows. The hotel is moments from Gouden Bocht (Golden Bend), the most elegant section of the Herengracht. The Flower Market, Rembrandtplein, and Kalverstraat shopping street are all within a short distance.
Address: Herengracht 519-525, 1017 BV Amsterdam, Netherlands
Nearest Airports: AMS · Schiphol · 16 km; RTM · Rotterdam The Hague · 68 km

Alt Text: The Hoxton Amsterdam: A spacious suite with blue paneled walls, fireplace, desk, gray sofa, and large windows overlooking the city

Images.alt: The Hoxton Amsterdam: A spacious suite with blue paneled walls, fireplace, desk, gray sofa, and large windows overlooking the city
The Hoxton, Amsterdam: Historic waterfront buildings along a canal with characteristic Dutch architecture and bicycles parked below

Hotel Tagline: Canal houses line both banks of the Herengracht, visible from balconies directly above the water.
Summary: Five canal houses threaded together on the Herengracht, with rooms that feel deliberate rather than designed. Some face the canal directly, some have small balconies above it. Lotti’s opens its roof when the weather holds — a genuinely open-air terrace that retains the canal house character.
Description ⚙: The Hoxton, Amsterdam is housed within five interconnected canal houses on the Herengracht, offering 111 rooms where luxury and character combine. Many rooms provide canal views, with some featuring balconies above the water. Set in the vibrant Nine Streets area, the hotel places guests within easy reach of Anne Frank’s House, the Begijnhof, and the Royal Palace Amsterdam. Lotti’s restaurant and bar features a retractable roof, creating a genuinely open-air terrace in warm weather.
Address: Herengracht 255, 1016 BJ Amsterdam, Netherlands
Nearest Airports: AMS · Schiphol · 17 km; RTM · Rotterdam The Hague · 69 km

Hotel Tagline: Rooms on Dam Square face the baroque Royal Palace facade directly across the square.
Summary: The only hotel on Dam Square — rooms look directly at the Royal Palace facade. The White Room has been Michelin-starred in the same ornate dining room since 1885. The Anantara Spa provides the quieter counterpart. Request a Dam Square-facing room on the upper floors.
Description ⚙: Anantara Grand Hotel Krasnapolsky Amsterdam has been a welcoming sanctuary on Dam Square for over 150 years and is one of the city’s finest five-star hotels. Restaurant The White Room is Michelin-starred and occupies an ornate dining room that has attracted guests since 1885. Rooms with a view face Dam Square and the baroque Royal Palace Amsterdam directly. 402 rooms and suites make this one of the largest five-star properties in the Benelux region. The Anantara Spa offers holistic treatments including saunas and massage rooms. The hotel’s position on Dam Square provides immediate access to the Royal Palace, de Bijenkorf department store, and the Wintergarden.
Address: Dam 9, 1012 JS Amsterdam, Netherlands
Nearest Airports: AMS · Schiphol · 22 km

Hotel Tagline: From the 6th-floor pool, the Royal Palace fills the view across Dam Square.
Summary: The WET Deck pool faces the Royal Palace — 22 metres of heated water on the 6th floor above Dam Square. Rooms in the Bank building look directly onto the Singel. Two buildings, two distinct views, one address: the corner that puts Dam Square and the UNESCO canal belt in the same stay.
Description ⚙: W Amsterdam occupies two historic buildings near Dam Square: the W Exchange (former telephone exchange, 1913 Amsterdam School architecture) and the W Bank. 238 rooms and suites total. The WET Deck rooftop pool — 22 metres, heated year-round — on the 6th floor of the Exchange building faces the Royal Palace and Dam Square directly. The W Lounge rooftop bar offers panoramic views over the canal district including Westerkerk. Canal Bank rooms in the Bank building look directly onto the Singel canal; Cool Corner Exchange rooms have Royal Palace views. The Duchess is a Michelin-starred restaurant in the Bank building. MR PORTER is the rooftop steakhouse. AWAY Spa with canal-view fitness centre. Opened 2015.
Address: Spuistraat 175, 1012 RR Amsterdam, Netherlands
Nearest Airports: AMS · Schiphol · 17 km; RTM · Rotterdam The Hague · 69 km

Hotel Tagline: From the SkyLounge, the IJ, the Basilica of Saint Nicholas, and the Eye Film Institute spread across the water.
Summary: SkyLounge Amsterdam on the upper floor delivers a panorama taking in the IJ, the Basilica of Saint Nicholas, and the Eye Film Institute across the water. The Executive Corner King Room is the right call for the best room-level views. Steps from Centraal Station, with the canal belt directly below.
Description ⚙: The DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station features SkyLounge Amsterdam on the upper floor, with panoramic views of the IJ River, the Basilica of Saint Nicholas, and the Eye Film Institute across the water. Some contemporary rooms feature balconies with vistas of the Basilica of Saint Nicholas and the Oosterdok canals. The Executive Corner King Room with Lounge Access offers the best room-level views. Steps from Amsterdam Centraal Station. Eastwood restaurant offers canal views at ground level.
Address: Oosterdoksstraat 4, 1011 DK Amsterdam, Netherlands
Nearest Airports: AMS · Schiphol · 21 km

Hotel Tagline: Floor-to-ceiling windows face the full Amsterdam skyline across the IJ from the A'DAM Tower.
Summary: In the A’DAM Tower on the north bank of the IJ, all rooms have floor-to-ceiling windows facing the Amsterdam skyline — Centraal Station, the canal belt, the city’s full silhouette in one read. Corner rooms extend the angle to 270°. The ferry from Centraal takes two minutes and runs all night.
Description ⚙: Sir Adam Hotel, part of Sircle Collection, is located in the A’DAM Tower on the north bank of the IJ River, directly across from Amsterdam Centraal Station. All rooms feature floor-to-ceiling windows with panoramic views of the Amsterdam skyline — the Centraal Station roofline, the canal belt, the waterfront, and the historic silhouette of the city. Corner rooms provide 270° views. The Butcher Social Club restaurant is on the ground floor. The A’DAM Lookout observation deck and ‘Over the Edge’ swing (100 metres above ground) are in the same building. Free GVB ferry from Centraal Station (2-minute crossing, 24 hours). The hotel’s music identity runs throughout: in-room record players, guitars available, disco elevator.
Address: Overhoeksplein 7, 1031 KS Amsterdam, Netherlands
Nearest Airports: AMS · Schiphol · 30 km

Hotel Tagline: Floor-to-ceiling glass frames the IJ River and the Eye Film Institute's cantilevered silhouette.
Summary: Floor-to-ceiling windows throughout, with upper-floor rooms catching the IJ River and the Eye Film Institute’s cantilevered silhouette from Westerdokseiland. The Junior King Corner Suites are the argument for the extra spend — the best vistas in the building, unobstructed. Breakfast until noon.
Description ⚙: Room Mate Aitana is a design hotel on Westerdokseiland, perched over the IJ River. Floor-to-ceiling windows in every room provide panoramas of the city. Upper-floor rooms provide views of the IJ River and the Eye Film Institute’s cantilevered form. The Junior King Corner Suites provide the best city vistas in the hotel. Breakfast is served until noon and Amsterdam Centraal Station is within walking distance.
Address: IJdok 6, 1013 MM Amsterdam, Netherlands
Nearest Airports: AMS · Schiphol · 19 km
