Hotel Tagline: Rocking chairs on the wrap-around veranda face the Atlantic at ground level, where the towers have thinned.
Summary: Pelican Grand sits north of Fort Lauderdale's central hotel strip where the beach opens up and the towers thin out — the Colonial wrap-around veranda with rocking chairs faces the Atlantic at ground level, an angle the glass towers to the south cannot replicate.
Description ⚙: Positioned north of Fort Lauderdale's central hotel strip at N Ocean Boulevard, the 159-room resort features a Colonial-style wrap-around veranda with rocking chairs facing the Atlantic Ocean at ground level. The private beach and oceanfront pool provide direct Atlantic access at a position where the density of the main hotel corridor has thinned.
Address: 2000 N Ocean Blvd, Fort Lauderdale, FL 33305, USA
Nearest Airports: FLL · Fort Lauderdale-Hollywood · 23 km; MIA · Miami International · 63 km

Hotel: Reid's Palace, A Belmond Hotel, Madeira
Alt Text: Reid's Palace Belmond Funchal arched terrace restaurant with checkered floor and direct Atlantic Ocean view

Images.alt: Reid's Palace Belmond Funchal arched terrace restaurant with checkered floor and direct Atlantic Ocean view

Hotel Tagline: Pink clifftop terraces hang above the open Atlantic, with the Cabo Girão cliffs on the western horizon.
Summary: The pink clifftop colonnade has looked over the Atlantic since 1891 — Winston Churchill was among those who smoked on these terraces, contemplating his next political moves. Sea-facing rooms open onto balconies above the subtropical gardens; the Briza do Mar restaurant hangs directly over the water.
Description ⚙: Opened in November 1891, Reid's Palace is the founding grand hotel of Funchal — a pink clifftop landmark set in over four acres of subtropical gardens above the Atlantic. The hotel's position on the western edge of the Lido strip gives every sea-facing room a balcony over open ocean, with the Cabo Girão cliffs on the western horizon. Winston Churchill was among the celebrated guests who spent time on these terraces. The William Restaurant holds a Michelin star; the Briza do Mar restaurant is suspended directly over the Atlantic with glass walls on three sides.
Address: Estrada Monumental 139, São Martinho, 9000-098 Funchal, Portugal
Nearest Airports: FNC · Madeira · 24 km

Alt Text: Hotel The Cliff Bay Funchal cliffside sundeck terraces with parasols overlooking Funchal Bay and the Atlantic

Images.alt: Hotel The Cliff Bay Funchal cliffside sundeck terraces with parasols overlooking Funchal Bay and the Atlantic

Hotel Tagline: Three sundeck terraces step down the cliff face toward open Atlantic, with Funchal Bay framed in floor-to-ceiling glass.
Summary: The sundeck terraces step down the cliff face in three levels, all facing open ocean. Sea-view rooms have full balconies over the Atlantic from the promontory's highest point; the two-Michelin-star Il Gallo d'Oro restaurant looks directly across Funchal Bay from floor-to-ceiling windows.
Description ⚙: Positioned on a natural rocky promontory at the western end of Funchal's Lido strip, The Cliff Bay offers panoramic Atlantic views from most of its 201 rooms. Sea-view rooms have full balconies facing open ocean; the hotel's sundeck terraces step down the cliffside in three levels, each platform looking south across the Atlantic. The Il Gallo d'Oro restaurant holds two Michelin stars and has floor-to-ceiling windows over Funchal Bay. Direct private access to the sea is via a platform at the base of the cliff.
Address: Estrada Monumental 147, São Martinho, 9004-532 Funchal, Portugal
Nearest Airports: FNC · Madeira · 25 km

Hotel: Les Suites at The Cliff Bay
Alt Text: Les Suites at The Cliff Bay Funchal infinity pool illuminated at night with Funchal city lights and moonlit Atlantic Ocean

Images.alt: Les Suites at The Cliff Bay Funchal infinity pool illuminated at night with Funchal city lights and moonlit Atlantic Ocean

Hotel Tagline: Cantilevered over the cliff, the infinity pool looks directly down into Funchal Bay.
Summary: Twenty-three suites across two century-old villas and a new wing, all on the same Atlantic promontory as The Cliff Bay next door. Ground-floor suites open onto private garden terraces with direct sea views; the infinity pool is cantilevered over the cliff, with Funchal Bay directly below.
Description ⚙: Les Suites occupies two century-old villas and a new wing on the promontory directly adjacent to The Cliff Bay, sharing the same clifftop position but operating as a separate boutique property of 23 suites. All suites face the Atlantic from floor-to-ceiling windows; several ground-floor suites open onto private garden terraces with direct sea views. The property's infinity pool is cantilevered over the cliff, looking directly down into Funchal Bay. Guests have full access to The Cliff Bay's spa and two-Michelin-star restaurant.
Address: Estrada Monumental 145, São Martinho, 9004-532 Funchal, Portugal
Nearest Airports: FNC · Madeira · 25 km

Alt Text: Savoy Palace Funchal sea-view room with carved gold floral headboard panels and balcony over the Atlantic Ocean

Images.alt: Savoy Palace Funchal sea-view room with carved gold floral headboard panels and balcony over the Atlantic Ocean

Hotel Tagline: From the rooftop, open ocean stretches south toward the Desertas islands on the horizon.
Summary: Opened in 2019 on the rebuilt site of the historic Savoy, the hotel's 352 rooms include a sea-facing category with full balconies over the Atlantic. The rooftop Sky Bar and pool face south across open ocean; on clear days the Desertas islands appear on the horizon.
Description ⚙: Savoy Palace is the flagship hotel of the Savoy Signature group in Madeira — a 5-star resort of 352 rooms along the Lido strip, opened in 2019 after the complete rebuilding of the historic Savoy hotel site. Sea-view rooms and suites have full balconies over the Atlantic; the rooftop Sky Bar and pool face south across open ocean, with the Desertas islands visible on clear days. The hotel has four outdoor and indoor pools, Laurea Spa, and five restaurants.
Address: Av. do Infante 25, São Martinho, 9004-542 Funchal, Portugal
Nearest Airports: FNC · Madeira · 24 km

Alt Text: The Vine Hotel Funchal rooftop infinity pool at dusk reflecting the city skyline and Funchal mountains

Images.alt: The Vine Hotel Funchal rooftop infinity pool at dusk reflecting the city skyline and Funchal mountains

Hotel Tagline: From the rooftop pool, Fort São João and the cruise port sit below the Atlantic horizon.
Summary: Funchal's principal design hotel sits atop a city-centre tower, with a rooftop infinity pool facing south over the Sé rooftops and the cruise port. Sea-view upper rooms look directly down to the bay; at sunset, the pool deck catches the last light over Fort São João and the Atlantic horizon.
Description ⚙: The Vine is Funchal's foremost design hotel, occupying the upper floors of a mixed-use city-centre tower with views over the old town and Funchal Bay. The rooftop infinity pool and Bar 360° face south, with the tower of Funchal Cathedral, Fort São João and the cruise port all visible from the deck. Sea-view rooms on the upper floors have direct lines to the Atlantic across the red-tiled rooftops of the historic centre.
Address: R. dos Aranhas 27, São Martinho, 9000-044 Funchal, Portugal
Nearest Airports: FNC · Madeira · 21 km

Alt Text: Castanheiro Boutique Hotel Funchal rooftop infinity pool with panoramic view over the historic center and Funchal Cathedral tower

Images.alt: Castanheiro Boutique Hotel Funchal rooftop infinity pool with panoramic view over the historic center and Funchal Cathedral tower

Hotel Tagline: Rooftop water, cathedral tower, terracotta skyline, then the Atlantic and the Desertas on the horizon.
Summary: Five historically classified buildings in the pedestrian old town, united by a rooftop pool and jacuzzi that look over the cathedral tower and the terracotta skyline of the Sé to the Atlantic. Balcony rooms face the city or the bay, with the old quarter underfoot in every direction.
Description ⚙: Castanheiro occupies five historically classified buildings spanning three centuries of Funchal's old town, from an 18th-century artisans' atelier to a 20th-century typography and embroidery workshop. The rooftop pool and jacuzzi look south over the terracotta rooftops, past the bell tower of Funchal Cathedral, to the Atlantic and the Desertas islands on the horizon. Balcony rooms on the upper floors face either the city or the bay.
Address: R. do Castanheiro 31, São Martinho, 9000-081 Funchal, Portugal
Nearest Airports: FNC · Madeira · 20 km

Alt Text: Pestana CR7 Funchal rooftop pool with view over the marina harbor and Funchal hillside

Images.alt: Pestana CR7 Funchal rooftop pool with view over the marina harbor and Funchal hillside

Hotel Tagline: From the rooftop, the marina and the full sweep of Funchal Bay stretch below.
Summary: Marina-front position in central Funchal, 300 metres from the cruise terminal. The rooftop infinity pool — tiled in the hotel's signature pink — looks directly over the marina and Funchal Bay; the Off-Side Rooftop bar delivers the widest bay panorama of any rooftop in the city centre.
Description ⚙: Pestana CR7 Funchal is a 4-star lifestyle hotel occupying a marina-front position in central Funchal, 300 metres from the cruise terminal. The rooftop infinity pool, tiled in the hotel's signature pink, looks directly over the marina and the sweep of Funchal Bay. The Off-Side Rooftop bar delivers the widest bay panorama of any rooftop in the city centre. Upper sea-facing rooms have balcony views over the port and the Atlantic.
Address: Praça CR7, Av. Sá Carneiro, São Martinho, 9000-017 Funchal, Portugal
Nearest Airports: FNC · Madeira · 21 km

Alt Text: Quinta da Casa Branca Funchal modern garden pavilion set among tropical botanical gardens with mountain backdrop

Images.alt: Quinta da Casa Branca Funchal modern garden pavilion set among tropical botanical gardens with mountain backdrop

Hotel Tagline: Banana plantations and mountain ridges, seen from within 28,150m² of subtropical gardens.
Summary: A 5-star boutique estate set in 28,150m² of subtropical botanical gardens on the western hillside above Funchal, open since 1998. Rooms and terraces face inward over the estate: banana plantations, specimen trees from Asia and Africa, and the mountains of the Funchal interior.
Description ⚙: Quinta da Casa Branca is a 5-star boutique estate hotel set in 28,150m² of subtropical botanical gardens on the western hillside above Funchal, open since 1998 and the first Design Hotel inaugurated on Madeira. Rooms and terraces face inward over the grounds: banana plantations, specimen trees from Asia and Africa, flowering borders and the mountains of the Funchal interior. The property is a member of Small Luxury Hotels of the World.
Address: R. da Casa Branca 7, São Martinho, 9000-088 Funchal, Portugal
Nearest Airports: FNC · Madeira · 24 km

Alt Text: The Woodward Geneva grand Belle Époque suite living room with crystal chandelier and arched floor-to-ceiling windows with wrought iron balconies overlooking the blue water of Lake Geneva

Images.alt: The Woodward Geneva grand Belle Époque suite living room with crystal chandelier and arched floor-to-ceiling windows with wrought iron balconies overlooking the blue water of Lake Geneva

Hotel Tagline: Lakefront balconies face Mont Blanc directly, with Lake Geneva filling the windows between.
Summary: Geneva’s first and only all-suite hotel since its 2021 opening, The Woodward places lakefront balconies and Mont Blanc views inside 26 meticulously designed suites. Worth the stay for L’Atelier Robuchon alone — two Michelin stars earned in a room that overlooks Lake Geneva.
Description ⚙: Geneva's first all-suite hotel, opened in 2021, The Woodward, Auberge Collection occupies a post-Haussmann building on Quai Wilson completely reimagined by architect Pierre-Yves Rochon. Each of the 26 suites offers its own character, marble fireplace, and large windows — 21 of them framing Lake Geneva and, on clear days, the summit of Mont Blanc. The Suite Mont Blanc has lakefront balconies aligned directly with the mountain. L'Atelier Robuchon, Geneva's only two-Michelin-star restaurant, and Le Jardinier are housed within the property. The 1,200 m2 Guerlain Spa across two floors includes a 21-metre indoor pool.
Address: Quai Wilson 37, 1201 Genève, Switzerland
Nearest Airports: GVA · Geneva · 9 km; ANE · Annecy · 47 km

Alt Text: Hotel d'Angleterre Geneva ornate suite with baroque gold decor and open balcony where a staff member sets afternoon tea with the Jet d'Eau fountain directly in view

Images.alt: Hotel d'Angleterre Geneva ornate suite with baroque gold decor and open balcony where a staff member sets afternoon tea with the Jet d'Eau fountain directly in view

Hotel Tagline: From the Bellevue Suite's private balcony, the Jet d'Eau rises directly across the water.
Summary: In operation since 1872, the d’Angleterre reserves its finest views for the Bellevue Suite — a private balcony that faces the Jet d’Eau directly across the water. The Leopard Bar, stocked with vintage spirits and premium cigars, makes for a naturally elegant end to any Geneva evening.
Address: Quai du Mont-Blanc 17, 1201 Genève, Switzerland
Nearest Airports: GVA · Geneva · 9 km; ANE · Annecy · 47 km

Hotel: Four Seasons Hotel des Bergues Geneva
Alt Text: Four Seasons Hotel des Bergues Geneva rooftop terrace restaurant at sunset with round dining tables and panoramic view of the Old Town cathedral spires and Jura mountains

Images.alt: Four Seasons Hotel des Bergues Geneva rooftop terrace restaurant at sunset with round dining tables and panoramic view of the Old Town cathedral spires and Jura mountains

Hotel Tagline: From the corner terrace, Mont Blanc fills the Alpine panorama above Lake Geneva.
Summary: The oldest luxury hotel in Geneva, open since 1834, the Four Seasons des Bergues earns repeat visits with a rooftop pool above the lake and a Michelin-starred Italian kitchen. The room to ask for is the corner Suite Mont Blanc — private terrace, Alpine panorama, no compromises.
Description ⚙: Geneva's oldest luxury hotel, open since 1834, the Four Seasons Hotel des Bergues combines classic elegance with contemporary amenities on the shores of Lake Geneva. Many of the 115 rooms and suites offer views of the lake, the Jet d'Eau, and the Alps. The corner Suite Mont Blanc has a private terrace and an unobstructed Alpine panorama. The Michelin-starred Italian restaurant Il Lago and the Japanese-Nikkei fusion restaurant Izumi provide two significant dining experiences. An indoor rooftop pool overlooks the lake.
View Subjects: Jet d'Eau, Lake Geneva, Mont Blanc
Address: Quai des Bergues 33, 1201 Genève, Switzerland
Nearest Airports: GVA · Geneva · 10 km; ANE · Annecy · 47 km

Alt Text: Beau-Rivage Geneva classic bedroom with cream curtains and ornate wrought iron balcony overlooking Lake Geneva and the left-bank skyline

Images.alt: Beau-Rivage Geneva classic bedroom with cream curtains and ornate wrought iron balcony overlooking Lake Geneva and the left-bank skyline

Hotel Tagline: From a king-sized bed, the Jet d'Eau rises unobstructed over Lake Geneva.
Summary: Among the few Geneva hotels where the Jet d’Eau can be watched from a king-sized bed without sitting up — that distinction belongs to the Prestige Junior Lake View suites at Beau-Rivage. In winter, cable cars shipped from Gstaad open a rooftop Alpine terrace above the lake.
Description ⚙: Established in 1865, Beau-Rivage is a beacon of Swiss palace hospitality on Quai du Mont-Blanc. The hotel's 52 rooms and 43 suites — including loft suites measuring up to 500 m2 — are equipped with private spas. The Prestige Junior Lake View suites offer an unobstructed view of the Jet d'Eau directly from a king-sized bed. In winter, cable cars brought from Gstaad open the hotel's rooftop for the La Terrasse Alpine dining experience with lake views. Beau-Rivage holds a Swisstainable certification for its commitment to sustainable practices.
Address: Quai du Mont-Blanc 13, 1201 Genève, Switzerland
Nearest Airports: GVA · Geneva · 9 km; ANE · Annecy · 47 km

Alt Text: Mandarin Oriental Geneva rooftop terrace at dusk with candlelit outdoor tables above the illuminated Rhône river and the Geneva city skyline at sunset

Images.alt: Mandarin Oriental Geneva rooftop terrace at dusk with candlelit outdoor tables above the illuminated Rhône river and the Geneva city skyline at sunset

Hotel Tagline: Private terraces hold the river, Old Town, and Alps in a single, quiet frame.
Summary: Set on the Rhône rather than the lake, the Mandarin Oriental offers private terraces facing the river, Old Town, and Alps simultaneously — a quieter, more residential perspective than its neighbours. The SACHI restaurant and a Forbes five-star awarded in 2023 complete the picture.
Description ⚙: The Mandarin Oriental, Geneva occupies the right bank of the River Rhone, offering a different perspective from the lake-facing hotels on Quai du Mont-Blanc. Suites feature private terraces with views of the river, Old Town, and the Alps. The Japanese restaurant SACHI serves an UMAMI tasting menu from an open kitchen. A fitness centre, spa, and yoga studio are available to guests. The hotel received a Forbes Travel Guide five-star rating in 2023 and is strategically located within walking distance of the Jet d'Eau and St. Peter's Cathedral.
Address: Quai Turrettini 1, 1201 Genève, Switzerland
Nearest Airports: GVA · Geneva · 12 km; ANE · Annecy · 48 km

Hotel: The Ritz-Carlton Hotel de la Paix, Geneva
Alt Text: The Ritz-Carlton Hotel de la Paix Geneva contemporary grey-toned suite with wingback armchair and open wrought iron balcony framing the vivid blue-green water of Lake Geneva

Images.alt: The Ritz-Carlton Hotel de la Paix Geneva contemporary grey-toned suite with wingback armchair and open wrought iron balcony framing the vivid blue-green water of Lake Geneva

Hotel Tagline: At 140 metres, the Jet d'Eau rises directly beyond the panoramic balcony.
Summary: We’d book the Grace Kelly or Mont-Blanc Suite for the panoramic balcony facing the Jet d’Eau — at 140 metres, the fountain dominates every window. Fiskebar’s Nordic kitchen holds a Michelin star, and the Living Room Bar & Kitchen’s weekend brunch has earned a devoted following across Geneva.
Description ⚙: The Ritz-Carlton Hotel de la Paix has stood on Quai du Mont-Blanc since 1865, rebranded as a Ritz-Carlton in 2017. The hotel's 74 rooms and 19 suites offer views of Lake Geneva, Mont Blanc Square, and the Jet d'Eau. The Grace Kelly Suite and Mont-Blanc Suite feature panoramic balconies directly facing the fountain. The Nordic kitchen Fiskebar holds a Michelin star; the Living Room Bar and Kitchen is known for its weekend brunch. Views reach 140 metres to the Jet d'Eau from the lakefront rooms.
Address: Quai du Mont-Blanc 11, 1201 Genève, Switzerland
Nearest Airports: GVA · Geneva · 9 km; ANE · Annecy · 47 km

Alt Text: InterContinental Genève Geneva high-floor suite living room with pale upholstered sofas and wraparound windows showing a full bird's-eye panorama of the city, Jet d'Eau, and Alps

Images.alt: InterContinental Genève Geneva high-floor suite living room with pale upholstered sofas and wraparound windows showing a full bird's-eye panorama of the city, Jet d'Eau, and Alps

Hotel Tagline: From the highest lake-facing floors, the Jet d'Eau and Alps rise above Geneva's roofline.
Summary: At 17 floors, the InterContinental is among the few Geneva hotels that genuinely rises above the roofline — request the highest lake-facing floor available. It also holds the largest outdoor pool of any five-star in the city, with uninterrupted views of the lake, Jet d’Eau, and Alps.
Address: 7, Chem. du Petit-Saconnex 9, 1209 Genève, Switzerland
Nearest Airports: GVA · Geneva · 7 km; ANE · Annecy · 50 km

Hotel: Hotel President Wilson, a Luxury Collection Hotel, Geneva
Alt Text: Hotel President Wilson Geneva marble suite bathroom with red marble vanity and floor-to-ceiling windows overlooking the turquoise water of Lake Geneva and the tree-lined lakeside promenade

Images.alt: Hotel President Wilson Geneva marble suite bathroom with red marble vanity and floor-to-ceiling windows overlooking the turquoise water of Lake Geneva and the tree-lined lakeside promenade

Hotel Tagline: From upper floors on Quai Wilson, the Jet d'Eau rises above a full Alpine backdrop.
Summary: The President Wilson lines up 228 rooms along Quai Wilson with lake and Jet d’Eau views on the upper floors. Request a high-floor suite for the full Alpine backdrop; the outdoor heated pool — one of the few at any five-star in Geneva — is the most coveted spot on a clear summer afternoon.
Description ⚙: Hotel President Wilson, a Luxury Collection Hotel, takes its name from the US president who championed Geneva as the seat of the League of Nations in 1919. Situated on Quai Wilson, the hotel's 228 rooms and suites deliver panoramic views of Lake Geneva, the Jet d'Eau, and the Alps from upper lake-facing floors. The outdoor heated pool — a rarity among Geneva's five-star hotels — overlooks the lake directly, offering one of the few opportunities in the city to swim with the Jet d'Eau in view. The hotel serves an international and diplomatic clientele given its proximity to the United Nations European headquarters.
Address: Quai Wilson 47, 1211 Genève, Switzerland
Nearest Airports: GVA · Geneva · 8 km; ANE · Annecy · 48 km

Hotel: The Langham, Gold Coast and Jewel Residences
Alt Text: The Langham Gold Coast and Jewel Residences suite with king bed and angular floor-to-ceiling windows opening to a Pacific Ocean balcony

Images.alt: The Langham Gold Coast and Jewel Residences suite with king bed and angular floor-to-ceiling windows opening to a Pacific Ocean balcony

Hotel Tagline: From above the 36th floor, the Pacific Ocean fills every window, uninterrupted.
Summary: Opened in June 2022 as the first new beachfront hotel on the Gold Coast in over 30 years. The Two Bedroom Skyline Ocean Residences above the 36th floor face the Pacific uninterrupted. T’ang Court, the sister of a three-Michelin-star Cantonese restaurant in Hong Kong, is on level three.
Description ⚙: The Langham, Gold Coast and Jewel Residences, a luxurious addition to Queensland's renowned holiday destination, is situated between Surfers Paradise and Broadbeach in one of the most sought-after vacation spots in the Sunshine State. This 5-star hotel, the first new beachfront hotel on the Gold Coast in over 30 years when it opened in June 2022, offers a refined escape with 169 hotel rooms and 170 residences, all boasting stunning views of the Pacific Ocean or the hinterland. The Two Bedroom Skyline Ocean Residences above the 36th floor face the Pacific uninterrupted. The hotel features T'ang Court, the first Australian outpost of the Michelin-starred Cantonese restaurant from Hong Kong, on level three. Additional venues include the beachfront cafe 26 & Sunny, the Akoya signature restaurant, and a swim-up pool bar. The Chuan Spa draws on millenary Chinese medicine traditions. Facilities include indoor and outdoor pools, an ocean-facing fitness centre, and a kids club.
Address: 38 Old Burleigh Rd, Surfers Paradise QLD 4217, Australia
Nearest Airports: OOL · Gold Coast · 26 km

Alt Text: Peppers Broadbeach Gold Coast high-rise apartment balcony with two guests seated facing the Pacific Ocean horizon

Images.alt: Peppers Broadbeach Gold Coast high-rise apartment balcony with two guests seated facing the Pacific Ocean horizon

Hotel Tagline: Pacific fills the balcony from mid-floors up, with Kurrawa Beach fifty metres below.
Summary: The Oracle complex splits into two towers in the heart of Broadbeach — the room to grab is in Tower 1, where east-facing apartments have the Pacific filling the balcony from the mid-floors up. Sky Homes push the panorama to include the entire Broadbeach coastline. Kurrawa Beach is 50 metres from the door.
Description ⚙: Part of The Oracle, an $850M two-tower luxury development in the heart of Broadbeach, with the five-star hotel component opened in November 2010. The complex comprises a 50-storey beach tower (Tower 1) and a 40-storey hinterland tower (Tower 2), with a total of 505 apartments. One-, two-, and three-bedroom suites and Sky Homes offer panoramic views of the Pacific Ocean or the Gold Coast Hinterland. Tower 1 east-facing apartments have direct Pacific Ocean views from the mid-floors upward; Sky Homes push the panorama to include the full Broadbeach coastline. Facilities include heated indoor and outdoor pools, a Zen garden, sauna, steam room, gymnasium, private cinema with surround sound, executive lounge, wine lockers, and a Teppanyaki grill. Located 50 metres from Kurrawa Beach, steps from the Oracle Boulevard dining precinct (100+ restaurants), 4 minutes from the G:Link Broadbeach North tram stop, and 10 minutes on foot from Pacific Fair Shopping Centre and the Gold Coast Convention and Exhibition Centre.
Address: 21 Elizabeth Ave, Broadbeach QLD 4218, Australia
Nearest Airports: OOL · Gold Coast · 25 km

Alt Text: Meriton Suites Southport Gold Coast high-floor balcony with breakfast table overlooking the Broadwater waterways and Surfers Paradise skyline

Images.alt: Meriton Suites Southport Gold Coast high-floor balcony with breakfast table overlooking the Broadwater waterways and Surfers Paradise skyline

Hotel Tagline: From above the 53rd floor, the ocean and Broadwater Parklands unfold directly below.
Summary: The suites between levels 25 and 55 deliver dramatic ocean views, but the category worth targeting is the 3 Bedroom Ocean Suite above the 53rd floor. The Broadwater Parklands stretch directly below. G:Link to Surfers Paradise and Broadbeach is a two-minute walk.
Description ⚙: For those on a hunt for a luxurious stay in Gold Coast, the upscale Meriton Suites Southport is a natural choice. Located in the heart of Southport, adjacent to the manicured South Lawn Broadwater Parklands, this all-suite hotel offers trouble-free access to the city's top attractions, including the famous Gold Coast beaches, theme parks (Sea World and GC Aqua Park) and shopping centers (like the upscale Marina Mirage, with multiple water view restaurants). The fully-equipped suites between levels 25 and 55 offer dramatic views that can stretch as far as the eye can see. Each is beautifully designed and features high-quality furnishings and amenities. The spacious 3 Bedroom Ocean Suites perched above the 53rd floor deliver the ultimate prize. The Broadwater Parklands G:Link light rail station, just a two-minute walk from the hotel, connects guests to famous Gold Coast beaches like Surfers Paradise and Broadbeach, as well as to Brisbane (via Helensvale). For those who prefer to walk, the fluffy sands of Main Beach are only a 20-minute stroll away from the hotel.
Address: 2 Como Cres, Southport QLD 4215, Australia
Nearest Airports: OOL · Gold Coast · 30 km

Hotel: JW Marriott Gold Coast Resort & Spa
Alt Text: JW Marriott Gold Coast Resort and Spa suite interior with floor-to-ceiling windows overlooking the Pacific Ocean and Surfers Paradise skyline

Images.alt: JW Marriott Gold Coast Resort and Spa suite interior with floor-to-ceiling windows overlooking the Pacific Ocean and Surfers Paradise skyline

Hotel Tagline: Floor-to-ceiling windows frame the Pacific from the upper suites of this Surfers Paradise beachfront resort.
Summary: The suites have floor-to-ceiling windows on the Pacific or the hinterland — upper floors with an ocean orientation are the ones to book. The saltwater lagoon with tropical fish and sand is one of the best resort pools on the coast. Citrique holds the AGFG Chef Hat three years running, 2023 to 2025.
Description ⚙: This premium beachfront resort, inspired by coastal Queensland's beauty and relaxed mood, offers 238 rooms and suites, starting from a generous 42 square meters in size. Each room boasts panoramic views of either the hinterland or the Pacific; the suites, decorated in soothing tones, are particularly noteworthy, featuring floor-to-ceiling windows displaying vistas guests won't forget in a hurry. There are multiple outdoor pools (freshwater and saltwater) for lounging and soaking up the sun. The lagoon pool is surrounded by sand, adding to the allure of a tropical getaway, and has been awarded Australia's best hotel pool in 2021 and 2024. For those who prefer to stay active, there's a 24/7 fitness center on level 3, as well as a mixed-use sports court. The Citrique Restaurant specializes in seafood and has earned the Australian Good Food Guide Chef Hat for three consecutive years — 2023, 2024, and 2025. The resort is conveniently situated a short walk from the famous white sandy beaches of the Gold Coast, as well as the small Budds Beach, a narrow stretch of sand with tranquil waters facing the Nerang river.
Address: 158 Ferny Ave, Surfers Paradise QLD 4217, Australia
Nearest Airports: OOL · Gold Coast · 30 km

Alt Text: Meriton Suites Surfers Paradise living room with floor-to-ceiling windows and unobstructed Pacific Ocean view

Images.alt: Meriton Suites Surfers Paradise living room with floor-to-ceiling windows and unobstructed Pacific Ocean view

Hotel Tagline: From the 75th floor, the Pacific rolls out without a horizon.
Summary: One of the tallest residential structures in Surfers Paradise at 252 metres. The category that justifies the height is the 3 Bedroom Ocean Sky Suite on the 75th floor — at that elevation, the Pacific rolls out without a horizon. The COAST rooftop bar extends the view into the evening.
Description ⚙: Meriton Suites Surfers Paradise, a prestigious 5-star apartment hotel, offers an unparalleled experience in Surfers Paradise. This magnificent 252-meter-tall structure, acclaimed as the Best Suite/Apartment Hotel in the 2022 Australian Hotels Association National Awards for Excellence, embodies luxury and comfort. Guests are reported to gaze out in amazement across an ocean with seemingly no end. The hotel's suites are a testament to modern luxury, featuring a serene palette that complements the coastal environment. Ranging from one to three bedrooms, including exclusive penthouse suites, each room has a balcony and a gourmet kitchen. The sights from the 75th-floor 3 Bedroom Ocean Sky Suite represent the hotel's view at its peak. The hotel boasts two pools for relaxation and recreation — an indoor pool with a spa and an outdoor pool with a sundeck. The fitness center and sauna cater to fitness enthusiasts, while the COAST Beach Bar and rooftop terrace extend the Pacific view into the evening. The hotel is located right on the famous Surfers Paradise Beach.
Address: 86 Esplanade, Surfers Paradise QLD 4217, Australia
Nearest Airports: OOL · Gold Coast · 28 km

Alt Text: Peppers Soul Surfers Paradise Hyde Paradiso oceanfront restaurant with arched windows facing the Pacific Ocean at dusk

Images.alt: Peppers Soul Surfers Paradise Hyde Paradiso oceanfront restaurant with arched windows facing the Pacific Ocean at dusk

Hotel Tagline: From the upper floors, beach, ocean, and city skyline share the same uninterrupted frame.
Summary: A 77-storey tower in Surfers Paradise, with beach, ocean, and city skyline in the same frame from the upper floors. We’d book one of the Signature Collection Sub-Penthouses for an uninterrupted ocean read. Hyde Paradiso, the oceanfront restaurant, is a reason to stay in at night.
Description ⚙: A high-end getaway in one of Australia's most popular holiday destinations, the 77-story tower harboring Peppers Soul Surfers Paradise delivers epic views of the beach, ocean, and city skyline. The hotel offers a range of one, two, three, and four-bedroom luxury apartments, including the gorgeous Signature Collection Sub-Penthouses, the hotel's pinnacle of luxury. These spectacular accommodations are perfect for various needs, from romantic weekends with uninterrupted ocean views to family holidays packed with comfort. The hotel's glamorous oceanfront restaurant, Hyde Paradiso, offers Mediterranean tapas and cocktails with direct beach views from level one and is open to non-guests. Guests can take advantage of the on-site heated pool, sauna, steam room, spa, and well-equipped gymnasium. Just a short walk from this hotel, the Soul Boardwalk shopping mall offers plentiful, laid-back eateries, some with glorious vistas.
Address: 8 Esplanade, Surfers Paradise QLD 4217, Australia
Nearest Airports: OOL · Gold Coast · 28 km

Alt Text: Iconic Kirra Beach Resort Coolangatta apartment balcony with north-facing view over Kirra Beach and the Gold Coast coastline

Images.alt: Iconic Kirra Beach Resort Coolangatta apartment balcony with north-facing view over Kirra Beach and the Gold Coast coastline

Hotel Tagline: From the upper floors, the full Gold Coast coastline arcs unbroken from Coolangatta to Surfers Paradise.
Summary: From the ocean-facing apartments, the view north covers the full Gold Coast coastline — Coolangatta rock wall to Surfers Paradise in a single unbroken arc. The front-facing upper floors are the pick of the resort. During whale season, humpbacks pass directly below. Gold Coast Airport is 3km away.
Description ⚙: A 15-level, 118-apartment beachfront resort located directly opposite Kirra Beach at the quiet southern end of the Gold Coast. Oceanfront Apartments on levels 5 to 15 (front of building) offer panoramic north-facing views over the entire Gold Coast coastline — from the Coolangatta rock wall to Surfers Paradise in a single unbroken arc of approximately 40 kilometres. Panoramic View Apartments on the side of the building (levels 6 to 15) combine ocean views from the balcony with mountain and city views from the interior. Three-bedroom Premier Ocean View Apartments deliver uninterrupted beach vistas from both interior and balcony. All apartments are architecturally designed, fully self-contained, and feature modern kitchen facilities, private balconies, and air-conditioning. Amenities include a heated multi-use outdoor pool and a gymnasium. Located 50 metres from Kirra Beach and in the Kirra restaurant strip, 3 km from Gold Coast Airport, adjacent to Snapper Rocks — one of the Gold Coast's most celebrated surf breaks. The building faces the humpback whale migration corridor (peak June to November), with sightings regularly confirmed from upper-floor balconies.
Address: 74/76 Musgrave St, Coolangatta QLD 4225, Australia
Nearest Airports: OOL · Gold Coast · 6 km

Alt Text: Q1 Resort and Spa Surfers Paradise indoor pool at dusk with panoramic floor-to-ceiling windows overlooking the Gold Coast city lights and ocean

Images.alt: Q1 Resort and Spa Surfers Paradise indoor pool at dusk with panoramic floor-to-ceiling windows overlooking the Gold Coast city lights and ocean

Hotel Tagline: From level 60 and above, the coast bends away in both directions with the Hinterland closing the frame.
Summary: Australia’s tallest residential resort tower, with ocean views from every apartment category. The sightlines above level 60 are hard to argue with — the coast bends away in both directions, the Hinterland closing the frame behind. SkyPoint Observation Deck on the 77th floor adds a second perspective.
Description ⚙: The seaside Q1 Resort & Spa, located on the Gold Coast, is celebrated as the tallest residential resort tower in the area; naturally, the views rise to legendary material, even more so from the SkyPoint Observation Deck, which is located on the 77th floor and offers 360-degree views of the Gold Coast, the Hinterland, and beyond to Byron Bay. This superior holiday destination offers an array of exclusive apartment options, including one-bedroom, two-bedroom, and three-bedroom apartments, as well as more luxurious choices like the three-bedroom sub-penthouse, four-bedroom executive spa apartment, four-bedroom penthouse, presidential penthouse, and the three-bedroom celebrity spa suite. At the resort, guests will find two lagoon-style swimming pools, an indoor heated pool, a gymnasium, a sauna, a steam room, a games room, a private theatre, and a children's play area. There is also a full-service day spa, Stephanies Wellness Spa, with multiple ocean-inspired treatments. The resort is home to various dining options, including Longboards Laidback Eatery & Bar, Asami Teppanyaki, SkyPoint Bistro & Bar, and Osaka Kaiten Sushi.
Address: 9 Hamilton Ave, Surfers Paradise QLD 4217, Australia
Nearest Airports: OOL · Gold Coast · 27 km

Alt Text: QT Gold Coast Surfers Paradise hotel room with bold geometric carpet and balcony facing the Pacific Ocean and beach

Images.alt: QT Gold Coast Surfers Paradise hotel room with bold geometric carpet and balcony facing the Pacific Ocean and beach

Hotel Tagline: From level 15 and above, the Pacific Ocean fills the window of the King Suite.
Summary: The Deluxe QT King Suite Ocean View delivers exactly what the name promises, from level 15 up. Yamagen, the hotel’s Japanese izakaya, has been refining its craft on the Gold Coast for over 30 years. SpaQ treatments — including the signature ‘Pure Gold’ ritual — complete the stay.
Description ⚙: Located on the famous Surfers Paradise beach in Queensland, Australia, QT Gold Coast is a luxurious hotel that offers guests a unique and unforgettable experience. With its prime location, upscale amenities, and stunning views, this hotel is popular among travelers looking for a memorable vacation. The Deluxe QT King Suite Ocean View, located above level 15, delivers direct Pacific Ocean views. The hotel's facilities reflect its commitment to providing a five-star stay. The Stingray Lounge offers a sophisticated and playful bar atmosphere, while Yamagen — the hotel's contemporary Japanese izakaya restaurant with over 30 years of history on the Gold Coast — provides an izakaya dining experience with an extensive Japanese whisky collection. FIXX Cafe caters to all tastes with a selection of indulgent treats and healthy options. To enhance guests' stay, the spaQ offers mindfully designed therapies and rituals for ultimate relaxation, with signature treatments including 'Pure Gold' and 'The Plush Prince(ss)'. There are also tennis courts and an outdoor pool.
Address: 7 Staghorn Ave, Surfers Paradise QLD 4217, Australia
Nearest Airports: OOL · Gold Coast · 28 km

Alt Text: The Wave Resort Broadbeach curved apartment balcony with dining table and view over Gold Coast beach and Surfers Paradise towers

Images.alt: The Wave Resort Broadbeach curved apartment balcony with dining table and view over Gold Coast beach and Surfers Paradise towers

Hotel Tagline: From wrap-around balconies on the top three floors, the Gold Coast coastline meets the Pacific far below.
Summary: Worth booking for the sub-penthouses on the top three floors: wrap-around balconies above the Broadbeach skyline, and the level 34 sky pool faces east over the Pacific. Central Broadbeach puts the beach 300 metres away, The Star and Pacific Fair within a 5-minute walk.
Description ⚙: A 34-storey self-contained apartment resort in central Broadbeach, 300 metres from the beach. Offers one-, two-, and three-bedroom apartments plus three-bedroom sub-penthouse suites. Two Bedroom and Three Bedroom Water View Apartments, located between levels 12 and 30, have ocean and Broadbeach views from private balconies. The three-bedroom sub-penthouses on the top three floors (levels 32–34) offer panoramic views of the Gold Coast coastline and Hinterland from wrap-around balconies. The exclusive sky pool, spa, and sauna on level 34 face east directly over the Pacific Ocean. A second infinity pool with spa, sauna, and steam room is located on level 4. Facilities also include a fitness centre and poolside BBQ areas on both levels. Each apartment is self-contained with modern kitchen facilities, quality furnishings, full laundry, and free Wi-Fi. Pacific Fair Shopping Centre, The Star Casino, and the Gold Coast Convention and Exhibition Centre are within a 5-minute walk. The G:Link Broadbeach North tram stop is 150 metres from the entrance.
Address: 89-91 Surf Parade, Broadbeach QLD 4218, Australia
Nearest Airports: OOL · Gold Coast · 25 km

Alt Text: Rhapsody Resort Surfers Paradise rooftop terrace with landscaped garden, pool, and open ocean view

Images.alt: Rhapsody Resort Surfers Paradise rooftop terrace with landscaped garden, pool, and open ocean view

Hotel Tagline: Ocean, city, and hinterland meet in a single sweep from the rooftop terrace.
Summary: A four-star address 100 metres from Surfers Paradise Beach that punches above its category. The rooftop terrace — ocean, city, and hinterland in the same sweep — turns any evening into an event. Apartments have private kitchens and laundry, practical for longer stays.
Description ⚙: Anyone looking for a luxurious stay in Surfers Paradise doesn't need to look much further than Rhapsody Resort, a distinguished ocean-facing property that delivers a five-star experience despite not having as many stars. The accommodation choices at this address offer a range of Studio, One and Two-bedroom serviced apartments. Each apartment is designed to provide panoramic views of the ocean, city, and hinterland, enhancing the experience of staying just 100 meters from the patrolled Surfers Paradise Beach. The apartments have fully equipped private kitchens and laundry facilities, catering to short- and long-term stays. The rooftop terrace and BBQ facilities are one of this property's highlights, allowing for gorgeous ocean vistas that promise to take any social gathering to the next level. The resort's amenities include a pool and spa. The resort's prime location puts guests steps away from the famous golden beaches of the Gold Coast, namely Main Beach and Surfers Paradise Beach, as well as popular attractions such as the leafy Macintosh Island Park and the Surfers Paradise Beachfront Markets.
Address: 3440 Surfers Paradise Blvd, Surfers Paradise QLD 4217, Australia
Nearest Airports: OOL · Gold Coast · 29 km

Alt Text: Four Seasons Hotel Guangzhou indoor infinity pool at night with floor-to-ceiling windows framing the illuminated Canton Tower and Guangzhou city lights

Images.alt: Four Seasons Hotel Guangzhou indoor infinity pool at night with floor-to-ceiling windows framing the illuminated Canton Tower and Guangzhou city lights

Hotel Tagline: From the 74th-floor pool, Canton Tower and the Pearl River fill the glass.
Summary: The infinity pool on the 74th floor runs alongside Canton Tower and Pearl River views — and the rooms above improve as floors increase. Ask for a Pearl River Suite above the 85th; the Michelin-starred Yu Yue Heen on 71 and Tian Bar on 99 extend the view into the night.
Description ⚙: A list of the best hotels in Guangzhou would only be complete if it included the Four Seasons Hotel Guangzhou, occupying the upper floors of the Guangzhou International Finance Centre in Tianhe District. The indoor infinity pool on the 74th floor frames the Canton Tower and Pearl River directly through floor-to-ceiling glass — one of the most photographed hotel pool views in China. Pearl River Suites on floors above the 85th extend the water view across both banks. The Michelin-starred Yu Yue Heen Cantonese restaurant on the 71st floor and The Atrium all-day dining on the 70th keep the elevation consistent across every meal. Tian Bar on the 99th floor closes the day with a Canton Tower backdrop after dark. The hotel also operates a private check-in lounge and dedicated butler service for suite guests.
Address: Tianhe District, Guangzhou, China, 510623
Nearest Airports: CAN · Baiyun · 41 km; FOC · Foshan Shadi · 41 km

Alt Text: The Ritz-Carlton Guangzhou classic suite with cream and gold furnishings, three tall windows looking directly onto the Canton Tower and Pearl River in daylight

Images.alt: The Ritz-Carlton Guangzhou classic suite with cream and gold furnishings, three tall windows looking directly onto the Canton Tower and Pearl River in daylight

Hotel Tagline: Canton Tower and the Pearl River share the same frame from the Club rooms.
Summary: The Club Canton Tower River category delivers on its name — Canton Tower and Pearl River in one frame, Club Lounge access included. Lai Heen has held a Michelin star since the inaugural Guangzhou guide in 2018; the table is worth reserving before the flight is booked.
Description ⚙: The Ritz-Carlton, Guangzhou is located in the upscale Pearl River New City, next to the Guangdong Museum. The hotel offers 350 rooms and suites — some of which were subject to a recent refurbishment — and 91 high-grade apartments for extended stays. The Club Canton Tower River room category places Canton Tower and Pearl River in one frame with Club Lounge access included: private check-in, top-grade food presentations, and sweeping city vistas in one category. The outdoor heated pool is available year-round. Lai Heen, the hotel's Cantonese fine-dining restaurant, has held a Michelin star since the inaugural Guangzhou guide in 2018 and is among the most reserved tables in the city. The British-inspired Churchill Bar closes evenings with a single malt and city views.
Address: 3 Xing An Lu, Tian He Qu, Guang Zhou Shi, Guang Dong Sheng, China, 510623
Nearest Airports: CAN · Baiyun · 42 km; FOC · Foshan Shadi · 42 km

Alt Text: Rosewood Guangzhou guest room with warm neutral tones and a full-height window wall, the Canton Tower rising from the cityscape far below in clear daylight

Images.alt: Rosewood Guangzhou guest room with warm neutral tones and a full-height window wall, the Canton Tower rising from the cityscape far below in clear daylight

Hotel Tagline: From 400 metres, the Pearl River fills the window wall with the IFC far below.
Summary: At 530 metres, this is the highest hotel in southern China. The Club River Rooms offer Pearl River views with the IFC below the window; the Manor Suites add private terraces. The TOO HIGH bar at 107 and the Asaya pool at 93 give the altitude somewhere to go.
Description ⚙: Set on the top 39 floors of the Guangzhou CTF Finance Centre — at 530 metres the tallest building in Guangzhou and the third-tallest in China — Rosewood Guangzhou is the highest 5-star hotel in southern China. The 251 rooms and suites, designed by Yabu Pushelberg with warm woods and royal blue lacquers referencing Lingnan architectural heritage, start on the 93rd floor. Club River Rooms face the Pearl River with a full window wall at over 400 metres; Manor Suites add private terraces over the city skyline. The Asaya Active wellness centre spans floors 93 and 94, housing a 25-metre indoor pool with river views, yoga studio, spa treatment suites, and fitness centre. Seven food and beverage venues include Lingnan House for classic Cantonese cuisine, Patina brasserie on the 95th floor, and the TOO HIGH sky bar and restaurant on the 107th floor with outdoor terraces and one of Guangzhou's most extensive whisky selections. The hotel opened in September 2019 and is listed in the MICHELIN Guide hotel selection.
Address: 6 Zhu Jiang Dong Lu, Tian He Qu, Guang Zhou Shi, Guang Dong Sheng, China, 510655
Nearest Airports: FOC · Foshan Shadi · 40 km; CAN · Baiyun · 44 km

Alt Text: Park Hyatt Guangzhou open-air rooftop terrace bar at dusk, wooden pergola and tropical greenery framing the Canton Tower lit in pink and purple against the evening sky

Images.alt: Park Hyatt Guangzhou open-air rooftop terrace bar at dusk, wooden pergola and tropical greenery framing the Canton Tower lit in pink and purple against the evening sky

Hotel Tagline: At night, Canton Tower and the Pearl River curve away in opposite directions from the corner suite.
Summary: The Park Deluxe River View Suite justifies the corner position — Pearl River sweeping in one direction, Canton Tower lit at night in the other. The 25-metre pool at cloud level frames the same tower between lengths. Super Potato’s interiors bring warmth to the altitude.
Description ⚙: Park Hyatt Guangzhou occupies the upper floors of R&F Yingkai Square in Tianhe District, one of the most prominent towers in Zhujiang New Town. Interiors are by Super Potato — the Japanese design studio known for bringing warm natural materials and textured surfaces to high-altitude hotel spaces. The Park Deluxe River View Suite occupies a corner position with the Pearl River in one direction and the Canton Tower lit at night in the other; the 25-metre indoor pool at cloud level frames the Canton Tower through its glass wall. Three restaurants and a bar serve Cantonese, Japanese, and international cuisine from the hotel's upper floors. The spa offers a comprehensive treatment menu across private rooms.
Address: 16 Hua Xia Lu, Tian He Qu, Guang Zhou Shi, Guang Dong Sheng, China, 510620
Nearest Airports: FOC · Foshan Shadi · 40 km; CAN · Baiyun · 42 km

Alt Text: Conrad Guangzhou suite bathroom with a freestanding oval bathtub set against floor-to-ceiling windows, the Canton Tower illuminated in colour against the night skyline

Images.alt: Conrad Guangzhou suite bathroom with a freestanding oval bathtub set against floor-to-ceiling windows, the Canton Tower illuminated in colour against the night skyline

Hotel Tagline: South-facing upper floors place the Pearl River and Canton Tower square in the frame.
Summary: Xiguan Mansion-inspired interiors — carved details, layered materials — give Conrad’s rooms a texture the glass-tower neighbours lack. South-facing upper floors frame the Pearl River and Canton Tower; the terrace extends the river view for those who prefer the outside.
Description ⚙: Conrad Guangzhou draws on the Xiguan Mansion — the historic merchant-class residences that defined Guangzhou's architectural heritage — for its interior design: carved details, layered materials, and a domestic warmth that distinguishes it from the glass-tower neighbours in Zhujiang New Town. South-facing upper floors frame the Pearl River and Canton Tower through full-height windows; the hotel terrace extends the river view for guests who prefer to take it outside. The indoor pool, sauna, steam room, and full-service spa provide a comprehensive wellness circuit. Three restaurants serve Chinese and international cuisine across the full day. Club Lounge access on premium room categories adds personalised check-in and dedicated food and beverage presentations throughout the stay.
Address: China, Guang Zhou Shi, Tian He Qu, 珠江新城兴民路222号 邮政编码: 510623
Nearest Airports: CAN · Baiyun · 41 km; FOC · Foshan Shadi · 41 km

Alt Text: Jumeirah Guangzhou suite living room with curved floor-to-ceiling windows and orange accent cushions, overlooking the Guangzhou CBD skyline in morning light

Images.alt: Jumeirah Guangzhou suite living room with curved floor-to-ceiling windows and orange accent cushions, overlooking the Guangzhou CBD skyline in morning light

Hotel Tagline: Canton Tower stands in direct sightline from private terraces on the upper floors.
Summary: The Signature Loft Suites occupy two floors and add a private terrace with the Canton Tower in direct sightline. Two pools — indoor and outdoor — and a Turkish Hammam make the wellness offer genuinely comprehensive. The morning banquet is worth staying in for.
Description ⚙: Jumeirah Guangzhou occupies a prominent tower in Zhujiang New Town with Canton Tower sightlines from its upper-floor Signature Loft Suites — two-storey rooms with private terraces and the tower in direct view. The wellness offer is among the most comprehensive in the city: two pools (indoor and outdoor), a Turkish Hammam, and full spa facilities. The hotel's morning banquet is a standout food-and-beverage offer. Three restaurants cover Cantonese, international, and all-day dining from the hotel's mid and upper floors. The property's service model follows the Jumeirah brand's hospitality standards, with dedicated guest relations for suite categories.
Address: No 14 Zhujiang East Road, 越秀区广州市广东省 China, 510623
Nearest Airports: FOC · Foshan Shadi · 41 km; CAN · Baiyun · 45 km

Hotel: Hotel Indigo Guangzhou Haixinsha by IHG
Alt Text: Hotel Indigo Guangzhou Haixinsha rooftop terrace at dusk with glowing white pod chairs and bar stools, the Canton Tower and Pearl River filling the horizon

Images.alt: Hotel Indigo Guangzhou Haixinsha rooftop terrace at dusk with glowing white pod chairs and bar stools, the Canton Tower and Pearl River filling the horizon

Hotel Tagline: At river level, the Canton Tower rises directly across the water from the outdoor pool.
Summary: The only luxury hotel in Guangzhou at river level: Haixinsha Island puts the Canton Tower directly across the water from the outdoor pool. Request a Canton Tower View Suite for the terrace sightline; by night, the LED display reflects across the Pearl River.
Description ⚙: Hotel Indigo Guangzhou Haixinsha occupies a position that no other luxury hotel in the city can replicate. Haixinsha Island — the green park island in the Pearl River that served as the stage for the 2010 Asian Games opening ceremony — places the hotel at river level, with the Canton Tower rising directly across the water from its outdoor pool and garden terrace. Where every other 5-star address in Guangzhou looks down at the river from a high floor, this one stands beside it. The 139 individually furnished rooms all include floor-to-ceiling windows; the Canton Tower View Suites add a private terrace with an unobstructed sightline to the tower. By night, the Canton Tower's LED display reflects across the Pearl River from the outdoor terrace. The SAIL restaurant serves Chinese cuisine across breakfast, lunch, and dinner. A poolside bar and cocktail terrace extend the river and tower view into the evening.
Address: 1 Sha Tai Nan Lu, Tian He Qu, Guang Zhou Shi, Guang Dong Sheng, China, 510000
Nearest Airports: FOC · Foshan Shadi · 41 km; CAN · Baiyun · 44 km

Hotel Tagline: Private balconies look out over the Guangzhou skyline; the indoor pool frames it again through a green living wall.
Summary: The suite categories are W’s best argument: private balconies over the Guangzhou skyline, Bose audio throughout, karaoke rooms and a wine cellar in the room itself. The indoor pool, backed by a green living wall, frames the city from a different angle entirely.
Description ⚙: W Guangzhou distributes 317 individually designed rooms across 30 floors in Guangzhou. The property's strongest offer is in its upper suite categories: private balconies over the city skyline, Bose surround-sound systems, dedicated karaoke rooms, wine cellars, and whirlpool tubs. The indoor pool is set behind a green living wall with a city panorama. Three restaurants cover international, Cantonese, and Japanese cooking; WOOBAR serves cocktails and late-night drinks; FEI club adds a nightlife dimension. The W Spa offers massages, body scrubs, and aromatherapy treatments across private and couples treatment rooms. The Canton Tower is a 10-minute drive; the primary views here are the Guangzhou city skyline from the private balconies and suite levels.
Address: 26 Xian Cun Lu, 珠江新城, Tian He Qu, Guang Zhou Shi, Guang Dong Sheng, China, 510623

Hotel Tagline: Canton Tower, the IFC, and CTF Finance Centre share one unobstructed frame from the Sky Lobby.
Summary: The Sky Lobby frames the full Zhujiang New Town panorama — Canton Tower, IFC and CTF Finance Centre — in one unobstructed sweep. Grand Club rooms hold that read from floor level. The Guangzhou Opera House, designed by Zaha Hadid, is steps away for evenings off the property.
Description ⚙: Grand Hyatt Guangzhou occupies one of the most logistically central positions in Zhujiang New Town. The 368 rooms and 48 suites are fitted with floor-to-ceiling windows, and the Sky Lobby delivers the most comprehensive panoramic view of the full CBD available from any hotel space in the district: the Canton Tower, the Guangzhou International Finance Centre, and the CTF Finance Centre simultaneously in a single unobstructed frame. The Grand Club Lounge — accessible to premium room guests — provides personalised check-in, all-day food and beverage presentations, and dedicated service throughout the stay. Three restaurants serve international cuisine across the full day. O Spa provides a full treatment menu. An indoor pool and 24-hour gym complete the wellness facilities. The hotel is immediately adjacent to the Guangzhou Opera House, designed by Zaha Hadid and completed in 2010, and operates a complimentary shuttle to the Pazhou Exhibition Complex during Canton Fair periods.
Address: 12 Zhu Jiang Xi Lu, Tian He Qu, Guang Zhou Shi, Guang Dong Sheng, China, 510623

Alt Text: The Ritz-Carlton Half Moon Bay guest room with French doors opening to coastal lawn terrace and Pacific Ocean beyond

Images.alt: The Ritz-Carlton Half Moon Bay guest room with French doors opening to coastal lawn terrace and Pacific Ocean beyond

Hotel Tagline: Perched on a bluff above Three Rocks Beach, with the Pacific breaking against rocks directly below.
Summary: The Ocean Front rooms sit above Three Rocks Beach on a bluff that drops straight to the Pacific — fire pit on the stone terrace, gas fireplace inside, and the Old Course running along the cliff edge below. Bagpipes at sunset are a daily ritual. The room to ask for is any Ocean Front category; suites add private terraces with unobstructed panoramas.
Description ⚙: Being the only Forbes Five-Star hotel in this Californian coastal city, The Ritz-Carlton, Half Moon Bay, presiding over Three Rocks Beach, holds its position as the defining oceanfront property on the Northern California coast. Waves crash against the rocks below while fog often drapes the property in a mystical morning haze, creating the kind of raw coastal beauty that draws visitors from San Francisco and around the world. A full property refresh completed in September 2024 carried through all 261 rooms and suites, introducing coastal textures and warm leather accents. Ocean-view rooms feature private fire pits on stone terraces; Ocean Front rooms and suites deliver unobstructed Pacific panoramas. The two championship golf courses wind along the bluffs, with the Old Course dating to 1973 and the Ocean Course playing along the cliff edge from holes 16 through 18. Dining at Navio — Forbes Four-Star and Michelin Recommended in 2025 — means 180-degree Pacific views through dramatic arched windows, with Chef de Cuisine Xisco Simon's sustainable tasting menus. The Conservatory serves breakfast, lunch, and dinner with floor-to-ceiling Pacific views. Nightly bagpipe performance at sunset.
Address: 1 Miramontes Point Rd, Half Moon Bay, CA 94019, USA
Nearest Airports: SQL · San Carlos · 33 km; SFO · San Francisco · 39 km; OAK · Oakland · 65 km; SJC · San Jose · 68 km

Hotel Tagline: From the third-floor penthouse, the full Pacific spreads unbroken across every window.
Summary: Eighteen rooms on the northern tip of Half Moon Bay’s longest beach stretch, most with direct ocean views from balconies or patios. Heated floors, fireplaces, and jetted tubs are standard across the property. We’d request the Las Nubes penthouse on the third floor — full Pacific panorama and the kind of morning light that makes checking out difficult.
Description ⚙: For those seeking an oceanfront hotel in Half Moon Bay with glorious ocean views, the Cypress Inn on Miramar Beach is a compelling choice. The intimate 18-room boutique property sits at the northern tip of Half Moon Bay's longest beach stretch, welcoming travelers who want to fall asleep to crashing waves. Most rooms have direct ocean views from balconies or patios; heated floors, fireplaces, and jetted bathtubs are standard. The Las Nubes penthouse on the third floor is the finest suite, delivering a full Pacific panorama. Located at the northern end of a beach stretch that extends south through Naples Beach, Half Moon Bay Beach, Venice Beach, Francis Beach, Poplar Beach, and Redondo Beach. Hotel View: Ocean.
Address: 407 Mirada Rd, Half Moon Bay, CA 94019, USA
Nearest Airports: SQL · San Carlos · 32 km; SFO · San Francisco · 37 km; OAK · Oakland · 64 km; SJC · San Jose · 67 km

Hotel Tagline: From the third-floor balcony, ocean, harbor, and mountains align in a single frame.

We’d time a stay for the Penthouse Ocean View suites on the third floor, where a private balcony puts ocean, harbor, and mountains in a single frame. Mavericks surf break is a short walk along the coastal path.
Description ⚙: Beach House Half Moon Bay is one of the best places to stay in a region with 25 miles of beaches. The 54-suite boutique hotel offers well-appointed units, most with extraordinary ocean views from the living room and bedroom areas, with select suites featuring a balcony or patio overlooking the bay. The Penthouse Ocean View suites on the third floor are the finest option, framing ocean, harbor, and mountains in a single panorama. The hotel is a short walk from Pillar Point Harbor Beach and Mavericks Beach, with the seven-mile coastal path ideal for cycling, jogging, or walking. A complimentary wine hour and continental breakfast are included. Hotel View: Ocean, Mountains, Pillar Point Harbor.
Address: 4100 Cabrillo Hwy N, Half Moon Bay, CA 94019, USA
Nearest Airports: SQL · San Carlos · 33 km; SFO · San Francisco · 37 km; OAK · Oakland · 65 km; SJC · San Jose · 68 km

Hotel Tagline: Pillar Point Harbor, the ocean, and the mountains all converge outside the suite windows.
Summary: Positioned at the edge of Pillar Point Harbor with ocean, marina, and mountain views from the suites. The Grand Oceano King Suite is the one to book for the full panorama; the Oceano Coastal Spa handles the rest. Harbor-side location puts the coastal trail, whale-watching tours, and the best of the local seafood scene within easy reach.
Description ⚙: The Oceano Hotel and Spa Half Moon Bay Harbor occupies a prime oceanfront position in the harbor area of Northern California's coast. Ocean, marina, and mountain views are available from the hotel's suites, with the Grand Oceano King Suite offering the broadest panorama. The property offers a full-service spa — the Oceano Coastal Spa — with a range of treatments and massages, alongside waterfront dining options and versatile event spaces. Guests can explore Ross's Cove and access whale-watching tours from the nearby harbor. The hotel is surrounded by seafood and fish restaurants and positioned within walking distance of the harbor trail. Hotel View: Ocean, Mountains, Pillar Point Harbor.
