Alt Text: InterContinental Grand Stanford Hong Kong room with expansive harbour views at night

Images.alt: InterContinental Grand Stanford Hong Kong room with expansive harbour views at night

Hotel Tagline: Victoria Harbour at eye level, framed across the Tsim Sha Tsui waterfront without looking down.
Summary: The Victoria Harbour View Suites at the Grand Stanford deliver the Kowloon waterfront position without the vertical ambition of the tower hotels — a cinematic view at eye level. Securing one of those rooms and using Café On M for breakfast with the harbour behind it is the formula here.
Description ⚙: The InterContinental Grand Stanford Hong Kong occupies the Tsim Sha Tsui East waterfront at a position removed from the main TST strip, delivering a cinematic view of Victoria Harbour at eye level. The Victoria Harbour View Suites provide the Kowloon waterfront experience without the vertical scale of the ICC tower hotels. Café On M offers harbour views across the breakfast table.
View Subjects: Victoria Harbour, Tsim Sha Tsui Waterfront
Address: 70號 Mody Rd, Tsim Sha Tsui, Hong Kong
Nearest Airports: HKG · Hong Kong International · 36 km

Alt Text: Four Seasons Hotel Hong Kong panoramic bathtub with daytime view of Hong Kong skyline

Images.alt: Four Seasons Hotel Hong Kong panoramic bathtub with daytime view of Hong Kong skyline

Hotel Tagline: Floor-to-ceiling glass wraps 180 degrees around Victoria Harbour, Kowloon, and the hills beyond.
Summary: The corner Grand Harbour View Suites frame 180 degrees of Victoria Harbour, Kowloon, and the hills beyond through floor-to-ceiling glass. Lung King Heen below and the harbour-facing pool on the same level make the case for not leaving the building.
Description ⚙: The Four Seasons Hotel Hong Kong sits directly above Hong Kong Station in Central, connected to the Airport Express. Corner Grand Harbour View Suites frame 180 degrees of Victoria Harbour, Kowloon, and the hills beyond through floor-to-ceiling glass. Lung King Heen — the world's first Chinese restaurant awarded three Michelin stars — has a harbour view alongside the meal. A harbour-facing pool occupies the same level as the restaurant.
Address: 8 Finance St, Central, Hong Kong
Nearest Airports: HKG · Hong Kong International · 37 km

Alt Text: Mandarin Oriental Hong Kong room with night view of Bank of China Tower

Images.alt: Mandarin Oriental Hong Kong room with night view of Bank of China Tower

Hotel Tagline: From the top-floor wraparound balcony, Victoria Harbour fills every direction at once.
Summary: The top-floor Tamar Suite has a wraparound balcony over the harbour — city and water in the same frame, the nightly Light Show from the living room. The hotel is mid-renovation, with the suite program intact and Daniel Boulud’s rooftop due in 2026.
Description ⚙: The Mandarin Oriental Hong Kong, in Central since 1963, is undergoing a USD 100 million renovation scheduled for completion in Q4 2026. The hotel remains open throughout, with the suite program intact — including the top-floor Tamar Suite, whose wraparound balcony over Victoria Harbour frames city and water in the same view, with the nightly Symphony of Lights from the living room. Daniel Boulud's rooftop restaurant is due in 2026.
Address: 5 Connaught Road, Central, Hong Kong
Nearest Airports: HKG · Hong Kong International · 38 km

Alt Text: Island Shangri-La Hong Kong harbour view room overlooking Kowloon from Admiralty

Images.alt: Island Shangri-La Hong Kong harbour view room overlooking Kowloon from Admiralty

Hotel Tagline: Victoria Harbour and the Kowloon hills spread beyond the 56th-floor roof garden.
Summary: The Grand Premier Harbour View rooms face Victoria Harbour and Kowloon from Admiralty’s upper floors. The 56th-floor roof garden extends the view outward. The Shangri-La Suite adds the mountain line beyond the harbour — the reason to upgrade.
Description ⚙: Island Shangri-La, Hong Kong occupies the upper floors of the Pacific Place complex in Admiralty. Grand Premier Harbour View rooms face Victoria Harbour and Kowloon from upper floors. The 56th-floor roof garden extends the view outward. The Shangri-La Suite adds the mountain line beyond the harbour — the natural backdrop visible from the island side that Kowloon-facing views do not include.
Address: Supreme Ct Rd, Admiralty, Hong Kong
Nearest Airports: HKG · Hong Kong International · 38 km

Alt Text: Grand Hyatt Hong Kong public area with view facing Hong Kong skyline

Images.alt: Grand Hyatt Hong Kong public area with view facing Hong Kong skyline

Hotel Tagline: 270 degrees of skyline and harbour water, from the Wan Chai waterfront.
Summary: The Victoria Harbour Suite on the upper floors spans 90 square meters with a 270-degree view of the skyline and harbour — the most unambiguous room in a hotel that otherwise rewards knowing where to book. The 11th-floor Plateau Spa pool faces the same water.
Description ⚙: Grand Hyatt Hong Kong sits on the Wan Chai waterfront adjacent to the Hong Kong Convention and Exhibition Centre. The Victoria Harbour Suite on the upper floors spans 90 square metres with a 270-degree view of the skyline and harbour. The 11th-floor Plateau Spa pool faces the same water. The Wan Chai position retains full harbour frontage at a remove from the most expensive TST corridor.
Address: 1 Harbour Rd, Wan Chai, Hong Kong
Nearest Airports: HKG · Hong Kong International · 39 km

Hotel: The Murray, Hong Kong, a Niccolo Hotel
Alt Text: The Murray Hong Kong restaurant with city skyline view

Images.alt: The Murray Hong Kong restaurant with city skyline view

Hotel Tagline: Gardens in the foreground, Hong Kong skyline behind, framed by Foster + Partners' large square windows.
Summary: The Cotton Tree Suite looks over the Hong Kong Botanical Gardens with the city skyline behind — a quieter orientation than the harbour hotels, and deliberate. Foster + Partners’ large square windows on every floor make the views an architectural feature.
Description ⚙: The Murray, Hong Kong, a Niccolo Hotel, is a 1969 Foster + Partners landmark in Central overlooking the Hong Kong Botanical Gardens with the city skyline behind. The Cotton Tree Suite faces the gardens with the skyline as backdrop — a quieter, greener orientation than the harbour-facing hotels. Large square windows on every floor make the garden and city views an architectural element of each room.
Address: 22 Cotton Tree Dr, Central, Hong Kong
Nearest Airports: HKG · Hong Kong International · 38 km

Hotel: Renaissance Hong Kong Harbour View Hotel
Alt Text: Renaissance Hong Kong Harbour View Hotel panoramic bathroom inside harbour-view suite

Images.alt: Renaissance Hong Kong Harbour View Hotel panoramic bathroom inside harbour-view suite

Hotel Tagline: From above the 21st floor, Victoria Harbour fills two-thirds of the windows.
Summary: About two-thirds of the 857 rooms face Victoria Harbour — the floors above the 21st are where to request, for the larger windows and the cleaner view. The Mirage Bar’s floor-to-ceiling glass handles the evening; the outdoor pool and jogging trail, the morning.
Description ⚙: The Renaissance Hong Kong Harbour View Hotel occupies the Wan Chai waterfront adjacent to the Hong Kong Convention and Exhibition Centre. About two-thirds of the 857 rooms face Victoria Harbour — floors above the 21st are the optimal choice for larger windows and a cleaner sightline. The Mirage Bar's floor-to-ceiling glass handles the evening; an outdoor pool and jogging trail extend the waterfront experience.
Address: 1 Harbour Rd, Wan Chai, Hong Kong
Nearest Airports: HKG · Hong Kong International · 39 km

Alt Text: EAST Hong Kong high-floor room with harbour views at night

Images.alt: EAST Hong Kong high-floor room with harbour views at night

Hotel Tagline: From the 32nd-floor outdoor deck, Victoria Harbour stretches uninterrupted above Quarry Bay.
Summary: Sugar, the 32nd-floor bar, serves tapas with uninterrupted harbour views from an outdoor deck that few visitors to Quarry Bay find by accident. The harbour-view suites on the 30th floor are the reason to book a room rather than just an evening there.
Description ⚙: EAST Hong Kong is positioned in Quarry Bay, apart from the main harbour hotel cluster. Sugar, the 32nd-floor bar, serves tapas with uninterrupted harbour views from an outdoor deck that few visitors to the neighbourhood find independently. Harbour-view suites on the 30th floor represent the lowest price point on this list for a confirmed harbour sightline.
Address: 29 Tai Koo Shing Rd, Quarry Bay, Hong Kong
Nearest Airports: HKG · Hong Kong International · 44 km

Alt Text: ESPACIO The Jewel of Waikiki Honolulu rooftop pool with wave mosaic overlooking Waikiki Beach and the Pacific Ocean

Images.alt: ESPACIO The Jewel of Waikiki Honolulu rooftop pool with wave mosaic overlooking Waikiki Beach and the Pacific Ocean

Hotel Tagline: Balcony Jacuzzis above Kuhio Beach, Diamond Head framed against the open Pacific.
Summary: Nine floors, nine suites — each with a private elevator entrance, a full-floor residence in Italian marble, and a balcony Jacuzzi® above Waikiki Beach. The Penthouse Diamond Suite frames Diamond Head and the open Pacific simultaneously. No corridors, no resort fees.
Description ⚙: ESPACIO The Jewel of Waikiki occupies a building on Kalakaua Avenue, across from Kuhio Beach, with nine suites — one per floor — each entered via a private elevator that opens directly into the accommodation. There are no corridors or standard hotel rooms. Each suite is a full-floor residence in Italian marble with a chef's kitchen, private sauna, and a balcony Jacuzzi facing the Pacific. The Penthouse Diamond Suite commands an uninterrupted panorama of Waikiki Beach, Diamond Head, and the open Pacific. Every stay includes butler service, airport transfers, a Mercedes, and a dining credit at Mugen, the on-site fine dining restaurant holding Forbes Travel Guide Five Stars alongside the hotel — ESPACIO is the only property in Hawaii to hold dual Five-Star recognition. No resort fees apply.
Address: 2452 Kalākaua Ave, Honolulu, HI 96815, USA
Nearest Airports: HNL · Daniel K. Inouye · 29 km; JRF · Kalaeloa · 43 km

Alt Text: Halekulani Honolulu beachfront balcony with two lounge chairs overlooking turquoise ocean and Diamond Head

Images.alt: Halekulani Honolulu beachfront balcony with two lounge chairs overlooking turquoise ocean and Diamond Head

Hotel Tagline: From the lanai, Waikiki Beach curves toward Diamond Head above the orchid-mosaic pool.
Summary: The room to ask for is a Premier Suite facing Diamond Head and the orchid-mosaic pool below — 453 rooms, nearly all with ocean views, on Waikiki’s quietest stretch of sand. La Mer remains Hawaii’s only Forbes 5-Star restaurant; House Without A Key is where the locals go for sunset.
Description ⚙: The Halekulani, meaning House Befitting Heaven in Hawaiian, is an oceanfront luxury hotel on Waikiki Beach in Honolulu. Most of its 453 rooms and suites offer ocean views; Premier Suites boast unobstructed oceanfront views of Waikiki Beach and Diamond Head and feature lanais. The Halekulani Suite, designed by Vera Wang, is 2,135 square feet with a wrap-around balcony. La Mer is Hawaii's only Forbes Five-Star restaurant, offering French cuisine with Hawaiian influences. House Without A Key is a beachfront bar known for sunset views. The iconic oceanfront pool features a mosaic orchid design created from 1.2 million South African glass mosaic tiles. SpaHalekulani offers Hawaiian-inspired treatments.
Address: 2199 Kālia Rd, Honolulu, HI 96815, USA
Nearest Airports: HNL · Daniel K. Inouye · 26 km; JRF · Kalaeloa · 41 km

Alt Text: Halepuna Waikiki by Halekulani Honolulu infinity pool terrace overlooking the Pacific Ocean

Images.alt: Halepuna Waikiki by Halekulani Honolulu infinity pool terrace overlooking the Pacific Ocean

Hotel Tagline: From floors 19 through 23, Diamond Head and the Pacific fill the horizon unobstructed.
Summary: Sister hotel to Halekulani, two minutes from the water and designed by Champalimaud. Deluxe Ocean View rooms on floors 19 to 23 deliver unobstructed Pacific and Diamond Head sightlines. An 8th-floor infinity pool faces the shoreline — no resort fee attached.
Description ⚙: Halepuna Waikiki by Halekulani opened in October 2019 as the boutique sister hotel to Halekulani, two minutes from Waikiki Beach. The 284-room property was designed by Champalimaud Design with a public art program developed with the Honolulu Museum of Art. Deluxe Ocean View rooms on floors 19 through 23 deliver unobstructed sightlines over the Pacific and the Waikiki shoreline. The eighth floor Urban Oasis features an infinity lap pool with ocean views, a hot tub, and pool bar. The restaurant Umi by Vikram Garg presents fine dining with Hawaiian ingredients. The Halekulani Bakery offers artisan pastries and coffee. The hotel charges no resort fee. AAA Four Diamond award holder.
Address: 2233 Helumoa Rd, Honolulu, HI 96815, USA
Nearest Airports: HNL · Daniel K. Inouye · 27 km; JRF · Kalaeloa · 41 km

Alt Text: The Ritz-Carlton Residences Waikiki Beach Hotel Honolulu ocean-view suite with private terrace and Pacific panorama

Images.alt: The Ritz-Carlton Residences Waikiki Beach Hotel Honolulu ocean-view suite with private terrace and Pacific panorama

Hotel Tagline: From the Diamond Head Tower's upper floors, the Pacific fills every floor-to-ceiling window.
Summary: Two towers, 552 ocean-facing suites with full kitchens, plus the 16-seat Sushi Sho omakase counter by chef Keiji Nakazawa — arguably Honolulu’s hardest reservation. Worth staying for the Diamond Head Tower’s upper floors and the highest heated infinity pool in Waikiki.
Description ⚙: The Ritz-Carlton Residences, Waikiki Beach is a high-rise five-star property spread across two towers — the Ewa Tower and the Diamond Head Tower. Its 552 ocean-facing accommodations range from studios to multi-bedroom penthouses; with 246 suites, it holds more luxury suites on Oahu than any other hotel. Every unit includes a full kitchen, washer and dryer, and floor-to-ceiling windows overlooking the Pacific. Dining includes Sushi Sho, a 16-seat Edomae-style omakase counter by chef Keiji Nakazawa; Solera, focused on Hawaiian regional cuisine; Quiora, an open-air Italian concept; and Dean and DeLuca. The adults-only heated infinity pool is the highest in Waikiki. In 2023, the hotel received the Condé Nast Traveler Readers Choice Award as the best hotel in Hawaii.
Address: The Ritz-Carlton Residences, 383 Kalaimoku St, Honolulu, HI 96815, USA
Nearest Airports: HNL · Daniel K. Inouye · 26 km; JRF · Kalaeloa · 41 km

Hotel: Ka La’i Waikiki Beach, LXR Hotels & Resorts
Alt Text: Ka La'i Waikiki Beach LXR Hotels Resorts Honolulu ocean-view suite with direct Pacific horizon and Waikiki coastline below

Images.alt: Ka La'i Waikiki Beach LXR Hotels Resorts Honolulu ocean-view suite with direct Pacific horizon and Waikiki coastline below

Hotel Tagline: Waikiki Beach and Diamond Head, framed between Fort DeRussy Park and the open ocean.
Summary: Joined Hilton’s LXR collection in February 2024 and a phased renovation by Bryan O’Sullivan Studio — the firm behind Claridge’s and The Connaught — began in 2025. Residential suites with full kitchens look south over Fort DeRussy Park; Prime Ocean View floors face Diamond Head.
Address: 223 Saratoga Rd, Honolulu, HI 96815, USA
Nearest Airports: HNL · Daniel K. Inouye · 26 km; JRF · Kalaeloa · 41 km

Hotel: The Royal Hawaiian, A Luxury Collection Resort, Waikiki
Alt Text: The Royal Hawaiian A Luxury Collection Resort Waikiki Honolulu pink facade beside beach with pink umbrellas, palm trees, and turquoise Pacific

Images.alt: The Royal Hawaiian A Luxury Collection Resort Waikiki Honolulu pink facade beside beach with pink umbrellas, palm trees, and turquoise Pacific

Hotel Tagline: From the Mai Tai Bar, the sand and sea of Waikiki stretch out at sunset.
Summary: The Pink Palace has held the same Waikiki Beach frontage since 1927. Request the Historic Wing for the original colonial character; the Mailani Tower delivers oceanfront balconies on higher floors. The Mai Tai Bar at sunset is the most iconic table on the sand.
Address: 2259 Kalākaua Ave, Honolulu, HI 96815, USA
Nearest Airports: HNL · Daniel K. Inouye · 27 km; JRF · Kalaeloa · 41 km

Alt Text: Renaissance Honolulu Hotel Spa Honolulu corner room with panoramic views of Diamond Head, Ala Wai harbor, and Pacific Ocean

Images.alt: Renaissance Honolulu Hotel Spa Honolulu corner room with panoramic views of Diamond Head, Ala Wai harbor, and Pacific Ocean

Hotel Tagline: From the 39th floor, the Pacific opens to the south while the Ko'olau range rises to the northeast.
Summary: Opened in late 2023 in Ala Moana, the 39-story tower frames the Pacific to the south and the Koʻolau range to the northeast — a dual horizon unavailable from deep inside Waikiki. Nami Spa introduced Oahu’s first traditional Japanese ofuro soaking baths.
Description ⚙: The Renaissance Honolulu Hotel and Spa opened in late 2023 in the Ala Moana district, delivering a 39-story vantage point above the shoreline between Waikiki and downtown Honolulu. The 187-room hotel's position gives upper-floor rooms a panorama of the Pacific to the south and the Ko'olau mountain range to the northeast. Rooms include floor-to-ceiling glass windows and deep soaking tubs. The Sky Deck on the 8th floor features a 25-meter heated lap pool, two whirlpools, and a poolside bar. The signature spa Nami Spa introduced traditional Japanese ofuro soaking baths to Oahu, alongside Himalayan salt saunas and cold plunge circuits. The restaurant SERA serves coastal Mediterranean cuisine. The hotel is directly across from Ala Moana Center and close to Ala Moana Beach Park.
Address: 1390 Kapiolani Blvd, Honolulu, HI 96814, USA
Nearest Airports: HNL · Daniel K. Inouye · 23 km; JRF · Kalaeloa · 38 km

Alt Text: The Kahala Hotel and Resort Honolulu oceanfront room with balcony overlooking unobstructed Pacific horizon

Images.alt: The Kahala Hotel and Resort Honolulu oceanfront room with balcony overlooking unobstructed Pacific horizon

Hotel Tagline: From the oceanfront rooms, the panorama stretches unbroken from Diamond Head to Koko Head Crater.
Summary: A deliberate retreat from Waikiki, beyond Diamond Head on its own private beach. Oceanfront rooms span from Diamond Head to Koko Head Crater; the beach stays uncrowded when the strip does not. Hoku’s draws a local following that signals what the ocean view is worth here.
Description ⚙: When it opened in 1964, The Kahala Hotel and Resort was the most expensive hotel ever built at that time, at a cost of US$12 million. Nestled between a golf course and the Pacific, beyond Diamond Head, the hotel offers a private beach and oceanfront rooms with panoramic views from Diamond Head to Koko Head Crater. The resort's lagoon is shared with resident Atlantic bottlenose dolphins as part of a long-standing marine education program. Hoku's restaurant is recognized for innovative fusion cuisine blending Hawaiian influences with global flavors. The Veranda offers ocean views for afternoon tea and evening cocktails. The hotel holds an Ocean Friendly Restaurant certification from the Surfrider Foundation.
Address: Kahala Resort, 5000 Kahala Ave #5000, Honolulu, HI 96816, USA
Nearest Airports: HNL · Daniel K. Inouye · 32 km; JRF · Kalaeloa · 46 km

Alt Text: Aston Waikiki Beach Tower Honolulu balcony view over Kuhio Beach, rock breakwater, and turquoise Pacific

Images.alt: Aston Waikiki Beach Tower Honolulu balcony view over Kuhio Beach, rock breakwater, and turquoise Pacific

Hotel Tagline: From a high-floor lanai, the Pacific and Diamond Head stretch unobstructed above Kuhio Beach.
Summary: All-suite on Kalakaua Avenue, across from the calmer Kuhio Beach section. We’d request the 2-bedroom Premium Oceanfront suite on a high floor: private lanai with unobstructed Pacific and Diamond Head, and a full kitchen for a longer stay.
Description ⚙: Located on Kalakaua Avenue across from the Kuhio Beach section of Waikiki, the Aston Waikiki Beach Tower is an all-suite property positioned in one of Waikiki's calmer beach areas. Higher-floor suites — particularly the 2-bedroom Premium Oceanfront, Penthouse, and Presidential Suite — offer unobstructed vistas of Waikiki Beach and the Pacific. All suites feature floor-to-ceiling windows, private balconies with ocean views, and full kitchens. Amenities include a heated swimming pool. The property is primarily condominium-style accommodations, offering residential comfort near the beach.
Address: 2470 Kalākaua Ave, Honolulu, HI 96815, USA
Nearest Airports: HNL · Daniel K. Inouye · 28 km; JRF · Kalaeloa · 43 km

Alt Text: Prince Waikiki Honolulu infinity pool with Ala Moana shoreline and Pacific Ocean in the background

Images.alt: Prince Waikiki Honolulu infinity pool with Ala Moana shoreline and Pacific Ocean in the background

Hotel Tagline: Every room faces the Pacific, guaranteed, from a harbor perch at Waikiki's edge.
Summary: Positioned at the harbor gateway to Waikiki, every room faces south or west — an ocean view guaranteed regardless of category. The saltwater infinity pool on the fifth floor and the Lanai Suite’s private rooftop terrace both frame the water at the right hour of the day.
Description ⚙: Prince Waikiki is situated at the gateway to Waikiki near the Ala Wai Harbor. Every room faces south or west, guaranteeing an ocean view regardless of category. The fifth-floor saltwater infinity pool overlooks the harbor and the Pacific Ocean, with a sun deck and cabanas. The Lanai Suite offers sunset views from a private rooftop terrace. The 100 Sails Restaurant and Bar features harbor views and offers a buffet. The hotel is a ten-minute walk from the Ala Moana Center and Ala Moana Beach Park. Beach access points are available within a five-minute walk.
Address: 100 Holomoana St, Honolulu, HI 96815, USA
Nearest Airports: HNL · Daniel K. Inouye · 25 km; JRF · Kalaeloa · 40 km

Hotel: Moana Surfrider, A Westin Resort & Spa, Waikiki Beach
Alt Text: Moana Surfrider A Westin Resort Spa Waikiki Beach Honolulu beachfront facade with palm-lined shore and Diamond Head

Images.alt: Moana Surfrider A Westin Resort Spa Waikiki Beach Honolulu beachfront facade with palm-lined shore and Diamond Head

Hotel Tagline: From the same strip of Waikiki sand since 1901, with Diamond Head on the eastern horizon.
Summary: Waikiki’s first hotel — open since 1901 and on the National Register of Historic Places — still on the original stretch of sand. Tower Ocean View rooms face directly onto the beach; the Historic Banyan Wing’s east-facing rooms reach Diamond Head.
Description ⚙: The Moana Surfrider opened on March 11, 1901, and is recognized as Waikiki's first hotel. Listed on the National Register of Historic Places, the hotel occupies the same stretch of Waikiki Beach today. Tower Ocean View rooms face the ocean directly. In the Historic Banyan Wing, east-facing rooms provide views of Diamond Head. The hotel's design features tall columns, intricate woodwork, and a large banyan tree planted in 1904 that covers the courtyard. The Beachhouse at the Moana and the Veranda at the Beachhouse both offer ocean dining experiences. The hotel is within steps of shops and central Waikiki.
Address: 2365 Kalākaua Ave, Honolulu, HI 96815, USA
Nearest Airports: HNL · Daniel K. Inouye · 29 km; JRF · Kalaeloa · 44 km

Alt Text: OUTRIGGER Waikiki Beachcomber Hotel Honolulu ocean-view room with balcony and Diamond Head in the distance

Images.alt: OUTRIGGER Waikiki Beachcomber Hotel Honolulu ocean-view room with balcony and Diamond Head in the distance

Hotel Tagline: From Kalakaua Avenue, Pacific views open through ocean rooms and from the rooftop pool above.
Summary: One block from the beach, between the International Market Place and the main Waikiki strip. Ocean rooms and the corner Beachcomber Suite are the categories where the Pacific appears; the rooftop pool extends it. Refreshed in 2019 under the Outrigger brand.
Description ⚙: The OUTRIGGER Waikiki Beachcomber Hotel is located on Kalakaua Avenue one block from Waikiki Beach, between the International Market Place and the main Waikiki strip. Rooms were upgraded in 2019 after the Outrigger brand assumed management. Ocean rooms, corner suites, and the Beachcomber Suite offer Pacific views. Hotel amenities include a rooftop pool, fitness center, mini-market, and a lobby brewpub. The hotel provides complimentary beach towels.
Address: 2300 Kalākaua Ave, Honolulu, HI 96815, USA
Nearest Airports: HNL · Daniel K. Inouye · 27 km; JRF · Kalaeloa · 41 km

Alt Text: OUTRIGGER Reef Waikiki Beach Resort Honolulu beachfront cabana lounge with ocean and palm tree view

Images.alt: OUTRIGGER Reef Waikiki Beach Resort Honolulu beachfront cabana lounge with ocean and palm tree view

Hotel Tagline: From the western end of Waikiki Beach, Pacific panoramas stretch 180 degrees to Diamond Head.
Summary: At the western end of Waikiki Beach following an $80 million renovation completed in 2021. Club Oceanfront Suites deliver 180-degree Pacific panoramas; the Club Diamond Head Oceanfront Suite extends the frame inland. Duke’s Waikiki on the sand merits a dinner reservation regardless.
Description ⚙: The OUTRIGGER Reef Waikiki Beach Resort sits at the western end of Waikiki Beach, following an $80 million renovation completed in 2021. Ocean-facing rooms and suites were redesigned around Hawaiian culture and tropical decor. The Club Oceanfront Suite offers 180-degree Pacific views, and the Club Diamond Head Oceanfront Suite adds the crater to the panorama; both afford access to the Voyager 47 Club Lounge. A lagoon-shaped pool and spa are on the property. Duke's Waikiki and Hula Grill provide beachside dining with views of the ocean and palm trees. The hotel fronts directly onto Waikiki Beach.
Address: 2169 Kālia Rd, Honolulu, HI 96815, USA
Nearest Airports: HNL · Daniel K. Inouye · 26 km; JRF · Kalaeloa · 41 km

Alt Text: Çırağan Palace Kempinski Istanbul aerial view of the Ottoman palace facade and palm-lined gardens with the outdoor pool along the Bosphorus at sunset and the 15 July Martyrs Bridge in the background

Images.alt: Çırağan Palace Kempinski Istanbul aerial view of the Ottoman palace facade and palm-lined gardens with the outdoor pool along the Bosphorus at sunset and the 15 July Martyrs Bridge in the background

Hotel Tagline: Infinity pool and restaurant meet the Bosphorus at waterline, palace-side.
Summary: The 2023 redesign by Ottoman art expert Serdar Gülgün runs from lobby Iznik ceramics to bronze four-poster beds in the suites. We’d book the Sultan Suite — 376 sqm, three Bosphorus balconies, private hammam. The winter-heated infinity pool and Tuğra restaurant face the strait with equal directness.
Description ⚙: A 19th-century Ottoman palace on the Bosphorus, fully redesigned in 2023 by Ottoman art expert Serdar Gülgün. The Sultan Suite spans 376 sqm across three Bosphorus balconies; the winter-heated infinity pool and Tuğra restaurant face the strait at waterline. Eleven palace suites are available for exclusive use.
Address: Yıldız, Çırağan Cd. No:32, 34349 Beşiktaş/İstanbul, Türkiye
Nearest Airports: IST · Istanbul · 46 km; SAW · Sabiha Gökçen · 49 km

Alt Text: Mandarin Oriental Bosphorus Istanbul suite living and dining area with floor-to-ceiling windows opening directly to Bosphorus water view and wooded Asian hills

Images.alt: Mandarin Oriental Bosphorus Istanbul suite living and dining area with floor-to-ceiling windows opening directly to Bosphorus water view and wooded Asian hills

Hotel Tagline: Every balcony sits metres from the Bosphorus, the strait filling three sides of the Royal Suite.
Summary: Every one of the 100 rooms has a balcony just metres from the Bosphorus — an immersive docked-at-shore feeling that the waterfront cluster rarely matches. The Royal Bosphorus Suite delivers three-sided strait panoramas. Hakkasan and Novikov are both worth sitting down to; neither requires leaving the water’s edge.
Description ⚙: Every one of the 100 rooms and 23 suites has a balcony just metres from the Bosphorus. The Royal Bosphorus Suite delivers three-sided strait panoramas; Hakkasan (Cantonese) and Novikov anchor the waterfront dining terrace. The Mandarin Spa covers 3,500 square metres including two outdoor pools.
Address: Kuruçeşme, Muallim Naci Cd. No: 62, 34345 Beşiktaş/İstanbul, Türkiye
Nearest Airports: IST · Istanbul · 45 km; SAW · Sabiha Gökçen · 55 km

Alt Text: The Ritz-Carlton Istanbul suite sitting area with blue velvet sofa and floor-to-ceiling windows showing the Bosphorus and the Maiden's Tower on the Asian shore

Images.alt: The Ritz-Carlton Istanbul suite sitting area with blue velvet sofa and floor-to-ceiling windows showing the Bosphorus and the Maiden's Tower on the Asian shore

Hotel Tagline: Above Dolmabahçe Palace, the Bosphorus stretches from the Old City domes to both bridges.
Summary: Following a complete refurbishment in 2018, the Ritz-Carlton commands one of the city’s widest Bosphorus sweeps from above Dolmabahçe Palace. The room to ask for is the Nobu Suite — ofuro tub on the terrace, the strait below. Atölye, Michelin-listed since 2023, anchors the restaurant floor.
Description ⚙: Set above Dolmabahçe Palace in Süzer Plaza, the Ritz-Carlton sweeps from the Old City domes to both Bosphorus bridges. Front Bosphorus View rooms and the Nobu Suite (ofuro tub on the terrace) deliver the clearest sightlines. Atölye has been Michelin Guide–listed since 2023; The Roof adds a rooftop infinity pool.
Address: Suzer Plaza Askerocagi Caddesi, No:6, 34367 Elmadag, Harbiye, 34367 Şişli/İstanbul, Türkiye
Nearest Airports: IST · Istanbul · 42 km; SAW · Sabiha Gökçen · 50 km

Alt Text: The Peninsula Istanbul aerial view of the hotel building on the Galataport waterfront at sunset with Galata Tower rising above the rooftops and the Golden Horn to the left

Images.alt: The Peninsula Istanbul aerial view of the hotel building on the Galataport waterfront at sunset with Galata Tower rising above the rooftops and the Golden Horn to the left

Hotel Tagline: From a Bosphorus balcony, binoculars bring the Maiden's Tower within reach.
Summary: When the Peninsula opened in February 2023, four restored shoreline buildings from 1910–1937 became its footprint. Rooms in the 1912 Rıhtım Han and 1910 Çinili Han face the Bosphorus and the Maiden’s Tower. Ask for the Executive Bosphorus corner suite — binoculars are included; the balcony view explains why.
Description ⚙: Opened in February 2023 across four restored Galataport buildings from 1910–1937, with the 1937 passenger terminal as the lobby. Rooms in the 1912 Rıhtım Han and 1910 Çinili Han face the Bosphorus and the Maiden's Tower. The Executive Bosphorus corner suite includes binoculars and a panoramic balcony.
Address: Kemankeş Karamustafa Paşa, Kemankeş Cd. No:34, 34425 Beyoğlu/İstanbul, Türkiye
Nearest Airports: IST · Istanbul · 43 km; SAW · Sabiha Gökçen · 44 km

Hotel: Four Seasons Hotel Istanbul at the Bosphorus
Alt Text: Four Seasons Hotel Istanbul at the Bosphorus outdoor pool with red-and-white striped umbrellas and loungers along the Bosphorus waterfront

Images.alt: Four Seasons Hotel Istanbul at the Bosphorus outdoor pool with red-and-white striped umbrellas and loungers along the Bosphorus waterfront

Hotel Tagline: A 200-metre terrace along the Bosphorus, with the 15 July Martyrs Bridge framed at sunrise.

The marble infinity pool mirrors the Bosphorus; Palace Bosphorus rooms and suites with private terraces frame the 15 July Martyrs Bridge at sunrise. A free shuttle connects to the Sultanahmet sister property.
Description ⚙: A pale pink 19th-century Ottoman palace beside Çırağan, with a 200-metre terrace unrolling along the Bosphorus. Palace Bosphorus rooms and suites with private terraces frame the 15 July Martyrs Bridge at sunrise; the marble infinity pool mirrors the strait. A complimentary shuttle connects to the Sultanahmet sister property.

Hotel Tagline: From the dining room window, the Bosphorus Strait stretches before you.
Summary: A 1929 tobacco warehouse turned Far Eastern retreat on the Bosphorus, with an 18-metre silk mural and Bohemian glass chandeliers running through the interior. Worth staying for: the Shangri-La Suite, with 180-degree wraparound terrace views. IST TOO serves the strait from the dining room window.
Description ⚙: A 1929 tobacco warehouse transformed into a Far Eastern retreat on the Bosphorus, featuring an 18-metre silk mural and Bohemian glass chandeliers. The Bosphorus Duplex and Deluxe Bosphorus suites are the recommended categories; the Shangri-La Suite crowns the building with 180-degree wraparound terraces. IST TOO restaurant serves the strait from the dining room window.

Hotel Tagline: From Maçka Hill, palace domes and white minarets frame a wide Bosphorus sweep below.
Summary: Perched on Maçka Hill above Dolmabahçe Palace, the Swissôtel sits higher than any waterfront rival and earns a wider Bosphorus sweep for it. Signature Lofts frame palace domes and white minarets through floor-to-ceiling glass. In summer, 16 Roof; in winter, a century-old Chalet cabin with fondue.
Description ⚙: Perched on Maçka Hill above Dolmabahçe Palace, the Swissôtel's 566 rooms command Bosphorus views across the palace domes and white minarets below. Signature Lofts frame the panorama through floor-to-ceiling glass. In summer, the rooftop 16 Roof hosts sunset cocktails; in winter, the century-old Chalet cabin serves fondue beside the Bosphorus.

Hotel Tagline: From the rooms, the Bosphorus, Sultanahmet's domes, and the historic peninsula align in one panorama.
Summary: Five minutes from Taksim Square, the InterContinental angles its 390 rooms toward a panorama that takes in the Bosphorus, Sultanahmet’s domes, and the historic peninsula simultaneously. The Safran Restaurant & Terrace pairs Ottoman cuisine with the same view. Bosphorus Suites add balconies and jacuzzis.
Description ⚙: Five minutes from Taksim Square, the InterContinental angles its 390 rooms toward a panorama encompassing the Bosphorus, Sultanahmet's domes, and the historic peninsula. Bosphorus Suites add balconies and jacuzzis; the Safran Restaurant and Terrace serves Ottoman cuisine against the same view. The outdoor pool is heated and operates seasonally.

Hotel Tagline: Three private terraces, with Hagia Sophia's dome at closest range.
Summary: A saffron-yellow Neoclassical building — once the city’s first jailhouse, reborn in 1996 and fully reimagined in 2022. Sixty-five rooms and suites face the Hagia Sophia or the fragrant courtyard. We’d request the St. Sophia Suite: three private terraces, the dome at closest range.
Description ⚙: A saffron-yellow Neoclassical former jailhouse in the heart of Sultanahmet, reborn in 1996 and fully reimagined in 2022. The Süreyya Rooftop Terrace faces the Hagia Sophia directly; the St. Sophia Suite offers three private terraces with the dome at closest range. The hotel's courtyard restaurant Avlu and a patisserie complete the Old City experience.
Address: Sultanahmet, Cankurtaran, Tevkifhane Sk. No:1, 34122 Fatih/İstanbul, Türkiye

Hotel Tagline: From Gümüşsuyu Hill above Dolmabahçe Palace, the Bosphorus curves 270 degrees.
Summary: On Gümüşsuyu Hill above Dolmabahçe Palace, the CVK commands one of Istanbul’s widest Bosphorus sweeps — 270 degrees from the Grand Executive Suite at the top floors. The rooftop Istanbul Terrace Restaurant puts dinner against the same panorama; Taksim Square is a three-minute walk.
Description ⚙: On Gümüşsuyu Hill above Dolmabahçe Palace, the CVK Park Bosphorus commands a wide Bosphorus panorama from 453 rooms and suites. The Grand Executive Suite delivers approximately 270-degree views from the top floors; the rooftop Istanbul Terrace Restaurant puts dinner against the same sweep. Taksim Square is a three-minute walk.

Hotel Tagline: Hagia Sophia, the Blue Mosque, and the Sea of Marmara meet in a single rooftop frame.
Summary: In Sultanahmet, a four-star rooftop terrace that outperforms its category: Hagia Sophia, the Blue Mosque, and the Sea of Marmara in a single frame at breakfast and dinner alike. The terrace seats 400 on summer evenings. Superior rooms share the same privileged views across the Marmara.
Description ⚙: In Sultanahmet, a four-star hotel whose rooftop terrace frames Hagia Sophia, the Blue Mosque, and the Sea of Marmara in a single view. The terrace seats up to 400 on summer evenings; Superior rooms share the same privileged views across the Marmara. The hotel is a 10-minute walk from Topkapı Palace.

Hotel Tagline: Bosphorus visible through anti-reflection glass from every room — even the shower.
Summary: Architect Sinan Kafadar’s 17-floor titanium façade curves above Gezi Park, its anti-reflection panoramic windows trained on the Bosphorus — visible even from the shower in the Deluxe rooms. The suite to request: the Duplex, 75 sqm across two floors, Bosphorus views from bedroom and jacuzzi both.
Description ⚙: Architect Sinan Kafadar's 17-floor titanium façade above Gezi Park features anti-reflection panoramic windows trained on the Bosphorus across 56 rooms and 11 suites. The Duplex Suite delivers Bosphorus views from bedroom, bathroom, and living room across two floors; the Sky Suite adds a rooftop terrace combining the strait, Gezi Park, and Taksim in one frame. A near-zero-emission property with Turkey's Greening Hotels certification.

Hotel Tagline: Breakfast on the rooftop with Hagia Sophia's dome rising directly ahead.
Summary: Steps from the Hagia Sophia in Sultanahmet, the Agora Life keeps it focused: rooftop breakfast with the dome rising directly ahead, the Bosphorus glinting in the distance, and ferries tracking toward Galata. Select rooms frame the same skyline from the pillow — one of the city’s strongest ratios of view to rate.
Description ⚙: A boutique hotel in the heart of Sultanahmet, steps from the Hagia Sophia, whose rooftop terrace serves breakfast with the dome rising directly ahead. Select rooms frame the Hagia Sophia, Topkapı Palace, and distant Galata Tower from the pillow. One of Istanbul's strongest ratios of view to room rate in the Old City.
Address: Alemdar, Cağaloğlu Hamamı Sk. No:6, 34110 Fatih/İstanbul, Türkiye

Hotel Tagline: Golden Horn panoramas unfold from the Mata Hari and Hemingway Suites above Istanbul.
Summary: Built in 1892 for Orient Express travellers, the Pera Palace is equal parts five-star hotel and living museum. The Mata Hari and Hemingway Suites crown the building with Golden Horn panoramas; Room 411, linked to Agatha Christie, retains its literary mystique. Afternoon tea under six domes at the Kubbeli Saloon.
Description ⚙: Built in 1892 for Orient Express passengers, the Pera Palace is equal parts five-star hotel and living museum. The Mata Hari and Hemingway Suites offer panoramic Golden Horn views; Room 411, linked to Agatha Christie, preserves its literary history. Afternoon tea under six domes at the Kubbeli Saloon is among Istanbul's most distinctive hospitality experiences.
Address: Meşrutiyet Caddesi, Evliya Çelebi, Tepebaşı Cd. No:52, 34430 Beyoğlu/İstanbul, Türkiye
Nearest Airports: IST · Istanbul · 41 km; SAW · Sabiha Gökçen · 43 km

Hotel Tagline: From this Ortaköy building, the Grand Mecidiye Mosque and the Bosphorus align in the same frame.
Summary: A Balyan-dynasty mansion in Ortaköy, redesigned by Autoban, where 16 of its 26 rooms face the Bosphorus directly. The Landmark Penthouse Suite frames the Grand Mecidiye Mosque and the strait at once — an angle specific to this building on this stretch of water. The ferry pier is steps from the entrance.
Description ⚙: A 19th-century Balyan-dynasty mansion in Ortaköy, redesigned by Autoban, where 16 of its 26 rooms face the Bosphorus directly. The Landmark Penthouse Suite frames the Grand Mecidiye Mosque and the strait simultaneously — an angle specific to this building. The Romantic Penthouse Suite adds the 15 July Martyrs Bridge to the same Bosphorus panorama.
Address: Yıldız, Ortaköy Salhanesi Sk. No:1/A, 34349 Beşiktaş/İstanbul, Türkiye

Hotel Tagline: From 34 floors above Mecidiyeköy, the Bosphorus Strait opens wide across the city.
Summary: Rising 34 floors above Mecidiyeköy in Emre Arolat’s tower, the Fairmont Quasar sends its Bosphorus View Rooms toward the strait from city height. The 15th-floor Gold Lounge pairs butler service with wide-angle panoramas. Aila, Michelin-recommended every year since 2023, defines the kitchen.
Description ⚙: A 34-floor tower by Emre Arolat in Mecidiyeköy with Bosphorus View Rooms, a 15th-floor Gold Lounge with wide-angle panoramas, and Aila — Michelin Guide–recommended since 2023 and Gault & Millau–recognized — as the flagship restaurant. Ukiyo offers Asian cuisine beside the outdoor infinity pool in summer; Demlique serves afternoon tea.
Address: Mecidiyeköy Mahallesi, Büyükdere Cd. No:76, 34393 Şişli/İstanbul, Türkiye

Hotel Tagline: From the rooftop, Hagia Sophia and the Blue Mosque anchor the skyline across the Golden Horn.
Summary: A Camondo family building from 1874, restored in 2022 as a fifty-room Autograph Collection boutique in Beyoğlu. The view comes at the top: rooftop restaurant Béatrice looks across the Golden Horn to a skyline anchored by the Hagia Sophia and the Blue Mosque — worth staying for the terrace alone.
Description ⚙: A 1874 Camondo family building in Beyoğlu, restored in 2022 as a fifty-room Autograph Collection boutique. Rooftop restaurant Béatrice looks across the Golden Horn to a skyline combining Hagia Sophia, the Blue Mosque, and Galata Tower. With only fifty rooms, the hotel maintains a genuinely personal service standard.
View Subjects: Golden Horn, Hagia Sophia, Blue Mosque
Address: Asmalı Mescit, General Yazgan Sk. No.14, 34430 Beyoğlu/İstanbul, Türkiye

Alt Text: Park Hyatt Kuala Lumpur Merdeka 118 corner room at night with KL Tower on left window and Petronas Twin Towers on right window

Images.alt: Park Hyatt Kuala Lumpur Merdeka 118 corner room at night with KL Tower on left window and Petronas Twin Towers on right window

Hotel Tagline: From the 99th-floor pool, the Petronas Twin Towers sit below the waterline.
Summary: The only hotel that looks down at the Petronas Twin Towers. Between floors 97 and 114 of Merdeka 118 — the world’s second-tallest building — every room places the city’s icons below the horizon. The 99th-floor pool confirms it. Ask for a City View Room above floor 100.
Description ⚙: The only hotel in Kuala Lumpur from which the Petronas Twin Towers are visible from above. Park Hyatt Kuala Lumpur occupies levels 97 to 114 of Merdeka 118 — the second-tallest building in the world at 678.9 metres — making it the highest hotel on the planet by occupied floors. Opened in August 2025, designed by GA Group (London), the 252 rooms and 27 suites all feature floor-to-ceiling panoramic windows. City View Rooms face the Petronas Twin Towers directly; Corner Suites frame the city on two sides. The indoor pool on the 99th floor positions swimmers above the Twin Towers, KL Tower, and the Exchange TRX. Merdeka Grill focuses on premium cuts and locally sourced produce; Cacao Mixology and Chocolate — the city's first chocolate-themed bar — serves cocktails framed by a panoramic view overlooking the Petronas Twin Towers from above.
View Subjects: Petronas Twin Towers, KL Tower (Menara KL)
Address: KL118, Presint Merdeka 118, Wilayah Persekutuan, 50118 Kuala Lumpur, Wilayah Persekutuan Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia
Nearest Airports: SZB · Subang · 25 km

Alt Text: Traders Hotel Kuala Lumpur SkyBar indoor pool at night with glass grid ceiling and Petronas Twin Towers at far end

Images.alt: Traders Hotel Kuala Lumpur SkyBar indoor pool at night with glass grid ceiling and Petronas Twin Towers at far end

Hotel Tagline: From the 33rd floor, the full height of the Petronas Twin Towers fills the window straight on.
Summary: SkyBar, reimagined in 2025 with a new layout and live music, still holds the best straight-on view of the Petronas Twin Towers at rooftop level. The Twin Towers View suites bring the same sightline into the room — floor-to-ceiling, with Club Lounge access included.
Description ⚙: Part of the Shangri-La Group, Traders Hotel, Kuala Lumpur is one of the city's most established addresses for Petronas Twin Towers views. SkyBar, fully reimagined in 2025 with a new layout and live music programme, occupies the 33rd floor with an infinity pool and unobstructed sightlines to the towers. Many of the 571 rooms and suites face the Twin Towers; the Twin Towers View suites frame the full height of both spires through floor-to-ceiling windows and include access to the Club Lounge.
Address: Persiaran KLCC, Kuala Lumpur City Centre, 50088 Kuala Lumpur, Wilayah Persekutuan Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia
Nearest Airports: SZB · Subang · 32 km

Images.alt: Grand Hyatt Kuala Lumpur reception desk at night with Petronas Twin Towers through floor-to-ceiling windows

Hotel Tagline: From the 38th floor, the Petronas Twin Towers anchor a full-circle sweep of Kuala Lumpur.
Summary: THIRTY8 on the 38th floor runs show kitchens in a full-circle view of the city, with the Petronas Twin Towers anchoring the frame. The 411 rooms extend that view through generously sized windows. The rooftop pool earns a session of its own.
Description ⚙: The Grand Hyatt Kuala Lumpur's 38th-floor signature restaurant, THIRTY8, provides 360-degree views of the city skyline with the Petronas Twin Towers anchoring the frame — a show kitchen theatre reinforced by one of the most comprehensive panoramas available at dining level in the city. All 411 rooms and suites feature generously sized windows facing the cityscape. The check-in lobby is itself elevated, with panoramic city views visible on arrival.
Address: 12, Jalan Pinang, Kuala Lumpur, 50450 Kuala Lumpur, Wilayah Persekutuan Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia
Nearest Airports: SZB · Subang · 28 km

Alt Text: Mandarin Oriental Kuala Lumpur king bedroom at night with close-up view of Petronas Twin Towers and Skybridge

Images.alt: Mandarin Oriental Kuala Lumpur king bedroom at night with close-up view of Petronas Twin Towers and Skybridge

Hotel Tagline: From the pool above the park canopy, the Petronas Twin Towers rise directly ahead.
Summary: Positioned between the KLCC Park and the Petronas Twin Towers, with an outdoor pool suspended above the park canopy. The Club Towers View Room looks almost directly into the Skybridge; the 2-bedroom Twin Towers suites deliver the corner living room view that the KLCC corridor can’t match elsewhere.
Description ⚙: Situated between the KLCC Park and the Petronas Twin Towers, Mandarin Oriental, Kuala Lumpur occupies one of the most coveted positions in the city. The Club Towers View Room category provides frontal vistas of the Petronas Twin Towers close enough for the Skybridge to be visible in detail. The 2-bedroom Twin Towers suites offer corner living rooms with the same sightline at greater scale. The outdoor pool is suspended above the KLCC Park canopy with the towers in the background; the hotel's spa is among the most established in Kuala Lumpur's luxury tier.
Address: Kuala Lumpur City Centre, 50088 Kuala Lumpur, Wilayah Persekutuan Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia
Nearest Airports: SZB · Subang · 28 km

Alt Text: Four Seasons Hotel Kuala Lumpur lounge bar at sunset with glass bubble pendant lights and Petronas Twin Towers through floor-to-ceiling windows

Images.alt: Four Seasons Hotel Kuala Lumpur lounge bar at sunset with glass bubble pendant lights and Petronas Twin Towers through floor-to-ceiling windows

Hotel Tagline: After dark, the Petronas Twin Towers fill the pool and bar's panorama.
Summary: Bar Trigona — ranked 39th on Asia’s 50 Best Bars in 2025 — serves honey-forward cocktails built from Malaysian stingless-bee honey, with the Petronas Twin Towers framing every sip. Several rooms face the towers directly. The Executive Club adds an elevated pool and a working terrace.
Description ⚙: Open since 2018 in the Golden Triangle, the Four Seasons Hotel Kuala Lumpur offers several room, suite, and luxury apartment categories with direct Petronas Twin Towers views. Bar Trigona, ranked 39th on Asia's 50 Best Bars in 2025, serves honey-forward cocktails built from Trigona honey sourced from Malaysian stingless bees, with the towers framing the bar's panorama. Yun House, the hotel's Cantonese restaurant, has been Michelin-selected consecutively from 2023 to 2025. A 25-metre elevated outdoor pool overlooks the Petronas Twin Towers, at its most striking after dark. The Executive Club lounge adds complimentary breakfast, all-day snacks, and dedicated workspaces with tower views.
Address: 145, Jln Ampang, Kuala Lumpur, 50450 Kuala Lumpur, Wilayah Persekutuan Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia
Nearest Airports: SZB · Subang · 32 km

Alt Text: W Kuala Lumpur Hotel rooftop outdoor dining terrace at night with Petronas Twin Towers through glass panels

Images.alt: W Kuala Lumpur Hotel rooftop outdoor dining terrace at night with Petronas Twin Towers through glass panels

Hotel Tagline: Twin Towers fill the glass from the top-floor suite's private pool to the outdoor lap lanes below.
Summary: The EWOW suite is 520 square metres of Twin Towers views, a private pool, and enough space to lose track of the floor plan. For the more decisive guest, the Spectacular Twin Towers rooms deliver the same sightline at a fraction of the footprint. The outdoor pool is worth a lap.
Description ⚙: W Kuala Lumpur Hotel offers Petronas Twin Towers views from its Spectacular Twin Towers rooms and the EWOW suite — a 520-square-metre top-floor accommodation with a private pool, multiple living areas, and hypnotic views of the city's most iconic postcard. The outdoor pool also faces the Twin Towers and is a popular evening destination. AWAY Spa provides a full range of treatments; the FIT fitness centre is equipped with Life Fitness cardio and strength equipment.
Address: 121, Jln Ampang, Kuala Lumpur, 50450 Kuala Lumpur, Wilayah Persekutuan Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia
Nearest Airports: SZB · Subang · 27 km

Images.alt: Ascott Star KLCC rooftop infinity pool with Petronas Twin Towers KL Tower and Merdeka 118 in background

Hotel Tagline: From the 57th-floor pool, the Petronas Twin Towers, Merdeka 118, and KL Tower align in one frame.
Summary: On the 57th floor, a pool frames the Petronas Twin Towers, Merdeka 118, and the KL Tower in one panorama — one of the city’s more complete skyline reads from water level. Below, the serviced apartments run from studios to three-bedroom units, all with kitchens and most with tower views.
Description ⚙: A luxury serviced residence near the Kuala Lumpur City Centre, Ascott Star KLCC blends hotel amenities with residential practicality — studios, one-, two-, and three-bedroom apartments with fully equipped kitchens and living areas. The rooftop infinity pool on the 57th floor captures the Petronas Twin Towers, Merdeka 118, and the KL Tower simultaneously, making it one of the widest single-view pool panoramas in the city. Most serviced apartments have direct tower views, and the property's elevated position and apartment scale make it particularly suited to extended stays.
View Subjects: Petronas Twin Towers, KL Tower (Menara KL)
Address: 1, Jalan Yap Kwan Seng, 50450 Kuala Lumpur, Wilayah Persekutuan Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia
Nearest Airports: SZB · Subang · 28 km
