Alt Text: Hotel Stripes Kuala Lumpur Autograph Collection rooftop terrace at dusk with illuminated KL Tower and candlelit lounge beds

Images.alt: Hotel Stripes Kuala Lumpur Autograph Collection rooftop terrace at dusk with illuminated KL Tower and candlelit lounge beds

Hotel Tagline: From the rooftop pool, the KL Tower rises over the KLCC Park canopy with the Petronas at an oblique angle.
Summary: A boutique Autograph Collection property in Jalan Kamunting, where the rooftop Man Tao bar and infinity pool face the KL Tower over the KLCC Park canopy. The Petronas appear at an oblique angle — a lateral read of the skyline that the KLCC corridor hotels can’t replicate.
Description ⚙: A boutique 5-star Marriott Autograph Collection property in the Jalan Kamunting neighbourhood, Hotel Stripes Kuala Lumpur offers a distinctive lateral read of the Kuala Lumpur skyline. The rooftop Man Tao bar and infinity pool face the KL Tower directly over the KLCC Park canopy, with the Petronas Twin Towers visible at an oblique angle — a perspective unavailable from the KLCC corridor hotels. The Executive Studio category frames the KL Tower rising from the greenery below. The hotel's location near The Row brings it within walking distance of galleries, independent restaurants, and design shops.
View Subjects: KL Tower (Menara KL), Petronas Twin Towers
Address: Corner of Jalan Sultan Ismail, 25, Jalan Kamunting, Chow Kit, 50300 Kuala Lumpur, Federal Territory of Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia
Nearest Airports: SZB · Subang · 26 km

Alt Text: Shangri-La Kuala Lumpur hotel room with curved bay window overlooking city skyline and tree canopy

Images.alt: Shangri-La Kuala Lumpur hotel room with curved bay window overlooking city skyline and tree canopy

Hotel Tagline: KL Tower rises into the skyline from the windows of the Horizon Club and Malaysian Suite.
Summary: The Horizon Club Executive Rooms and the Malaysian Suite overlook the KL Tower and the city skyline from one of Kuala Lumpur’s most established five-star addresses. Three dining venues — Lemon Garden, Shang Palace, and Arthur’s Bar & Grill — make the case for spending the evening in.
Description ⚙: One of Kuala Lumpur's most established five-star addresses, Shangri-La Kuala Lumpur offers city and skyline views from the Horizon Club Executive Rooms and the Malaysian Suite on Jalan Sultan Ismail. The hotel's 662 rooms include categories facing the KL Tower and the wider city skyline. Three dining venues — Lemon Garden (international buffet), Shang Palace (Cantonese), and Arthur's Bar and Grill (Manhattan-style steak bar) — make it a strong in-house dining destination. The outdoor pool is surrounded by the city's skyline; the spa and Health Club are among the most comprehensive at a Kuala Lumpur city hotel.
Address: 11, Jln Sultan Ismail, Kuala Lumpur, 50250 Kuala Lumpur, Wilayah Persekutuan Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia
Nearest Airports: SZB · Subang · 27 km

Alt Text: Montage Laguna Beach private terrace with outdoor dining table and Pacific Ocean sunset view framed by palm trees

Images.alt: Montage Laguna Beach private terrace with outdoor dining table and Pacific Ocean sunset view framed by palm trees

Hotel Tagline: Thirty acres of coastal bluff, with breaking surf directly below the terrace.
Summary: Thirty acres of coastal bluff, where the ocean registers as sound before it does as view. The Signature Ocean suites position breaking surf beneath the terrace; the pool deck brings you to the cliff edge. That sea-reflected light, shifting all day, is what the stay is actually built around.
Description ⚙: Montage Laguna Beach is a five-star resort set on 30 acres of coastal bluff above the Pacific Ocean in Laguna Beach, California. The property occupies a headland between Crystal Cove State Park and Main Beach, with ocean views from all guest rooms, suites, and three outdoor pools along the cliff edge. Direct beach access leads to a semi-private stretch of sand below the bluffs. The resort has 250 rooms, suites, bungalows, and villas. Three restaurants include Mosaic Bar & Grille and The Loft. The spa occupies 20,000 square feet. Forbes Travel Guide Five-Star property.
Address: 30801 Coast Hwy, Laguna Beach, CA 92651, USA
Nearest Airports: SNA · John Wayne · 28 km; LGB · Long Beach · 58 km

Alt Text: Surf and Sand Laguna Beach ocean-view room with open sliding glass door to balcony directly above the Pacific

Images.alt: Surf and Sand Laguna Beach ocean-view room with open sliding glass door to balcony directly above the Pacific

Hotel Tagline: Between the sand and the Pacific, every pocket door opens to nothing but ocean.
Summary: The room to ask for is a Deluxe Ocean View — slide the pocket door open and the Pacific fills every sense: salt air, the light on the water, waves arriving at the wall below. Splashes restaurant puts you front-row at sea level three times a day, a few metres from where water meets sand.
Description ⚙: Surf & Sand Laguna Beach is a 167-room oceanfront resort situated directly on Laguna Beach, with every room offering Pacific Ocean views and a private balcony. The hotel stands on 500 feet of beachfront between the sand and the Pacific Coast Highway. Splashes restaurant serves three meals a day with unobstructed ocean views. An award-winning spa is on site. All rooms feature a pocket door that opens fully to the ocean air. The hotel underwent a renovation completed in 2024.
Address: 1555 S Coast Hwy, Laguna Beach, CA 92651, USA
Nearest Airports: SNA · John Wayne · 26 km; LGB · Long Beach · 56 km

Alt Text: Casa Laguna Hotel and Spa Laguna Beach hillside terrace with blue iron chairs and Pacific Ocean view above tropical garden

Images.alt: Casa Laguna Hotel and Spa Laguna Beach hillside terrace with blue iron chairs and Pacific Ocean view above tropical garden

Hotel Tagline: Terraced into the hillside, the Pacific appears in layers between the treetops below.
Summary: A 1920s Mission-style inn terraced into the hillside south of the village, where the Pacific shows itself through the garden in layers. From the upper rooms and the pool, the sea appears between the treetops and rooflines below — different light each hour, different ocean.
Description ⚙: Casa Laguna Hotel & Spa is a 22-room boutique hotel built into the hillside south of Laguna Beach village, in Mission Revival style dating to the 1920s. Terraced gardens step down toward the Pacific Ocean, framing sea views from the pool deck and from upper-floor rooms. All room rates include a complimentary continental breakfast. The hotel operates a spa offering massages and treatments. Woods Cove beach is a four-minute walk; the Laguna Beach trolley stops outside.
Address: 2510 S Coast Hwy, Laguna Beach, CA 92651, USA
Nearest Airports: SNA · John Wayne · 27 km; LGB · Long Beach · 57 km

Alt Text: Casa Loma Beach Hotel Laguna Beach room interior with sliding glass door opening to ocean-view balcony with wood deck chair

Images.alt: Casa Loma Beach Hotel Laguna Beach room interior with sliding glass door opening to ocean-view balcony with wood deck chair

Hotel Tagline: Opposite Heisler Park, the Pacific opens across clifftop gardens to open water.
Summary: Opposite Heisler Park on the North Laguna clifftop, where the Pacific comes into the room not through the glass but through the sound — the surf audible from every ocean-facing balcony. The view crosses the park's bluff gardens to open water; the rooftop terrace lifts the whole frame further still.
Description ⚙: Casa Loma Beach Hotel (formerly The Inn at Laguna Beach) is a 70-room clifftop boutique hotel opposite Heisler Park in North Laguna, positioned above the Pacific Coast Highway with unobstructed ocean views from all sea-facing rooms and suites. The hotel completed a $15 million renovation in Summer 2024, redesigning all guest rooms and public spaces. A rooftop terrace and pool overlook the Pacific. Main Beach and the village are a two-minute walk.
Address: 211 N Coast Hwy, Laguna Beach, CA 92651, USA
Nearest Airports: SNA · John Wayne · 25 km; LGB · Long Beach · 55 km

Alt Text: The Ranch at Laguna Beach outdoor pool with lounge chairs and Aliso Canyon hillside backdrop

Images.alt: The Ranch at Laguna Beach outdoor pool with lounge chairs and Aliso Canyon hillside backdrop

Hotel Tagline: Canyon walls and green hills close in on three sides, with the Pacific just out of sight.
Summary: Hidden in Aliso Canyon, 350 yards from the surf — close enough to hear the Pacific on a still morning. Green hills close in on three sides around the pool and the nine-hole golf course, trading the open sea for something quieter: canyon walls, bird sound, sage on the trail above.
Description ⚙: The Ranch at Laguna Beach is a resort set in Aliso Canyon, 350 yards from the Pacific Ocean, with views of the canyon walls and surrounding hills from all rooms and the main pool. The property includes a nine-hole golf course, farm-to-table restaurant (The Harvest), full-service spa, and access to Aliso Beach via a pedestrian underpass beneath the Pacific Coast Highway. The canyon setting provides a contrasting view experience from Laguna's clifftop and beachfront hotels.
Address: The Ranch at Laguna Beach, 31106 Coast Hwy, Laguna Beach, CA 92651, USA
Nearest Airports: SNA · John Wayne · 30 km; LGB · Long Beach · 60 km

Alt Text: Capri Laguna on the Beach Laguna Beach rooftop terrace with teal outdoor furniture and Pacific Ocean panorama

Images.alt: Capri Laguna on the Beach Laguna Beach rooftop terrace with teal outdoor furniture and Pacific Ocean panorama

Hotel Tagline: Rooms on the sand, with Catalina visible across the Pacific at dawn.
Summary: One of three Orange County hotels with rooms on the sand itself — the Pacific close enough to touch from the balcony at high tide, Catalina Island visible on a clear morning. The western exposure delivers unobstructed sunsets from the oceanfront rooms and the rooftop terrace above the cove.
Description ⚙: Capri Laguna on the Beach is a 46-room Mediterranean-style boutique hotel with direct beachfront access on Laguna Beach, one of three hotels in Orange County with rooms positioned directly on the sand. All oceanfront rooms face west over the Pacific; Catalina Island is visible on clear days. A rooftop terrace commands a full panorama over the cove and the open ocean. Heisler Park is 0.13 miles north. The hotel operates year-round.
Address: 1441 S Coast Hwy, Laguna Beach, CA 92651, USA
Nearest Airports: SNA · John Wayne · 26 km; LGB · Long Beach · 56 km

Alt Text: Hotel Villa Flori Lake Como facade and terrace with garden facing the lake and mountains

Images.alt: Hotel Villa Flori Lake Como facade and terrace with garden facing the lake and mountains

Hotel Tagline: A terrace restaurant sitting directly above the water, with the western lake stretching to the horizon.
Summary: A 19th-century villa between Cernobbio and Como, with lake-facing rooms and a terrace restaurant that sits directly above the water. Ristorante Raimondi opens onto the shore — request a balcony room on the upper floors for the full western reach of the lake. The view here is why it holds our certification.
Description ⚙: This restored 19th century villa is set on the western shores of Lake Como, between Cernobbio and the town of Como. It offers elegant rooms with parquet floors and marble bathrooms. Set in a private park with orange and lemon groves, the historic Hotel Villa Flori features Venetian stucco work and frescos. The Italian general Giuseppe Garibaldi got married here. All air-conditioned rooms provide flat-screen satellite TV and a mini-bar. Some rooms feature a balcony and lake views. Restaurant Raimondi enjoys panoramic lake views, and serves an eclectic mix of international and local cuisine for both lunch and dinner. Villa Flori lies close to the town of Como and features a private dock for guests arriving by boat.
Address: Via Per Cernobbio, 12, 22100 Como CO, Italy
Nearest Airports: LUG · Lugano · 34 km; MXP · Malpensa · 52 km

Alt Text: Grand Hotel Tremezzo Lake Como Art Nouveau facade with floating pool and mountains across the lake

Images.alt: Grand Hotel Tremezzo Lake Como Art Nouveau facade with floating pool and mountains across the lake

Hotel Tagline: Facing Bellagio across the water, the floating pool puts the full lake panorama at surface level.
Summary: Established in 1910, this Art Nouveau palace faces Bellagio across the lake. The floating pool sits directly on the water — the most efficient way to take in the full panorama. We’d ask for the Suite Greta or a rooftop suite for the view above the treetops.
Description ⚙: The Grand Hotel Tremezzo, perched elegantly on the shores of Lake Como, presents a spectacle of luxury with its impressive views over the lake and Bellagio. This lavish lakefront property, established in 1910 as a haven for Belle Époque socialites, continues to exude old-world glamour and grace. Renowned for its opulent interior design, the hotel blends classic and contemporary styles with select suites offering private terraces. The historic Suite Greta pays homage to the illustrious guest Greta Garbo, who fell in love with its sunny lake and mountain vistas. The hotel's iconic floating pool is set on the waters of Lake Como, providing guests with an unforgettable swimming experience with views including the picturesque town of Bellagio on the opposite margin. Guests can relax at the multi-award-winning T Spa in the historic Villa Emilia, complete with treatment rooms, an infinity pool, a hammam suite, and steam rooms. Culinary delights await at La Terrazza Gualtiero Marchesi restaurant, the only restaurant in Italy serving the complete tasting menu of the late maestro. Da Giacomo al Lago offers a scenic seafood dining experience by the lake adjacent to the floating pool deck.
Address: Via Statale, 5401, 22019 Tremezzina CO, Italy
Nearest Airports: LUG · Lugano · 40 km

Alt Text: Mandarin Oriental Lago di Como floating pool with mountain and lake panorama

Images.alt: Mandarin Oriental Lago di Como floating pool with mountain and lake panorama

Hotel Tagline: A 40-metre pool sits directly on the lake, water meeting water.
Summary: The floating pool — 40 metres, designed by Herzog & de Meuron, the largest on the lake — is the hotel’s clearest visual argument. Villa Roccabruna anchors the 19th-century heart of the property; L’ARIA, with Chef Massimiliano Blasone, handles dinner with the lake as backdrop.
Description ⚙: The Mandarin Oriental, Lago di Como, skilfully intertwines historical charm with contemporary luxury on the picturesque shores of Lake Como. It is housed in the 19th-century Villa Roccabruna and features 75 rooms and suites across multiple categories, including two private villas — Villa del Lago and Villa della Rocca. The hotel elevates its offerings with a 40-metre infinity floating pool, designed by Herzog and de Meuron and the largest on the lake, positioned directly on the water. The renovated Spa & Wellness oasis features six treatment rooms, two private Spa Suites, a zen garden, and a redesigned wet area overlooking the lake. The hotel boasts L'ARIA, offering refined Italian cuisine with Japanese influences under Chef Massimiliano Blasone, and the CO.MO Bar & Bistrot for casual lakeside dining. Committed to sustainability, the resort sources 100% of its energy from renewable sources and provides fully electric vehicles for guest use.
Address: Via E. Caronti, 69, 22020 Blevio CO, Italy
Nearest Airports: LUG · Lugano · 40 km; MXP · Malpensa · 54 km

Alt Text: Vista Palazzo Lake Como rooftop terrace overlooking the southern basin of the lake

Images.alt: Vista Palazzo Lake Como rooftop terrace overlooking the southern basin of the lake

Hotel Tagline: From the rooftop bar above the ferry terminal, the full lake opens across the southern horizon.
Summary: Eighteen suites in the center of Como, at the southernmost point of the lake. The Infinity Bar is the clearest reason to arrive before sunset — a cocktail terrace with a full lake panorama, above the ferry terminal. Upper-floor suites add the view from the room.
Description ⚙: Vista Palazzo is located in the heart of Como's city center, a short distance from the ferry terminal, at the southernmost point of Lake Como. The hotel features 18 elegantly designed suites and rooms, each offering a unique combination of luxury and comfort. The suites are spacious and equipped with king beds and magnificent windowed marble bathrooms. All rooms offer an outstanding view of Lake Como from its southernmost point. The Infinity Bar is a panoramic rooftop cocktail terrace with a full lake vista above the ferry terminal, a destination in its own right for non-guests. The hotel's restaurant, Sottovoce, proposes a journey across contemporary Italian cuisine through a tasting menu. Guests can enjoy private transfers, motorboat rentals, a personal butler service, and in-suite spa treatments.
Address: Piazza Camillo Benso Conte di Cavour, 24, 22100 Como CO, Italy
Nearest Airports: LUG · Lugano · 34 km; MXP · Malpensa · 48 km; LIN · Linate · 69 km

Alt Text: Grand Hotel Villa Serbelloni Bellagio luxury suite with Lake Como view from the promontory

Images.alt: Grand Hotel Villa Serbelloni Bellagio luxury suite with Lake Como view from the promontory

Hotel Tagline: Where the lake divides into two, both arms stretch out below at once.
Summary: At the tip of Bellagio’s promontory, where the two arms of the lake divide, this 1873 grande dame overlooks both branches at once. Mistral, the Michelin-recognized restaurant led by Chef Ettore Bocchia, sits on a veranda above the water. The hotel joined Relais & Châteaux in July 2025.
Description ⚙: Showcasing spectacular views over Lake Como, the Italian Alps, and Bellagio, the Grand Hotel Villa Serbelloni has been in the Bucher family for four generations. Situated at the tip of Bellagio's promontory where the two arms of the lake divide, the hotel provides simultaneous views over both branches of the lake. With indoor and outdoor swimming pools, immaculately landscaped gardens, and a sublime spa and beauty salon, the hotel belongs to the elite of the finest hotels in Lake Como. Its interior décor features timeless carpeted floors, antique furniture, frescoed ceilings, opulent staircases, a grand hall, and magnificent chandeliers — all nodding to the history of the building that stems as far back as 1873. The hotel's Michelin-recognized Mistral restaurant, led by executive chef Ettore Bocchia (Italy's leading molecular gastronomist), offers fine dining on a veranda above the water. La Goletta restaurant serves gourmet Italian cuisine on a terrace by the pool. In July 2025 the hotel joined Relais & Châteaux, becoming the first and only property on Lake Como in that collection.
Address: Via Teresio Olivelli, 1, 22021 Bellagio CO, Italy
Nearest Airports: LUG · Lugano · 42 km; BGY · Bergamo Orio al Serio · 67 km

Alt Text: Il Sereno Lago di Como floor-to-ceiling windows with direct lake view from suite

Images.alt: Il Sereno Lago di Como floor-to-ceiling windows with direct lake view from suite

Hotel Tagline: Floor-to-ceiling windows frame Lake Como and the Alpine scenery beyond.
Summary: Opened in 2016, Il Sereno’s suites were designed by Patricia Urquiola with floor-to-ceiling windows — the lake is the room’s primary element. The 1-Michelin-star restaurant Al Lago, led by Chef Raffaele Lenzi, reinforces the argument. Worth timing a stay for a sunset dinner on the terrace.
Description ⚙: Since its opening in 2016, Il Sereno Lago di Como has been fabulously positioned along the shores of Lake Como, only a 15-minute drive from the charming town of Como. The fashionable hotel features elegantly designed suites by Patricia Urquiola, showcasing modernist Italian style with natural materials like Canaletto walnut, Verde Alpi stone, and Venetian terrazzo floors. Expansive floor-to-ceiling windows offer hypnotic views of Lake Como and the Alpine scenery, a perk available across all the hotel's chic suites. The seasonal outdoor infinity pool overlooks the lake. Culinary delights await at Il Sereno Al Lago restaurant, which holds one Michelin star under Executive Chef Raffaele Lenzi, a romantic lake vista enhancing the flavours of contemporary Italian cuisine with global influences. The hotel has a small sandy beach with direct lake access and water activities including paddle boarding, kayaking, and rowing. A spa housed in a former boathouse is also available. Guests can take one of the iconic Riva speedboats from the private dock for a spin around the lake.
Address: Via Torrazza, 10, 22020 Torno CO, Italy
Nearest Airports: LUG · Lugano · 41 km; MXP · Malpensa · 55 km

Alt Text: MUSA Lago di Como suite view of garden pool lake and mountains

Images.alt: MUSA Lago di Como suite view of garden pool lake and mountains

Hotel Tagline: Isola Comacina reads clearly across the water from the Grand Suite.
Summary: Twelve keys, no more. The Grand Suite earns the most direct lake view, with Isola Comacina reading clearly across the water. Arriving by boat to the private dock — with the white villa appearing from the lake — sets the right tone. GAIA Bar handles the rest.
Description ⚙: Nestled along the pristine waters of Lake Como, the luxurious MUSA Lago di Como stands as a beacon of modern architecture and seclusiveness. This elegant, white-hued villa offers no more than 12 exclusive keys, each unlocking spotless accommodations with a balcony with stunning views of the lake's charming scenery, including Isola Comacina — the only island on Lake Como. For the best possible views and extra space, the gorgeous Grand Suite is recommended. Guests are treated to pristine white linen bedding, tasteful contemporary art, and luxurious white marble bathrooms with deep bathtubs and spacious showers. Accessible either by a scenic drive from the town of Como or by boat, arriving at its private dock, the villa offers a serene getaway. The decor is a testament to minimalist elegance, with a palette of neutrals and blacks. Culinary experiences are a highlight, with meals served in the glass-encased dining room or on the terrace. The GAIA Bar serves signature cocktails named after notable women alongside extraordinary lake views.
Address: Via Statale, 45, 22010 Sala Comacina CO, Italy
Nearest Airports: LUG · Lugano · 52 km; MXP · Malpensa · 70 km

Alt Text: Passalacqua Lake Como romantic alfresco dining setting at night

Images.alt: Passalacqua Lake Como romantic alfresco dining setting at night

Hotel Tagline: Rooms in the Casa al Lago sit where the water fills the view.
Summary: An 18th-century villa opened as a hotel in 2022, with 24 rooms across three buildings in Moltrasio. The Casa al Lago rooms sit closest to the water — those are the ones to request. Dinner is served anywhere on the property; the terrace above the lake is where most evenings land.
Description ⚙: Passalacqua, located in the comune of Moltrasio, opened its doors for the first time in 2022 in a beautifully restored 18th-century private dwelling. The exclusive hotel melds historic charm with luxurious amenities, offering guests an experience of antique elegance in a modern setting. This boutique hotel spreads charm across 24 uniquely designed rooms and suites distributed over three main buildings: the Villa, the Palazz, and the Casa al Lago. The Villa features twelve opulent rooms ranging from double rooms to grand suites, while the Casa al Lago offers four rooms with stunning lake views, perfect for couples or those seeking privacy. The hotel's culinary experience focuses on the simplicity and authenticity of Italian cuisine, made from local, seasonal ingredients. Guests have the flexibility to dine anywhere on the property, including the romantic terrace above the lake. The pool terrace is among Passalacqua's most celebrated features. For wellness and relaxation, the hotel offers a spa and wellness center housed in the Palazz, known as the Sottoterra — a hidden gallery made of stones under the property's gardens.
Address: Via Besana, 59, 22010 Moltrasio CO, Italy
Nearest Airports: LUG · Lugano · 37 km; MXP · Malpensa · 55 km

Alt Text: Filario Hotel and Residences Lake Como infinity pool extending over the lake toward Bellagio

Images.alt: Filario Hotel and Residences Lake Como infinity pool extending over the lake toward Bellagio

Hotel Tagline: Bellagio sits across the water, visible from every lake-facing balcony.
Summary: A former wire factory in Lezzeno, now a contemporary hotel with an infinity pool that extends over the lake. Bellagio reads clearly on the opposite shore. Request a lake-view junior suite — every room has a balcony — and consider arriving by water taxi for the right approach.
Description ⚙: Many of Lake Como's hotels are palatial villas or neoclassical mansions, but Filario Hotel & Residences is housed in a former wire factory in Lezzeno — midway between Bellagio and Como on the eastern shore — that has been cleverly converted into a luxury hotel with an infinity pool and a private beach. Industrial-chic is the style: cool stone and glass that lets in abundant natural sunlight, as well as views of the lake. Guest rooms are elegant and minimalist, with natural wood paneling, white linens, slate bathrooms, and a private terrace or balcony facing the water; Bellagio is visible on the opposite shore. All 13 hotel rooms have lake-view balconies. The property also includes 22 residences with fully equipped kitchens. The infinity pool extends directly over the lake. Restaurant Filo serves seasonal Italian cuisine on a lakeside terrace for lunch and fine dining at dinner. The beach bar and bistrot Yeast provides casual meals and gourmet pizza at the private black-sand beach alongside a private marina. Filario is listed in the Michelin Guide and is a Design Hotels member.
Address: Località Bagnana, 96, 22025 Lezzeno CO, Italy
Nearest Airports: LUG · Lugano · 56 km; MXP · Malpensa · 70 km

Alt Text: Hilton Lake Como rooftop infinity pool at Terrazza 241 with panoramic lake and mountain view

Images.alt: Hilton Lake Como rooftop infinity pool at Terrazza 241 with panoramic lake and mountain view

Hotel Tagline: From the rooftop, Como spreads below and the mountains rise across the water.
Summary: The rooftop infinity pool at Terrazza 241 is the view argument for the Hilton — a lake panorama from above the city, with Como spread below and the mountains across the water. Lake View suites add a private terrace and a hot tub. The pool is the reason to stay.
Description ⚙: Just steps from the shores of Lake Como, Hilton Lake Como welcomes guests year-round with a sophisticated atmosphere and breathtaking views. The crown jewel is Terrazza 241, the rooftop infinity pool where guests can sip cocktails at sunset and enjoy gourmet cuisine from lunch through dinner with a stunning lake and mountain backdrop. Inside, the Satin restaurant features seasonal and rotating culinary concepts, and Taffeta Bar provides relaxed elegance throughout the day. The rooms combine style and elegance with warm parquet floors and modern comforts. Some rooms offer the luxury of a private terrace with spectacular lake views or an outdoor whirlpool. The eforea spa and health club is the ideal place to recharge, featuring a hydrotherapy pool, Finnish sauna, Turkish bath, whirlpool, solarium, and a fully equipped fitness centre. The hotel is the first Hilton in the Lake Como region, located 500 metres from Villa Olmo and approximately 15 minutes on foot from Como's ferry terminal.
Address: Via Borgo Vico, 241, 22100 Como CO, Italy
Nearest Airports: LUG · Lugano · 33 km; MXP · Malpensa · 49 km; LIN · Linate · 70 km

Alt Text: Langdale Chase Hotel Windermere bedroom with stone balcony and direct view of Lake Windermere with passenger ferry crossing and far-shore hills

Images.alt: Langdale Chase Hotel Windermere bedroom with stone balcony and direct view of Lake Windermere with passenger ferry crossing and far-shore hills

Hotel Tagline: Windermere begins at the garden's edge and fills every window from there.
Summary: The only hotel on Windermere’s eastern shore, sitting in the water rather than overlooking it. Reopened November 2023 after a full restoration. The Boathouse suite hovers over the lake on its own jetty — floor-to-ceiling glass, dual copper baths, private rooftop terrace.
Description ⚙: Langdale Chase holds something no other hotel on Windermere can claim: it stands directly on the lake's eastern shore, its 1890 Victorian stonework reflected in the water at the bottom of its own gardens. The Grade II listed property reopened in November 2023 following a careful, multi-million-pound restoration and within five months had been awarded five AA stars and The Times' North Hotel of the Year 2024. The 30 rooms and suites are split across the main house, the adjoining Lakehouse, and a private Boathouse — all but two with direct lake views. The Boathouse suite takes this to its logical extreme: hovering over the lake on its own jetty, with floor-to-ceiling glass, dual copper bathtubs, and a private rooftop terrace. The two-AA-Rosette Dining Room features walls of glass that hold Windermere in frame from the first course to dessert. A 1928 teak-and-mahogany motor yacht, Albatros, offers private lake cruises from the hotel's own jetty.
Address: Ambleside Road, Ecclerigg, Windermere LA23 1LW, UK
Nearest Airports: CAX · Carlisle Lake District · 88 km

Alt Text: Linthwaite House Hotel Windermere hotel exterior and dining terrace at dusk with illuminated floor-to-ceiling windows and panoramic view over Lake Windermere and wooded hills

Images.alt: Linthwaite House Hotel Windermere hotel exterior and dining terrace at dusk with illuminated floor-to-ceiling windows and panoramic view over Lake Windermere and wooded hills

Hotel Tagline: Hilltop above Windermere, with the lake spread wide below the terrace.
Summary: We’d book a Lake View Hot Tub suite — hilltop position above Windermere, heated floors, power shower, and the lake below. On the grounds: Henrock, Simon Rogan’s informal restaurant whose three-Michelin-star L’Enclume is twenty minutes away in Cartmel.
Description ⚙: Linthwaite House sits on a hilltop above Windermere, with panoramic vistas over the lake from its terrace and Lake View Hot Tub suites. After a twelve-million-pound investment in 2019 under the Leeu Collection, the 36-room boutique hotel offers heated floors, power showers, and private verandas in its lake-facing suites. Henrock, an informal restaurant by Simon Rogan's group — whose three-Michelin-star flagship L'Enclume is twenty minutes away in Cartmel — operates on the grounds. During warmer months, the terrace offers a magnificent view of the parkland and Lake Windermere below.
Address: Crook Ln, Bowness-on-Windermere, Windermere LA23 3JA, UK
Nearest Airports: CAX · Carlisle Lake District · 92 km

Alt Text: Lakes Hotel and Spa Windermere hot tub on covered balcony with glass balustrade overlooking gardens and autumn-coloured Lakeland fells

Images.alt: Lakes Hotel and Spa Windermere hot tub on covered balcony with glass balustrade overlooking gardens and autumn-coloured Lakeland fells

Hotel Tagline: Twelve hot tub balconies overhang Lake Windermere at water level, the entire southern reach ahead.
Summary: Ask for a hot tub balcony room — twelve of them overhang Lake Windermere at the same level as the water, with the entire southern reach of the lake in front. The spa is the most comprehensive in Bowness: cold plunge, mood-lit pool, full treatment menu.
Description ⚙: The Lakes Hotel & Spa has a distinct feature not seen anywhere else on Windermere: rooms with hot tubs symmetrically distributed across twelve balconies that overhang the lake at the same level as the water, with the entire southern reach in front. The spa is the most comprehensive in Bowness, offering cold plunge, mood-lit pool, and a full treatment menu. After a relaxing day, the hotel's Bentley Chauffeuring service is available for dining in nearby Bowness-on-Windermere.
Address: Lake Road, Bowness-on-Windermere, Windermere LA23 3HH, UK
Nearest Airports: CAX · Carlisle Lake District · 94 km

Alt Text: The Samling Hotel Windermere Michelin-starred restaurant dining room at sunset with floor-to-ceiling glass walls and Lake Windermere panorama

Images.alt: The Samling Hotel Windermere Michelin-starred restaurant dining room at sunset with floor-to-ceiling glass walls and Lake Windermere panorama

Hotel Tagline: From a private hillside, the full length of Windermere unfolds south, with Coniston Old Man to the west.
Summary: Worth staying for the view alone — panoramic south along Windermere and west to Coniston Old Man, from a hillside position that no lakeside hotel can match for breadth. The Michelin-starred restaurant doubles as the best seat in the house for the same panorama.
Description ⚙: The Samling sits on a private hillside above Windermere with a view that opens south along the full length of the lake and west toward the Coniston Old Man range — a panorama that reviewers consistently describe as the finest of any hotel in the region. The 18th-century Georgian house holds just 12 bedrooms, suites, and cottages, each named after a Lake District location. The Michelin-starred restaurant occupies a slate-and-glass extension with floor-to-ceiling lake views over every table, and the wine list is widely regarded as one of the most serious in the north of England. The hotel scores 9.5 on Booking.com.
Address: Ambleside Rd, Windermere LA23 1LR, UK
Nearest Airports: CAX · Carlisle Lake District · 90 km

Alt Text: Lindeth Fell Country House Windermere curved bay window lounge with afternoon tea, pink window seat and view of formal garden terrace and distant fells

Images.alt: Lindeth Fell Country House Windermere curved bay window lounge with afternoon tea, pink window seat and view of formal garden terrace and distant fells

Hotel Tagline: Afternoon tea on the terrace, with Lake Windermere and the fells spread below.
Summary: We’d request the Grasmere, Windermere, or Haweswater room — the three that face the lake directly. Fourteen rooms total, run by the Kennedy family for nearly four decades, with afternoon tea on a terrace overlooking Windermere and the surrounding fells.
Description ⚙: Lindeth Fell Country House is a five-star boutique bed and breakfast run by the Kennedy family for nearly four decades. Most of its 14 charming rooms look out into the calm waters of Lake Windermere; the master rooms that display the most impressive vistas are the Grasmere, Windermere, and Haweswater. Guests will find beds dressed in Egyptian Cotton Bed Linen, coffee machines, and high-end toiletries throughout. Weather permitting, afternoon tea is served at the hotel's panoramic terrace, where scones, jams, and a wide variety of teas are paired with views of the countryside and Lake Windermere below.
Address: Lyth Valley Road, Bowness-on-Windermere, Windermere LA23 3JP, UK
Nearest Airports: CAX · Carlisle Lake District · 93 km

Alt Text: Hazel Bank Country House Lake District sitting room with red velvet armchairs, tea service on round table and view of wooded Borrowdale hillside through bay window

Images.alt: Hazel Bank Country House Lake District sitting room with red velvet armchairs, tea service on round table and view of wooded Borrowdale hillside through bay window

Hotel Tagline: Dale Head, Great Gable, and Glaramara rise directly beyond the windows of this quiet Borrowdale corner.
Summary: Seven rooms in a quiet corner of Borrowdale, with direct views to Dale Head, Great Gable, and Glaramara — some of the most dramatic fell profiles in the Lake District. The resident chef cooks with local ingredients; Haystacks and Cat Bells are at the door.
Description ⚙: Hazel Bank Country House occupies a quiet corner of Borrowdale with seven elegantly designed rooms, all with direct views toward Dale Head, Great Gable, and Glaramara — three of the most prominent peaks in the Lakeland fells. The resident chef prepares delectable dishes made with locally sourced ingredients. The hotel is ideally positioned for walks to Haystacks Hill, Cat Bells, Surprise View, and the Langstrath Valley. Galleny Force Waterfall is under two miles from the property.
Address: Hazel Bank Country House, Hazel Bank Dr, Keswick CA12 5FA, UK
Nearest Airports: CAX · Carlisle Lake District · 77 km

Alt Text: The Daffodil Hotel and Spa Grasmere lake-view bedroom with pale blue walls and open balcony with glass balustrade overlooking water and wooded hillside

Images.alt: The Daffodil Hotel and Spa Grasmere lake-view bedroom with pale blue walls and open balcony with glass balustrade overlooking water and wooded hillside

Hotel Tagline: Grasmere Lake reads as immediate from here — not framed, just present.
Summary: The room to ask for faces Grasmere Lake directly — the hotel sits close enough to the water that the view reads as immediate rather than framed. The spa includes a tepidarium alongside the thermal pool; Wordsworth’s cottage and Rydal Cave are within walking distance.
Description ⚙: Located in the picturesque village of Grasmere, The Daffodil Hotel & Spa sits close enough to the water that its lake-view rooms deliver an immediate rather than framed read of Grasmere Lake. Opened in 2012 and designed by interior designer Paul Sawford, the hotel has consistently attracted those seeking romantic breaks and relaxing weekend getaways. The spa features a thermal pool, sauna, steam rooms, and a tepidarium. Wordsworth's cottage and Rydal Cave are within walking distance.
Address: Keswick Road, Grasmere, Ambleside LA22 9PR, UK
Nearest Airports: CAX · Carlisle Lake District · 78 km

Alt Text: Storrs Hall Hotel Windermere lounge with floor-to-ceiling sash windows and direct view of Lake Windermere and autumn-coloured far shore across the lawn

Images.alt: Storrs Hall Hotel Windermere lounge with floor-to-ceiling sash windows and direct view of Lake Windermere and autumn-coloured far shore across the lawn

Hotel Tagline: Windermere stretches south from every table, every hot tub, every room.
Summary: A Georgian manor from 1797, on the shores of Windermere in 17 acres of private grounds. The lake-view rooms and the six Lakeside Suites with cedar hot tubs face south down the water. The Lake Edge Restaurant holds the same position — 2 AA Rosettes, Windermere from every table.
Description ⚙: Storrs Hall Hotel is housed in an impeccably restored Grade II* listed Georgian mansion from 1797, on the southern shores of Lake Windermere in 17 acres of private grounds. The hotel has been the temporary address for guests including poets Wordsworth and Southey. Its 35 elegant rooms and six Lakeside Suites with cedar hot tubs face south down the water. The Lake Edge Restaurant is a gastronomic reference in the region, holding 2 AA Rosettes and positioned at the lake's edge, allowing diners to contemplate Windermere between courses.
Address: Bowness-on-Windermere, Windermere LA23 3LG, UK
Nearest Airports: CAX · Carlisle Lake District · 95 km

Alt Text: Gilpin Hotel Lake District spa lodge outdoor deck at dusk with stone-built hot tub, wooden terrace, lit suite interior and barrel sauna, Lakeland hills at sunset

Images.alt: Gilpin Hotel Lake District spa lodge outdoor deck at dusk with stone-built hot tub, wooden terrace, lit suite interior and barrel sauna, Lakeland hills at sunset

Hotel Tagline: Woodland through the windows, and a private pond catches the sky just outside.
Summary: The spa suites are the reason to push the budget — 100 square metres, stone hot tub by a private pond, circular stone bath, fireplace, and woodland through the windows. A mile away, the 8-bedroom Lake House offers 360° Lakeland views with its own pool and boat house.
Description ⚙: Under the motto lots of luxury, zero pretentiousness, the Gilpin Hotel & Lake House is one of the most successful hospitality ventures in the Lake District. The 30-room boutique hotel includes the Michelin-starred SOURCE at Gilpin Hotel, the casual pan-Asian Gilpin Spice, a spa, a Champagne Bar, and spa suites featuring a circular stone bath, fireplace, double walk-in shower, and a stone-built hot tub beside a private pond. The nearby 8-bedroom Lake House, a mile from the main hotel, boasts 360-degree Lakeland views and its own pool, boat house, and hot tubs.
Address: Crook Rd, Windermere LA23 3NE, UK
Nearest Airports: CAX · Carlisle Lake District · 90 km

Images.alt: Lido Palace Riva del Garda private suite terrace with sun loungers facing the mountains and lake

Hotel Tagline: Panoramic balconies hold the Garda Prealps and the lake in the same glance.

Summary: Opened in summer 2023, perched 200 metres above the lake’s eastern shore and still drawing some of the highest guest satisfaction scores on Garda. We’d book the Deluxe Sky Pool Suite — rooftop terrace, private infinity pool, the lake laid flat below.

Summary: Established in 1888 and a National Heritage site, the Grand Hotel Fasano added four new lake-view suites in 2025 alongside a fully renovated AQVA SPA. Il Fagiano, awarded a Michelin star in 2024 under Chef Maurizio Bufi, is reason enough to book a table.

Hotel Tagline: Twenty-two rooms look straight out over the water from Lake Garda's western shore.
Summary: Twenty-three rooms, all but one facing the water — a scale that keeps the place genuinely boutique on this stretch of the western shore. The 20-metre lakefront pool and the open-kitchen restaurant with its 360° panorama make the case for staying put.

Nearest Airports: BSL · Brescia · 37 km; VRN · Verona · 63 km

Hotel Tagline: From the candlelit terrace, water and mountains settle exactly where they should be.
Summary: We’d book the Suite Loggia for its private terrace over the lake, then spend evenings at the Maximilian restaurant — the candlelit alfresco terrace that, more than anywhere else in Gardone, puts the water and the mountains exactly where they should be.

Summary: Floor-to-ceiling windows in every room, controlled by a one-touch system. For the unobstructed Strip view, the Sky Suites are the correct choice — the adults-only Liquid Pool Lounge handles the afternoon, and the 150,000 sq ft casino occupies the evening.

Summary: Suites start at 720 square feet — among the largest standard suites on the Strip — and some of them frame the Sphere directly. We’d request one of those and watch the nightly LED display against the backdrop of Frenchman Mountain from a room that already has seven pools beneath it.

Summary: The fountains choreograph twice an hour after dark, and the suites that face them — the Executive Hospitality Suite, the Two-Bedroom Bellagio Suite — have a front-row position that no other hotel on the Strip replicates. The conservatory and botanical garden complete the picture inside.

Hotel Tagline: Wrap-around balconies sit eye level with the Bellagio fountains, the choreography unfolding directly across.
Summary: The Terrace Suites are the room to ask for — private wrap-around balconies positioned directly across from the Bellagio fountains, at eye level with the choreography. No other hotel on the Strip replicates this angle. The 14th-floor pools add a Strip panorama without leaving the property.

Hotel Tagline: From the upper floors, the Strip unfolds unobstructed from north to south.
Summary: The upper floors of Resorts World’s tower deliver an unobstructed Strip panorama from north to south — Crockfords is the ultra-luxury tier of the complex, with private check-in, personal concierge, and the 1,600 sq ft Entertainment Suite for those who want the view without the compromise.

Tower Suites bring private check-in and a dedicated pool deck. Wing Lei, the first Chinese restaurant in the U.S. to earn a Michelin star, anchors the dining.

Hotel Tagline: Suites facing the Sphere watch its nightly display rise against Frenchman Mountain.
Summary: The Venetian Luxury King Suite starts at 650 square feet with Egyptian cotton and a Roman tub — and the suites facing the Sphere catch its nightly display against Frenchman Mountain. The resort opened in 1999 and remains, combined with The Palazzo, one of the largest hotels in the world.

Hotel Tagline: From the top floors of Mandalay Bay, the Eiffel Tower replica sits framed in the window.
Summary: Occupying the top floors of Mandalay Bay with its own entrance, the Four Seasons is one of the few Strip hotels without a casino. The Strip View One-Bedroom Suite covers 1,100 sq ft with the Eiffel Tower replica in frame. The Forbes Five-Star Spa is the quietest address on the boulevard.

Hotel Tagline: The Strip unfolds as the in-room show, framed by sweeping views from above.
Summary: The Encore Three-Bedroom Duplex earns its price: marble whirlpools, a billiard table, a dedicated butler, and sweeping Strip views as the in-room show. XS Nightclub and Encore Beach Club are the two most coveted nightlife addresses in Las Vegas — both steps from the door.

Hotel Tagline: From 64 stories, the Strip's south axis unfolds through golden glass with uncommon clarity.
Summary: At 64 stories, the golden glass facade aligns perfectly with the Strip’s south axis — the south-facing suites, all with kitchen facilities, deliver some of the clearest Strip views available from a non-gaming property. The DJT restaurant and rooftop pool occupy the same building.

Hotel Tagline: The Strip unfolds directly below, framed by seven pools stretching toward the boulevard.
Summary: Part of Resorts World Las Vegas, which opened in June 2021 as the first new resort on the Strip in over a decade. The Deluxe Strip View rooms face the boulevard directly; seven pools extend the property outward. The ZOUK Nightclub and AYU Dayclub anchor the entertainment offer after dark.

Alt Text: Tivoli Avenida Liberdade Lisboa Sky Bar by Seen rooftop restaurant dining table at dusk with illuminated São Jorge Castle and Tagus River panorama

Images.alt: Tivoli Avenida Liberdade Lisboa Sky Bar by Seen rooftop restaurant dining table at dusk with illuminated São Jorge Castle and Tagus River panorama

Hotel Tagline: From the rooftop, São Jorge Castle sits in the middle distance with the Tagus and Christ the King beyond.
Summary: The Sky Bar by Seen on the rooftop puts Avenida da Liberdade below, São Jorge Castle in the middle distance, and the Tagus and Christ the King beyond. We’d time the visit for sunset — the rail fills quickly and the best spots go first. The lobby bar’s nightly jazz rounds out the evening.
Description ⚙: Opened in 1933 on Avenida da Liberdade, the Tivoli is one of Lisbon's most established five-star addresses. Its Sky Bar by Seen rooftop puts São Jorge Castle in the middle distance and the Tagus and Christ the King at the horizon. The lobby bar hosts nightly jazz performances; the Anantara Spa anchors the wellness offer.
Address: Av. da Liberdade 185, 1269-050 Lisboa, Portugal
Nearest Airports: LIS · Humberto Delgado · 9 km; CSC · Cascais · 21 km

Images.alt: Altis Avenida Hotel Lisbon Rossio Gastrobar rooftop terrace with São Jorge Castle and historic Baixa rooftops in view

Hotel Tagline: From the rooftop terrace, São Jorge Castle faces you directly, with the Tagus shimmering on the horizon.
Summary: The Grand View Suite is the one to request: a rooftop terrace facing São Jorge Castle and presiding over Rossio Square, with the Tagus visible on the horizon. The Rossio Gastrobar on the seventh floor opens the same sweep at a considerably lower price.
Description ⚙: An Art Deco landmark facing Rossio Square, opened in 2010 and expanded in 2019 to occupy the full building. The top-floor Grand View Suite has a private terrace with unobstructed sightlines to São Jorge Castle and Rossio Square. The seventh-floor Rossio Gastrobar opens the same panorama with the Tagus visible at the horizon.
Address: R. 1º de Dezembro 120, 1200-360 Lisboa, Portugal
Nearest Airports: LIS · Humberto Delgado · 9 km; CSC · Cascais · 21 km

Alt Text: Four Seasons Hotel Ritz Lisbon rooftop running track with panoramic view of historic Lisbon and Tagus River

Images.alt: Four Seasons Hotel Ritz Lisbon rooftop running track with panoramic view of historic Lisbon and Tagus River

Hotel Tagline: Corner suites hold Eduardo VII Park and the Tagus River in the same frame.
Summary: Corner suites frame Eduardo VII Park and the Tagus simultaneously — two of Lisbon’s most requested views from a single room. The open-sky running track on the rooftop extends the same panorama. CURA, the hotel’s Michelin-starred restaurant, has held its star every year since opening in 2020.
Description ⚙: A Modernist landmark from 1959 at the edge of Eduardo VII Park, managed by Four Seasons since 1997. Corner suites frame Eduardo VII Park and the Tagus simultaneously. An outdoor pool opened in 2020; the open-sky rooftop running track provides sweeping city views. CURA, the hotel's signature restaurant, has held a Michelin star every year since 2021.
Address: R. Rodrigo da Fonseca 88, 1099-039 Lisboa, Portugal
Nearest Airports: LIS · Humberto Delgado · 8 km; CSC · Cascais · 20 km

Alt Text: Torel Palace Lisbon suite with multiple arched balcony doors overlooking Lisbon historic rooftops and castle hill

Images.alt: Torel Palace Lisbon suite with multiple arched balcony doors overlooking Lisbon historic rooftops and castle hill

Hotel Tagline: From a hilltop in Arroios, the Tagus, the Santa Justa Lift, and the Carmo Convent share one terrace view.
Summary: The Dom João II Suite pairs a jacuzzi with a terrace framing the Tagus, the Santa Justa Lift, and the Carmo Convent in one sweep. The panoramic pool in summer — ringed by cypress trees — becomes the better seat. A hilltop position that earns its elevation.
Description ⚙: A 1900s hilltop palace in Arroios, combining three buildings into 33 rooms and suites. The Dom João II Suite offers a jacuzzi on a terrace framing the Tagus, the Santa Justa Lift, and the Carmo Convent. A panoramic pool surrounded by cypress trees opens in summer. The Black Pavilion restaurant has a winter garden with city views.
Address: R. Câmara Pestana 45, 1150-082 Lisboa, Portugal
Nearest Airports: LIS · Humberto Delgado · 8 km; CSC · Cascais · 22 km

Alt Text: Bairro Alto Hotel Lisbon rooftop terrace at dusk with Ponte 25 de Abril, Tagus River and Christ the King at sunset

Images.alt: Bairro Alto Hotel Lisbon rooftop terrace at dusk with Ponte 25 de Abril, Tagus River and Christ the King at sunset

Hotel Tagline: Two rooftop terraces divide Lisbon between them: the Tagus and bridge on one side, the castle quarter on the other.
Summary: The hotel’s two rooftop terraces split the panorama: one faces the Tagus and Christ the King, the other the castle quarter alongside the BAHR restaurant. Weekends the older terrace queues before it opens — arrive early or book a table at BAHR for the same view seated.
Description ⚙: A Pritzker Prize-winning renovation by Eduardo Souto de Moura, doubling the hotel's size to encompass an entire Chiado block. Two rooftop terraces split the panorama: one faces the Tagus River and Ponte 25 de Abril with Christ the King beyond, the other the castle quarter alongside the BAHR restaurant. The hotel is a local institution for sunset viewings.
Address: Praça Luís de Camões 2 5º Piso, 1200-243 Lisboa, Portugal
Nearest Airports: LIS · Humberto Delgado · 10 km; CSC · Cascais · 22 km

Alt Text: MYRIAD by SANA Hotels Lisbon SAYANNA Spa sauna on upper floor with panoramic glass wall overlooking Tagus River estuary

Images.alt: MYRIAD by SANA Hotels Lisbon SAYANNA Spa sauna on upper floor with panoramic glass wall overlooking Tagus River estuary

Hotel Tagline: From 120 metres above the Tagus, the Vasco da Gama Bridge spans the eastern horizon.
Summary: East-facing rooms look straight at the Vasco da Gama Bridge from 120 metres above the Tagus — the tower’s position makes every room a river suite. Fifty Seconds, the Michelin-starred restaurant at the summit, is the culinary reason to make the journey to Parque das Nações.
Description ⚙: Incorporated in Torre Vasco da Gama, Lisbon's tallest building, rising 120 metres above the Tagus in Parque das Nações. Every room faces the river, with east-facing rooms capturing the full span of the Vasco da Gama Bridge. Fifty Seconds, the Michelin-starred rooftop restaurant, operates at the summit. The SAYANNA Spa on the 23rd floor provides a floating wellness experience above the water.
Address: Lote 2.21.01, Parque das Nações, R. Cais das Naus Lote 2.21.01, 1990-173 Lisboa, Portugal
Nearest Airports: LIS · Humberto Delgado · 8 km; CSC · Cascais · 34 km

Alt Text: MACAM Hotel Lisbon rooftop pool terrace with Ponte 25 de Abril and Cristo Rei at golden hour

Images.alt: MACAM Hotel Lisbon rooftop pool terrace with Ponte 25 de Abril and Cristo Rei at golden hour

Hotel Tagline: From the rooftop pool, Ponte 25 de Abril and Cristo Rei sit directly over the Tagus.
Summary: Opened in October 2025 in the Palácio Condes da Ribeira Grande — left derelict for years before MetroUrbe’s restoration — MACAM sits between Alcântara and Belém with the Tagus and Ponte 25 de Abril in the sightline. The former 18th-century chapel is now a library with the bridge in the window.
Description ⚙: Opened in October 2025 in the restored Palácio Condes da Ribeira Grande between Alcântara and Belém, combining a 64-room hotel with 2,000 square metres of museum space displaying Armando Martins' art collection. The rooftop pool terrace looks over the Tagus with Ponte 25 de Abril and Cristo Rei directly in frame. A former 18th-century chapel on the property serves as a library facing the bridge.
Address: R. da Junqueira 66, 1300-343 Lisboa, Portugal
Nearest Airports: LIS · Humberto Delgado · 13 km; CSC · Cascais · 19 km

Hotel Tagline: From a corner bathtub, Alfama's rooftops fall away to the silver Tagus below.
Summary: The Santiago Suite positions a bathtub at a corner window overlooking Alfama’s rooftops and the Tagus below. The first-floor terrace frames the sharpest contrast in Lisbon: crumbling tilework and green gardens in the foreground, the river silver beyond.
Description ⚙: A 19-room five-star boutique hotel in a converted 15th-century palace at the foot of São Jorge Castle hill, preserving the Palácio dos Castros with Roman foundations. The Santiago Suite's corner bathtub faces Alfama's rooftops and the Tagus below. The first-floor terrace offers the contrast of crumbling tilework and green gardens in the foreground, with the river silver beyond.
Address: R. de Santiago 12, 1100-494 Lisboa, Portugal

Alt Text: The Lumiares Hotel Spa Lisbon Lumi Rooftop terrace with couple at glass railing overlooking Bairro Alto rooftops and São Jorge Castle

Images.alt: The Lumiares Hotel Spa Lisbon Lumi Rooftop terrace with couple at glass railing overlooking Bairro Alto rooftops and São Jorge Castle

Hotel Tagline: From the rooftop, the Tagus stretches one way and São Jorge Castle anchors the other.
Summary: Perched at the top of Bairro Alto, the Lumi Rooftop swings between the Tagus on one side and Castelo de São Jorge on the other — the same panorama as the São Pedro de Alcântara viewpoint, directly across the street. We’d book the penthouse to keep that framing from the room.
Description ⚙: A Small Luxury Hotels member in a former palace at the summit of Bairro Alto, with 53 apartment-style suites from Studio to Penthouse. The Lumi Rooftop Restaurant and Bar faces the Tagus on one flank and São Jorge Castle on the other, directly opposite the São Pedro de Alcântara miradouro. All suites include fully equipped kitchens; bespoke furnishings throughout are by local Portuguese artisans.
Address: R. do Diário de Notícias 142, 1200-146 Lisboa, Portugal

Hotel: The Editory Riverside Hotel, an Historic Hotel
Alt Text: The Editory Riverside Hotel Lisbon room with arched neoclassical window and direct view over the Tagus River at Santa Apolónia

Images.alt: The Editory Riverside Hotel Lisbon room with arched neoclassical window and direct view over the Tagus River at Santa Apolónia

Hotel Tagline: From first-floor balconies in the south wing of Santa Apolónia Station, the Tagus lies directly ahead.
Summary: Converted from the south wing of Santa Apolónia Station — Portugal’s oldest railway terminus, inaugurated in 1865 — the hotel’s River View Balcony rooms look directly over the Tagus. Worth specifying the river side when booking; station-facing rooms face the platform instead.
Description ⚙: A Historic Hotels Worldwide member occupying the south wing of Santa Apolónia Station — Portugal's oldest railway terminus, inaugurated in 1865. River View Balcony rooms on the first floor look directly over the Tagus; Junior Suite and Master Suite River View categories extend the offer upward. Hotel Tagline: From the river-facing floors, the London Eye and Big Ben frame the same stretch of Thames that Monet painted.
Summary: River View Rooms frame the London Eye, Big Ben, and the stretch of Thames that Monet painted from his suite. We’d push for a higher river-facing floor on check-in. Gordon Ramsay’s three restaurants — Savoy Grill, River Restaurant, and the Michelin-starred Restaurant 1890 — and The Gallery, which replaced the Thames Foyer in late 2024, handle everything below.
Description ⚙: What do The Beatles, Frank Sinatra, Winston Churchill, and Muhammed Ali have in common? You got it right if you guessed they were all guests of The Savoy, one of the very best hotels with a view in London. If you consider this world-class hotel for its views, you won't be disappointed; pick a river view room and wake up to a romantic view of the London Eye, Thames River, and Big Ben. The hotel's 267 guest rooms and suites reflect a blend of Edwardian and Art Deco styles, with many offering stunning views of the Thames and London's famous landmarks. The Savoy boasts multiple dining experiences, including the famous Savoy Grill by Gordon Ramsay and The River Restaurant by Gordon Ramsay. For all-day dining and afternoon tea, The Gallery — the hotel’s reimagined dining space that opened in November 2024 after a complete transformation of the former Thames Foyer — offers a vibrant setting from breakfast through to late-night cocktails. The five-star London hotel is perfectly situated, nestled by the Thames and a stroll from Covent Garden.
Address: Strand, London WC2R 0EZ, UK

Description ⚙: Are you in search of a hotel that offers a breathtaking view of the London Eye? This hotel is a classic example of a picture being worth a thousand words. To bring this experience to life, we invite you to book one of the suites with a river-facing balcony, which will provide you with one of the most memorable hotel views you've ever seen. From the comfort of your room, you'll be able to see the London Eye, the Thames River, the Westminster Bridge, and the iconic Big Ben. The rooms and suites reflect comfort and elegance in mind, featuring luxurious bathrobes, Egyptian cotton sheets, and marble bathrooms with high-end amenities. The London Marriott Hotel County Hall provides a holistic experience. In addition to luxurious accommodations, guests can indulge in an indoor swimming pool, fitness center, and spa services. For those with a taste for fine dining, Gillray's Steakhouse & Bar, one of London's most renowned restaurants, awaits.

In some cases, a view over Scotland Yard's facilities will also be available (book the Whitehall Suite). At the heart of the hotel, Mezzogiorno — the new Italian restaurant by chef Francesco Mazzei, which launched in November 2025 — brings bold southern Italian flavours to the hotel's grand corner room. Kerridge's Bar and Grill offers contemporary British food, while Velvet by Salvatore Calabrese invites a late-night cocktail. Spanning four levels, the ESPA Life spa is the epitome of opulent wellness.
Address: Corinthia Hotel, 10 Whitehall Pl, London SW1A 2BD, UK

Hotel Tagline: Titanium curves of Disney Concert Hall fill the Corner Suite window, floor 12 to 25.
Summary: Frank Gehry’s The Grand LA opened in 2022 with the Conrad on floors 12 through 25, directly opposite his earlier Disney Concert Hall. The Corner Suite category centres the hall’s titanium curves in the window — the most architecturally specific view on this list.
Description ⚙: Frank Gehry's The Grand LA complex, which opened in summer 2022 across from the Walt Disney Concert Hall, houses the Conrad Los Angeles on floors 12 through 25. The hotel's lobby on the 12th floor offers a terrace with direct views of the Concert Hall. Guests access the swimming pool via a 22-meter-long footbridge. With 305 bedrooms including three presidential suites extending to the 25th floor, guests enjoy panoramic views of the Los Angeles skyline. The spa offers quantum harmonic therapy and other wellness treatments.

Hotel Tagline: Twelve floors up, Century City to the east, the Santa Monica Mountains to the west.
Summary: Twelve floors above Wilshire and Santa Monica boulevards, the Waldorf puts Century City to the east and the Santa Monica Mountains to the west. We’d book it for the rooftop alone — sunset views while Jean-Georges Vongerichten handles the menu at The Rooftop by JG.
Description ⚙: The Waldorf Astoria Beverly Hills, at the intersection of Wilshire and Santa Monica boulevards, features Art Deco and Mid-century Modern design by Pierre-Yves Rochon. The 170 rooms and suites are equipped with the Crestron smart-home system; Superior Corner Junior Suites on levels 3 to 5 include panoramic balconies. The rooftop area includes a saltwater pool, bar, and The Rooftop by JG — Jean-Georges Vongerichten's al-fresco restaurant offering 360-degree views including Century City and the Santa Monica Mountains. The hotel extends complimentary Rolls-Royce or Cadillac Escalade rides to nearby venues.
Address: 9850 Wilshire Blvd, Beverly Hills, CA 90210, USA

Hotel Tagline: Eleven glass floors, with the Hollywood Sign aligned directly north.
Summary: Eleven glass floors in the Vinyl District with the Hollywood Hills — and the Sign within them — aligned directly north. The room category to search is ‘Hollywood Hills View’; Bar Lis on the rooftop handles the evening with Saint-Tropez energy and panoramic coverage.
Description ⚙: Thompson Hollywood, by Hyatt opened in summer 2021 with a sleek 11-story glass facade, 1950s-inspired lobby lounges, and 190 rooms with views of the Hollywood Hills and iconic Hollywood Sign. The Hollywood Hills View room category offers the clearest direct sightline to the Sign. The ground-floor Mes Amis restaurant, designed by Martin Brudnizki, offers a Hollywood twist on the French brasserie. The rooftop terrace features a pool with yellow umbrellas and city panoramas; Bar Lis on the terrace has become popular for its Jazz Eclectic LA nights on Tuesdays.

Images.alt: The London West Hollywood Beverly Hills rooftop dining terrace framed by citrus trees, with the Century City skyline visible through the glass railing

Hotel Tagline: From the tenth floor, the Hollywood Hills face north and the Los Angeles basin spreads south.
Summary: An all-suite property on North San Vicente with private balconies on most rooms: the Hollywood Hills face north, the city spreads south. The rooftop pool on the tenth floor — reserved for guests — holds both views at once, making it the strongest case for staying in.
Description ⚙: Perched on North San Vicente Boulevard steps from the Sunset Strip, The London West Hollywood at Beverly Hills is an all-suite property with 226 rooms designed by David Collins Studio, starting at 725 square feet. Most suites open onto private balconies overlooking the Hollywood Hills to the north or the Los Angeles basin to the south. The rooftop pool on the tenth floor is exclusively reserved for guests and offers panoramic views of the Hills and the city skyline. Boxwood restaurant serves California cuisine and a complimentary European-style breakfast. Other amenities include a 110-seat private screening room and a complimentary house car.
Address: 1020 N San Vicente Blvd, West Hollywood, CA 90069, USA

Hotel Tagline: From the foot of the Hollywood Hills, every room faces either the Sign or Downtown.
Summary: Every one of the 216 rooms faces either the Hollywood Sign or the Downtown skyline — there are no neutral rooms here. The fifth-floor Skyline Sundeck is where both views converge; the Sign reads clearly to the north while the DTLA towers anchor the southern horizon.
Description ⚙: Positioned at the foot of the Hollywood Hills on Argyle Avenue, the Kimpton Everly Hotel Hollywood is the closest hotel to the Hollywood Sign by address. The 216 guestrooms and 12 suites on floors 5 through 15 each face either the Hollywood Hills and the Sign to the north or the Downtown LA skyline to the south — there is no neutral option. The fifth-floor Skyline Sundeck and rooftop pool hold both views simultaneously. Jane Q, the all-day restaurant, serves a California-American menu. The hotel offers a complimentary daily wine hour from 5 to 6pm.
Address: 1800 Argyle Ave, Los Angeles, CA 90028, USA

Hotel Tagline: From 73 floors up, Los Angeles spreads in every direction through floor-to-ceiling glass.
Summary: The tallest building west of Chicago at 73 stories, with floor-to-ceiling windows in all 889 rooms. Spire 73 — the Western Hemisphere’s highest open-air bar — is the destination for sunset; for breakfast with the same panorama, Dekkadance on the 69th floor opens early.

Summary: The rooftop pool at 1 Hotel West Hollywood takes in a sweep from Downtown Los Angeles to Santa Monica — an unusually wide field for a Sunset Strip property. Harriet’s, the rooftop bar above it, holds the same view into the evening with a well-stocked cocktail list.
Description ⚙: In West Hollywood, 1 Hotel West Hollywood prioritizes sustainability at every turn, featuring a green wall at the entrance, eco-friendly amenities, and recycled materials throughout. The hotel offers Hills House and Canyon House suites with panoramic views, king beds, and luxurious amenities. The rooftop pool offers sweeping views from Downtown Los Angeles to Santa Monica. Harriet's rooftop bar and the Bamford Wellness Spa are signature amenities. Dining options include the signature restaurant 1 Kitchen, the Juniper lobby bar and lounge, and Harriet's rooftop bar.

Hotel Tagline: Rodeo Drive runs its full length to the Hollywood Hills, framed from the balcony.
Summary: At the foot of Rodeo Drive since 1927, the Beverly Wilshire faces the full length of the street from the balconies of its luxury suites, with the Hollywood Hills forming the backdrop. The David Collins Studio redesign kept the building’s old Hollywood character intact.
Description ⚙: The Beverly Wilshire, A Four Seasons Hotel, a pioneer in luxury hospitality since its opening in 1927, features suites with panoramic views of Beverly Hills. The rooms, redesigned by the David Collins Studio, blend timeless elegance with contemporary luxuries. Luxury suites open onto furnished balconies with spectacular views of Rodeo Drive, the Hollywood Hills, and the Los Angeles skyline. The hotel features a Mediterranean-style pool, a top-notch spa, and a massive fitness center.

Hotel Tagline: From the fifth-floor balcony, Century City's towers rise close enough to read as neighbors.
Summary: The Peninsula Beverly Hills frames the Century City skyline from its pool terrace — a mid-rise perspective that reads differently from the high-floor panoramas elsewhere on this list. The California Suite’s panoramic balcony puts the same towers at close range from the fifth floor.
Description ⚙: Opening in 1991, The Peninsula Beverly Hills offers 195 guest rooms, 38 suites, and 17 secluded villas among lush tropical gardens. Recent renovations by Forchielli Glynn added chinoiserie wall panels and hand-painted finishes. The California Suite includes a panoramic balcony with expansive vistas. The pool overlooks the Century City complex skyscrapers with private lounges and in-cabana spa services. The Belvedere restaurant offers Franco-Californian cuisine, and The Living Room tea room serves afternoon tea thrice daily.

Summary: Inside the L.A. Live complex, the Ritz-Carlton positions its spa, rooftop pool, and jacuzzi all on the 26th floor — at room level, not above it. We’d book upstairs for the dual aspect: the Downtown skyline to the north, the San Gabriel Mountains visible to the east on clear days.

Alt Text: Hotel Splendide Royal Lugano Belle Époque facade at dusk with Lake Lugano, pink sky, and illuminated hillside town in the background

Images.alt: Hotel Splendide Royal Lugano Belle Époque facade at dusk with Lake Lugano, pink sky, and illuminated hillside town in the background

Hotel Tagline: Upper-floor suites look straight across Lake Lugano to the far Alpine shore.
Summary: A Belle Époque palace on Lugano’s lakefront promenade since 1887. Lake-facing Deluxe Rooms and suites look straight over the water. Worth requesting a higher-floor suite for the widest panorama — and the Michelin-starred I Due Sud makes staying in for dinner an easy decision.
Description ⚙: A Belle Époque palace on Lugano's lakefront promenade, open since 1887 under the name Hotel Splendide — 'Royal' was added in 1924 to mark its royal clientele. The hotel belongs to the Roberto Naldi Collection, which also operates sister Splendide Royals in Rome and Paris. Lake-facing Deluxe Rooms and suites on the upper floors look directly across the water to the far Alpine shore; the panorama is widest from the higher suite categories. The Michelin-starred I Due Sud restaurant — led by chef Domenico Ruberto, awarded one Michelin star and 16 Gault & Millau points — bridges the cuisine of southern Switzerland and southern Italy and serves dinner Tuesday through Saturday. La Veranda and La Piazzetta terrace complete the dining offer. The Splendide Lifestyle Spa includes a 28°C indoor pool, sauna, Turkish bath, and beauty salon. The property is a member of The Leading Hotels of the World and Swiss Deluxe Hotels.
Address: Riva Antonio Caccia 7, 6900 Lugano, Switzerland
Nearest Airports: LUG · Lugano · 5 km

Alt Text: The View Lugano suite with floor-to-ceiling window and terrace overlooking Lugano city center and the blue lake

Images.alt: The View Lugano suite with floor-to-ceiling window and terrace overlooking Lugano city center and the blue lake

Hotel Tagline: Eighteen private terraces on the Lugano-Paradiso hills, each facing Lake Lugano and Monte San Salvatore.
Summary: All 18 suites perched on the Lugano-Paradiso hills have private terraces looking directly at Lake Lugano and Monte San Salvatore. We’d request a Dream Suite for the widest arc. The one-Michelin-starred in-house restaurant makes the view a two-course proposition.
Description ⚙: An all-suite boutique hotel perched on the Lugano-Paradiso hills, where all 18 suites open onto private terraces with unobstructed views of Lake Lugano and Monte San Salvatore. The two Dream Suites offer the widest panoramic arc. The in-house The View Fine Dining restaurant was awarded one Michelin star in 2022 — confirmed in the MICHELIN Guide Switzerland 2025 — holds 16 Gault & Millau points, and is a member of Les Grandes Tables de Suisse; chef Diego Della Schiava builds seasonal menus around Mediterranean and Swiss ingredients. The spa includes sauna, hammam, indoor pool, and a jet-lag massage protocol. In 2025, the property received a Forbes Travel Guide Recommended Hotel designation and a Michelin Key. Complimentary electric bicycles and smart cars are available. Member of Small Luxury Hotels of the World (SLH).
Address: Via Guidino 29, 6900 Paradiso, Switzerland
Nearest Airports: LUG · Lugano · 7 km

Alt Text: Grand Hotel Villa Castagnola Lugano breakfast table on a balcony with Monte San Salvatore and Lake Lugano visible through the subtropical park

Images.alt: Grand Hotel Villa Castagnola Lugano breakfast table on a balcony with Monte San Salvatore and Lake Lugano visible through the subtropical park

Hotel Tagline: Balconies and terraces hang directly over Lake Lugano from the eastern bank.
Summary: A lakeside villa since 1885, set in a subtropical park with a private lido on the lake. Lake-view rooms look directly over the water from balconies and terraces — the Michelin-starred Arté al Lago, set within an art gallery by the waterfront, earns a reservation on its own.
Description ⚙: A lakeside villa operating as a hotel since 1885, originally the home of a noble Russian family. The 72 rooms and suites — including 30 suites, among them three two-bedroom suites — are set within a subtropical private park on the eastern bank of Lake Lugano; lake-view rooms have balconies, terraces, or loggia. The property includes a private lido on the lake, a clay tennis court, indoor pool, and spa. The crown jewel is the Ristorante Galleria Arté al Lago — a Michelin-starred restaurant set within an art gallery at the water's edge, led by Executive Chef Alessandro Boleso; the gallery rotates works by international artists. The hotel is part of the Swisstainable sustainable tourism initiative and a member of Small Luxury Hotels of the World (SLH). A boat pier offers transfers to Monte Brè.
Address: Via Pico 9, 6900 Lugano, Switzerland
Nearest Airports: LUG · Lugano · 8 km

Alt Text: Villa Principe Leopoldo Lugano terraced garden with outdoor pool and panorama of Lake Lugano and Monte San Salvatore

Images.alt: Villa Principe Leopoldo Lugano terraced garden with outdoor pool and panorama of Lake Lugano and Monte San Salvatore

Hotel Tagline: From Collina d'Oro, the full arc of Lake Lugano and Alpine ranges opens in a single frame.
Summary: Perched on Collina d’Oro above Lugano, this all-suite hotel has lake panoramas from an elevation that opens the full arc of water and mountains. We’d book a Panorama or Signature Lake suite — both provide private spa access and the widest views on the hillside.
Description ⚙: An all-suite hotel perched on Collina d'Oro (Golden Hill) above Lugano, formerly the residence of a German prince. The 37 spacious suites are divided between garden-view and lake-view categories; the Panorama and Signature Lake suites occupy the property's most commanding positions and include private spa access. The elevated hillside location opens the full arc of Lake Lugano and the surrounding Alpine ranges in a single frame. The Principe Leopoldo restaurant is a member of Les Grandes Tables de Suisse and receives recognition in leading gastronomy guides. The hotel is a member of Relais & Châteaux. An outdoor pool, spa, fitness center, and piano bar with live music complete the offering. Located 2 km from Lugano's city center, with access to Piazza della Riforma and the waterfront.
Address: Via Montalbano 5, 6900 Lugano, Switzerland
Nearest Airports: LUG · Lugano · 4 km

Images.alt: Swiss Diamond Hotel & Spa Morcote evening lakeside terrace with a set dinner table and an illuminated village reflected across Lake Lugano

Hotel Tagline: Lake Lugano stretches before nearly every private balcony at the water's edge in Morcote.
Summary: On the shore of Lake Lugano in Morcote, 7 km from Lugano’s center — nearly every room faces the water from a private balcony. The Lago and Panorama restaurants both overlook the lake, and the lakeside pool keeps the view constant from morning to evening.
Description ⚙: A five-star resort on the shore of Lake Lugano in Vico Morcote, 7 km south of Lugano's city center. Nearly every room in the 87-room property faces the water from a private balcony; lake-view, Alps-view, and garden-view categories are available across rooms and suites. Two lakeside restaurants — Lago and Panorama — serve regional, Mediterranean, and international cuisine with the water visible from every table. A lakeside outdoor pool, indoor pool, and the Venus Wellness Center (sauna, hammam, hydromassage, fitness) complete the leisure offer. The hotel operates a regular shuttle to Lugano city center and organizes excursions to nearby Monte Generoso by scenic train. Part of the Swiss Diamond Group.
Address: Riva lago Olivella 29, 6921 Vico Morcote, Switzerland
Nearest Airports: LUG · Lugano · 13 km
