Images.alt: Suitenhotel Parco Paradiso Lugano outdoor restaurant terrace framed by palm trees overlooking Lugano city bay and Monte San Salvatore

Hotel Tagline: Elevated above Lugano Paradiso, every suite balcony looks straight out over the lake to Monte San Salvatore.
Summary: Elevated above Lugano Paradiso with a straight-on view of Lake Lugano and Monte San Salvatore from every suite balcony. The Havana Deck cigar bar has become a Lugano institution for evening views over the water — a terrace that draws residents and hotel guests in equal measure.
Description ⚙: A four-star suite hotel elevated above Lugano Paradiso, within walking distance of the Lugano Paradiso train station and the Monte San Salvatore cable car. Following a thorough renovation, the hotel offers 65 rooms and suites with private balconies or terraces, most facing Lake Lugano and Monte San Salvatore directly. The Havana Deck cigar bar — a terrace with premium spirits, handmade cigars, and lake views — has developed a strong following among Lugano residents and is one of the most-visited hotel bars in the area. The hotel also operates a Mediterranean restaurant and a Japanese teppanyaki restaurant. An indoor panoramic pool, wellness area, and extensive parking are included. The San Salvatore cable car is accessible on foot.
Address: Via Carona 27, 6900 Paradiso, Switzerland
Nearest Airports: LUG · Lugano · 6 km

Alt Text: Kurhaus Cademario Hotel & Spa Cademario suite interior with open balcony door, wine table, and Lake Lugano visible between forested hills

Images.alt: Kurhaus Cademario Hotel & Spa Cademario suite interior with open balcony door, wine table, and Lake Lugano visible between forested hills

Hotel Tagline: From 850 meters up, every balcony looks south over Lake Lugano and the Alps.
Summary: At 850 meters on one of Switzerland’s sunniest hillsides, this 1914 property looks south over Lake Lugano and the Alps from every balcony. The room to ask for is the Bella Vista suite, with a panoramic jacuzzi facing the water, inside a 2,200 m² spa complex.
Description ⚙: Founded in 1914 by Dr. Keller for its geomantic properties, Kurhaus Cademario Hotel & Spa has operated continuously as a wellness destination on one of Switzerland's sunniest hillsides. Situated at 850 meters above sea level — 25 minutes from Lugano's city center — the property delivers southward views over Lake Lugano and the Malcantone mountain ranges from virtually every room and outdoor space. The 82 rooms and suites range from standard lake-view categories to the Bella Vista suite, which comes with sunbeds and a panoramic jacuzzi on a private terrace, and the newer AQUA Suite. Access is exclusively for adults aged 16 and above. The DOT Spa covers 2,200 square meters and includes an indoor pool, outdoor pool, sauna world, ice fountains, hammam, Turkish bath, hydromassage benches, and a full treatment menu. Dining is at Radici Gourmet, a panoramic restaurant with lake-facing windows and terrace, led by Executive Chef Alessandro Ballerini.
Address: Via Kurhaus 12, 6936 Cademario, Switzerland
Nearest Airports: LUG · Lugano · 9 km

Alt Text: ARIA Retreat & Spa Lake Lugano infinity pool overlooking the lake framed by two forested mountains with lush garden in the foreground

Images.alt: ARIA Retreat & Spa Lake Lugano infinity pool overlooking the lake framed by two forested mountains with lush garden in the foreground

Hotel Tagline: Fifteen private loggias face Lake Lugano directly, the Swiss Alps rising across the water.
Summary: On the Italian shore of Lake Lugano, 15 km from Lugano — 15 private suites, each with a loggia looking straight over the water toward the Swiss Alps. Worth staying for the La Musa rooftop restaurant, the adults-only spa, and a guest rating among the highest on the lake.
Description ⚙: A five-star adults-only boutique enclave of 15 suites on the Italian shore of Lake Lugano, set within the 60-acre subtropical park of the Parco San Marco resort, 15 km from Lugano's city center. All suites face the lake directly from private loggias; eight suite types range from Junior Loggia to the Luxury Loggia Master Suite, which includes a freestanding soaking tub and full-width lake terrace. The adults-only spa CEò offers sauna, steam bath, relaxation areas, and a full treatment menu, with access restricted to guests aged 16 and above. La Musa Restaurant & Rooftop Terrace serves gourmet Italian and Mediterranean cuisine at dinner with uninterrupted lake views; a private beach extends the property to the water's edge. Guests also have access to Parco San Marco's three pools and family spa. The property is a member of The Leading Hotels of the World and received a Michelin Key in 2024.
Address: Via del Ciclamino, 5, 22018 Cima CO, Italy
Nearest Airports: LUG · Lugano · 23 km

Hotel: Swiss Diamond Boutique Hotel La Romantica
Alt Text: Swiss Diamond Boutique Hotel La Romantica Melide restaurant interior with sliding glass doors open to a lakeside terrace and mountain view

Images.alt: Swiss Diamond Boutique Hotel La Romantica Melide restaurant interior with sliding glass doors open to a lakeside terrace and mountain view

Hotel Tagline: Floor-to-ceiling glass frames Lake Lugano and the Alps from every one of the 26 rooms.
Summary: Opened in 2024 on the lakefront in Melide, 10 minutes from Lugano by train. All 26 rooms and suites face the water — the south-facing lake suites have the most generous terraces. The restaurant Le Rive serves dinner with uninterrupted views of Lake Lugano and the Alps.
Description ⚙: Opened in 2024 on the lakefront in the village of Melide, 10 km south of Lugano and 10 minutes by rail, this five-star boutique hotel is the newest property in the Swiss Diamond Group's Lake Lugano portfolio. Its contemporary architecture — clean lines, floor-to-ceiling glazing, lake-facing terraces — treats the panorama as the central design element. The 26 rooms and suites divide between lake-view and park-view categories; south-facing lake suites have the most expansive private terraces. The gourmet restaurant Le Rive serves dinner with uninterrupted lake views, drawing on regional Swiss-Italian produce. A seasonal outdoor pool, spa with sauna and steam bath, and direct access to lakeside walking paths complete the leisure offer. Melide station is a 5-minute walk; the Swissminiatur open-air attraction is nearby.
Address: Via Cantonale 1, 6815 Melide, Switzerland
Nearest Airports: LUG · Lugano · 13 km; MXP · Malpensa · 68 km

Hotel: InterContinental Lyon – Hotel Dieu, an IHG Hotel
Alt Text: InterContinental Lyon Hotel Dieu exterior view from across the Rhône with Soufflot dome and Basilique Notre-Dame de Fourvière on the hill

Images.alt: InterContinental Lyon Hotel Dieu exterior view from across the Rhône with Soufflot dome and Basilique Notre-Dame de Fourvière on the hill

Hotel Tagline: Across the Rhône, the Basilique Notre-Dame de Fourvière rises on the ridge opposite.
Summary: The room to ask for is the Junior Suite Rhône River View — two levels, river-facing, with the Basilica of Notre-Dame de Fourvière on the opposite bank. Le Dôme bar, set beneath a 32-metre Soufflot dome, is the city’s most theatrical place to end an evening.
Description ⚙: Housed in the Grand Hôtel-Dieu — one of the great 18th-century classified buildings on the Rhône quays, restored after 2013 — the InterContinental Lyon – Hotel Dieu has 144 rooms and suites designed by Jean-Philippe Nuel. The river-facing rooms and the Junior Suite Rhône River View look across the water toward the Part-Dieu skyline, with the Basilique Notre-Dame de Fourvière visible on the ridge. The 150 m² Presidential Suite has Rhône-facing balconies. Le Dôme bar operates beneath a 32-metre Soufflot dome and is the city's most architecturally distinctive bar. Restaurant Epona, led by chef Mathieu Charrois, serves regionally inspired cuisine along the grand façade of the Hôtel-Dieu. The hotel has held the World Travel Awards title of France's Leading Hotel five consecutive years through 2025 and earned a 2026 Michelin Key.
Address: 20 Quai Jules Courmont, 69002 Lyon, France
Nearest Airports: QNJ · Bron · 25 km; LYS · Saint-Exupéry · 38 km

Hotel: Villa Florentine, A Beauvallon Hotel & Spa
Alt Text: Villa Florentine Lyon glass-enclosed restaurant terrace at night with Lyon Cathedral illuminated below and city lights

Images.alt: Villa Florentine Lyon glass-enclosed restaurant terrace at night with Lyon Cathedral illuminated below and city lights

Hotel Tagline: From Fourvière Hill, Lyon Cathedral and the Old Lyon rooftops spread below the terrace.
Summary: Reopened in April 2026 under Groupe Beauvallon, with renovated rooms and a new restaurant, bar, and salon de thé. The Medici Suite delivers the house’s widest view — Lyon Cathedral and the full sweep of Old Lyon rooftops visible from the terrace. The panoramic pool faces the same city.
Description ⚙: On Fourvière Hill in a 17th-century former convent, Villa Florentine has occupied the same position above Old Lyon since 1993. In October 2025 the property passed to Groupe Beauvallon and closed for renovation, reopening in April 2026 as Villa Florentine, A Beauvallon Hotel & Spa. The renovation preserved the glass-enclosed verrière that frames Lyon Cathedral and the rooftops of Old Lyon directly below, and added a new gastronomic restaurant under a new chef, a speakeasy-style bar, a salon de thé, and a ground-floor bistrot. The Medici Suite remains the house benchmark: elevated hill position with the cathedral façade and the full spread of the Presqu'île in view. The heated panoramic pool and spa, now Le Spa de la Villa Florentine, continue under the new ownership. The hotel is a Relais & Châteaux member.
Address: 25 Mnt Saint-Barthélémy, 69005 Lyon, France
Nearest Airports: QNJ · Bron · 29 km; LYS · Saint-Exupéry · 42 km

Alt Text: Villa Maïa Lyon terrace at dusk with panoramic view of the Saône river bridges Presqu’île and Part-Dieu tower at blue hour

Images.alt: Villa Maïa Lyon terrace at dusk with panoramic view of the Saône river bridges Presqu’île and Part-Dieu tower at blue hour

Hotel Tagline: From Fourvière Hill, the upper rooms hold both rivers and, on the clearest days, Mont Blanc.
Summary: Worth staying for the position alone — from the upper rooms and terrace, the view spans Lyon’s two rivers and, on the clearest days, reaches as far as Mont Blanc. The 100 m² apartment at the top of the property holds the broadest sightline in the house.
Description ⚙: Atop Fourvière Hill in Lyon's 5th arrondissement, Villa Maïa is a boutique five-star hotel with 27 rooms, 6 suites, and a 100 m² apartment, each designed with references to Japanese art. From the upper rooms and terrace the view spans both the Saône and the Rhône with the Presqu'île between them; on the clearest winter days, Mont Blanc appears on the eastern horizon. The hotel is a member of the Leading Hotels of the World. The gourmet restaurant serves panoramic city views alongside the menu. The spa draws on ancient Gallo-Roman bathing traditions with modern treatments. The landscaped gardens offer meditative views of Lyon's cityscape and rivers. The Basilique Notre-Dame de Fourvière and the Théâtre Gallo-Romain de Fourvière are within walking distance.
Address: 8 Rue Professeur Pierre Marion, 69005 Lyon, France
Nearest Airports: QNJ · Bron · 29 km; LYS · Saint-Exupéry · 42 km

Alt Text: Radisson Blu Hotel Lyon Celest Restaurant dining room on the 32nd floor with panoramic windows and Lyon cityscape and mountains below

Images.alt: Radisson Blu Hotel Lyon Celest Restaurant dining room on the 32nd floor with panoramic windows and Lyon cityscape and mountains below

Hotel Tagline: From the pencil tower's upper floors, Lyon and the Alps unfold across every window.
Summary: Request a room on the upper floors of the Tour Part-Dieu — the Radisson Blu occupies the pencil-shaped tower’s top section, with every room opening onto a panoramic sweep of the city and the Alps. Celest Bar & Restaurant on the 32nd floor sets the same view over breakfast and dinner.
Description ⚙: The Radisson Blu Hotel, Lyon occupies the top ten floors of the 42-storey Tour Part-Dieu — nicknamed Le Crayon by locals for its tapered pencil profile — in the Part-Dieu business district. Every one of the 245 guest rooms has a panoramic city view, and the Alps are visible from the upper floors on clear days. Celest Bar & Restaurant on the 32nd floor, approximately 150 metres above ground, serves breakfast and dinner with a full-rotation panorama of Lyon and the surrounding massifs. The hotel is directly connected to the Westfield La Part-Dieu shopping centre and two minutes from the Gare de la Part-Dieu TGV station, making it the most convenient high-view property in the city for arriving and departing travellers.
Address: 129 Rue Servient, 69003 Lyon, France
Nearest Airports: QNJ · Bron · 15 km; LYS · Saint-Exupéry · 28 km

Alt Text: Sofitel Lyon Bellecour Les 3 Dômes restaurant dining table with floor-to-ceiling windows overlooking the Rhône and Lyon city skyline

Images.alt: Sofitel Lyon Bellecour Les 3 Dômes restaurant dining table with floor-to-ceiling windows overlooking the Rhône and Lyon city skyline

Hotel Tagline: From the eighth floor, the Rhône and Fourvière's basilica fill the same frame.
Summary: The rooms worth requesting are on the river-facing façade — upper floors across the Rhône toward Fourvière and the Massif des Bauges beyond. Les 3 Dômes, the panoramic restaurant on the eighth floor, makes the same frame available over breakfast and dinner.
Description ⚙: On the west bank of the Rhône at the southern end of the Presqu'île, the Sofitel Lyon Bellecour has 164 rooms and suites, with river-facing rooms on the north façade overlooking the Rhône toward the 6th arrondissement and the Basilique Notre-Dame de Fourvière on the ridge beyond. Les 3 Dômes restaurant occupies the eighth floor with 180-degree views across the Rhône and the city rooftops; chef Jérémy Ravier, a member of the Toques Blanches Lyonnaises, serves a regionally inspired menu listed in the MICHELIN Guide. Bar Le Melhor and the Light Bar terrace share the same panoramic floor. The spa offers Deep Nature and Biologique Recherche treatments. The hotel is four minutes on foot from Place Bellecour and 14 minutes from Vieux Lyon.
Address: 20 Quai du Dr Gailleton, 69002 Lyon, France
Nearest Airports: QNJ · Bron · 24 km; LYS · Saint-Exupéry · 37 km

Hotel Tagline: Three infinity pools descend the cliff face toward an unbroken south Atlantic horizon.
Summary: The west coast's only 5-star design resort, with 243 rooms on south-facing cliff terraces above Calheta Beach. Three outdoor infinity pools descend toward the Atlantic; the Hedonistic Suites add private jacuzzis with a direct ocean view from the highest point of the promontory.
Description ⚙: A 5-star design resort built across south-facing terraced cliffs above Calheta Beach on Madeira's west coast. Its 243 rooms and suites are distributed over multiple levels, all oriented toward the Atlantic. The Hedonistic Suites have private outdoor jacuzzis with a direct ocean view. Three outdoor infinity pools descend from the upper terrace toward the beach, with the rooftop pool at the highest elevation delivering the widest south Atlantic view. Four restaurants, four bars, and a spa complete the offer.
Address: Rua da Serra D'Água, nº1, 9370-087 Arco da Calheta, Madeira, Portugal
Nearest Airports: FNC · Madeira · 48 km

Summary: A working quinta on a clifftop plateau in Santana, with three hectares of organic vine between the building and the north coast cliffs. The outdoor pool and restaurant terrace share the same northeast Atlantic panorama as the vineyards stretching away below.
Description ⚙: A 65-room hotel and working quinta on a clifftop plateau above Achada do Gramacho in Santana, northeast Madeira. The property occupies five hectares, of which three are planted with organic vines descending toward the north coast cliffs. Views from rooms and the outdoor pool take in the full northeast Atlantic coastline and the volcanic interior mountains. The hotel was fully renovated in 2020. The on-site restaurant serves Madeiran cuisine and wine from the estate's own cellar.
Address: Estrada da Quinta do Furão Nº6, 9230-082 Santana, Portugal
Nearest Airports: FNC · Madeira · 25 km

Summary: Built directly above Porto Moniz's famous natural lava pools on Madeira's northwest coast — the only hotel at this remove from Funchal with rooms facing the volcanic formations. The restaurant terrace overlooks the pools and the open Atlantic in the same sightline.
Description ⚙: A 4-star hotel in the fishing village of Porto Moniz, positioned directly above the island's famous natural lava rock swimming pools on the northwest coast. All rooms have balconies facing the Atlantic Ocean and the volcanic rock formations of the pool complex. The restaurant terrace overlooks the pools and the open sea. A rooftop solarium with jacuzzi provides elevated views north over the Atlantic. The hotel includes free access to the natural pools and a diving centre on site.
Address: Rotunda Da Piscina Nº 3, 9270-156 Porto Moniz, Portugal

Summary: A south-coast cliff hotel in Caniço de Baixo with a sea-level bathing complex carved into volcanic rock. The Galo Lido includes saltwater pools and direct access to the Garajau Marine Reserve. All rooms have Atlantic balconies; the Ayurvedic spa delivers the same ocean view.
Description ⚙: A 4-star hotel set on a south-facing cliff edge in Caniço de Baixo, 15 minutes east of Funchal. The hotel's bathing complex — the Galo Lido — is carved into the volcanic rock at sea level, with saltwater pools and direct access to the Garajau Marine Reserve, one of the oldest marine protected areas in Europe. All rooms have sea-view balconies facing the Atlantic. An Ayurvedic spa, two restaurants, and a full programme of water and land activities are available.
Address: R. Dom Francisco Santana, 9125-031 Caniço, Portugal
Nearest Airports: FNC · Madeira · 10 km

Description ⚙: A 4-star all-inclusive resort positioned directly on Calheta Beach, one of only three natural sandy beaches on Madeira's coast. The hotel's pool terrace faces south over the beach and the Atlantic. All 72 rooms include private balconies with ocean or mountain views. Three restaurants, three bars, a spa with indoor pool and Turkish bath, and a full activity programme are included in the all-inclusive rate. The Calheta Marina is 100 metres from the hotel entrance.
Address: Praia da, 9370-133 Estreito da Calheta, Portugal

Description ⚙: A 4-star boutique hotel created from the renovation of a traditional quinta on a cliff above the village of Ponta do Sol, on Madeira's south coast. Its 54 rooms are designed in a contemporary minimalist aesthetic; sea-facing rooms look south over the Atlantic, and garden rooms face the banana plantations and terraced village below. All rooms open onto panoramic balconies. The outdoor infinity pool and jacuzzi overhang the cliff with the ocean on the horizon. Member of Design Hotels.
Address: Caminho do Passo 6, 9360-529 Ponta do Sol, Portugal

Summary: The retractable roof in the Chapter Two villas opens the bedroom to a sky of Noonu Atoll stars, and the same overwater structure includes a slide from the upper deck directly into the 5.6-kilometre private lagoon. No beach, no jetty — just a step and a drop into the Indian Ocean.
Description ⚙: Overwater and island villas on private Medhufaru Island in the Noonu Atoll, 40 minutes from Malé by seaplane. 51 one-to-five-bedroom villas, all with private pools and open-air bathrooms. Chapter Two villas feature a retractable bedroom roof for stargazing and a water slide from the upper deck into the lagoon. On-site facilities include an overwater cinema, a high-powered observatory, a glass-blowing studio, and six dining venues. Eco-certified with a zero-waste philosophy.
Address: Medhufaru Island, Manadhoo, Maldives
Nearest Airports: DRV · Dharavandhoo · ~70 km

Alt Text: COMO Maalifushi Maldives overwater villa teak deck with private plunge pool, thatched gazebo and staff member carrying tray over turquoise Indian Ocean

Images.alt: COMO Maalifushi Maldives overwater villa teak deck with private plunge pool, thatched gazebo and staff member carrying tray over turquoise Indian Ocean

Hotel Tagline: Overwater villas open onto an unbroken Indian Ocean horizon, with Tai Restaurant suspended above the same water.
Summary: In the Thaa Atoll — 60 minutes from Malé by seaplane and the most remote resort on this page — the overwater villas open directly onto an unbroken Indian Ocean horizon. Tai, the Japanese restaurant, is built on stilts above the same water, framing sunset over open sea.
Description ⚙: 65 overwater and beach villas in the Thaa Atoll, 60 minutes from Malé by seaplane — the only luxury resort in the atoll. Tai Restaurant, suspended on stilts above the lagoon, serves Japanese cuisine. COMO Shambhala Retreat offers Ayurvedic therapies and ocean-facing treatment rooms. Known for surf breaks managed in partnership with Tropicsurf, and for whale shark snorkelling excursions on the nearby western reefs.
Address: Thaa Atoll, Maldives
Nearest Airports: DRV · Dharavandhoo · ~317 km

Alt Text: Waldorf Astoria Maldives Ithaafushi private beach dinner at dusk with sand-carved armchairs, Moroccan lanterns and torches facing the Indian Ocean at twilight

Images.alt: Waldorf Astoria Maldives Ithaafushi private beach dinner at dusk with sand-carved armchairs, Moroccan lanterns and torches facing the Indian Ocean at twilight

Hotel Tagline: Where the infinity pool ends, the lagoon begins, and the line between them vanishes.
Summary: Three private islands spanning 3.5 kilometres of coastline enclose a protected lagoon in South Malé Atoll. Each villa has a private infinity pool level with the water surface — at the edge, the distinction between pool and ocean disappears into one flat line.
Description ⚙: 119 villas across three private islands in the South Malé Atoll, 40 minutes from Velana Airport by private yacht. All villas feature private infinity pools. The resort offers 11 distinct dining venues. Horizontal villa architecture places the pool surface at ocean level.
Address: Ithaafushi Island South, Male 20009, Maldives
Nearest Airports: DRV · Dharavandhoo · ~130 km

Alt Text: Six Senses Laamu Maldives overwater deck at sunset with two guests seated at ocean edge, green cushion lounge seating and open water horizon

Images.alt: Six Senses Laamu Maldives overwater deck at sunset with two guests seated at ocean edge, green cushion lounge seating and open water horizon

Hotel Tagline: Glass floors reveal reef sharks, turtles and eagle rays passing directly beneath your feet.
Summary: The only resort in the Laamu Atoll, 65 minutes south of Malé by seaplane, with overwater villas built over glass-panelled floors above the house reef. Reef sharks, turtles and eagle rays pass directly beneath — the view is vertical as much as it is horizontal.
Description ⚙: 97 beach and overwater villas on Olhuveli Island, Laamu Atoll — the only five-star resort in the atoll, located 65 minutes south of Malé by seaplane. Overwater villas feature glass-panelled floors allowing guests to observe reef life from inside the villa. Four restaurants, a Six Senses Spa with ocean-facing treatment rooms, and a Junior Marine Biologist programme for children.
Address: RC93+66F, Laamu Atoll 15090, Maldives
Nearest Airports: DRV · Dharavandhoo · ~372 km

Hotel: The St. Regis Maldives Vommuli Resort
Alt Text: St. Regis Maldives Vommuli Resort overwater villa terrace with long lap pool, timber deck chairs and angular contemporary architecture over turquoise ocean

Images.alt: St. Regis Maldives Vommuli Resort overwater villa terrace with long lap pool, timber deck chairs and angular contemporary architecture over turquoise ocean

Hotel Tagline: From the Whale Bar, suspended at the island's western tip, the Indian Ocean fills the horizon at sunset.
Summary: Set on a private island in the Dhaalu Atoll, all 77 villas have private pools and floor-to-ceiling windows facing the Indian Ocean. The Whale Bar, suspended over the water at the island's western tip, delivers the clearest sunset sightline on the property.
Description ⚙: 77 villas on private Vommuli Island in the Dhaalu Atoll, 45 minutes from Malé by seaplane. All villas have private pools, floor-to-ceiling windows, and 24-hour St. Regis Butler Service. Six restaurants and the Iridium Spa. The Whale Bar, located at the island's western tip, is positioned for direct sunset views over the open Indian Ocean.
Address: Vommuli Island Dhaalu Atoll, 13080, Maldives
Nearest Airports: DRV · Dharavandhoo · ~251 km

Alt Text: Ritz-Carlton Maldives Fari Islands overwater villa infinity pool at ocean edge with two guests wading, circular day bed and wicker table on teak deck

Images.alt: Ritz-Carlton Maldives Fari Islands overwater villa infinity pool at ocean edge with two guests wading, circular day bed and wicker table on teak deck

Hotel Tagline: Overwater villas sit above a turquoise lagoon, private infinity pools at the edge.
Summary: Forty-five minutes by speedboat from Velana Airport in North Malé Atoll, the overwater villas sit above a turquoise lagoon with private infinity pools at the edge. Sunset is marked nightly by a Bodu Beru drum ceremony from the water's edge.
Description ⚙: 100 overwater and beach villas in the Fari Islands archipelago, North Malé Atoll. Accessible by 45-minute speedboat or 10-minute seaplane from Velana Airport. All villas have private pools. Seven dining venues. Opened June 2021. Sunset is marked nightly with a traditional Bodu Beru drum ceremony.
Address: Fari Islands North, Male 20013, Maldives
Nearest Airports: DRV · Dharavandhoo · ~79 km

Alt Text: Anantara Kihavah Maldives Villas SEA underwater restaurant interior with panoramic aquarium walls showing reef fish and mirrored ceiling

Images.alt: Anantara Kihavah Maldives Villas SEA underwater restaurant interior with panoramic aquarium walls showing reef fish and mirrored ceiling

Hotel Tagline: Open ocean surrounds every overwater villa inside the Baa Atoll UNESCO Biosphere Reserve.
Summary: Inside the Baa Atoll UNESCO Biosphere Reserve, the overwater villas at Kihavah face open ocean on every side. Below the same stilts, the house reef runs toward Hanifaru Bay — the world's largest gathering site for manta rays, reachable in under 25 minutes by boat.
Description ⚙: 80 overwater and beach villas on Kihavah Huravalhi Island in the Baa Atoll UNESCO Biosphere Reserve, 35 minutes from Malé by seaplane. Features SEA, the Maldives' only underwater caviar restaurant, and SKY, the country's first overwater observatory. The house reef runs toward Hanifaru Bay, where the world's largest documented gatherings of manta rays occur between May and November.
Address: Kihavah Huravalhi Island Baa Atoll, 20215, Maldives
Nearest Airports: DRV · Dharavandhoo · ~18 km

Alt Text: Soneva Fushi Maldives aerial view of circular treehouse dining deck with green banquette seating surrounded by tropical jungle canopy at dusk

Images.alt: Soneva Fushi Maldives aerial view of circular treehouse dining deck with green banquette seating surrounded by tropical jungle canopy at dusk

Hotel Tagline: Dense jungle parts to reveal a private beach with no other resort in sight.
Summary: The villas at Soneva Fushi sit inside dense jungle on a private island in Baa Atoll, steps from a beach with no other resort in sight. A treehouse dining deck above the canopy and an open-air cinema on the sand extend the experience outward after dark.
Description ⚙: 65 beach villas on private Kunfunadhoo Island in the Baa Atoll UNESCO Biosphere Reserve, 30 minutes from Malé by seaplane. All villas sit within dense jungle with direct private beach access. On-site facilities include open-air Cinema Paradiso, a high-powered observatory, a glass-blowing studio, and 16 dining venues.
Address: Kunfunadhoo Island, Eydhafushi, Maldives
Nearest Airports: DRV · Dharavandhoo · ~8 km

Hotel: Four Seasons Resort Maldives at Landaa Giraavaru
Alt Text: Four Seasons Maldives Landaa Giraavaru overwater bar terrace at sunset with woman holding cocktail, illuminated lounge seating and resort lights across lagoon

Images.alt: Four Seasons Maldives Landaa Giraavaru overwater bar terrace at sunset with woman holding cocktail, illuminated lounge seating and resort lights across lagoon

Hotel Tagline: A hammock net above the lagoon, with manta ray waters stretching to the horizon.
Summary: Water villas at Landaa Giraavaru are built above the UNESCO Biosphere Reserve waters of Baa Atoll, each with an overwater hammock net suspended between the deck posts. Between June and November, manta rays gather at nearby Hanifaru Bay — visible from the same lagoon below the villa.
Description ⚙: 103 beach and overwater villas on a 44-acre island in the Baa Atoll UNESCO Biosphere Reserve, 35 minutes from Malé by seaplane. Overwater villas feature hammock nets suspended between deck posts above the lagoon. AyurMa Ayurvedic retreat and Marine Discovery Centre with turtle rehabilitation on-site. Manta ray snorkelling at Hanifaru Bay available between June and November.
Address: Baa Atoll, 20097, Maldives
Nearest Airports: DRV · Dharavandhoo · ~15 km

Alt Text: One&Only Reethi Rah Maldives overwater villa deck with suspended hammock nets over shallow turquoise lagoon under thatched roof

Images.alt: One&Only Reethi Rah Maldives overwater villa deck with suspended hammock nets over shallow turquoise lagoon under thatched roof

Hotel Tagline: Twelve separate beaches, each one open to the Indian Ocean with nothing else in sight.
Summary: On one of the largest private islands in the Maldives — two islands joined by a bridge — the villas are arranged across 12 separate beaches, each facing open Indian Ocean without a neighbouring resort in the sightline. The overwater villas extend directly above the North Malé Atoll lagoon.
Description ⚙: 130 overwater and beach villas across two private islands joined by a bridge in North Malé Atoll, 45 minutes from Malé by yacht. Designed by Jean-Michel Gathy. The island has 12 distinct beaches, each facing open ocean. Six restaurants and One&Only Spa.
Address: Reethi Rah, North Malé Atoll, Malé 08440, Maldives
Nearest Airports: DRV · Dharavandhoo · ~75 km

Alt Text: Patina Maldives Fari Islands overwater villa at dusk with private pool, open-plan living room with floor-to-ceiling glass walls facing ocean horizon at sunset

Images.alt: Patina Maldives Fari Islands overwater villa at dusk with private pool, open-plan living room with floor-to-ceiling glass walls facing ocean horizon at sunset

Hotel Tagline: Floor-to-ceiling glass makes the open ocean the villa's fourth wall.
Summary: Opened in 2021 in the Fari Islands archipelago of North Malé Atoll, the villas here are framed entirely in floor-to-ceiling glass facing open water. Sunrise arrives simultaneously through the bedroom wall and the pool terrace — the ocean becomes the room's fourth wall.
Description ⚙: Opened in 2021 as part of the Fari Islands archipelago in North Malé Atoll, 45 minutes by speedboat or 10 minutes by seaplane from Velana Airport. Floor-to-ceiling glass villas on beach and overwater, facing open ocean. 11 dining venues. Sustainability-focused with EarthCheck certification.
Address: North Malé Atoll, 20026, Maldives
Nearest Airports: DRV · Dharavandhoo · ~76 km

Hotel: Four Seasons Resort Mallorca at Formentor
Alt Text: Four Seasons Resort Mallorca at Formentor Port de Pollènça pool terrace with pine trees and mountain-ringed bay at golden hour

Images.alt: Four Seasons Resort Mallorca at Formentor Port de Pollènça pool terrace with pine trees and mountain-ringed bay at golden hour

Hotel Tagline: Private terraces hang above the bay, pine forest rising behind, open Mediterranean ahead.
Summary: Hotel Formentor opened in 1929 and drew the world's most celebrated guests to its Cala Formentor beach; reopened as Four Seasons in August 2024, now with 110 rooms and suites, each on a private terrace above the bay — on a peninsula accessible only by road or by private boat from Port de Pollènça.
Description ⚙: Reopened in August 2024 as a Four Seasons property, this landmark resort on the Cap de Formentor peninsula dates to 1929, when it opened as Hotel Formentor. Set on a private estate of 486 hectares between Cala Formentor beach and a protected pine forest, the resort offers 110 rooms and suites, all with private terraces. Upper-floor rooms and Formentor Suites deliver panoramic views of the Mediterranean and the forested peninsula. The resort has four restaurants, a full-service spa, an adults-only pool, and a family pool, with direct access to the white-sand beach.
Address: Carrer de Formentor, s/n, 07470 Mallorca, Illes Balears, Spain
Nearest Airports: PMI · Palma de Mallorca · 77 km

Alt Text: Cap Rocat Mallorca cliff terrace with plunge pool set into golden limestone rock above open Mediterranean sea

Images.alt: Cap Rocat Mallorca cliff terrace with plunge pool set into golden limestone rock above open Mediterranean sea

Hotel Tagline: From the fortress walls, the whole Bay of Palma stretches out with nothing between you and it.
Summary: The drawbridge goes up at sunset and the Bay of Palma belongs entirely to the guests. Built into a 19th-century military fortress declared a National Monument, this adults-only hotel has 30 rooms carved from stone — each looking out over the same water that once had to be defended.
Description ⚙: Cap Rocat occupies a 19th-century military fortress on a private headland above the Bay of Palma, declared both a Heritage Asset and a National Monument. The fortress, set within a 120-hectare protected natural area, has been converted into an adults-only hotel of 30 rooms and suites, each built into the original stone walls with private patios and terraces, most with direct Mediterranean sea views. The hotel has direct sea access via a saltwater pool built on the fortress walls and a private rocky beach cove. Two restaurants serve Mediterranean cuisine; the property is a member of Small Luxury Hotels of the World and closes seasonally from mid-November to March.
Address: Ctra. d'enderrocat, s/n, 07609 Cala Blava-Llucmajor, Illes Balears, Spain
Nearest Airports: PMI · Palma de Mallorca · 13 km

Alt Text: Jumeirah Mallorca Port de Sóller outdoor restaurant terrace with wicker chairs overlooking the bay and Tramuntana mountains at sunset

Images.alt: Jumeirah Mallorca Port de Sóller outdoor restaurant terrace with wicker chairs overlooking the bay and Tramuntana mountains at sunset

Hotel Tagline: Horseshoe harbor in front, pine-covered mountains behind — the cliff holds both at once.
Summary: Perched on the cliff above Port de Sóller, the hotel sits between two views at once: the horseshoe harbor and the Mediterranean in front, the pine-covered Serra de Tramuntana rising behind. Both are framed from every room — the mountain UNESCO-listed, the sea turning deep blue at dusk.
Description ⚙: Located on the northwest coast of Mallorca, Jumeirah Mallorca occupies a clifftop position above Port de Sóller, overlooking the natural harbor and the Serra de Tramuntana, a UNESCO World Heritage site. Eleven low-rise buildings are linked by garden walkways across 500 meters of cliff. The hotel offers 121 rooms and suites, all with private balconies or terraces oriented toward the Mediterranean or the Tramuntana range. The hotel features five restaurants and lounges, an adults-only infinity pool, a family pool, and the award-winning Talise Spa.
Address: Jumeirah, Hotel & Spa, Carrer de Bèlgica, S/N, 07108 Port de Sóller, Illes Balears, Spain
Nearest Airports: PMI · Palma de Mallorca · 37 km

Hotel: La Residencia, A Belmond Hotel, Mallorca
Alt Text: La Residencia A Belmond Hotel Deà private pool terrace with sun loungers and Tramuntana mountain ridge and village rooftops behind

Images.alt: La Residencia A Belmond Hotel Deà private pool terrace with sun loungers and Tramuntana mountain ridge and village rooftops behind

Hotel Tagline: Olive groves fall away to the valley, with the Tramuntana ridge and Mediterranean beyond.
Summary: Deà has drawn artists and writers since Robert Graves settled there in 1929. La Residencia sits at the edge of that same village: 13 hectares of olive groves and terraced gardens on a hillside facing the Tramuntana ridge, with the Mediterranean visible in the valley below.
Description ⚙: La Residencia occupies two 16th-century manor houses on a 13-hectare hillside estate at the edge of the village of Deà, in the Serra de Tramuntana. The hotel gardens include olive trees, citrus groves, and herb gardens, with views across the valley to the mountain ridgeline and the Mediterranean beyond. Rooms and suites are furnished in traditional Mallorcan style; Executive Suites and upper-floor suites offer panoramic views of Deà and the Tramuntana, and several suites and villas have private plunge pools. Three restaurants include El Olivo in a 500-year-old olive press. The property is seasonal, open from March to November.
Address: Carrer son Canals, 07179 Deià, Illes Balears, Spain
Nearest Airports: PMI · Palma de Mallorca · 37 km

Hotel: The St. Regis Mardavall Mallorca Resort
Alt Text: The St. Regis Mardavall Mallorca Resort bedroom with arched terrace doors open to balcony table and Mediterranean sea view

Images.alt: The St. Regis Mardavall Mallorca Resort bedroom with arched terrace doors open to balcony table and Mediterranean sea view

Hotel Tagline: From the lowest terrace, the Mediterranean fills the entire frame.
Summary: The southwest coast of Mallorca drops sharply into the sea near Puerto Portals, and the Mardavall is built into that slope. Es Fum, the Michelin-starred restaurant, sits at the lowest level; from its terrace, the Mediterranean fills the entire frame — and the rooms above it do the same.
Description ⚙: The St. Regis Mardavall occupies a terraced clifftop position on the southwest coast of Mallorca between the Tramuntana foothills and the Mediterranean Sea. The resort consists of four terracotta-hued low-rise buildings with 125 rooms and suites, all featuring large private terraces with Mediterranean views. Butler service is standard for all guests. Dining includes Es Fum, a Michelin-starred restaurant, the Terra restaurant with a farm-to-table concept, and the Mar Sea Club. The resort also features a full-service spa, two outdoor pools, and an indoor pool. Seasonal, open from February to November.
Address: Ma-1, 19, 07181 Costa den Blanes, Illes Balears, Spain
Nearest Airports: PMI · Palma de Mallorca · 24 km

Hotel: Es Princep – The Leading Hotels of the World
Alt Text: Es Princep Palma rooftop terrace with wooden deck and parasols overlooking the turquoise Bay of Palma

Images.alt: Es Princep Palma rooftop terrace with wooden deck and parasols overlooking the turquoise Bay of Palma

Hotel Tagline: From the rooftop, the cathedral quarter, ancient walls, and Bay of Palma open in a single panorama.
Summary: Built directly over the 16th-century Baluard walls of Palma's old town, Es Princep sits at the hinge between the city and the sea. The Bay of Palma is visible from upper rooms; from the rooftop Almaq, the view opens to the cathedral quarter, the ancient walls, and the water beyond.
Description ⚙: Es Princep is built on and above the 16th-century fortification walls of the Baluard Es Príncep in the historic center of Palma. The hotel has 100 rooms; sea-facing rooms on upper floors deliver direct views of the Bay of Palma. The rooftop terrace Almaq spans 800 square meters and features a pool, bar, and restaurant with panoramic views of the sea, the cathedral quarter, and the city walls. The hotel includes the Cocó Spa Oasis with an 18-meter indoor pool, sauna, and hammam. Es Princep is a member of The Leading Hotels of the World.
Address: Carrer de Bala Roja, 1, Centre, 07001 Palma, Illes Balears, Spain
Nearest Airports: PMI · Palma de Mallorca · 9 km

Alt Text: Nixe Palace Mallorca hotel facade above turquoise sea and palm trees at Cala Major beach

Images.alt: Nixe Palace Mallorca hotel facade above turquoise sea and palm trees at Cala Major beach

Hotel Tagline: Rooms sit directly above Cala Major's sand, balconies level with open Mediterranean.
Summary: Cala Major is a sheltered sandy bay ten minutes west of Palma — and Nixe Palace sits directly on it, rooms renovated in 2024 looking out over the water. The spa thermal circuit has its own sea view; the beach is directly below the pool terrace, accessible without leaving the hotel grounds.
Description ⚙: Nixe Palace is a beachfront hotel on Cala Major, a sheltered sandy beach west of Palma. The hotel is positioned directly above the sand, with rooms renovated in 2024 featuring sea-facing balconies overlooking the Mediterranean. The property has two restaurants, including A Popa Sea Club at beach level, plus the Nixe Herbal Spa by Sisley with a heated indoor wellness pool and sea views. The hotel also has an outdoor pool and direct beach access. A member of Preferred Hotels & Resorts.
Address: Avinguda de Joan Miró, 269, Ponent, 07015 Palma, Illes Balears, Spain
Nearest Airports: PMI · Palma de Mallorca · 19 km

Alt Text: Son Brull Mallorca Pollènça outdoor pool deck with white sun loungers and pine-covered Tramuntana valley at sunrise

Images.alt: Son Brull Mallorca Pollènça outdoor pool deck with white sun loungers and pine-covered Tramuntana valley at sunrise

Hotel Tagline: From the restaurant terrace, almond groves and vineyard rows climb toward Tramuntana limestone cliffs.
Summary: The Pollènça valley opens wide from the 3/65 restaurant terrace, with almond groves and vineyard rows running up to limestone cliffs at the edge of the Tramuntana. Son Brull's estate — 100 acres of olive trees, its own winery, a converted Jesuit monastery — gives the view something to belong to.
Description ⚙: Son Brull is a Relais & Châteaux hotel in a converted 18th-century Jesuit monastery at the foot of the Serra de Tramuntana, surrounded by 100 acres of vineyards, olive groves, and almond orchards. The property has 27 rooms and suites; the estate produces its own olive oil and wine. The restaurant 3/65 serves contemporary Mediterranean cuisine on a terrace overlooking the Pollènça valley and the Tramuntana limestone peaks. The hotel has a spa with indoor and outdoor pools, a sauna, and a hammam. Located six kilometers from the sea.
Address: Ctra. Palma -Puerto Pollença, Km. 50, 07460 Pollença, Illes Balears, Spain
Nearest Airports: PMI · Palma de Mallorca · 58 km

Alt Text: The Peninsula Manila Manila classic suite living room with warm golden interior and two windows framing the Makati skyline and the Ayala Triangle Gardens canopy at dusk

Images.alt: The Peninsula Manila Manila classic suite living room with warm golden interior and two windows framing the Makati skyline and the Ayala Triangle Gardens canopy at dusk

Hotel Tagline: From the terrace, the manicured Ayala Triangle Gardens spread below, the Makati skyline rising beyond.
Summary: The landscaped terrace and outdoor gardens frame the Ayala Triangle Gardens below, while upper-floor rooms turn towards the Makati skyline. Two swimming pools and a Gallery Club Lounge for suite guests round out one of Manila’s most established luxury addresses.
Description ⚙: One of the best hotels in Manila, The Peninsula Manila is located at the corner of Ayala and Makati Avenues in the Makati Central Business District. This iconic five-star hotel, known as The Jewel in The Capital's Crown, has recently undergone renovations to enhance its 351 rooms with sophisticated designs, modern luxuries, and state-of-the-art technology. The hotel's landscaped gardens and expansive outdoor terrace offer stunning views of the Manila skyline and the manicured Ayala Triangle Gardens. Amenities include a fitness center, a luxurious spa, two swimming pools, and the exclusive Gallery Club Lounge for suite guests. The hotel's prime location near Greenbelt Mall and Century City Mall makes it ideal for both leisure and business travelers.
Address: 1226 Makati Ave, Makati City, Metro Manila, Philippines
Nearest Airports: MNL · Ninoy Aquino · 14 km

Alt Text: Discovery Primea Manila rooftop infinity pool deck with sunloungers and jacuzzi at sunset overlooking the Makati CBD skyline

Images.alt: Discovery Primea Manila rooftop infinity pool deck with sunloungers and jacuzzi at sunset overlooking the Makati CBD skyline

Hotel Tagline: From a heated infinity pool high above Makati, the Manila skyline stretches across the horizon.
Summary: A heated 20-metre infinity pool on the upper levels frames the Makati skyline in full. In the hotel itself — a Kenzo Tange tower of 68 stories — even standard rooms reach the view from their floor-to-ceiling windows. Pool level is the clearest perspective.
Description ⚙: A top Manila hotel in the Makati Central Business District, Discovery Primea is renowned for its luxurious accommodations and strategic location. Designed by Pritzker Prize-winning architect Kenzo Tange and housed in a 68-story tower — one of Manila's tallest skyscrapers — the hotel occupies the lower floors, ensuring wonderful city vistas at every level. It is a stone's throw from Greenbelt Shopping Mall, Glorietta by Ayala Malls, and Rustan's Department Store. The hotel features a heated 20-meter infinity pool with panoramic views of Manila's skyline, a 24/7 fitness center, and the Terazi Spa with traditional Turkish baths. On-site dining includes Restaurant Tapenade (Mediterranean cuisine) and Flame (contemporary continental fine dining). Rooms feature kitchenettes and floor-to-ceiling windows.
Address: 6749 Ayala Ave, Makati City, 1226 Metro Manila, Philippines
Nearest Airports: MNL · Ninoy Aquino · 13 km

Alt Text: Okada Manila Manila marble suite bathroom with freestanding oval bathtub facing floor-to-ceiling windows overlooking the outdoor resort pool and Manila Bay

Images.alt: Okada Manila Manila marble suite bathroom with freestanding oval bathtub facing floor-to-ceiling windows overlooking the outdoor resort pool and Manila Bay

Hotel Tagline: Manila Bay fills the bay-side rooms, while The Fountain glows below private balconies.
Summary: Manila Bay fills the rooms on the bay side, and The Fountain — one of Southeast Asia’s largest water features — is visible from private balconies and bathrooms on the relevant floors. A resort that operates at its own scale: 993 rooms, over 20 dining venues.
Description ⚙: Nestled in Entertainment City, Parañaque, and only a 10-minute drive from Ninoy Aquino International Airport, Okada Manila is a premier five-star resort known for its luxurious offerings and iconic design, which resembles a golden flower. This expansive property provides an excellent mix of leisure, entertainment, a world-class casino, and comfort. The resort features 993 lavishly furnished rooms and suites with stunning views of Manila Bay, over 20 dining venues, and The Fountain — a large illuminated water feature visible from private balconies and bathrooms on the bay-facing floors. Guests can enjoy panoramic Manila Bay views from rooms on the bay side of the property.
Address: Entertainment City, New Seaside Dr, Parañaque, 1701 Kalakhang Maynila, Philippines
Nearest Airports: MNL · Ninoy Aquino · 8 km

Alt Text: Conrad Manila Manila illuminated rooftop infinity pool at blue hour with Manila Bay stretching to the horizon and curved wooden façade reflected in the water

Images.alt: Conrad Manila Manila illuminated rooftop infinity pool at blue hour with Manila Bay stretching to the horizon and curved wooden façade reflected in the water

Hotel Tagline: Corner geometry earns the widest sweep of Manila Bay from the Diplomatic Suite.
Summary: The Bay View Diplomatic Suite in the corner is the definitive address for Manila Bay — the building’s geometry puts it at the widest angle. Standard rooms divide between bay and city depending on which side they face; the bay-facing rooms also connect to the infinity pool terrace at sunset.
Description ⚙: Since its grand opening in 2016, Conrad Manila has been a beacon of luxury and innovation. Nestled on the edge of Manila Bay within the Mall of Asia Complex, the hotel features 347 well-appointed rooms with panoramic views of Manila Bay or the city from floor-to-ceiling windows. The opulent Bay View Diplomatic Suite in the building's corner guarantees the most spectacular Manila Bay vistas while providing access to the hotel's exclusive Executive Lounge. Amenities include a bay-facing infinity pool, a 24/7 Life Fitness-equipped fitness center, and a luxurious spa with captivating views. Strategically located just fifteen minutes from the airport, the hotel serves both leisure and business travelers.
Address: Seaside Boulevard, Coral Way, Pasay City, 1300 Metro Manila, Philippines
Nearest Airports: MNL · Ninoy Aquino · 10 km

Alt Text: Shangri-La The Fort Manila freestanding white bathtub in suite bathroom with three tall windows overlooking the Bonifacio Global City skyline and green belt below

Images.alt: Shangri-La The Fort Manila freestanding white bathtub in suite bathroom with three tall windows overlooking the Bonifacio Global City skyline and green belt below

Hotel Tagline: From the 40th floor, Manila's skyline spreads wide across the Horizon Club Lounge windows.
Summary: Higher means more at Shangri-La The Fort: the four specialty suites and the Shangri-La Suite top the view hierarchy, but the Horizon Club Lounge on the 40th floor is accessible by room category — a good reason to book one of those floors for skyline access.
Description ⚙: Set in dynamic Bonifacio Global City in Taguig, Shangri-La The Fort, Manila is a pinnacle of luxury and modern design. It features 576 rooms and suites that blend contemporary furnishings with local Filipino elements. With sweeping views of the city's impressive skyline from the upper floors — particularly from the four specialty suites and the Shangri-La Suite — the hotel offers a sophisticated living experience. The Horizon Club Lounge on the 40th floor provides panoramic Manila skyline views for qualifying room categories. Amenities include Kerry Sports Manila (the region's largest indoor lifestyle and leisure club across two dedicated floors), a spa, an outdoor pool, and eight restaurants and bars including Canton Road and The Back Room.
Address: 30th Street, corner 5th Ave, Taguig, 1634 Metro Manila, Philippines
Nearest Airports: MNL · Ninoy Aquino · 15 km

Alt Text: Marco Polo Ortigas Manila Vu's Sky Bar at night with pod seating and open panoramic views of the Metro Manila cityscape extending to the horizon

Images.alt: Marco Polo Ortigas Manila Vu's Sky Bar at night with pod seating and open panoramic views of the Metro Manila cityscape extending to the horizon

Hotel Tagline: From the 45th floor, the Ortigas skyline spreads 360 degrees in every direction.
Summary: The rooms begin above the 20th floor — no lobby-level accommodation here. Vu’s Sky Bar on the 45th floor is the destination for panoramas; Lung Hin on the 44th adds Cantonese cuisine to the altitude, and the indoor infinity pool frames the Ortigas skyline on the way.
Description ⚙: Prominently situated in the vibrant Ortigas Center of Pasig City, Marco Polo Ortigas Manila is a luxury five-star hotel and the Philippines' first purpose-built sky hotel. An EarthCheck Gold-certified property since 2024, it features 316 tastefully designed rooms and suites providing dazzling views of the city skyline. All rooms are positioned above the 20th floor. Dining highlights include Vu's Sky Bar and Lounge at the 45th floor with 360-degree panoramic views, the Cantonese Lung Hin restaurant on the 44th floor, and all-day dining at Cucina. The hotel also features an indoor infinity pool with city views, a full-service spa, and a fitness center. It is a short walk from SM Megamall, The Podium, and Shangri-La Plaza.
Address: Meralco Avenue, Sapphire Rd, Ortigas Center, Pasig, 1600 Metro Manila, Philippines
Nearest Airports: MNL · Ninoy Aquino · 19 km

Alt Text: New World Makati Hotel Manila contemporary suite living area with large window framing the Makati skyline at dusk and bedroom visible through sliding door

Images.alt: New World Makati Hotel Manila contemporary suite living area with large window framing the Makati skyline at dusk and bedroom visible through sliding door

Hotel Tagline: Private balconies look out over the Makati skyline, directly above Greenbelt and Glorietta below.
Summary: Many of the 580 rooms come with private balconies — unusual at this level of the market in Makati. Balcony rooms with Makati skyline views are the priority; the hotel sits directly across from Greenbelt and Glorietta, which makes the location difficult to improve on.
Description ⚙: New World Makati Hotel, Manila is a top choice for business and leisure travelers, ideally situated near the Makati Business District and directly across from the Greenbelt and Glorietta Lifestyle complexes. The hotel boasts 580 luxurious guestrooms and suites, many with private balconies offering panoramic views of the Makati skyline. For dining, guests can choose between Café 1228 (all-day buffet dining), Jasmine (Chinese and Cantonese cuisine), and Bar Rouge. Comprehensive facilities include a full-service spa, a well-equipped fitness center, a sauna, and an outdoor swimming pool. The hotel's location makes it ideal for first-time visitors to Manila, with easy access to shopping, dining, and entertainment.
Address: Esperanza Street, corner Makati Ave, Ayala Center, Makati City, 1228 Metro Manila, Philippines
Nearest Airports: MNL · Ninoy Aquino · 12 km

Alt Text: La Mamounia Marrakech ornate suite interior with open bay windows directly framing the Koutoubia Mosque minaret

Images.alt: La Mamounia Marrakech ornate suite interior with open bay windows directly framing the Koutoubia Mosque minaret

Hotel Tagline: Century-old olive trees in the foreground, the Koutoubia minaret's tile inlay sharp beyond them.
Summary: The Koutoubia Suite's windows face Marrakech's 12th-century minaret directly — the tile inlay visible at distance. Seven hectares of Moorish garden give garden-facing rooms a second view: bougainvillea, century-old olive trees, and the Atlas Mountains on clear winter mornings.
Description ⚙: Set within 7 hectares of historic gardens established in the 18th century as a royal wedding gift, La Mamounia has been Marrakech's most celebrated address since opening in 1923. Its 135 rooms and 71 suites occupy a beautifully renovated interior where Art Deco and Moroccan craftsmanship — carved cedar ceilings, zellige tilework, mashrabiya screens — intersect across every corridor. Rooms divide between garden-facing and city-facing orientations; the Koutoubia Suite and upper-floor rooms have direct sight lines to the 12th-century Koutoubia Mosque minaret, with the tile inlay and golden orb visible at close range. Below, century-old olive, orange, and rose gardens create a further layer of view available from lower-floor rooms and poolside terraces. Six restaurants and bars span Moroccan, Italian, Asian, and French cuisine.
Address: Avenue Bab Jdid، مراكش 40040, Morocco
Nearest Airports: RAK · Menara · 7 km

Alt Text: Royal Mansour Marrakech private riad rooftop terrace at night with the illuminated Koutoubia Mosque minaret above the medina rooftops

Images.alt: Royal Mansour Marrakech private riad rooftop terrace at night with the illuminated Koutoubia Mosque minaret above the medina rooftops

Hotel Tagline: After dark, the illuminated Koutoubia minaret rises above medina rooftops from your private terrace.
Summary: Each of the 53 private riads at Royal Mansour climbs three floors, ending in a rooftop terrace that belongs only to your riad — no shared pool, no other guests. From up there, after dark, the illuminated Koutoubia Mosque minaret rises above the medina rooftops less than 400 meters away.
Description ⚙: The Royal Mansour, commissioned by Morocco's King Mohammed VI and completed in 2010, is built as a medina within a medina: a private compound of 53 riads, each spanning three floors, each with a private courtyard, plunge pool, and exclusive rooftop terrace. The tri-level format reaches its climax at the top: medina rooftops, date palms, and the Koutoubia Mosque minaret after dark — from a perch no other guest can access. Four restaurants and four bars serve Moroccan, Italian, Mediterranean, and international menus. Le Spa du Royal Mansour occupies three underground floors with 13 treatment rooms.
Address: Rue Abou Abbas El Sebti، Marrakech 40000, Morocco
Nearest Airports: RAK · Menara · 7 km

Alt Text: Four Seasons Resort Marrakech breakfast terrace at sunset with Atlas Mountains on the horizon

Images.alt: Four Seasons Resort Marrakech breakfast terrace at sunset with Atlas Mountains on the horizon

Hotel Tagline: Breakfast on a south-facing terrace, the snowcapped Atlas Mountains filling the horizon.
Summary: The elevated pool deck at Four Seasons faces due south, giving it an unobstructed sightline toward the High Atlas: snowcapped from November to April, and burnished purple at sunset year-round. Villas with private terraces share the same orientation — breakfast to Atlas Mountains, unfiltered.
Description ⚙: The Four Seasons Resort Marrakech occupies 16 hectares of Moorish gardens between the ancient Medina and the Ville Nouvelle, oriented due south toward the High Atlas range. Its elevated main pool deck provides an unobstructed sightline toward the Atlas Mountains — the range visible year-round, snowcapped between November and April, turning purple at sunset. The 139 individually furnished rooms and suites include Pavilion Rooms with garden access, One-Bedroom Suites, and Signature Suites with private plunge pools; all upper-floor rooms have south-facing terrace or balcony access. Three restaurants serve Moroccan, Mediterranean, and poolside cuisine. A full-service spa features eight treatment rooms, hammams, and plunge pools.
Address: Av. de la Ménara, Marrakech 40000, Morocco
Nearest Airports: RAK · Menara · 6 km

Alt Text: Mandarin Oriental Marrakech suite terrace with view over the resort pool and snow-capped Atlas Mountains

Images.alt: Mandarin Oriental Marrakech suite terrace with view over the resort pool and snow-capped Atlas Mountains

Hotel Tagline: From the terrace, wooden beams frame a ridge that defined Marrakech's caravan routes for centuries.
Summary: The property spans 20 hectares of olive and palm groves, with the Atlas Mountains framing the estate on the southern horizon. A suite terrace — white sofas, wooden beams overhead, pool in the foreground — frames the same ridge that defined Marrakech's caravan routes for centuries.
Description ⚙: The Mandarin Oriental, Marrakech sits on 20 hectares of olive and palm groves on Route Golf Royal, the Atlas Mountains forming a continuous panoramic ridge visible from most of the estate. Its 56 pool villas and seven suites are oriented toward the range, with private terraces framed by wooden beams overhead and the resort's pool in the foreground. Each villa has its own plunge pool. Three restaurants and a poolside bar serve international, Mediterranean, and Moroccan menus. Adjacent to Royal Golf Club Marrakech.
Address: Rte Golf Royal, Marrakech 40000, Morocco
Nearest Airports: RAK · Menara · 11 km

Alt Text: Selman Marrakech formal gardens and rectangular pool with snow-capped Atlas Mountains across the horizon

Images.alt: Selman Marrakech formal gardens and rectangular pool with snow-capped Atlas Mountains across the horizon

Hotel Tagline: Snowcapped Atlas peaks rise beyond the horse paddocks, framed on the same axis as the formal gardens.
Summary: Three pools and the outdoor restaurant at Selman face the Atlas Mountains, with the hotel's Arabian horse paddocks between you and the horizon. The formal gardens run south toward the same range on a central axis — snowcapped from November through April, and tawny in the summer heat.
Description ⚙: Selman Marrakech, located 5 kilometers south of the city on Route d'Amizmiz, was designed around a working stud farm of purebred Barb and Arabian horses. Three outdoor pools and the outdoor restaurant terrace are oriented due south toward the High Atlas, with the horse paddocks between the hotel and the range. The formal gardens run on a central symmetrical axis toward the mountains. A Chenot spa and three restaurants — including a Spanish tapas venue at the horse stables — and two bars complete the offering.
Address: HXFH+5QC، Km5 Route d'Amizmiz، مراكش 40160, Morocco
Nearest Airports: RAK · Menara · 8 km

Alt Text: Les Jardins de la Koutoubia Marrakech outdoor pool with the Koutoubia Mosque minaret rising to the right

Images.alt: Les Jardins de la Koutoubia Marrakech outdoor pool with the Koutoubia Mosque minaret rising to the right

Hotel Tagline: The Koutoubia minaret rises above the pool's hedges, visible from terrace to rooftop across 350 meters.
Summary: The rooftop suites at Les Jardins de la Koutoubia include a private terrace with a direct view of the Koutoubia Mosque minaret — less than 350 meters away. The outdoor pool frames the same minaret from below: a Moorish spire rising above the hedges at the pool's edge.
Description ⚙: Les Jardins de la Koutoubia stands 350 meters from the Koutoubia Mosque, one of the few full-service luxury hotels within Marrakech's Medina walls. Its 108 rooms and suites — including 30 Mini Suites, 22 Junior Suites, and 2 Royal Suites — include upper-floor categories with private terraces and direct sightlines to the mosque's 12th-century minaret. The outdoor pool is framed by clipped hedges with the minaret rising immediately to the right. The two Royal Suites each feature a large landscaped terrace with fireplace, direct pool access, and an unobstructed Koutoubia view. Three restaurants, a piano bar, and a rooftop sky bar with medina panoramas complete the public spaces.
Address: J2G5+676, 26 Rue Koutoubia, Marrakech 40000, Morocco
Nearest Airports: RAK · Menara · 7 km

Alt Text: Nobu Hotel Marrakech rooftop terrace at golden hour with the Marrakech cityscape and Atlas Mountains on the horizon

Images.alt: Nobu Hotel Marrakech rooftop terrace at golden hour with the Marrakech cityscape and Atlas Mountains on the horizon

Hotel Tagline: From the rooftop, the Atlas Mountains and Koutoubia Mosque share the same sunset frame.
Summary: Suites at Nobu Hotel are sold as either Atlas Mountain or Koutoubia Mosque views — each a distinct editorial choice about what Marrakech means. The rooftop garden pool deck, elevated above the Hivernage district, puts both in the same frame at sunset, with DJs on the deck from dusk.
Description ⚙: Nobu Hotel Marrakech occupies a contemporary building in the Hivernage Golden Triangle, within walking distance of the Medina. Its 71 suites are offered in two distinct view orientations: Atlas Mountain-facing to the south and Koutoubia Mosque-facing to the northeast, making the view choice an explicit booking decision. The rooftop garden pool deck — elevated above the surrounding district — frames both landmarks simultaneously at sunset. Three restaurants include the signature Nobu Restaurant serving Japanese-Peruvian cuisine. The Pearl Spa extends across 2,000 square meters, with a subterranean mosaic heated pool, three hammam chambers, and private treatment suites.
Address: Av. Echouhada et, Rue du Temple, Marrakesh 40000, Morocco
Nearest Airports: RAK · Menara · 7 km

Alt Text: El Fenn Marrakech rooftop pool with Moroccan pavilion towers and the Koutoubia Mosque minaret visible through the palms

Images.alt: El Fenn Marrakech rooftop pool with Moroccan pavilion towers and the Koutoubia Mosque minaret visible through the palms

Hotel Tagline: The rooftop pool aligns directly with the Koutoubia minaret across the Medina rooftops.
Summary: El Fenn's 1,300 m² rooftop terrace in the heart of the medina holds one of the clearest sightlines to the Koutoubia Mosque in the city — the minaret aligned directly with the rooftop pool. Under the AKAN Collection since November 2025, with three outdoor pools and two restaurants across five interlocking 19th-century courtyards.
Description ⚙: El Fenn is a boutique riad hotel in the heart of Marrakech's Medina, built across five interlocking 19th-century courtyards and opened in 2004. Its 41 individually styled rooms and suites are spread through the original riad and adjacent properties. The defining feature is the 1,300-square-meter roof terrace: one of the largest in the Medina, positioned with the rooftop pool aligned directly with the Koutoubia Mosque minaret. Three outdoor pools, two cocktail bars, and two restaurants are distributed across the property. El Fenn joined the AKAN Collection in November 2025.
Address: Derb Moulay Abdullah Ben Hezzian, 2, Marrakesh 40000, Morocco
Nearest Airports: RAK · Menara · 8 km

Alt Text: Fairmont Royal Palm Marrakech pool terrace and gardens with snow-capped Atlas Mountains

Images.alt: Fairmont Royal Palm Marrakech pool terrace and gardens with snow-capped Atlas Mountains

Hotel Tagline: Atlas peaks rise above palms and olive trees across an unbroken southern horizon.
Summary: The Fairmont Royal Palm sits 12 kilometers south on Route d'Amizmiz, far enough from the city to give its pool deck an unobstructed horizon — the Atlas Mountains above palms and olive trees. Golf course views share the same Atlas backdrop across all 18 holes.
Description ⚙: The Fairmont Royal Palm occupies a 231-hectare estate on Route d'Amizmiz, 12 kilometers south of Marrakech, in the Palmeraie zone below the first foothills. The property's distance from the city gives its pool terraces and gardens a clear, unobstructed southern horizon: the Atlas Mountains framed by palms and olive trees with no urban skyline intervening. The 134 rooms and villas include garden-facing and pool-facing categories; all share access to the Atlas panorama from the estate grounds. An 18-hole golf course plays against the same backdrop on every fairway. Four outdoor pools, four restaurants, and a full-service spa complete the property.
Address: Km 12 Route D'Amizmiz, Marrakech 40000, Morocco
Nearest Airports: RAK · Menara · 11 km

Hotel Tagline: All 19 balconies look out over open Mediterranean, with the Frioul Islands and Château d'If on the horizon.
Summary: We’d request any room here — all 19 face the open Mediterranean from a private balcony, with the Frioul Islands and Château d’If framing the horizon. The fifth-floor heated pool is reserved for guests; the rooftop bar two floors below is worth a stop regardless of where you’re staying.

Summary: Worth staying for the terrace suite — Notre-Dame de la Garde rising above the Old Port, read from a private loggia at close range. Les Fenêtres brasserie earns a breakfast reservation in its own right: same panorama, at a fraction of the suite rate, from a table on the terrace.

Images.alt: Le Petit Nice Passedat Marseille seafront terrace with outdoor pool and rocky Mediterranean coastline

Hotel Tagline: Every room faces open sea, the Frioul Islands and Château d'If visible from the terrace.
Summary: Ask for any of the 16 rooms — all face the open sea, with the Frioul Islands and Château d’If visible from the terrace. The restaurant is the other reason to come: three Michelin stars, chef Gérald Passedat’s seafood-forward menu, and the Mediterranean in full view from the dining room.
Address: 17 Rue des Braves Anse de Maldormé, 156 Cor Président John Fitzgerald Kennedy, 13007 Marseille, France

Alt Text: Sofitel Marseille Vieux-Port terrace breakfast table overlooking the full Old Port marina Fort Saint-Jean and Marseille Cathedral

Images.alt: Sofitel Marseille Vieux-Port terrace breakfast table overlooking the full Old Port marina Fort Saint-Jean and Marseille Cathedral

Hotel Tagline: From the top-floor terrace, the Old Port spreads below with Notre-Dame de la Garde on the skyline.
Summary: The room to ask for is one of the top-floor suites with a private terrace — Prestige or Opera — for a direct read on the Old Port and Notre-Dame de la Garde from your own outdoor space. The Danès Skylounge covers the same panorama with cocktails; Les Trois Forts extends it over dinner.
Description ⚙: The Sofitel Marseille Vieux-Port is a luxury five-star hotel near Fort Saint Nicolas and the Palais du Pharo, delivering panoramic views over Marseille's Old Port. The 134 rooms and suites are elegantly decorated with maritime themes. Many rooms offer views of the Old Port, with select suites featuring private terraces or balconies. The Prestige and Opera suites provide expansive top-floor views with private lounges. The hotel operates three panoramic venues: the Dantès Skylounge, a 150-square-meter cocktail terrace on the top floor with views from the MUCEM to Notre-Dame de la Garde; Les Trois Forts, a gastronomic restaurant led by Chef Sylvain Touati; and Le Carré Bistromanie, a brasserie with a port-facing terrace. Additional facilities include the Sofitel Spa, fitness centre, and hairstyling salon.
Address: 36 Bd Charles Livon, 13007 Marseille, France
Nearest Airports: MRS · Marseille Provence · 26 km

Hotel: Radisson Blu Hotel Marseille Vieux Port
Alt Text: Radisson Blu Hotel Marseille Vieux Port rooftop pool with sun loungers overlooking Fort Saint-Nicolas and Old Port marina

Images.alt: Radisson Blu Hotel Marseille Vieux Port rooftop pool with sun loungers overlooking Fort Saint-Nicolas and Old Port marina

Hotel Tagline: From the rooftop pool, the Old Port and Fort Saint-Nicolas stretch out across 200 square metres of open sky.
Summary: We’d request a port-view room on the upper floors, then check when the rooftop pool opens — the 200 m² terrace looks directly onto the Old Port and Fort Saint-Nicolas, with the Pool Bar running through summer. Le Quai du 7ème covers dinner on a harbour terrace a floor below.
Description ⚙: Directly on the Quai de Rive Neuve, the Radisson Blu Hotel Marseille Vieux Port overlooks the Old Port with views of Fort Saint-Nicolas. The 189 rooms and suites carry two decorative themes — Provençal and African — and the port-view rooms on upper floors deliver direct harbour sightlines. The hotel's rooftop terrace spans 200 square meters overlooking the Vieux Port and Fort Saint-Nicolas; in summer the seasonal Pool Bar operates alongside the outdoor pool. The restaurant Le Quai du 7ème serves Mediterranean cuisine on a terrace facing the harbour, complemented by a hidden patio for evening dining. A fitness centre is open 24 hours, and the hotel is partnered with the 5 Mondes Spa nearby. Well positioned for the Abbaye Saint-Victor, the MUCEM, and the Marseille History Museum on foot.
Address: 38-40 Quai de Rive Neuve, 13007 Marseille, France
Nearest Airports: MRS · Marseille Provence · 27 km

Images.alt: Grand Hotel Beauvau Marseille Vieux Port MGallery room with oval window framing the Old Port marina and boats

Hotel Tagline: From upper-floor balconies, the Vieux-Port fills the view at genuine close range.
Summary: The upper-floor balcony suites look straight down onto the Vieux Port at genuine close range — no distance to soften it. Le Beauvau bar on the terrace earns an evening visit regardless of where you’re based; the Provençal breakfast room holds a window table worth asking for.
Address: 4 Rue Beauvau, 13001 Marseille, France
Nearest Airports: MRS · Marseille Provence · 25 km

Alt Text: La Residence Du Vieux Port Marseille room with red decor and balcony window overlooking Old Port and Notre-Dame de la Garde

Images.alt: La Residence Du Vieux Port Marseille room with red decor and balcony window overlooking Old Port and Notre-Dame de la Garde

Hotel Tagline: From a private balcony, the Old Port and Notre-Dame de la Garde share the same frame.
Summary: The suite to target is La Notre Dame — Old Port and basilica in the same frame from a private balcony. All 51 rooms and suites face the harbour; Le Relais 50 holds a terrace under olive trees directly below, with Notre-Dame de la Garde in unobstructed sight from every table.
Description ⚙: Located in the historical centre of Marseille along the Old Port, La Résidence Du Vieux Port stands out with its eclectic yet refined style. The hotel offers views stretching from the bustling port filled with boats and yachts to Notre-Dame de la Garde in the distance. All 51 rooms and suites feature balconies or terraces facing the harbour. Guests can book from Deluxe rooms, Junior Suites, and top-tier options such as the Prestige Sky Suite and the La Notre Dame suite, which provides panoramic views of the Old Port and the basilica from a private balcony. Guests can dine at Le Relais 50, the hotel's Mediterranean-focused restaurant with a terrace under olive trees directly overlooking the harbour and Notre-Dame de la Garde. Additional amenities include premium airport and station shuttle services and pet-friendly accommodations.
Address: 18 Quai du Port, 13002 Marseille, France
Nearest Airports: MRS · Marseille Provence · 25 km

Alt Text: nhow Marseille sea-view room with balcony and palm trees on the Corniche Kennedy coastline

Images.alt: nhow Marseille sea-view room with balcony and palm trees on the Corniche Kennedy coastline

Hotel Tagline: Corniche Kennedy coastline frames the Mediterranean on all sides, sea to every horizon.
Summary: The Penthouse is the obvious target — panoramic sea views on all sides and the Malibu-adjacent energy that runs through this Corniche property. The Junior Suites with sea views give the same coastal read from a standard balcony; the Sky Bar on the third floor covers the same panorama over cocktails.
Description ⚙: Planted on Marseille's Corniche Kennedy coastline, halfway between Plage du Prophète and Plage du Prado, nhow Marseille offers an array of sea views from a property entirely renovated in 2018 by architects Claire Fatosme, Christian Lefèvre, and Teresa Sapey. The 150 rooms feature colourful contemporary décor; sea- and mountain-view rooms are available, and many have balconies or terraces facing the Mediterranean coast. The nhow Penthouse is the standout room type — panoramic sea views, high ceilings, and an expansive layout. The hotel features a 250-square-meter outdoor pool, a spa with hammam and indoor heated pool, and a Sky Bar with panoramic terrace on the third floor. The restaurant Les Bains serves Mediterranean cuisine with sea views. The property is close to the Marseille Palais des Congrès and a ten-minute drive from the Vieux Port.
Address: 200 Cor Président John Fitzgerald Kennedy, 13007 Marseille, France
Nearest Airports: MRS · Marseille Provence · 31 km

Alt Text: The Ritz-Carlton Melbourne indoor infinity pool on level 64 with floor-to-ceiling windows overlooking Port Phillip Bay and suburban Melbourne

Images.alt: The Ritz-Carlton Melbourne indoor infinity pool on level 64 with floor-to-ceiling windows overlooking Port Phillip Bay and suburban Melbourne

Hotel Tagline: From the 65th floor, Port Phillip Bay, the Yarra, and the Melbourne skyline share one window.
Summary: All 257 rooms begin at the 65th floor of Australia’s tallest hotel. The Panoramic and Harbour View categories place Port Phillip Bay, the Yarra, and the full Melbourne skyline in a single frame. Opened March 2023 — the most commanding address in the city.
Description ⚙: The Ritz-Carlton, Melbourne occupies floors 65 to 79 of an 80-story tower on Lonsdale Street in Melbourne's western CBD — Australia's tallest hotel, opened in March 2023. All 257 rooms and suites begin at the 65th floor, with the Panoramic and Harbour View categories framing Port Phillip Bay, the Yarra River, and the full Melbourne skyline in a single floor-to-ceiling window. The Yarra, Executive, and Ritz-Carlton suites provide access to the Ritz-Carlton Club on level 79. The signature restaurant Atria and bar Cameo are both located on level 80; the indoor infinity pool and spa occupy level 64, with the pool providing commanding views south over the city.
View Subjects: Melbourne Skyline, Yarra River, Port Phillip Bay
Address: 650 Lonsdale St, Melbourne VIC 3000, Australia
Nearest Airports: MEB · Essendon · 19 km; MEL · Tullamarine · 28 km; MBW · Moorabbin · 30 km; AVV · Avalon · 56 km

Images.alt: The Langham Melbourne outdoor rooftop pool with guest on sun lounger and Melbourne CBD skyline including Flinders Street Station and St Paul's Cathedral

Hotel Tagline: From Southbank, the pool looks directly at Federation Square and the CBD skyline.
Summary: Rooms face the Yarra River from Southbank, with the Deluxe River Corner King and Executive Terrace categories adding a balcony overlooking the city. The 15-metre pool looks directly at the CBD skyline and Federation Square — worth the upgrade on its own.
Description ⚙: The Langham Melbourne is a five-star hotel on Southgate Avenue in Southbank, facing the Yarra River. Room categories including the Deluxe River King, Executive River King, and Deluxe River Corner King provide sweeping views of the Yarra River and the Melbourne CBD skyline. Executive Terrace rooms add private balconies overlooking the city. The Chuan Spa is one of Melbourne's most recognised hotel spas. The 15-metre indoor pool faces directly toward the CBD skyline and Federation Square. The Langham Club on the 24th floor offers a dedicated lounge with skyline views. The Melba Restaurant serves breakfast, lunch, and dinner with floor-to-ceiling views of the Yarra River and Southbank.
Address: 1 Southgate Ave, Southbank VIC 3006, Australia
Nearest Airports: MEB · Essendon · 24 km; MBW · Moorabbin · 28 km; MEL · Tullamarine · 33 km; AVV · Avalon · 57 km

Alt Text: Grand Hyatt Melbourne hotel room at night with two windows showing the Arts Centre Melbourne spire and lit CBD skyline

Hotel Tagline: From a corner window, the Yarra River and Arts Centre spire meet Melbourne's skyline.
Summary: The Diplomatic Suite frames the Yarra River, the Arts Centre spire, and Melbourne’s skyline from a single corner window. Grand Club access on the 31st floor extends the panorama to 360° — the right choice for an evening drink above Collins Street.
Description ⚙: Grand Hyatt Melbourne is a five-star hotel on Collins Street in the Melbourne CBD. The Diplomatic Suite frames the Yarra River, the Arts Centre Melbourne spire, and the city skyline from a corner window. The Grand Suite King offers staggering city views through floor-to-ceiling windows. Grand Club access on the 31st floor delivers 360-degree panoramas of the Melbourne skyline alongside cocktails and canapés. The hotel features an indoor pool, sauna, steam room, and 24-hour fitness centre with Life Fitness equipment.
Address: 123 Collins St, Melbourne VIC 3000, Australia
