Hotel Tagline: Floor-to-ceiling windows frame the skyline, the Yarra River, and Port Phillip Bay in one view.
Summary: The Premier Club Suite is the room to ask for: floor-to-ceiling windows place the Melbourne skyline, the Yarra River, and Port Phillip Bay in one frame. On the highest floors the view reaches all the way south — best timed for sunset.
Description ⚙: Crown Towers Melbourne is a five-star hotel in Southbank, part of the Crown Melbourne complex. Rooms feature views of the Yarra River, the Melbourne skyline, Eureka Tower, Australia 108, and Port Phillip Bay through floor-to-ceiling windows. Higher floors provide panoramic views extending to the south. The Premier Club Suite is notable for city sunset views and lavish comfort. The hotel includes a heated outdoor pool, Crown Spa, and direct access to Crown Casino and Southbank dining.
View Subjects: Melbourne Skyline, Yarra River, Port Phillip Bay

Images.alt: Park Hyatt Melbourne Terrace Suite lounge with open balcony door and direct view of St Patrick's Cathedral tower

Hotel Tagline: St. Patrick's Cathedral and the CBD skyline share the same unobstructed frame from the private terrace.
Summary: We’d request the Terrace Suite: a private outdoor terrace placing St. Patrick’s Cathedral and the Melbourne skyline in the same unobstructed frame — the two architectural registers of the city, side by side. The radii restaurant & bar looks onto manicured Tuscan-inspired gardens below.
Description ⚙: Park Hyatt Melbourne is a five-star hotel on Parliament Square in East Melbourne, adjacent to Fitzroy, Treasury, and Carlton Gardens. Art deco-style guest rooms offer views of the Melbourne skyline, Fitzroy Gardens, and St. Patrick's Cathedral. The Terrace Suite features a private outdoor terrace placing St. Patrick's Cathedral and the CBD skyline in the same unobstructed frame. The radii restaurant and bar looks onto manicured Tuscan-inspired gardens. The hotel includes a large heated pool, Park Club Health and Day Spa, well-equipped gym, and tennis courts.

Hotel Tagline: From the rooftop terrace, the Cathedral's towers rise close enough to read their detail across the Zócalo.
Summary: The Art Nouveau atrium — a 1908 Tiffany-style ceiling, wrought-iron balconies, and elevators featured in two Bond films — sets the bar before you reach the room. Climb to the rooftop terrace for the most direct Zócalo view in the Centro Histórico, with the Cathedral at close range.
Description ⚙: The Gran Hotel Ciudad de Mexico is positioned on the north side of the Zócalo, Mexico City's central plaza, with a rooftop terrace that delivers the most direct view of the Metropolitan Cathedral and the Palacio Nacional in the Centro Histórico. The hotel's landmark 1899 building features a celebrated Art Nouveau interior — a 1908 Tiffany-style stained-glass ceiling spanning the full atrium, wrought-iron balconies on every floor, and a pair of original elevators that featured in two James Bond films. The rooftop terrace looks directly across the plaza, with the Cathedral's towers close enough to read their detail. Rooms on the upper floors of the Zócalo-facing side combine the proximity of the Centro Histórico with the visual gravity of one of the largest squares in the world.
Address: 16 de Septiembre 82, Centro Histórico de la Cdad. de México, Centro, Cuauhtémoc, 06000 Ciudad de México, CDMX, Mexico

Standard Reforma-facing rooms from mid-floors are close enough to read the detail of the golden column, with the full avenue and monument in the same frame. Description ⚙: The Grand Fiesta Americana Chapultepec sits directly across from the Bosque de Chapultepec on Calzada General Mariano Escobedo, with park-facing rooms from floor eight delivering unobstructed views over the forest canopy, Chapultepec Castle on its hill, and the Reforma skyline behind the trees. No building stands between the hotel's park-facing rooms and the forest edge. The Junior Suite with Park View frames both the forest and the skyline in the same window. The hotel features La Fontana restaurant, Spa 19th with hydrotherapy and aromatherapy, and a pool. Its location gives guests walking access to the Museo Nacional de Antropología, the Auditorio Nacional, and the park entrance.

Hotel: Four Seasons Hotel at The Surf Club
Alt Text: Four Seasons Hotel at The Surf Club Surfside guest room desk with ocean lamp and peonies, balcony with direct Atlantic Ocean view

Images.alt: Four Seasons Hotel at The Surf Club Surfside guest room desk with ocean lamp and peonies, balcony with direct Atlantic Ocean view

Hotel Tagline: Upper floors trace the Atlantic north to Bal Harbour and south to the South Beach skyline.
Summary: The former 1930s Surf Club, reimagined as a Four Seasons in 2017, pairs a Richard Meier oceanfront tower with restored coral stone interiors from the original members-only club. Premier Ocean View rooms look straight onto the Atlantic; Thomas Keller’s on-site restaurant makes this the most complete address north of South Beach.
Description ⚙: The Four Seasons Hotel at The Surf Club occupies a singular address at 9011 Collins Avenue in Surfside: the site of the former Surf Club, a private beach establishment founded in 1930 that counted Rockefeller, Churchill, and much of the twentieth century's social register among its members. The complex opened in 2017 as a Four Seasons property, combining the painstakingly restored historic building — its barrel-vaulted ceilings, coral stone columns, and garden courtyard intact — with a contemporary oceanfront tower designed by Richard Meier. The tower's Premier Ocean View and One-Bedroom Ocean View Suite categories look directly onto the Atlantic; upper floors deliver unobstructed sightlines extending north toward Bal Harbour and south toward the South Beach skyline. Dining at The Surf Club is among the primary reasons to book the property. The Surf Club Restaurant, overseen by Thomas Keller, maintains the precision and sourcing standards associated with his flagship kitchens, translated into an oceanside setting. The spa spans 36,000 square feet across multiple treatment wings, with an indoor pool and full wellness programming.
Address: 9011 Collins Ave, Surfside, FL 33154, USA
Nearest Airports: OPF · Opa-locka Executive · 19 km; MIA · Miami International · 29 km; FLL · Fort Lauderdale-Hollywood · 29 km; FXE · Fort Lauderdale Executive · 43 km

Alt Text: The Shelborne By Proper Miami Beach corner suite with wraparound floor-to-ceiling windows and Atlantic Ocean view on two sides

Images.alt: The Shelborne By Proper Miami Beach corner suite with wraparound floor-to-ceiling windows and Atlantic Ocean view on two sides

Hotel Tagline: The Art Deco pool sits on the sand with the Atlantic immediately beyond.
Summary: A $100 million renovation by Proper Hotels reopened this 1940 MiMo landmark in May 2025. The Art Deco-era pool at beach level puts the Atlantic in constant frame; the Oceanfront Balcony Penthouse extends the panorama in both directions along the coast. Chef Abram Bissell’s Pauline is the dining draw.
Description ⚙: The Shelborne opened in 1940 at 1801 Collins Avenue, designed by Igor Polevitzky with later contributions from Morris Lapidus, who added the pool pavilion and cabanas that remain the most photographed elements of the property today. Proper Hotels acquired the site and commissioned a $100 million renovation with design studio ADC & Tuneu. The result reopened in May 2025 as The Shelborne By Proper. The renovation restored the two-story lobby windows that Lapidus had designed but which had been obscured for decades, flooding the ground floor with the natural light the original scheme intended. The 251 guest rooms and suites were fully rethought, with oceanfront categories now offering private balconies and direct Atlantic views. The top-floor Oceanfront Balcony Penthouse extends the panorama north and south along the coastline. The Art Deco-era pool at beach level remains the architectural centrepiece of the property: its position directly on the sand makes the Atlantic an immediate presence rather than a backdrop. Chef Abram Bissell leads the kitchen at Pauline, the hotel's signature restaurant, where a locally driven menu is served in a room that opens to a garden terrace.
Address: 1801 Collins Ave, Miami Beach, FL 33139, USA
Nearest Airports: MIA · Miami International · 24 km; OPF · Opa-locka Executive · 28 km; FLL · Fort Lauderdale-Hollywood · 44 km; FXE · Fort Lauderdale Executive · 58 km

Alt Text: The Setai Miami Beach high-floor guest room with South Beach skyline, Atlantic coastline and ocean visible from upper floors

Images.alt: The Setai Miami Beach high-floor guest room with South Beach skyline, Atlantic coastline and ocean visible from upper floors

Hotel Tagline: From the 40th floor, a private infinity pool meets the Atlantic's blue and turquoise panorama.
Summary: The forty-story Setai tower has held its position on Collins Avenue since 2005. Ocean Suites on the upper floors deliver the widest Atlantic panorama on the strip; the 40th-floor penthouse adds a private infinity pool to that view. Three temperature-varied pools and the Valmont Spa make the case for staying in entirely.
Description ⚙: When it opened in 2005, the forty-story Setai tower triumphantly took its place on Miami Beach's sands to become a premier destination in South Beach. Known for its dark wood decor, Asian-inspired serenity, and top-of-the-line amenities, The Setai, Miami Beach offers luxury at a price. The spacious rooms are furnished with Dux mattresses, and some boast sunken tubs. From the 140 accommodations, the Ocean Suites are a natural option for those looking to admire Miami's coastline from the privacy of their quarters. The 10,000-square-foot penthouse occupies the 40th floor and features lavish additions like a Steinway grand piano, two jacuzzis, and a private infinity pool; views offer a beautiful panorama of blue and turquoise ocean waters and Miami's downtown skyline in the distance. Dining options are a highlight, with restaurants like the Asian-inspired Jaya offering exquisite meals. Alternatively, the beachfront Ocean Grill restaurant is ideal for a more laid-back meal. The Setai, Miami Beach, offers a serene oasis with three temperature-varied pools. The Valmont Spa provides facials, massages, and a range of services that exclusively utilize Valmont spa and skincare products.
Address: 2001 Collins Ave, Miami Beach, FL 33139, USA
Nearest Airports: MIA · Miami International · 24 km; OPF · Opa-locka Executive · 28 km; FLL · Fort Lauderdale-Hollywood · 43 km; FXE · Fort Lauderdale Executive · 58 km

Images.alt: 1 Hotel South Beach Miami Beach suite terrace daybed with blue pillows overlooking beach umbrellas, palm trees and turquoise Atlantic Ocean

Hotel Tagline: Balconies face the Atlantic directly, with the ocean stretching out from Collins Avenue.
Summary: The eco-committed 1 Hotel rises from the Roney Palace site in Mid-Beach. Ocean View and Oceanfront suites command balcony views directly over the Atlantic. The rooftop pool and alfresco dining add elevation to the same panorama — worth staying for the beach access alone, across three pools including one oceanfront.
Description ⚙: The oceanfront 1 Hotel South Beach, envisioned by hotelier Barry Sternlicht, stands as a beacon of luxury and sustainability in Miami. It offers guests an eco-friendly oasis with a distinct emphasis on natural materials and environmental consciousness — in-hotel dry cleaning, hemp-blended Keetsa mattresses, natural cleansers, and reclaimed wood walls from Colorado beetle-killed pine. The upscale Ocean View and Oceanfront suites, featuring a scenic balcony facing the beach and the ocean, elevate this property to one of the best hotels in Miami on Collins Avenue. This is the third hotel to occupy the space within the large Roney Palace condo building, following the Gansevoort and its successor, the Perry. The 1 Hotel South Beach's top-notch amenities include two beautiful pools, a state-of-the-art gym, and multiple dining options, including superb gluten-free choices. The rooftop offers breathtaking ocean views and is a perfect spot for alfresco dining, while the beach level provides a more laid-back atmosphere with freshly grilled foods.
Address: 2341 Collins Ave, Miami Beach, FL 33139, USA
Nearest Airports: MIA · Miami International · 23 km; OPF · Opa-locka Executive · 27 km; FLL · Fort Lauderdale-Hollywood · 43 km; FXE · Fort Lauderdale Executive · 57 km

Alt Text: Delano Miami Beach South Beach guest room with herringbone wood floors and balcony with direct Atlantic Ocean view

Images.alt: Delano Miami Beach South Beach guest room with herringbone wood floors and balcony with direct Atlantic Ocean view

Hotel Tagline: Oversized windows frame the Atlantic Ocean or the Miami skyline from 171 rooms on Collins Avenue.
Summary: Ian Schrager’s legendary Art Deco address on Collins Avenue reopened in March 2026 after a six-year renovation by Ennismore. The 171 rooms and Poolside Bungalow Suites frame the Atlantic or the Miami skyline; the revival of the Rose Bar and Paris Society’s first U.S. restaurant anchor the most anticipated return in South Beach’s recent history.
Description ⚙: The original Delano opened on Collins Avenue in 1947; the version that defined South Beach's cultural moment arrived in the 1990s under hotelier Ian Schrager and designer Philippe Starck, whose white-on-white interiors, floor-to-ceiling curtains, and the legendary Rose Bar effectively inaugurated the modern era of lifestyle hospitality in the United States. The hotel closed in March 2020 for what became a comprehensive six-year renovation by Elastic Architects, in partnership with Ennismore and Cain International. It reopened on March 9, 2026. The 171 rooms and suites — including Poolside Bungalow Suites and Penthouse Suites — maintain the Delano's signature tonal palette: organic fluidity, bespoke lighting, and oversized windows that frame either the Atlantic Ocean or the Miami skyline. Two pools anchor the property: the original ground-level pool, now joined by a second pool on the fourth floor with a new beachfront amenity deck. Four food and beverage concepts accompany the reopening, including the revival of the Rose Bar, Gigi Rigolatto (Paris Society's first American outpost), and Mimi Kakushi.
Address: 4041 Collins Ave, Miami Beach, FL 33140, USA
Nearest Airports: MIA · Miami International · 24 km; OPF · Opa-locka Executive · 28 km; FLL · Fort Lauderdale-Hollywood · 43 km; FXE · Fort Lauderdale Executive · 58 km

Images.alt: The Ritz-Carlton Bal Harbour Miami balcony view of turquoise Haulover inlet, sandbar and Miami Beach skyline in the distance

Hotel Tagline: Glass balconies face the Atlantic from Bal Harbour to Fort Lauderdale along every floor.
Summary: The quietest address on the Collins Avenue luxury corridor — and the most consistently rated. Every room faces the Atlantic from a glass-walled balcony; upper floors deliver unobstructed sightlines from Bal Harbour to Fort Lauderdale. We’d request an Ocean View Suite and reserve an afternoon at the Exhale Spa.
Description ⚙: The Ritz-Carlton Bal Harbour occupies the northernmost point of the Collins Avenue luxury corridor at 10295 Collins Avenue — a deliberate distance from South Beach that serves guests who come specifically for the quieter stretch of beach, the proximity to Bal Harbour Shops, and the sense of seclusion that the area's lower density provides. The hotel's oceanfront position means every room category is oriented toward the Atlantic, with glass-walled balconies extending the interior space onto the water's edge. The tower's upper floors deliver sightlines that extend north toward Fort Lauderdale and south along the curve of the Miami Beach coastline. Ocean View and Ocean View Suite categories add private dining areas and expanded terrace space to the standard balcony panorama. The Exhale Spa operates as a distinguishing element of the property, offering a wellness programme that goes beyond standard hotel spa services to include fitness classes, energy work, and integrated recovery treatments. The private beach and beach club are managed with a service ratio that matches the room inventory.
Address: 10295 Collins Ave, Bal Harbour, FL 33154, USA

Alt Text: The Betsy Hotel South Beach rooftop pool deck with sun loungers, umbrellas, palm trees over Lummus Park and Atlantic Ocean view

Images.alt: The Betsy Hotel South Beach rooftop pool deck with sun loungers, umbrellas, palm trees over Lummus Park and Atlantic Ocean view

Hotel Tagline: Panoramic windows frame Lummus Park, Ocean Drive, and the Atlantic from the Royal Ocean View Suite.
Summary: The stateliest hotel on Ocean Drive, set apart from the Art Deco strip by its Southern colonial facade and nightly live jazz. We’d book the Royal Ocean View Suite for its panoramic windows over Lummus Park and the beach. The rooftop pool adds altitude to the Atlantic view; Laurent Tourondel’s LT Steak & Seafood handles dinner below.
Description ⚙: The Betsy Hotel, South Beach, is steps away from Miami Beach Ocean Walk and stands out as an elegant contrast to the surrounding Art Deco architecture. Known for its stately Southern charm, the hotel underwent a comprehensive renovation in 2006. The redesign features a sophisticated Christian Liaigre palette with dark walnut floors complemented by rich red, green, lilac, and ochre accents. The hotel is a cultural hub featuring live piano music daily, and a poetry bridge. For those seeking the pinnacle of luxury and comfort, the Royal Ocean View Suite at this oceanfront hotel is a must. This suite features expansive windows offering breathtaking views of Ocean Drive, Lummus Park, and the beach. Each morning, guests can start their day with breakfast on the deck overlooking Ocean Drive, appreciating the direct ocean views and easy access to the beach with provided sunbeds and umbrellas. Heading to the hotel's rooftop pool with captivating Atlantic vistas will undoubtedly be one of the highlights of this Miami stay. A notable highlight of The Betsy Hotel, South Beach, is the inclusion of Laurent Tourondel's LT Steak & Seafood, celebrated for its unique approach to cuisine, appealing to a discerning clientele.
Address: 1440 Ocean Dr, Miami Beach, FL 33139, USA

Images.alt: The Miami Beach EDITION Mid-Beach guest room with warm wood-paneled wall, sliding glass doors and Atlantic Ocean balcony view

Hotel Tagline: From the Oceanfront Balcony Room, the Atlantic holds the horizon at sunrise.
Summary: Ian Schrager’s Mid-Beach property occupies a 1950s building with minimalist white interiors and a beach setting that keeps the focus on the Atlantic. The Oceanfront Balcony Room is the address for a majestic sunrise. The Matador Room, led by Jean-Georges Vongerichten, is one of the few hotel restaurants in Miami worth booking on its own terms.
Description ⚙: Ian Schrager, co-founder of the celebrated Studio 54, pioneered the American boutique hotel concept. The Miami Beach EDITION, nestled in an area with spacious vintage hotels from the 1950s, offers a prime beachfront location that combines luxury, impeccable service, and exceptional amenities. Guests are welcomed into a world of minimalist elegance featuring a serene interior design of white and light wood finishes, accentuated by lush greenery. The hotel is celebrated for its spacious rooms, with large baths enhancing the experience. Guests enjoy stunning views from the Oceanfront Balcony Room, perfect for a majestic sunrise. The Premiere Bungalow Ocean View Suite category features a plunge pool, rainforest shower, and Le Labo amenities for those looking for truly luxurious oceanfront accommodations. This Collins Avenue hotel features the Basement disco and various recreational activities, including a pool table, bowling alley, and ice-skating rink. A talented chef oversees the culinary delights; the Matador Room signature restaurant by Jean-Georges Vongerichten and the on-site bars provide outstanding dining experiences. Guests can also relax at multiple pools and a spa equipped with a hammam, sauna, and treatment rooms.
Address: 2901 Collins Ave, Miami Beach, FL 33140, USA

Alt Text: Faena Hotel Miami Beach oceanfront suite with red velvet furnishings, gold accents and panoramic Atlantic Ocean views through multiple windows

Images.alt: Faena Hotel Miami Beach oceanfront suite with red velvet furnishings, gold accents and panoramic Atlantic Ocean views through multiple windows

Hotel Tagline: From the wraparound balcony of the corner suite, the Atlantic fills every angle.
Summary: The Saxony Hotel’s bones survive inside Alan Faena’s extravagant reimagining — Baz Luhrmann and Catherine Martin’s interiors, gold pillars, a Damien Hirst mammoth by the pool. The Premier Oceanfront Corner Suite wraps a wraparound ocean panorama around a private balcony; Francis Mallmann’s Los Fuegos delivers the open-fire asado dinner.
Description ⚙: Argentine hotelier Alan Faena transformed the historic Saxony Hotel into a lavish destination. The reimagined Faena Hotel Miami Beach retains the original terrazzo floors but introduces an extravagant interior combining the charm of the 1950s and Miami's beloved Art Deco architecture. The lobby boasts gold pillars and striking murals by Juan Gotti. The 58 guest rooms and 121 suites, designed by filmmakers Baz Luhrmann and Catherine Martin, feature a rich palette of gold, blue, and red. Those lodging in the Premier Oceanfront Corner Suite can expect an upgraded stay with sweeping ocean vistas enjoyed from a wraparound, expansive panoramic balcony. Artistic opulence continues throughout the hotel, notably with a Damien Hirst piece — a gold-coated mammoth skeleton encased in hurricane-proof glass — displayed near the pool. The property's location right on the beach provides easy access to South Beach. Guests are invited to unwind on the private beach, embark on a holistic experience at Tierra Santa Healing House, and dine at the excellent live-cooking restaurant Los Fuegos by Francis Mallmann, known for its signature asados. Entertainment is part of Faena Hotel Miami Beach's DNA, highlighted by a two-story cabaret theatre.
Address: 3201 Collins Ave, Miami Beach, FL 33140, USA
Nearest Airports: MIA · Miami International · 22 km; OPF · Opa-locka Executive · 26 km; FLL · Fort Lauderdale-Hollywood · 42 km; FXE · Fort Lauderdale Executive · 56 km

Alt Text: W South Beach Miami Beach suite living area with herringbone floors, green velvet chairs and sliding doors opening to Atlantic Ocean balcony

Images.alt: W South Beach Miami Beach suite living area with herringbone floors, green velvet chairs and sliding doors opening to Atlantic Ocean balcony

Hotel Tagline: Every room's private balcony faces the Atlantic, with the ocean filling the view from all nineteen floors.
Summary: The 2009 property that shifted the centre of gravity northward on Collins Avenue. Every room has a private balcony with ocean views — a consistency the W holds over most of its neighbours. The Extreme WOW Suite adds an outdoor plunge pool to that Atlantic panorama. We’d use the evenings at Wall and Mr. Chow, and the AWAY Spa for recovery.
Description ⚙: When it opened in 2009, the beachfront W South Beach dramatically shifted the Miami social and nightlife scene. This trendsetting hotel, sitting next to Collins Park, features a Mr. Chow Chinese restaurant right on Collins Avenue, a Living Room bar adjacent to a conceptual garden designed by Paula Hayes, an AWAY spa, and an ultralounge named Wall, all housed in a modern nineteen-story building by architect Costas Kondylis. The W South Beach influence is magnified by its connection to Aby Rosen, a renowned New York art collector who enhances the hotel's decor with museum-quality art pieces. Epitomizing Miami's persona, the Extreme WOW Suite boasts an outdoor plunge pool, a Japanese soaking tub, and an expansive, luxurious space with ocean views. In addition, the hotel boasts spacious and elegantly furnished rooms with breathtaking ocean views, modern furniture, and convenient kitchenettes. Every room has a private balcony with ocean views. The late architect Zaha Hadid chose the W South Beach as her Miami residence, merging two units to create her space.
Address: 2201 Collins Ave, Miami Beach, FL 33139, USA
Nearest Airports: MIA · Miami International · 24 km; OPF · Opa-locka Executive · 28 km; FLL · Fort Lauderdale-Hollywood · 43 km; FXE · Fort Lauderdale Executive · 57 km

Hotel: The St. Regis Bal Harbour Resort
Alt Text: The St. Regis Bal Harbour Resort Miami Beach suite sitting room with cream sofas, blue cushions and glass doors to balcony with direct Atlantic Ocean view

Images.alt: The St. Regis Bal Harbour Resort Miami Beach suite sitting room with cream sofas, blue cushions and glass doors to balcony with direct Atlantic Ocean view

Hotel Tagline: Every room's glass-walled balcony opens directly onto the Atlantic Ocean.
Summary: Every room in the 27-storey St. Regis tower extends onto a glass-walled balcony with direct ocean views — a consistency held since the hotel’s 2012 opening. South-facing rooms claim a broader panorama; north-facing rooms take in the full beach expanse. Atlantikos handles the Greek-inspired dining poolside, with the Bal Harbour Shops immediately across the street.
Description ⚙: The beachfront, hyper-luxurious The St. Regis Bal Harbour Resort, opened in 2012, replaced the nostalgic 1956 Americana hotel with a modern twenty-seven-storey tower where every room boasts an ocean view. The architectural design leaves the front facade unadorned, except for a cantilevered portico that marks a discreet entrance. Upon entering the mirrored lobby, guests are greeted with a warm welcome. The interior, designed by Toronto-based Yabu Pushelberg, melds modern glamour with elements like chandeliers and marble, balancing luxury with minimalism. Each room extends into a glass-walled balcony, offering expansive views. The St. Regis Bal Harbour Resort is not just a luxurious oceanfront retreat but a gateway to a world of culinary and retail delights. Located just steps away from top-notch restaurants and shopping, with the Bal Harbour Shops mall directly across the street. The hotel boasts multiple dining options, including the Greek-inspired restaurant Atlantikos, serving a breakfast buffet and a menu featuring salads, skewers, and grilled Atlantic-sourced fish.
Address: 9703 Collins Avenue Bal Harbour, Miami Beach, FL 33154, USA

Images.alt: Loews Miami Beach Hotel South Beach stacked ocean-facing balconies with Atlantic Ocean, sandy beach and blue umbrellas below

Hotel Tagline: Ocean to the east, Miami's skyline lighting up the west after dark.
Summary: The largest hotel on this list anchors the corner of Lincoln Road and Collins Avenue, its 790 rooms spread across one of South Beach’s most photographed Art Deco facades. Ocean-facing rooms deliver the standard Atlantic view; rooms on the west side add the Miami skyline after dark. Beach service is among the most efficient on the strip.
Description ⚙: Located where the lively Lincoln Road intersects with Collins Avenue, the oceanfront Loews Miami Beach Hotel is near many dining and nightlife options along the South Beach area, including the renowned Espanola Way Street. Steeped in history, the Loews Miami Beach Hotel was established in 1998, marking a significant milestone for Miami Beach. Nestled in one of Miami's most pictured Art Deco buildings, the hotel, renovated in 2010, is a fine example of Miami's rich architectural heritage. The 790 rooms and suites stand out for their cleanliness, comfort, and breathtaking ocean views. Many feature balconies that provide scenic vistas of the pool and the ocean. If the ocean vistas are the ultimate prize, the sight of Miami's skyline to the west is also impressive. The pool area is optimally sized, complete with plentiful beach chairs and a pool bar that offers convenient snack and drink service. The beach service further enriches guest stays.

Images.alt: The Palms Hotel and Spa Miami Beach oceanfront balcony with breakfast setup, champagne and direct view over beach and turquoise Atlantic Ocean

Hotel Tagline: Baobab gardens give way to the Atlantic, framed directly from the oceanfront pool.
Summary: Between the Faena and the EDITION, The Palms keeps a quieter tempo on the same stretch of ocean. A tropical garden with baobab trees separates Collins Avenue from the beach; the oceanfront pool looks directly at the Atlantic. We’d arrive here to step down from the scale of the neighbouring hotels without stepping back from the water.
Description ⚙: Positioned between the Faena Hotel and The Miami Beach EDITION at 3025 Collins Avenue, The Palms Hotel & Spa occupies a quieter register than its high-profile neighbours while sharing the same direct access to the Atlantic. The hotel's most distinctive physical feature is its grounds: a tropical garden planted with baobab trees, palms, and flowering species that create a layered courtyard between the street and the beach. The result is an atmosphere closer to a boutique resort than the social hotels that bracket it on either side. The oceanfront rooms and suites face the Atlantic directly from private balconies. The oceanfront pool faces the water, and beach service is provided with chairs, towels, and food and beverage attention. The Palms Spa offers a full treatment menu. Elements Restaurant handles dining across breakfast, lunch, and dinner; the outdoor terrace, set within the baobab garden, provides an alternative to the pool and beach settings.

Alt Text: National Hotel Miami Beach retro-style room with Marshall speaker fridge, leather armchairs and twin windows overlooking the Atlantic Ocean and beach

Images.alt: National Hotel Miami Beach retro-style room with Marshall speaker fridge, leather armchairs and twin windows overlooking the Atlantic Ocean and beach

Hotel Tagline: Between the Delano and the Sagamore, with South Beach and the Atlantic directly ahead.
Summary: Miami Beach’s 1939 National holds the longest pool on the strip and a stretch of beach where complimentary chairs are standard — a rarity in South Beach. The Martini Room and retro Marshall speakers calibrate the experience at a pace the neighbouring hotels don’t attempt. The adjacent Delano, which reopened in March 2026, has restored the block.
Description ⚙: The National Hotel, a grand structure from 1939, holds a prime spot between the reimagined Delano — which reopened in March 2026 after a six-year renovation — and the art-centric Sagamore. While neighboring hotels underwent significant transformations, the National Hotel maintained its original charm, especially after Delphine Dray's $10 million investment in a renovation effort that enhanced the hotel while respecting its historical roots. The National Hotel's refurbishment has beautifully preserved its classic elegance, updating the classy lobby with club chairs and period lighting, restoring the Martini Room, and maintaining its status as having the longest pool in Miami Beach. Modern amenities like flat-screen TVs, seamlessly blending into the decor, ensure a comfortable and luxurious stay. The retro Marshall sound speakers are a wonderful addition. The hotel boasts impressive facilities, including two tranquil pools and a stylish bar. Guests can enjoy direct beach access with complimentary beach chairs — a rarity in South Beach.
Address: 1677 Collins Ave, Miami Beach, FL 33139, USA

Alt Text: The Ritz-Carlton South Beach Miami Art Deco-inspired suite with navy tufted headboard, gold accents and balcony with Atlantic Ocean glimpse

Images.alt: The Ritz-Carlton South Beach Miami Art Deco-inspired suite with navy tufted headboard, gold accents and balcony with Atlantic Ocean glimpse

Hotel Tagline: Atlantic Ocean views from the oceanfront suites at 1 Lincoln Road, South Beach.
Summary: Morris Lapidus’s 1953 DiLido Hotel building at 1 Lincoln Road, reimagined as a Ritz-Carlton. Club Oceanfront and Lanai Oceanfront Suites deliver the Atlantic view the address promises; Zaytinya, by José Andrés Group, is the most considered hotel restaurant for a long lunch by the pool. The spa offers eleven treatment rooms with ocean orientation.
Description ⚙: A quintessentially luxurious Miami experience, The Ritz-Carlton, South Beach, located at the iconic address of 1 Lincoln Road in Miami Beach, is a five-star oceanfront hotel that combines the glamour of Miami's Art Deco heritage with modern-day amenities. Designed by legendary architect Morris Lapidus and opened as The DiLido Hotel in 1953. The hotel offers several room categories, including those with much sought-after stunning views of the ocean. Notable among these are the Club Oceanfront Suite, the Lanai Oceanfront Suite, and The Ritz-Carlton Suite. Standard to all rooms and suites are premium perks such as marble bathrooms, double vanities, and La Bottega Diptyque amenities. Guests are invited to enjoy diverse facilities: a top-notch spa with eleven treatment rooms, a state-of-the-art fitness center, and a landscaped outdoor pool that overlooks the Atlantic Ocean. Dining options include the DiLido Beach Bar, which offers al fresco, oceanfront meals, and Zaytinya by Jose Andres Group, which offers a menu that draws inspiration from Turkish, Greek, and Lebanese flavors.
View Subjects: South Beach, Art Deco Historic District
Address: 1 Lincoln Rd, Miami Beach, FL 33139, USA
Nearest Airports: MIA · Miami International · 25 km; OPF · Opa-locka Executive · 28 km; FLL · Fort Lauderdale-Hollywood · 44 km; FXE · Fort Lauderdale Executive · 58 km

Alt Text: Hotel Victor South Beach Victoria Penthouse rooftop terrace with circular plunge pool, lounge furniture and panoramic South Beach and Atlantic Ocean view

Images.alt: Hotel Victor South Beach Victoria Penthouse rooftop terrace with circular plunge pool, lounge furniture and panoramic South Beach and Atlantic Ocean view

Hotel Tagline: From the Victoria Penthouse terrace, Lummus Park and the Atlantic share the same frame.
Summary: The most considered boutique on Ocean Drive, opened in 2004 with interiors by Jacques Garcia of Hôtel Costes. The room to book is the Victoria Penthouse: private plunge pool and an oceanfront terrace that places Lummus Park and the Atlantic in the same frame. Below, soundproofed rooms keep the Ocean Drive energy where it belongs — outside.
Description ⚙: When it opened in 2004, Hotel Victor South Beach brought a wave of sophistication back to Ocean Drive. The hotel was initially celebrated for its stylish interiors designed by Parisian talent Jacques Garcia, known for his work on the Hotel Costes. The beach chic rooms are spacious and modern, featuring comfortable beds and large bathrooms equipped with luxurious bathtubs. Despite its lively surroundings, the hotel ensures a peaceful retreat with soundproofing that keeps the bustling street noise at bay. For those looking for the best accommodation in the house, getting hold of the Victoria Penthouse is a must; featuring a private plunge pool and an oceanfront terrace facing Miami Beach, it really doesn't get any better than this. Despite Ocean Drive's fluctuating allure over the years, the boutique Hotel Victor South Beach continues to distinguish itself as a stylish retreat next to the golden sands of South Beach.
Address: 1144 Ocean Dr, Miami Beach, FL 33139, USA
Nearest Airports: MIA · Miami International · 25 km; OPF · Opa-locka Executive · 32 km; FLL · Fort Lauderdale-Hollywood · 44 km; FXE · Fort Lauderdale Executive · 59 km

Alt Text: Andaz Miami Beach Surfside hotel tower curved balconies overlooking white sand beach, green lifeguard stand and turquoise Atlantic Ocean

Images.alt: Andaz Miami Beach Surfside hotel tower curved balconies overlooking white sand beach, green lifeguard stand and turquoise Atlantic Ocean

Hotel Tagline: Oceanfront balconies face the Atlantic directly, the sightline extending far along the coast.
Summary: Opened in Surfside on one of the last undeveloped oceanfront sites north of Mid-Beach, the Andaz brings the Hyatt lifestyle format to a quieter stretch of the Atlantic. Oceanfront suite balconies face the water directly; the beach club and Aguasal terrace — a poolside restaurant facing the ocean — structure the daytime with no effort required.
Description ⚙: The Andaz Miami Beach Resort & Spa opened at 4041 Collins Avenue in Surfside, bringing the Hyatt lifestyle format to the northern stretch of the oceanfront strip — a position north of the Mid-Beach concentration that offers a quieter stretch of beach and a less transited section of Collins Avenue. The hotel's contemporary architecture makes a direct claim on the Atlantic, with rooms, balconies, and public terraces oriented toward the water from multiple floors. The design follows the Andaz approach: an open lobby that doubles as a social gathering space, locally commissioned art, and room categories that prioritise floor space and natural light. Oceanfront suites command direct Atlantic views from private balconies; upper-floor categories extend the sightline significantly further along the coast. The property's pool is positioned at beach level, and the beach club provides towels, umbrellas, and food and beverage service throughout the day. Aguasal, the hotel's main restaurant, serves breakfast and lunch with a terrace facing the ocean.
Address: 4041 Collins Ave, Miami Beach, FL 33140, USA
Nearest Airports: MIA · Miami International · 22 km; OPF · Opa-locka Executive · 26 km; FLL · Fort Lauderdale-Hollywood · 41 km; FXE · Fort Lauderdale Executive · 56 km

Alt Text: Nautilus Sonesta Miami Beach room triple-panel window view of Miami Beach sand, beach cabanas and turquoise Atlantic Ocean

Images.alt: Nautilus Sonesta Miami Beach room triple-panel window view of Miami Beach sand, beach cabanas and turquoise Atlantic Ocean

Hotel Tagline: Floor-to-ceiling Atlantic views from a private terrace, with the ocean filling every window.
Summary: The 1950 building by Melvin Grossman and Albert Anis, with Morris Lapidus credited for the interiors, sits between The Shelborne By Proper and The Setai on one of the most competitive stretches of Collins Avenue. The King Balcony Oceanfront delivers floor-to-ceiling Atlantic views from a private terrace. The saltwater pool is the neighbourhood’s least crowded.
Description ⚙: Situated between The Shelborne By Proper — which completed a $100 million transformation and reopened in May 2025 — and The Setai on Miami's oceanfront, the Nautilus Sonesta Miami Beach, originally constructed in 1950, stands out for its exceptional location and design. It is close to Collins Park and the acclaimed Bass Art Museum. While Morris Lapidus is credited with the interior work, including the restaurant and possibly the porte cochere, the structure itself was the brainchild of architects Melvin Grossman and Albert Anis. After years of being under the radar, the renovated Nautilus Sonesta Miami Beach now garners accolades for its amenities. Guests enjoy the salt-water pool, stylish lobby, beachfront loungers, cool interior decor, and attentive service. The rooms offer comfort and style, but for the full experience, a room or suite with a terrace and ocean view is highly recommended; for instance, the King Balcony Oceanfront features floor-to-ceiling panoramic windows and a picture-perfect balcony to enjoy the Atlantic's breeze.
Address: 1825 Collins Ave, Miami Beach, FL 33139, USA
Nearest Airports: MIA · Miami International · 24 km; OPF · Opa-locka Executive · 28 km; FLL · Fort Lauderdale-Hollywood · 44 km; FXE · Fort Lauderdale Executive · 58 km

The 358 rooms and suites include Royal Beach and Sunset suites with standalone bathtubs facing the sea, and the western exposure produces unobstructed sunsets over the water. Lotus Cafe, the all-day restaurant, overlooks the garden and pool. The Quan Spa, three outdoor pools, and a garden facing the beach complete the amenity offer. The hotel is approximately five kilometres from Chhatrapati Shivaji Maharaj International Airport and walking distance from Juhu's restaurant and shopping district.

Description ⚙: Four Seasons Hotel Mumbai rises above Worli with sea-view rooms from the 7th floor upward, all facing the Arabian Sea through floor-to-ceiling windows. AER, the hotel's open-air rooftop bar on the 34th floor, reopened in 2023 after a full-year renovation and commands panoramic views of the Mumbai skyline and bay. Opus, the hotel's art deco all-day restaurant, is open for breakfast through evening. An outdoor pool on the 3rd floor, full-service spa, and sauna complete the facilities. The hotel is two kilometres from Bandra-Worli Sea Link and five kilometres from the Bandra Kurla Complex.

Description ⚙: The Oberoi Mumbai stands on Marine Drive at Nariman Point with uninterrupted views of the Arabian Sea and the Queen's Necklace. Sea-facing rooms are equipped with IoT-based air purification, floor-to-ceiling bay windows, and 24-hour butler service. The Premier Ocean View Suite includes a standalone bathtub aligned with the sea and a walk-in wardrobe. The pool deck faces the same water. The Oberoi has held the Editor's Choice Award for Best City Hotel at Travel + Leisure India's Best Awards for two consecutive years and is ranked among the top 20 hotels in India in the Conde Nast Traveler USA Readers' Choice Awards 2025. The hotel is within walking distance of the National Centre for the Performing Arts.

Summary: The named suites — Ravi Shankar, Tata — are the reason to plan ahead here. Most face the Gateway of India and the Arabian Sea simultaneously; Souk, the rooftop restaurant at the top of the Tower wing, extends the same panorama over the harbour each evening.
Description ⚙: The Taj Mahal Palace, Mumbai, opened in 1903 and stands opposite the Gateway of India at Apollo Bunder in Colaba. The hotel combines Moorish, Oriental, and Rajput architectural styles and was the first in Mumbai to introduce electricity, telephones, and lifts. Its named heritage suites — including the Ravi Shankar Suite and the Tata Suite — face the Gateway of India and the Arabian Sea simultaneously. The hotel houses nine restaurants and bars, the Taj Art Gallery, daily heritage walks, and the J Wellness Circle spa. Named to the World's 50 Best Hotels 2025. The Souk rooftop restaurant, on the 21st floor of the adjacent Tower wing, extends the harbour panorama into dinner service.
Address: Apollo Bandar, Colaba, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400001, India

Description ⚙: The Taj Mahal Tower, Mumbai, opened in 1973 as the modern wing of the Taj Mahal Palace complex at Apollo Bunder, Colaba. The 21-floor tower's upper Apollo rooms face the Gateway of India directly from across the harbour, with the Arabian Sea beyond. The 21st-floor Souk restaurant serves Middle Eastern cuisine with the same harbour panorama. The property shares the complex's spa, pools, and F&B facilities with the Palace wing, and guests of the Tower have access to the heritage areas. The J Wellness Circle spa offers ayurvedic and traditional treatments. The hotel's EV heritage carriage provides sightseeing access to Colaba and the surrounding district.

Koishii, a Nikkei cuisine restaurant on the 37th-floor Penthouse level, adds Japanese-Peruvian fusion dining at the same altitude. By the Mekong, also on the 37th floor, serves Southeast Asian cuisine. The Iridium Spa provides signature body and ayurvedic treatments. The hotel connects to the Phoenix Palladium shopping mall.

Images.alt: Mykonos Riviera Hotel & Spa Tourlos infinity pool terrace with wicker chair and open Aegean Sea view with island in distance

Hotel Tagline: Across the heated infinity pool, Delos and Rineia Island sit on the Aegean horizon.
Summary: The heated infinity pool puts Delos and Rineia Island directly across the strait. Worth staying for the Signature Spa Pool Suite: panoramic private pool, 55 sq m personal spa, outdoor hot tub, and the same Aegean sightline from every angle.
Description ⚙: In the spring of 2018, Mykonos welcomed a notable addition to its luxury hospitality scene with the opening of Mykonos Riviera Hotel & Spa. This upscale hotel quickly rose to prominence as one of the top accommodations on the island. Ideally situated moments away from Mykonos Town, Mykonos Riviera Hotel & Spa boasts one of the most spectacular views in Mykonos and is conveniently located near Tourlos Port, a gateway to the surrounding islands and their stunning beaches. The hotel is renowned for its breathtaking infinity heated pool, which seamlessly blends into the blue horizon of sea and sky. The 500-square-meter Oqua Spa offers a soothing pool environment and Thalasso treatments. The Signature 2 Bedroom Spa Pool Suite features a private 55-square-meter mini spa with sauna, steam bath, and fitness equipment, a panoramic private pool, and a heated outdoor hot tub.
Address: Tourlos 846 00, Greece
Nearest Airports: JMK · Mykonos · 5 km

Alt Text: Myconian Imperial Mykonos candlelit outdoor terrace lounge at dusk with white sofas and Aegean Sea headland at sunset

Images.alt: Myconian Imperial Mykonos candlelit outdoor terrace lounge at dusk with white sofas and Aegean Sea headland at sunset

Hotel Tagline: From the southern shore at Elia Beach, every view opens onto unobstructed Aegean water.
Summary: On the southern shore, all views open onto the Aegean without obstruction. The Executive Suite With Private Pool keeps that private even at noon. Meltemi for breakfast, the Eros Veranda Bar at sunset — both face the same uninterrupted water.
Description ⚙: Situated on the southern shores at Elia Beach, Myconian Imperial offers some of the most breathtaking sea views on the island. The morning begins with a scenic breakfast served at the Meltemi restaurant; the Eros Veranda Bar, renowned for its romantic sunsets, provides an unforgettable backdrop for evenings. The finest room is the Executive Suite With Private Pool, with a private terrace and panoramic sea views. A significant advantage is access to a private section of the beautiful Elia Beach. The hotel boasts three swimming pools, inviting jacuzzis, and a glamorous in-house spa. A 15-minute drive from Mykonos Town.
Address: Elia Beach, Mikonos 846 00, Greece
Nearest Airports: JMK · Mykonos · 10 km

Alt Text: Cali Mykonos aerial view of cliffside resort with 130-metre infinity pool above private beach and Aegean Sea

Images.alt: Cali Mykonos aerial view of cliffside resort with 130-metre infinity pool above private beach and Aegean Sea

Hotel Tagline: A 130-metre seawater pool holds the Aegean horizon, with Naxos beyond.
Summary: Perched on the quieter east coast above Kalafati, Cali runs the longest pool on the island — 130 metres of seawater flush against the horizon. The villas have private pools facing the same sea. The Missoni Resort Club debuted for 2025; the spa opened in 2024.
Description ⚙: An exclusive resort in Kalafati perched above a private beach on the eastern coast of Mykonos. Cali spans ten sun-drenched acres with 38 suites and villas, each offering a private sanctuary. A 130-meter infinity pool stretches toward the Aegean horizon, with Kalafati Beach below and Naxos visible on clear days. Three distinct dining options anchor the property. New for 2025, Cali unveils the Missoni Resort Club on the exclusive private beach. The spa, which opened in 2024, presents a complete wellness circuit with red-light therapy suites, a meditation room, sauna, steam room, and cold plunge suite. The Terra Athletic Club is an open-air Pilates and yoga facility with sea views.
Address: Mykonos 846 00, Greece
Nearest Airports: JMK · Mykonos · 10 km

Alt Text: Myconian Utopia Mykonos suite interior with hanging wooden daybed, glass-drop chandelier, and thatched terrace with private pool and Aegean Sea view

Images.alt: Myconian Utopia Mykonos suite interior with hanging wooden daybed, glass-drop chandelier, and thatched terrace with private pool and Aegean Sea view

Hotel Tagline: A hundred metres above Elia Beach, the Aegean stretches out across every terrace and pool.
Summary: A hundred metres above Elia Beach, Utopia holds the highest vantage point on the south coast. All 50 suites and villas have Aegean terraces and private pools. The Relais & Châteaux membership signals exactly the register of dining and service to expect.
Description ⚙: Overlooking the deep blue waters of the Aegean Sea from its commanding position 100 metres above Elia Beach in Mykonos, the Myconian Utopia Resort is a member of Relais & Châteaux. Combining unspoiled nature with contemporary design, Utopia features 50 suites and villas, all with sea terraces and private pools. The Pavilion Relais & Châteaux restaurant offers Mediterranean cuisine at breakfast, lunch, and dinner. The thalassotherapy spa provides signature wellness treatments. A complimentary shuttle connects guests to Elia Beach and Mykonos Town.
Address: Elia Beach, Mikonos 846 00, Greece
Nearest Airports: JMK · Mykonos · 11 km

Alt Text: Nissaki Boutique Hotel Mykonos all-white bathroom with jacuzzi tub and glass door opening to pool terrace and Aegean Sea with traditional boat

Images.alt: Nissaki Boutique Hotel Mykonos all-white bathroom with jacuzzi tub and glass door opening to pool terrace and Aegean Sea with traditional boat

Hotel Tagline: From the cliffside breakfast terrace, Psarou Beach and the Aegean spread directly below.
Summary: The cliffside breakfast terrace here — looking directly over Psarou Beach and the Aegean — is the detail guests describe most. Saltwater pools, the three-bedroom Coast Life Villa Suite, and a warmth of service that distinguishes it from larger properties nearby.
Description ⚙: A boutique property in Mykonos with breathtaking views over Psarou Beach and the azure Aegean Sea. Guests can stroll to Psarou Beach and Platis Yalos Beach. The hotel features minimalist decor, saltwater swimming pools, and a cliffside breakfast terrace overlooking the bay. Accommodations cater to various needs, with the three-bedroom Coast Life Villa Suite particularly favored by families. The staff is known for exceptional care, and thoughtful touches such as a complimentary beach bag and farewell candle gift are standard.
Address: Platis Gialos 846 00, Greece
Nearest Airports: JMK · Mykonos · 5 km

Alt Text: Bill & Coo Mykonos infinity pool at dusk with lit fiber optics reflected in water, white chapel with golden cross, and Aegean Sea at sunset

Images.alt: Bill & Coo Mykonos infinity pool at dusk with lit fiber optics reflected in water, white chapel with golden cross, and Aegean Sea at sunset

Hotel Tagline: Every room's private terrace looks out over the sea at Megali Ammos Beach.
Summary: We’d book a terrace room here before Mykonos Town fills for summer. The pool lights up at night with fiber optics mirroring the stars. At Yēvo, chef Aggelos Bakopoulos earned Toques d’Or recognition in 2025 — fine dining at this level is rare on the island.
Description ⚙: Bill & Coo Mykonos is an intimate boutique hotel with 30 rooms on Megali Ammos Beach, a short walk from Mykonos Town. Every room has a private terrace with sea views. The hotel's pool, lit with fiber optics at night, is one of the most photographed on the island. Restaurant Yēvo, under Executive Chef Aggelos Bakopoulos, earned Toques d'Or recognition in 2025 and is widely regarded as one of the finest dining establishments in Mykonos. The hotel also features a Valmont Spa — the only one on the island — and the sister property The Coast Bill & Coo provides additional beach access on Agios Ioannis.
Address: Bill & Coo Suites and Lounge Megali Ammos Beach, Μύκονος 846 00, Greece
Nearest Airports: JMK · Mykonos · 5 km

Hotel: Deos Mykonos — A Myconian Collection Hotel
Alt Text: Deos Mykonos pool terrace with rattan chair overlooking Mykonos Town, windmills, old port, and Aegean Sea

Images.alt: Deos Mykonos pool terrace with rattan chair overlooking Mykonos Town, windmills, old port, and Aegean Sea

Hotel Tagline: Eye-level with the windmills in one direction, Delos in the other.
Summary: Opened in May 2024 above the Chora, Deos is the only hotel that frames the 16th-century windmills in one direction and Delos in the other. Every suite has a private plunge pool on the terrace. The golf buggy to Mykonos Town takes under five minutes.
Description ⚙: Deos opened in May 2024 above Mykonos Town, positioned at eye level with the Aegean horizon. The panorama extends from the 16th-century windmills and old harbour across to Delos and the neighbouring islands of Syros and Tinos. Every suite has a private terrace with either a plunge pool or hot tub. A complimentary golf buggy connects guests to Mykonos Town in under five minutes. The Epico restaurant serves market-fresh Mediterranean cuisine and welcomes outside reservations. The spa and a 24-hour gym are available to all guests.
Address: Mykonos 846 00, Greece
Nearest Airports: JMK · Mykonos · 4 km

Alt Text: Mykonos Grand Hotel Mykonos infinity pool with in-water sun loungers, palm garden, and Aegean Sea with island on the horizon

Images.alt: Mykonos Grand Hotel Mykonos infinity pool with in-water sun loungers, palm garden, and Aegean Sea with island on the horizon

Hotel Tagline: Delos sits directly across the water, in the sightline of every sea-view room.
Summary: On Agios Ioannis, Delos sits directly across the water, and the Althea Spa Retreat was positioned to face it deliberately. Sea-view rooms share that sightline; private pools throughout. Privileged access to Shirley Valentine’s beach adds to the argument.
Description ⚙: The Mykonos Grand Hotel & Resort enjoys an enviable location on Agios Ioannis beach, overlooking Delos Island and the azure Aegean Sea. The world-class beachfront hotel combines seclusion with convenience and offers a complimentary shuttle service to Mykonos Town. Rooms are elegantly appointed in traditional Cycladic architecture, with sea-view options and private pools available. Privileged access to Shirley Valentine's serviced beach is provided. The Althea Spa Retreat, named after a Greek goddess, faces the island of Delos — the mythological birthplace of Apollo, son of Zeus.
Address: Agios Ioannis 846 00, Greece
Nearest Airports: JMK · Mykonos · 7 km

Alt Text: Myconian Panoptis Escape Mykonos villa bedroom with large open wall framing Aegean Sea sunset, stone fireplace, and rustic wood furniture

Images.alt: Myconian Panoptis Escape Mykonos villa bedroom with large open wall framing Aegean Sea sunset, stone fireplace, and rustic wood furniture

Hotel Tagline: From above Elia, the Aegean, Delos, and the Mykonian hills complete a full 360 degrees.
Summary: The villa complex above Elia with the widest sightline on the island — 360 degrees of Aegean, Delos, and the Mykonian hills. Twelve private pools across 21 bedrooms; the full estate can be reserved as one for groups or destination weddings. An SLH member.
Description ⚙: Panoptis Escape is a boutique villa complex above Elia Beach offering 360-degree views of the Aegean Sea, Delos Island, and the Mykonian hills. Twenty-one bedrooms across multiple villas, each with private pool decks and terraces. The property features 12 private pools and nearly 2,000 square metres of living space. The full estate can be reserved for exclusive use by groups or destination weddings. A member of Small Luxury Hotels of the World. Guests have full access to all Myconian Collection properties across the island, including restaurants, spas, and beach clubs.
Address: Elia Beach, Mikonos 846 00, Greece
Nearest Airports: JMK · Mykonos · 10 km

Alt Text: Cavo Tagoo Mykonos suite interior with floor-to-ceiling glass doors open to white terrace and Aegean Sea view

Images.alt: Cavo Tagoo Mykonos suite interior with floor-to-ceiling glass doors open to white terrace and Aegean Sea view

Hotel Tagline: Every suite faces the Aegean, with the infinity pool's horizon line sharpest at sunset.
Summary: The hotel that set the visual register for Mykonos luxury. Every suite faces the Aegean; the infinity pool’s horizon line at sunset is cinematically precise. The cave suites make the strongest case for this over the island’s larger beachfront resorts.
Description ⚙: Cavo Tagoo Mykonos is one of the island's most cosmopolitan hotels, designed by architect Paris Liakos. The sleek design incorporates natural elements with pristine white tones and abundant natural light. The spectacular infinity pool offers an unobstructed view of the Aegean Sea, widely regarded as among the finest in Mykonos. Every suite promises an enchanting sea view; cave suites are the most distinctive category. The hotel features a first-rate 5-star spa and a convenient shuttle service to and from Mykonos Town.
Address: Mykonos 846 00, Greece
Nearest Airports: JMK · Mykonos · 5 km

Alt Text: Myconian Ambassador Mykonos white stepped terraces with cascading pools, pine tree, and superyachts on turquoise Aegean Sea

Images.alt: Myconian Ambassador Mykonos white stepped terraces with cascading pools, pine tree, and superyachts on turquoise Aegean Sea

Hotel Tagline: Panoramic Aegean views unfold from the terrace, jacuzzi at the edge.
Summary: The room to ask for is the Passion Suite — jacuzzi terrace, panoramic Aegean view, the kind of setting honeymooners recognise immediately. Psarou and Paranga beaches are within walking distance. Restaurant Efisia earned recognition at the 2024 Greek Cuisine Restaurant Awards.
Description ⚙: The Myconian Ambassador, a five-star boutique hotel, sits adjacent to Platis Gialos. Beach lovers have proximity to Psarou, Paranga, and Agia Anna beaches within easy walking distance. The hotel boasts a magnificent outdoor pool with breathtaking Aegean views. The Passion Suite features a scenic terrace and jacuzzi with sea vistas — a top-level romantic choice for honeymooners. The acclaimed on-site restaurant Efisia offers Greek-inspired fine dining with poolside views; it earned recognition at the 2024 Greek Cuisine Restaurant Awards. The spa offers thalassotherapy-based treatments.
Address: Platis Gialos 846 00, Greece
Nearest Airports: JMK · Mykonos · 6 km

Alt Text: Myconian Villa Collection Mykonos thatched terrace with private infinity pool and Aegean Sea coastline and rocky hills

Images.alt: Myconian Villa Collection Mykonos thatched terrace with private infinity pool and Aegean Sea coastline and rocky hills

Hotel Tagline: Perched above Elia Beach, the terraces look out over the open Aegean.
Summary: Above Elia on the south shore, each villa has a private pool and an Aegean terrace that earns the name. Villa Ornos — five bedrooms, four infinity pools, private wine cellar — sets the benchmark for group stays on the island. Dinner at Cabbanes closes the evening well.
Description ⚙: Perched above Elia Beach on the south shore of Mykonos, Myconian Villa Collection offers stunning views over the Aegean Sea. Spacious rooms and villas have expansive terraces and private swimming pools. The five-bedroom, two-story Villa Ornos features four infinity pools, a jacuzzi, and a private wine cellar. Breakfast is served at the Nouveau restaurant overlooking the island's shores. The infinity pool provides a backdrop across the Mykonos skyline, and the on-site bar serves oysters and caviar. The Mediterranean restaurant Cabbanes offers al fresco dinner under the stars. Guests enjoy complimentary umbrellas and sunbeds on Elia Beach.
Address: Elia Beach, Mikonos 846 00, Greece
Nearest Airports: JMK · Mykonos · 11 km

Alt Text: Kove Mykonos terrace suite with outdoor hot tub and two square windows framing Ornos Bay with moored yachts and hillside

Images.alt: Kove Mykonos terrace suite with outdoor hot tub and two square windows framing Ornos Bay with moored yachts and hillside

Hotel Tagline: Most rooms look across Ornos Bay from a private plunge pool or hot tub.
Summary: Rebranded Kove by the Myconian Collection for 2025, this boutique between Ornos and Korfos beaches has 35 suites and rooms, most with plunge pools or hot tubs facing the bay. The cave spa — the only one in Mykonos — remains its most distinctive feature.
Description ⚙: Rebranded from Kenshō to Kove by the Myconian Collection for the 2025 season, this boutique hotel is nestled between Ornos and Korfos beaches. It features 35 suites and rooms, most with private plunge pools or hot tubs facing Ornos Bay. Interiors blend taupe and beige tones with Cycladic whitewashed walls, accented with copper fittings and candle holders by Tom Dixon. The cave spa — the only one in Mykonos — offers treatments in an atmospheric setting with steam bath, indoor jacuzzi, and tropical rain beds. The gourmet restaurant serves contemporary Greek and Mediterranean cuisine with bay views.
Address: Ornos 846 00, Greece
Nearest Airports: JMK · Mykonos · 6 km

Alt Text: Nomad Mykonos outdoor terrace with stone wall, reed-and-wood pergola, butterfly chairs, and small pool facing Aegean Sea with island beyond

Images.alt: Nomad Mykonos outdoor terrace with stone wall, reed-and-wood pergola, butterfly chairs, and small pool facing Aegean Sea with island beyond

Hotel Tagline: Fourteen hillside terraces look out past the Aegean to Naxos on clear days.
Summary: We’d request a sea-view suite here: only 14 units on a hillside above Kalo Livadi, each with a private pool or hot tub and a panoramic terrace that reaches Naxos on clear days. Kukulu Restaurant builds its menu on Mykonian culinary traditions without overstating them.
Description ⚙: Nomad Mykonos, part of LIM Hotels, is a boutique retreat on a hillside above Kalo Livadi with 14 suites, each with a private panoramic terrace equipped with a pool or hot tub. Views reach Naxos on clear days. Minimalist Cycladic furnishings crafted by island artisans, exposed stone walls, and clean lines define the interiors. The Kukulu Restaurant celebrates Mykonian culinary traditions with a modern twist, using fresh local ingredients. Private access to a beach below the property is available for guests.
Address: Kalo Livadi, Mikonos 846 00, Greece
Nearest Airports: JMK · Mykonos · 8 km

Alt Text: Mykonos Blu Grecotel Mykonos pool terrace with palm trees overlooking Psarou Beach and yachts anchored in turquoise bay

Images.alt: Mykonos Blu Grecotel Mykonos pool terrace with palm trees overlooking Psarou Beach and yachts anchored in turquoise bay

Hotel Tagline: Private bungalows sit level with the sea, their infinity pools merging with Psarou Beach below.
Summary: On Psarou, the bungalows and suites nearest the waterline have private infinity pools level with the sea. The two-level saltwater infinity pool and private beach section below are the main draws; the rooftop bar closes the day over the same view from above.
Description ⚙: Mykonos Blu, Grecotel Boutique Resort stands on its private section of Psarou Beach with exceptional sea views and direct beach access. The resort features a two-level saltwater infinity pool, select bungalows and suites with private infinity pools and hydro-massage plunge pools, and a rooftop cocktail bar with sunset views across the pool and Psarou Beach. Three restaurants are available on site, including Aegean Poets for Mediterranean and seafood dishes. The Elixir Spa offers ancient Greek-inspired wellness treatments. A public bus stop outside provides easy access to Mykonos Town, the windmills, and Little Venice.
Address: Psarrou 846 00, Greece
Nearest Airports: JMK · Mykonos · 4 km

Alt Text: Kalesma Mykonos infinity pool terrace at dawn with guest in bathrobe at pool edge facing open Aegean Sea horizon

Images.alt: Kalesma Mykonos infinity pool terrace at dawn with guest in bathrobe at pool edge facing open Aegean Sea horizon

Hotel Tagline: Twenty-five private pools, each one aimed at Delos across Ornos Bay.
Summary: Twenty-five suites and villas above Ornos Bay, each with a private infinity pool oriented toward Delos. The Kalesma Spa opened for the 2024 season in partnership with Dr. Barbara Sturm. Pere Ubu restaurant holds the Aegean in view at dinner; the fire pit faces Delos at dusk.
Description ⚙: Kalesma Mykonos opened in 2021 and quickly earned recognition as the number one resort in Greece by Travel + Leisure for 2024 and a Michelin Key in 2025. The hotel offers 25 suites and villas above Ornos Bay, each with a private infinity pool oriented toward Delos Island. Co-owner Aby Saltiel personally oversaw every detail before opening. The Kalesma Spa opened for the 2024 season in exclusive partnership with Dr. Barbara Sturm. The all-day restaurant Pere Ubu by Executive Chef Costas Tsingas features Cycladic-inspired cuisine with Aegean views. The Aloni Sunset Lounge with its fire pit faces Delos at dusk.
Address: Aleomandra, Mykonos, Mikonos 846 00, Greece
Nearest Airports: JMK · Mykonos · 7 km

Hotel: Santa Marina, A Luxury Collection Resort, Mykonos
Alt Text: Santa Marina Mykonos suite living room with bamboo-panelled walls, hanging rattan swing chair, and windows overlooking Ornos Bay and Mykonos hills

Images.alt: Santa Marina Mykonos suite living room with bamboo-panelled walls, hanging rattan swing chair, and windows overlooking Ornos Bay and Mykonos hills

Hotel Tagline: Ornos Bay wraps the peninsula on three sides, with the private beach directly below.
Summary: The resort above Mykonos’s only private beach, on a peninsula with Ornos Bay on three sides. The three-storey windmill suite — panoramic views, renovated in 2017 by Christiana Papageorgiou — is the most singular room on the island. Buddha-Bar Beach holds the sightline at the water’s edge.
Description ⚙: Santa Marina, a stylish resort established in the 1970s, was comprehensively renovated in 2017 under the direction of Christiana Papageorgiou, daughter of founder Elias Papageorgiou, with interiors by designer Silvina Macipe Krontiras. Nestled atop a cliff with stunning views over Ornos Bay, the resort is arranged like a quaint Greek village. The three-storey windmill suite offers panoramic vistas and is the most singular accommodation on the island. As one of the few resorts in Mykonos to offer a private beach, Santa Marina established the Buddha-Bar Beach, where guests bathe in the Aegean to lounge music. The resort features a spa, several pools, the Elais restaurant, and exclusive boutiques.
Address: Ornos Bay, Mikonos 846 00, Greece
Nearest Airports: JMK · Mykonos · 7 km

Hotel: Marriott Myrtle Beach Resort & Spa at Grande Dunes
Alt Text: Marriott Myrtle Beach Resort Grande Dunes oceanfront pool and Atlantic view

Images.alt: Marriott Myrtle Beach Resort Grande Dunes oceanfront pool and Atlantic view

Hotel Tagline: Private balconies face the Atlantic along a secluded stretch of the Grand Strand.
Summary: Those who have stayed at the Marriott Myrtle Beach Resort & Spa at Grande Dunes won’t blink when electing the best oceanfront resort in town. Renowned for its Atlantic views, beach-facing suites, Hibiscus Spa, and Ocean’s on 82nd restaurant overlooking the sea.
Description ⚙: The Marriott Myrtle Beach Resort & Spa at Grande Dunes is a five-star oceanfront resort on a private stretch of the Grand Strand in the Grande Dunes area. The 405 rooms and suites include oceanfront categories with private balconies overlooking the Atlantic. The Hibiscus Spa offers an indoor pool and a full menu of treatments. Ocean's on 82nd is the all-day oceanfront restaurant; Ocean Blu and The Cove provide poolside and seasonal dining. Two outdoor pools with a waterslide and a 24-hour fitness center are on site. The resort sits near the Dunes Golf and Beach Club and Broadway at the Beach.
Address: 8400 Costa Verde Dr, Myrtle Beach, SC 29572, USA
Nearest Airports: CRE · Grand Strand · 12 km; MYR · Myrtle Beach · 16 km

Hotel: Marriott’s OceanWatch Villas at Grande Dunes
Alt Text: Marriott OceanWatch Villas Grande Dunes room balcony facing the beach and ocean

Images.alt: Marriott OceanWatch Villas Grande Dunes room balcony facing the beach and ocean

Hotel Tagline: Ocean-view villas here are why beachfront exists as a category.
Summary: Sharing the grounds with its five-star neighbor, Marriott’s OceanWatch Villas at Grande Dunes is an all-villa beachfront resort with three heated pools, a putting green, and the Sand Dollar Grille. Ocean-view villas are the ones that drop jaws.
Address: 8550 Costa Verde Dr, Myrtle Beach, SC 29572, USA
Nearest Airports: CRE · Grand Strand · 12 km; MYR · Myrtle Beach · 16 km

Hotel: Hilton Grand Vacations Club Ocean Enclave Myrtle Beach
Alt Text: Hilton Ocean Enclave Myrtle Beach panoramic Atlantic view from full-serviced suite

Images.alt: Hilton Ocean Enclave Myrtle Beach panoramic Atlantic view from full-serviced suite

Hotel Tagline: From the 27th floor, the Grand Strand stretches in both directions along the Atlantic.
Summary: Opened in 2019 as the tallest hotel in Myrtle Beach at 27 floors, Ocean Enclave delivers panoramic Atlantic views from every floor. Select the “oceanfront” category for a private balcony overlooking the Grand Strand — the full kitchen makes extended stays effortless.
Description ⚙: Opened in October 2019, Hilton Grand Vacations Club Ocean Enclave is the tallest hotel in Myrtle Beach at 27 floors, rising directly on the Grand Strand two blocks from the Myrtle Beach Boardwalk. The 307 suites offer one, two, or three bedrooms with fully equipped kitchens, private balconies, and resort or oceanfront views; oceanfront units face the Atlantic directly. Upper-floor rooms provide panoramic coastline views in both directions. Amenities include two outdoor pools, a fitness center, a children's activity center, and an oceanfront restaurant and poolside bar.
Address: 1600 N Ocean Blvd, Myrtle Beach, SC 29577, USA
Nearest Airports: MYR · Myrtle Beach · 7 km; CRE · Grand Strand · 20 km

Hotel: SpringHill Suites by Marriott Myrtle Beach Oceanfront
Alt Text: SpringHill Suites Myrtle Beach oceanfront hotel terrace with fireplace and ocean views

Images.alt: SpringHill Suites Myrtle Beach oceanfront hotel terrace with fireplace and ocean views

Hotel Tagline: From the balcony, the Atlantic stretches wide and uninterrupted before you.
Summary: Ideally placed on the Grand Strand, SpringHill Suites by Marriott Myrtle Beach Oceanfront offers suites with oceanfront balconies, a complimentary breakfast, and a lazy river. The fitness center faces the Atlantic — motivation is built into the view.
Description ⚙: SpringHill Suites by Marriott Myrtle Beach Oceanfront is an all-suite beachfront hotel in the Grand Strand area, within walking distance of the Myrtle Beach Boardwalk and SkyWheel. All suites include sofa beds and modern amenities; many feature private oceanfront balconies with Atlantic views. Complimentary hot breakfast is served daily. The property offers outdoor and indoor pools, a sun deck, an indoor and outdoor lazy river, a fire pit, and an ocean-view fitness center. The onsite restaurant and bar serves American fare.
Address: 2006 N Ocean Blvd, Myrtle Beach, SC 29577, USA
Nearest Airports: MYR · Myrtle Beach · 7 km; CRE · Grand Strand · 20 km

Hotel: Holiday Inn Club Vacations Myrtle Beach Oceanfront, an IHG Hotel
Alt Text: Holiday Inn Club Vacations Myrtle Beach oceanfront suite with balcony and Grand Strand view

Images.alt: Holiday Inn Club Vacations Myrtle Beach oceanfront suite with balcony and Grand Strand view

Hotel Tagline: Private balconies look straight out over the Atlantic, four-bedroom villas facing it head-on.
Summary: Built from the ground up on the Grand Strand, this all-suite IHG resort is among the newest properties in Myrtle Beach. One- to four-bedroom villas with full kitchens and private ocean-view balconies; four-bedroom units face the Atlantic directly. Multilevel heated pool deck with bar and fire pits.
Description ⚙: Holiday Inn Club Vacations Myrtle Beach Oceanfront is a newly built all-suite IHG resort on the Grand Strand, offering 152 one- to four-bedroom villas with full kitchens, modern coastal interiors, and private balconies. Four-bedroom villas are guaranteed oceanfront; one- to three-bedroom Signature Collection and Standard villas offer high-quality lateral Atlantic views. Amenities include a multilevel heated pool deck directly facing the ocean, a Splash Pad, fire pits, The Back Porch Pool Bar, and a state-of-the-art fitness center. Located near Myrtle Beach State Park, quieter than the boardwalk strip.
Address: 3090 Springmaid Blvd, Myrtle Beach, SC 29577, USA
Nearest Airports: MYR · Myrtle Beach · 4 km; CRE · Grand Strand · 27 km

Hotel: Anderson Ocean Club and Spa by Oceana Resorts
Alt Text: Anderson Ocean Club and Spa Myrtle Beach oceanfront balcony suite

Images.alt: Anderson Ocean Club and Spa Myrtle Beach oceanfront balcony suite

Hotel Tagline: Balconies hang over the Atlantic on North Ocean Boulevard.
Summary: At the beachfront Anderson Ocean Club and Spa, spacious oceanfront studios to three-bedroom suites come with private balconies and equipped kitchens. The three-bedroom Penthouse hosts up to ten. The Awakening Spa and the Oceanfront Pool Bar round out the offer.
Description ⚙: Anderson Ocean Club and Spa by Oceana Resorts is an upscale beachfront resort in a Moroccan and Spanish Colonial building on North Ocean Boulevard. Accommodations range from studios to three-bedroom suites, available in oceanfront and ocean-view categories, all with private balconies, fully equipped kitchens, and washer-dryers. The three-bedroom oceanfront Penthouse sleeps up to ten. The Awakening Spa offers a full menu of facials, massages, and body treatments. Outdoor amenities include a lazy river, two pools, a 200-foot sun deck, and a seasonal Oceanfront Pool Bar. The resort offers miniature golf across the street and valet parking.
Address: 2600 N Ocean Blvd, Myrtle Beach, SC 29577, USA
Nearest Airports: MYR · Myrtle Beach · 8 km; CRE · Grand Strand · 19 km

Alt Text: Island Vista Resort Myrtle Beach secluded oceanfront stretch of Grand Strand

Images.alt: Island Vista Resort Myrtle Beach secluded oceanfront stretch of Grand Strand

Hotel Tagline: Unobstructed Atlantic from every private balcony, with no neighboring hotel for nearly a mile.
Summary: Nestled in a quiet stretch of the Grand Strand, Island Vista is the only oceanfront hotel for nearly a mile in either direction. Every suite has a private balcony facing the Atlantic. The award-winning Cypress Room serves breakfast and dinner with the ocean as backdrop.
Description ⚙: Island Vista Resort is a 12-story, family-operated all-suite resort situated on a solitary stretch of the Grand Strand, with no neighboring oceanfront hotel for nearly a mile in either direction. Every room and suite — ranging from standard rooms to four-bedroom configurations — includes a private balcony with unobstructed Atlantic views. The 149 suites are decorated in a tropical British West Indies style with full kitchens. The award-winning Cypress Room restaurant serves contemporary Southern cuisine in an oceanfront setting for breakfast and dinner. Amenities include three pools, hot tubs, a lazy river with an ancient ruins theme, and on-site spa services.
Address: 6000 N Ocean Blvd, Myrtle Beach, SC 29577, USA
Nearest Airports: MYR · Myrtle Beach · 13 km; CRE · Grand Strand · 15 km

Alt Text: Surfside Beach Oceanfront Hotel ocean view room with renovated interior

Images.alt: Surfside Beach Oceanfront Hotel ocean view room with renovated interior

Hotel Tagline: Every room looks out over the Atlantic, directly above the sand.
Summary: Every room at Surfside Beach Oceanfront Hotel delivers a stunning ocean view — no exceptions. The newly renovated guest rooms feature granite vanities and coffee makers steps from the sand, many with small balconies over the Atlantic. Nostalgic, laid-back, and genuinely oceanfront.
Description ⚙: Surfside Beach Oceanfront Hotel guarantees an Atlantic ocean view in every room without exception — a rare commitment among Grand Strand properties. The newly renovated guest rooms feature granite vanities, mini-fridges, and coffee makers directly above the sand; many include small balconies overlooking Surfside Beach and the Atlantic. The hotel offers an outdoor pool and private beach access. Located on the quieter Grand Strand between Myrtle Beach and Pawleys Island, the property delivers a nostalgic, laid-back beach experience within easy reach of area restaurants.
Address: 15 Ocean Blvd S, Surfside Beach, SC 29575, USA
Nearest Airports: MYR · Myrtle Beach · 12 km; CRE · Grand Strand · 38 km

Hotel: Hilton Grand Vacations Club Ocean 22 Myrtle Beach
Alt Text: Hilton Ocean 22 Myrtle Beach tower suite with balcony and Grand Strand ocean view

Images.alt: Hilton Ocean 22 Myrtle Beach tower suite with balcony and Grand Strand ocean view

Hotel Tagline: Atlantic views greet every balcony from the 24th floor down to the beach below.
Summary: Close to the Myrtle Beach Boardwalk, this 24-story Grand Strand tower offers one- to three-bedroom suites with full kitchens and superlative ocean-view balconies. Two pools — one indoor, one outdoor — both overlook the beach. Guests inevitably wake up to Atlantic views.
Description ⚙: Hilton Grand Vacations Club Ocean 22 Myrtle Beach is a 24-story beachfront timeshare resort on North Ocean Boulevard, two blocks from the Myrtle Beach Boardwalk. One-, two-, and three-bedroom suites feature full kitchens, spacious living areas, and oceanfront balconies with Atlantic views. Two pools — one indoor, one outdoor — both overlook the beach. Family amenities include a fitness center, a kids' activity center, and family-style dining. Direct beach access puts guests on the Grand Strand within steps of the tower's lobby.
Address: 2200 N Ocean Blvd, Myrtle Beach, SC 29577, USA
Nearest Airports: MYR · Myrtle Beach · 7 km; CRE · Grand Strand · 20 km

Alt Text: Coral Beach Resort Myrtle Beach suite with balcony facing the Atlantic

Images.alt: Coral Beach Resort Myrtle Beach suite with balcony facing the Atlantic

Hotel Tagline: Every room's private balcony opens directly onto the Atlantic Ocean.
Summary: Ten pools, a waterpark, a lazy river, a bowling alley, and a Starbucks-serving café on the sixth floor — Coral Beach packs a full resort into one oceanfront property. Every room has a private balcony with direct Atlantic views. The Travel Channel named it Best Family Resort.
Description ⚙: Coral Beach Resort is an oceanfront family resort named Best Family Accommodations by the Travel Channel. Every room includes a private balcony with direct Atlantic views and a small refrigerator and microwave; select suites add fully equipped kitchens. Ten pool attractions include a waterpark with a submarine and ship-wreck play area, an outdoor lazy river, indoor and outdoor pools, and hot tubs. The Entertainment Zone on the fourth floor houses an 8-lane AMF bowling alley and arcade. Dining options include the Sea Level Restaurant breakfast buffet, the Coral Bean Café serving Starbucks on the sixth floor, and the Splash Oceanfront Pool Bar. Located 1.5 kilometers from the Myrtle Beach Boardwalk.
Address: 1105 S Ocean Blvd, Myrtle Beach, SC 29577, USA
Nearest Airports: MYR · Myrtle Beach · 4 km; CRE · Grand Strand · 24 km
