Alt Text: Hampton Inn Myrtle Beach Oceanfront oceanfront restaurant

Images.alt: Hampton Inn Myrtle Beach Oceanfront oceanfront restaurant

Hotel Tagline: Ocean-facing balconies look out over the Atlantic from every room.
Summary: Seven pools, two lazy rivers, and ocean-facing penthouse suites that sleep six — the Hampton Inn & Suites Myrtle Beach Oceanfront punches above its price point. Steps from the sand, five minutes from the airport, and within walking distance of Walmart Neighborhood Market.
Description ⚙: Hampton Inn & Suites Myrtle Beach Oceanfront is a beachfront hotel on South Ocean Boulevard offering complimentary hot breakfast daily. Room types range from standard guest rooms to penthouse suites sleeping six, all with ocean-facing balconies and Atlantic views. Seven pools — indoor and outdoor — plus two lazy rivers and a children's water play area provide extensive aquatic amenities. The Reel restaurant serves coastal American fare with ocean views. Located five minutes from Myrtle Beach International Airport and within walking distance of Coastal Grand Mall.

Description ⚙: Sea Crest Oceanfront Resort anchors the south end of Myrtle Beach on the Atlantic beachfront. Oceanfront Executive suites offer the best views; all rooms feature private balconies. Nine water attractions include an outdoor waterpark with a 50-foot water slide, an indoor lazy river, indoor and outdoor pools, and two indoor whirlpools. The Beach Java Café on site serves Starbucks coffee and breakfast items. The Malibu Beach Bar provides seasonal poolside drinks and live entertainment. Café Amalfi is the on-site restaurant open all day with floor-to-ceiling windows and sea views; Black Drum Brewing and the Wet Whistle poolside bar add further dining options. Spa33 offers a full menu of massages and treatments. The 78Fitness center includes Peloton bikes and golf simulators. Hotel Tagline: From a terraced hillside above Rutherford, every balcony faces the vineyard floor and the Mayacamas Mountains.
Summary: All 50 rooms and suites on Rutherford Hill have private terraces facing the vineyard floor and the Mayacamas range — and the Michelin-starred restaurant's open-air terrace puts the same panorama on the table. The most direct valley sightlines are from the Classic Rooms in Maison 9.
Description ⚙: Opened in 1981 as Napa Valley's first fine dining restaurant by Claude Rouas, the inn was added in 1985. A Relais & Châteaux member on a 33-acre terraced hillside above Rutherford, with all 50 rooms and suites spread across seven maisons, each with a private balcony or terrace facing the vineyard floor and the Mayacamas Mountains. The Restaurant at Auberge du Soleil has held a Michelin star for 17 consecutive years; the open-air terrace shares the same valley panorama as the guest rooms. Auberge Spa has 7,000 sq ft and 12 treatment rooms. Children under 16 are not admitted.
Address: 180 Rutherford Hill Rd, Rutherford, CA 94573, USA
Nearest Airports: STS · Charles M. Schulz–Sonoma County · 51 km

Description ⚙: Founded in 2005 as the Poetry Inn by vintner Cliff Lede, the property changed ownership in 2024 and was officially renamed Sttupa Estate Napa Valley in April 2026. Set on a steep hillside on the eastern Silverado Trail above Yountville, adults-only, five suites from 970 to 1,500 sq ft, all facing west over the Stags Leap District. Each suite has a fireplace, private patio, and outdoor shower. Free multi-course breakfast included daily. Private wine tastings at Sullivan Rutherford Estate accessible to guests.
Address: 6380 Silverado Trail, Napa, CA 94558, USA

Watermark Fallsview Dining on the 33rd floor, an OpenTable Diners' Choice winner for Best Scenic View in Niagara, serves contemporary Canadian cuisine with floor-to-ceiling falls views. A Starbucks operates at lobby level alongside multiple additional dining outlets. The hotel offers an indoor pool, 24/7 gym, and EV charging facilities.
Address: 6361 Fallsview Blvd, Niagara Falls, ON L2G 3V9, Canada
Nearest Airports: IAG · Niagara Falls International · 18 km; BUF · Buffalo Niagara · 45 km

Alt Text: Tower Hotel at Fallsview Niagara Falls renovated room with panoramic window showing aerial view directly above Horseshoe Falls with mist cloud rising

Images.alt: Tower Hotel at Fallsview Niagara Falls renovated room with panoramic window showing aerial view directly above Horseshoe Falls with mist cloud rising

Hotel Tagline: From 160 metres above the water, the Horseshoe Falls fills the window of the 25th floor.
Summary: Ask for the Fallsview Tower King: the only room category in this 1962 observation tower that faces the Horseshoe Falls directly. At 99 metres tall, the 25th-floor breakfast comes with a perch 160 metres above the water — one of the most unusual and highest vantage points in Niagara.
Description ⚙: Originally constructed in 1962 as Niagara's first purpose-built observation tower, the Tower Hotel at Fallsview has operated as a boutique hotel at 6732 Fallsview Boulevard since conversion. The 50-room property stands 99 metres tall, placing guests 160 metres above the waterline — the highest vantage point of any hotel on Fallsview Boulevard. The Fallsview Tower King is the key room category: facing the Horseshoe Falls directly through panoramic windows, as the cylindrical tower distributes rooms across 360 degrees. The Sky Fallsview Steakhouse on the upper floor serves dinner with falls views; IHOP at lobby level handles breakfast. The hotel is one block from Fallsview Casino.
Address: 6732 Fallsview Blvd, Niagara Falls, ON L2G 3W6, Canada
Nearest Airports: IAG · Niagara Falls International · 18 km; BUF · Buffalo Niagara · 45 km

Hotel: The Oakes Hotel Overlooking the Falls
Alt Text: The Oakes Hotel Overlooking the Falls Niagara Falls king room with large picture window and direct view of Horseshoe Falls mist rising

Images.alt: The Oakes Hotel Overlooking the Falls Niagara Falls king room with large picture window and direct view of Horseshoe Falls mist rising

Hotel Tagline: Floor-to-ceiling windows at Table Rock's edge frame both the Horseshoe and American Falls at once.
Summary: Worth staying for the upper-floor Tower Room Premium Falls View accommodations — closest to the Table Rock edge of any hotel, with the Horseshoe and American Falls filling the window. Jacuzzi tubs on some floors add an indulgent note. The 14th-floor observation deck makes for the best photo stop on the boulevard.
Description ⚙: The Oakes Hotel Overlooking the Falls at 6546 Fallsview Boulevard is the closest hotel to Table Rock — the observation platform at the lip of Horseshoe Falls. The 189-room property offers Tower Room Premium Falls View accommodations on upper floors, where floor-to-ceiling windows frame both the Horseshoe and American Falls at close range; some premium suites include jacuzzi tubs. The 14th-floor observation lounge, exclusive to hotel guests, provides seated falls views from floor-to-ceiling windows across five enclaves. Applebee's Grill & Bar operates on-site. Amenities include an indoor pool, hot tub, sauna, and fitness centre. The hotel is directly adjacent to Niagara Fallsview Casino Resort.
Address: 6546 Fallsview Blvd, Niagara Falls, ON L2G 3W2, Canada
Nearest Airports: IAG · Niagara Falls International · 18 km; BUF · Buffalo Niagara · 45 km

Alt Text: Hyatt Regency Niagara Falls Fallsview restaurant dining room with white upholstered chairs and floor-to-ceiling windows overlooking Horseshoe Falls in winter

Images.alt: Hyatt Regency Niagara Falls Fallsview restaurant dining room with white upholstered chairs and floor-to-ceiling windows overlooking Horseshoe Falls in winter

Hotel Tagline: Both falls fill a single high-floor window, with Horseshoe directly below.
Summary: We’d book the Fallsview Regency Suite — two rooms, a jetted tub, both falls in one high-floor window — at the Fallsview district’s newest arrival. Opened April 2026 as the first Hyatt in Niagara and the closest Canadian hotel to the cascade, it adds the most significant renovation to the corridor in years.
Description ⚙: Hyatt Regency Niagara Falls Fallsview opened on April 1, 2026, as the first Hyatt hotel in Niagara Falls and the closest Canadian hotel to the falls. The 42-floor, 611-room property — converted from the former Embassy Suites by Hilton Niagara Falls Fallsview following a comprehensive renovation — sits in the heart of the Fallsview district atop the Canadian Horseshoe Falls. Most rooms feature floor-to-ceiling windows overlooking the Horseshoe and American Falls; the Fallsview Regency Suite is a two-room, 450-square-foot layout on a high floor with a jetted bathtub in the falls-facing position. The Fallsview King Suite offers a dedicated window seating area facing both cascades. On-site dining includes STK Steakhouse Fallsview and TGI Fridays. Facilities include an indoor pool, fitness centre, and over 20,000 square feet of meeting and banquet space.
Address: 6700 Fallsview Blvd, Niagara Falls, ON L2G 3W6, Canada
Nearest Airports: IAG · Niagara Falls International · 18 km; BUF · Buffalo Niagara · 45 km

Hotel: The Brock Niagara Falls Fallsview, Tapestry by Hilton
Alt Text: The Brock Niagara Falls Fallsview restaurant dining room at night with panoramic windows showing blue-illuminated American Falls and Horseshoe Falls

Images.alt: The Brock Niagara Falls Fallsview restaurant dining room at night with panoramic windows showing blue-illuminated American Falls and Horseshoe Falls

Hotel Tagline: Fallsview balconies on the 11th and 12th floors catch mist from both the American and Horseshoe Falls.
Summary: Request a Royal Floor room on the 11th or 12th floor: the Fallsview balcony is the rarest feature in Niagara’s hotel landscape, and the mist reaches it on blustery mornings. Prime Steakhouse downstairs is TripAdvisor’s top-rated restaurant in the city — the falls view from the table earns its own reservation.
Description ⚙: The Brock Niagara Falls Fallsview, Tapestry by Hilton is a historic hotel built in the late 1920s — the first four-star hotel on the Niagara Falls skyline — which entered the Tapestry Collection by Hilton following a $15 million renovation. It operates as Niagara's only Fallsview boutique hotel. Royal Floor rooms on the 11th and 12th floors feature private Fallsview Balconies open to the air and facing both the American and Horseshoe Falls, with Nespresso machines, robes, and private elevator access. Prime Steakhouse Niagara Falls, TripAdvisor's top-rated restaurant in the city, offers panoramic falls views alongside prime steaks and seafood. The Rainbow Room serves breakfast with falls views; Niagara's only Fallsview Tea Room rounds out in-house dining. Christienne Fallsview Spa (Ontario's #1-rated spa) is accessible via indoor walkway to the adjacent Sheraton Fallsview. The hotel connects to Casino Niagara and Falls Avenue Resort via indoor walkways.
Address: 5685 Falls Ave, Niagara Falls, ON L2E 6W7, Canada
Nearest Airports: IAG · Niagara Falls International · 16 km; BUF · Buffalo Niagara · 43 km

Alt Text: Wyndham Grand Fallsview Hotel Niagara Falls double room with two queen beds and corner windows showing Horseshoe Falls mist and city view

Images.alt: Wyndham Grand Fallsview Hotel Niagara Falls double room with two queen beds and corner windows showing Horseshoe Falls mist and city view

Hotel Tagline: From the 18th floor, the Horseshoe Falls fills the picture window.
Summary: Higher-floor Fallsview rooms look out over the Horseshoe Falls from a hotel that exceeds its 18 floors in dining ambition — Ruth’s Chris and The Keg Steakhouse share the building, as does a direct glass walkway to Fallsview Casino. The 18th-floor suite with its falls outlook and two-person whirlpool is the room to request.
Description ⚙: The Wyndham Grand Fallsview Hotel at 6455 Fallsview Boulevard — upgraded to the Wyndham Grand tier from Wyndham Fallsview Hotel, itself a conversion of the former Four Points by Sheraton Niagara Falls Fallsview — offers 405 renovated guestrooms across 18 floors. Higher-floor Fallsview rooms face the Horseshoe Falls directly through large picture windows; the 18th-floor Junior Suite with a king bed and two-person whirlpool delivers the most elevated falls view in the building. The hotel's dining lineup includes Ruth's Chris Steak House and The Keg Steakhouse & Bar for fine dining, alongside IHOP, TGI Fridays, and Starbucks. An indoor glass walkway connects directly to Fallsview Casino and the OLG Stage. Leisure facilities include an indoor heated pool, two hot tubs, a fitness centre, and a Fun Zone arcade.
Address: 6455 Fallsview Blvd, Niagara Falls, ON L2G 3V9, Canada
Nearest Airports: IAG · Niagara Falls International · 18 km; BUF · Buffalo Niagara · 45 km

Alt Text: Niagara Fallsview Hotel Niagara Falls king fallsview room with wide wraparound window overlooking Horseshoe Falls and icy gorge in winter

Images.alt: Niagara Fallsview Hotel Niagara Falls king fallsview room with wide wraparound window overlooking Horseshoe Falls and icy gorge in winter

Hotel Tagline: Horseshoe Falls fills the window from the only rooms that clear the Marriott next door.
Summary: Book a Fallsview Room — the only category that clears the taller building next door and delivers a direct Horseshoe Falls view, with jacuzzi tub standard. A price point well below the front-row boulevard hotels and walking distance to Fallsview Casino make this the most practical falls-facing option in the corridor.
Description ⚙: The Niagara Fallsview Hotel at 6733 Fallsview Boulevard, formerly the Radisson Hotel & Suites Fallsview before operating independently under Vrancor Hospitality Corporation, offers 232 rooms across a falls-facing tower and a city-view west wing. Guests seeking an unobstructed view of the Horseshoe Falls must book within the Fallsview Rooms category — the only tier that clears the adjacent taller Marriott building. Fallsview rooms include a jacuzzi tub, mini fridge, and microwave. The property was undergoing renovation between October 2025 and April 2026. On-site dining includes Turtle Jacks. Facilities include an indoor heated pool, fitness centre, and free Wi-Fi. The hotel is within walking distance of Fallsview Casino Resort and the Niagara Falls Convention Centre.
Address: 6733 Fallsview Blvd, Niagara Falls, ON L2G 3W7, Canada
Nearest Airports: IAG · Niagara Falls International · 18 km; BUF · Buffalo Niagara · 46 km

Alt Text: Hotel Le Negresco Nice ornate room with blue floral wallpaper gilded chandelier and sea view through window

Images.alt: Hotel Le Negresco Nice ornate room with blue floral wallpaper gilded chandelier and sea view through window

Hotel Tagline: From the upper floors, the Baie des Anges curves west beneath Nice's longest Mediterranean stretch.
Summary: Watching over the Promenade des Anglais since 1913, the Negresco is Nice’s most recognizable address. The upper floors are where the Mediterranean view pays off — the Baie des Anges curves below, the pink dome above. Le Chantecler, with its Michelin star, fills the evenings well.
Description ⚙: Hotel Le Negresco has watched over the Promenade des Anglais since 1913. The 128 rooms and suites spread across themed floors, with sea-facing upper floors delivering the longest Mediterranean stretch — the Baie des Anges curves west from every high-floor window. Le Chantecler, the Michelin-starred restaurant under chef Virginie Basselot, handles the evenings. The hotel's private beach section is directly on the Promenade, and La Rotonde Brasserie serves lunch outdoors under the same Mediterranean light.
View Subjects: Promenade des Anglais & Bay of Angels
Address: 37 Prom. des Anglais, 06000 Nice, France
Nearest Airports: NCE · Côte d'Azur · 7 km; CEQ · Cannes-Mandelieu · 40 km

Hotel Tagline: Balcony mornings over the Baie des Anges, rooftop dinners with the Promenade des Anglais spread 360° below.
Summary: Opened in November 2024, Le Victoria is the newest five-star on the Riviera. We’d request a sea-facing suite for balcony mornings over the Baie des Anges, then head to rooftop Taulissa — signed by Michelin-starred Glenn Viel — for the 360° panorama at dinner.
View Subjects: Promenade des Anglais & Bay of Angels
Address: 6 Av. de Suède, 06000 Nice, France
Nearest Airports: NCE · Côte d'Azur · 7 km; CEQ · Cannes-Mandelieu · 41 km

Hotel Tagline: From the rooftop, Nice's terracotta rooftops and the full curve of the Mediterranean open in every direction.
Summary: SEEN by Olivier’s rooftop terrace is the draw — 360° over Nice’s rooftops and the Mediterranean, best at sunset. The suite worth asking for is high-floor with a balcony: the Baie des Anges view is uninterrupted and fills the room with sea light from first light.
Description ⚙: The Anantara Plaza Nice Hotel occupies a Belle Epoque heritage building in Nice's city centre, renovated to combine historic grandeur with contemporary interiors. The 151 rooms and suites include sea-facing balcony categories overlooking the Baie des Anges, with upper floors extending the view along the full curve of the coast. SEEN by Olivier on the rooftop, a concept by Portuguese chef Olivier da Costa, delivers a 360-degree panorama over Nice's terracotta rooftops and the Mediterranean — particularly striking at sunset. The Anantara Spa is available for guests, and access to Ruhl Plage on the Promenade des Anglais is included.
View Subjects: Promenade des Anglais & Bay of Angels
Address: 12 Av. de Verdun, 06000 Nice, France
Nearest Airports: NCE · Côte d'Azur · 7 km; CEQ · Cannes-Mandelieu · 41 km

Images.alt: Le Meridien Nice sea view suite with floor-to-ceiling glass doors opening onto terrace overlooking Baie des Anges

Hotel Tagline: From number one on the Promenade des Anglais, the Baie des Anges fills every sea-facing window.
Summary: Positioned at number one on the Promenade des Anglais, the Méridien puts the Mediterranean directly in front. The room to ask for is the Junior Suite Sea View Terrace — balcony, open sea, nothing between you and the water. The rooftop pool adds the full Baie des Anges sweep.
Description ⚙: Le Meridien Nice occupies the prime position at number one on the Promenade des Anglais, with 324 rooms and 17 suites renovated in 2020. Sea-facing categories feature floor-to-ceiling windows or private terraces looking directly over the Baie des Anges. The tenth-floor rooftop hosts the Elaio restaurant and a heated outdoor pool operating year-round — the panorama from this level covers the full arc of the coast. The hotel has a private beach section directly across the Promenade, a spa, and a fitness centre. Nice-Ville train station is under ten minutes on foot.
View Subjects: Promenade des Anglais & Bay of Angels
Address: 1 Prom. des Anglais, 06000 Nice, France
Nearest Airports: NCE · Côte d'Azur · 7 km; CEQ · Cannes-Mandelieu · 40 km

Hotel: Hôtel Palais de la Méditerranée — The Unbound Collection by Hyatt
Alt Text: Hotel Palais de la Mediterranee Nice suite living room with sage sofa and floor-to-ceiling window over open sea

Images.alt: Hotel Palais de la Mediterranee Nice suite living room with sage sofa and floor-to-ceiling window over open sea

Hotel Tagline: The Baie des Anges fills the window from bed to breakfast behind the 1929 Art Déco façade.
Summary: The 1929 Art Déco façade anchors the Promenade. The indoor-outdoor heated pool — the only year-round one of its kind in Nice — keeps the Mediterranean in frame at both ends. Worth staying for a sea-facing balcony room: the Baie des Anges fills the window from bed to breakfast.
Description ⚙: Hôtel Palais de la Méditerranée, part of The Unbound Collection by Hyatt, has anchored the Promenade des Anglais since 1929 behind its landmark Art Deco facade. The 145 rooms and 28 suites deliver sea-facing balcony and terrace options overlooking the Baie des Anges. The hotel's indoor-outdoor heated pool is the only year-round one of its kind in Nice — guests move between interior and exterior sections while the Mediterranean stays in frame at both ends. Le 3e restaurant serves through floor-to-ceiling windows; the sauna and hammam complete the wellness offer. Nice Old Town and the Cours Saleya market are a short walk east.
View Subjects: Promenade des Anglais & Bay of Angels
Address: 13 Prom. des Anglais, 06000 Nice, France
Nearest Airports: NCE · Côte d'Azur · 7 km; CEQ · Cannes-Mandelieu · 40 km

Alt Text: Hotel La Perouse Nice wrought-iron balcony with rose wine table and unobstructed Mediterranean sea view

Images.alt: Hotel La Perouse Nice wrought-iron balcony with rose wine table and unobstructed Mediterranean sea view

Hotel Tagline: Baie des Anges below, Vieux Nice's terracotta rooftops to the west — all from a limestone cliff above the Promenade.
Summary: Carved into Castle Hill above the Promenade, La Pérouse earns its view from elevation. Ask for a sea-and-Old-Town suite: terrace, the Baie des Anges below, Nice’s red rooftops to the west. The rock-carved pool at golden hour is the reason not to rush down to dinner.
Description ⚙: Hôtel La Pérouse is carved into the limestone of Castle Hill above the Promenade des Anglais, a four-star boutique property with 53 rooms and suites completely renovated by Studio Friedmann & Versace in May 2023. Most rooms include private terraces or balconies at elevation above the Baie des Anges, and the upper suites extend the view west over the terracotta rooftops of Vieux Nice — the only property on this list with a confirmed dual sea and Old Town panorama. The rock-carved heated outdoor pool is among the most distinctive amenities on the Riviera. Le Patio, the hotel's restaurant, serves seasonal Provençal cuisine under lemon trees in the cliffside garden.
View Subjects: Promenade des Anglais & Bay of Angels
Address: 11 Quai Rauba Capeu, 06300 Nice, France
Nearest Airports: NCE · Côte d'Azur · 8 km; CEQ · Cannes-Mandelieu · 41 km

Hotel Tagline: From the 31st floor and above, Osaka Bay spreads wide beneath an Art Deco and Japanese sky.
Summary: Japan’s first Waldorf Astoria, open since April 2025. Every room starts at the 31st floor — city and bay views, Art Déco interiors fused with Japanese design. The 30th-floor pool faces the bay. Worth requesting a Corner Suite for the full wrap-around spread.
Description ⚙: Japan's first Waldorf Astoria, opened April 2025 within the Grand Green Osaka development. All 252 rooms begin at the 31st floor, combining Art Deco interiors with Japanese design. Bay and city views from upper floors; corner suites deliver wrap-around panoramas. The 30th-floor infinity pool faces Osaka Bay — the only elevated bay-facing pool in the city's hotel landscape.
Address: 5-54 Ōfukachō, Kita Ward, Osaka, 530-0011, Japan

Summary: Opened in August 2024, this sailboat-shaped tower puts all 154 rooms on its upper six floors — every one facing the Osaka skyline. The 28th-floor GENSUI ryokan suites frame the city through shoji screens. The room to ask for is a corner: Yodo River on one side, city on the other.
Description ⚙: Opened August 2024 in a sailboat-shaped tower in Kita Ward. All 154 rooms are on the upper six floors, every one facing the Osaka skyline. Summary: Floors 38 to 57 of Abeno Harukas — Osaka’s tallest skyscraper — mean every room here has the view by default. No category disappoints, but the 53rd-floor corner Executive Suite is the one to hold out for: panoramic from the bed, panoramic from the bathtub.
Description ⚙: Occupies floors 38 to 57 of Abeno Harukas, Osaka's tallest building at 300 metres. Every room delivers an elevated view by default. The 53rd-floor corner Executive Suite is panoramic from the bed and from the bathtub. Located in Abeno Ward, away from the downtown hotel concentration, with unobstructed views in all directions.

Description ⚙: Tadao Ando's black-facade tower rising 27 floors above Midosuji. All 337 rooms face the city through floor-to-ceiling — and in some cases wall-to-wall — windows. Wonderful Suites deliver the full skyline spread. After dark, Dotonbori's neon illumination is visible from upper floors.

Description ⚙: Occupies the upper floors of Nakanoshima Festival Tower West on an island between the Tosabori and Dojima rivers. All 164 rooms start from the 33rd floor. Hotel Tagline: The Glico Running Man sign, neon and all, fills the window from across Ebisubashi Bridge.
Summary: The Glico Running Man sign has faced Ebisubashi Bridge since 1935 — and the Cross Hotel’s Dotonbori View rooms face it directly from the other side. The room category name says it all: book it and the sign is yours, neon and all, from curtain-open to lights-out.
Description ⚙: The Dotonbori View room category faces the Glico Running Man sign directly from across Ebisubashi Bridge. The sign has occupied this position since 1935. Description ⚙: Fifty-one floors above Osaka Bay, offering the city's definitive altitude-and-water combination. Sky Floor rooms on floors 46 to 50 deliver a 360-degree spread of bay, skyline, and on clear days, the Akashi Kaikyo Bridge to the west. The bay-side location trades downtown proximity for an unobstructed water horizon.

No other property on this list places Osaka Castle at the centre of the view rather than the edge of it. Description ⚙: A four-star hotel opened in 2021 in a 1930s former electric factory in the 16th arrondissement, steps from Trocadéro metro. The rooftop bar delivers 360° panoramas with the Eiffel Tower as the centrepiece after dark. Several rooms catch the tower through floor-to-ceiling windows.

Description ⚙: A four-star boutique hotel on the quieter edge of the 17th arrondissement. The Deluxe Terrace Room and the top-floor Suite both have balconies where the Eiffel Tower comes into frame — suited to breakfast outside with the Iron Lady on the horizon.

Description ⚙: A 17-room boutique hotel in the 16th arrondissement beside the Trocadéro Gardens, with all rooms oriented around the Eiffel Tower. Summary: We’d book one of the four “Premium” rooms first — each adds a small balcony directly facing the tower, and they fill early. A walk across the Champ de Mars puts you at the base of it. The hotel has been welcoming guests in the 7th since the 18th century; the view, unchanged.
Description ⚙: A three-star boutique hotel in the 7th arrondissement operating since the 18th century. Four Premium rooms each have a small private balcony directly facing the Eiffel Tower. A walk across Champ de Mars puts guests at the base of the monument.

Summary: Of the 81 rooms, 20 have balconies or terraces — the “Premium” category earns the Eiffel Tower view directly, some with a terrace. Breakfast is a reason to linger before heading out to Champ de Mars, Les Invalides, and the Musée Rodin, all within walking distance.

Summary: Adults-only resort on the southwest coast of Paros, with a double-level infinity pool facing the open sea and Antiparos on the horizon. Description ⚙: Adults-only resort at Agia Irini on the southwest coast of Paros, set among hillside gardens with unobstructed views of the Aegean Sea and Antiparos. The property features two infinity pools — one double-level — plus five private pools in suite categories. All rooms face the sea and include balconies or terraces. On-site restaurant with ocean-view terrace, full-service spa, fitness center, yoga classes, and art gallery. Car or transfer required from Parikia, approximately 7 kilometers away.
Address: Agia Irini, Sarakiniko 844 00, Greece

Summary: Opened in 2024 in Ampelas, on the northeast coast where Paros narrows toward Naxos. The infinity pool sits high enough to carry both sea and the Naxos skyline in the same line of sight. An indoor pool, Dione Spa, and a restaurant round out a property still accumulating its first reviews — all naming the view first.
Description ⚙: Five-star hotel opened in 2024 in Ampelas, on the northeast coast of Paros, overlooking the Aegean Sea with Naxos on the horizon. Facilities include an indoor pool, a seasonal outdoor infinity pool, a full-service spa (Dione Spa), a restaurant, a poolside bar, and a fitness center. Room categories include Veranda Suites with panoramic sea views and Vione Suites with private pools and sea views. Located approximately 9 kilometers from Naoussa and 22 kilometers from the port of Parikia.

Summary: Five-star hotel on Ampelas beach, northeast Paros, where the sea opens directly toward Naxos. The Signature Sea View Suites come with a private plunge pool on a terrace with an unobstructed line across the Aegean. The restaurant terrace shares the same sightline, from sea level above the private beach.
Description ⚙: Five-star boutique hotel on Ampelas beach, northeast Paros, with a private beach area and direct sea access. Room categories include Comfort Rooms with sea view and Signature Sea View Suites with private outdoor pools or hot tubs. Operates seasonally, typically May to October. Description ⚙: Small Luxury Hotels (SLH) member located directly above the sea at Parasporos beach, southwest Paros. Facilities include a saltwater outdoor pool, a full-service spa, a fitness center, and the Olvo Restaurant serving Mediterranean cuisine with sea views. Summary: Three pools on the southeast coast, all facing Naxos across open water. The Galazia Hytra restaurant — a collaboration with the Michelin-starred Hytra in Athens — makes dinner here worth staying in for. Description ⚙: Resort set on a hillside above Krios Beach, western outskirts of Parikia. Facilities include two outdoor pools (one infinity), a full-service spa, the Coeli restaurant with ocean views, a poolside bar, tennis courts, and mini golf. The property features 56 individually furnished rooms, with private pool suites in upper categories. Complimentary shuttle to and from Parikia. Hotel Tagline: Saint Mary's Cathedral anchors the skyline from the upper floors, the full CBD arc beyond.
Summary: Corner suites on the upper floors face the full sweep of the CBD, with Saint Mary’s Cathedral anchoring the east end. The Club King is the room to request for the Cathedral frame; push to an Executive Suite for the full skyline arc. The heated infinity pool holds the same view.
Description ⚙: One of Perth's premier five-star hotels, The Westin Perth opened in 2019 in the Hibernian Place precinct, occupying an entire block between Hay Street and Murray Street in the CBD's East End, steps from The Perth Mint. The 368 rooms and suites include One-Bedroom Club Suites and Executive Suites on upper corner floors with sweeping views of the Perth skyline. Club King rooms face Saint Mary's Cathedral. The hotel's 20-metre heated infinity-edged outdoor pool offers captivating city vistas. The award-winning Italian restaurant Garum by Guy Grossi and the Haven Lounge, home to Perth's most celebrated high tea, are both located in the hotel precinct.
Address: 480 Hay St, Perth WA 6000, Australia

Hotel Tagline: At sunset, the Bell Tower and Swan River frame together from the Level 5 terrace.
Summary: Steps from Elizabeth Quay, rooms split between the CBD skyline and the Swan River — both floor-to-ceiling. The Ritz-Carlton Suite tops it with balconies on both sides. At sunset, the Songbird Bar terrace on Level 5 frames the Bell Tower and river together.
Description ⚙: The Ritz-Carlton, Perth opened in 2019 at Elizabeth Quay, steps from the Elizabeth Quay entertainment complex and The Bell Tower on the banks of the Swan River. Rooms and suites offer floor-to-ceiling windows facing either the CBD skyline or the Swan River, and the Ritz-Carlton Suite on the top floor features expansive balconies on both sides. The hotel's panoramic riverfront infinity pool overlooks Elizabeth Quay Bridge. The Songbird Bar and Lounge terrace on Level 5 frames the Bell Tower, Elizabeth Quay Bridge, and Swan River at sunset. The Ritz-Carlton Spa offers vitality pools and a full treatment menu.
Address: 1 Barrack St, Perth WA 6000, Australia

Hotel Tagline: Perth's highest rooftop holds the Swan River, skyline, and Perth Hills in one sweep.
Summary: The Rooftop at QT sits on the 18th floor — Perth’s highest rooftop — with the skyline, Swan River, Optus Stadium, and Perth Hills in a single sweep. Worth timing a stay to catch that view at dusk, then retreating to one of the upper-floor rooms for the same read after dark.
Description ⚙: QT Perth is a five-star boutique hotel in the Perth CBD, home to the Rooftop at QT — Perth's highest rooftop bar at 18 floors — with panoramic views of the Perth skyline, Swan River, Optus Stadium, and Perth Hills. The 184 rooms spread across 18 floors feature double rain showers, Bang & Olufsen speakers, and an industrial-chic aesthetic. Upper-floor rooms deliver the best urban vistas in the building. The hotel sits at the corner of Murray Street Mall, within easy reach of Forrest Chase, Raine Square, and the City of Perth Library.
Address: 133 Murray St, Perth WA 6000, Australia
Nearest Airports: PER · Perth · 16 km; JAD · Jandakot · 20 km

Hotel: InterContinental Perth City Centre by IHG

Images.alt: InterContinental Perth City Centre by IHG suite with guest seated by floor-to-ceiling window overlooking Perth CBD towers

Hotel Tagline: His Majesty's Theatre sits in the foreground, the Perth skyline spreading behind it.
Summary: Upper-floor west-facing rooms put His Majesty’s Theatre in the foreground of a broader Perth skyline. The Club InterContinental on Level 16 trades the same views for all-day access. Worth requesting a corner room for the widest read of the city and the Theatre together.
Description ⚙: InterContinental Perth City Centre by IHG stands 16 floors above the CBD on the corner of Hay Street and King Street, within a 15-minute walk of Kings Park and Botanic Garden. Upper-floor west-facing rooms look out over His Majesty's Theatre, one of Perth's most significant historic buildings. The 16th-floor Club InterContinental lounge provides all-day snacks, beverages, and sweeping city views exclusively for Club-level guests. The hotel's three restaurants include tapas bar Heno & Rey, wood-fired grill Ascua, and cocktail lounge Loft Lounge & Bar.
Address: 815 Hay St, Perth WA 6000, Australia
Nearest Airports: PER · Perth · 20 km; JAD · Jandakot · 20 km

Images.alt: The Adnate Perth Art Series Perth room at sunset with floor-to-ceiling window and CBD tower skyline

Hotel Tagline: From the upper floors, Perth's skyline spreads uninterrupted above the CBD roofline.
Summary: A 27-storey building at the quieter end of Hay Street means the upper floors clear most of Perth’s CBD roofline. The Premium Adnate Deluxe rooms have floor-to-ceiling windows and a clean skyline read; the pool deck on Level 1 adds a social counterpoint below the same view.
Description ⚙: The Adnate Perth – Art Series is a 25-floor, 250-room boutique hotel at the western end of Hay Street in Perth CBD, dedicated to the work of Australian street artist Matt Adnate. The building's west-facing facade features a 27-storey Mega Mural — the largest work Adnate has painted on a building — depicting the cultural history of Perth. Upper-floor Premium Adnate Deluxe rooms have floor-to-ceiling windows with a clean Perth skyline read. The Level 1 pool deck and BAHA Poolside Bar overlook Hay Street and the city. Art tours, in-room art channels, and art libraries are available for guests throughout the stay.
Address: 900 Hay St, Perth WA 6000, Australia
Nearest Airports: PER · Perth · 19 km; JAD · Jandakot · 20 km

Hotel Tagline: Where the Swan River and Perth skyline converge in the same eyeline, from pool to wrap-around balcony.
Summary: The multi-tiered pool area faces the Swan River and Matagarup Bridge on one side and the Perth skyline on the other — one of the few spots in Perth where both align in the same eyeline. Suites and Villas add wrap-around balconies to that equation.
Description ⚙: Crown Towers Perth opened in December 2016 as the flagship luxury hotel at the Crown Perth entertainment complex on the eastern banks of the Swan River at Burswood. The 500-room hotel features a multi-tiered infinity-edged lagoon pool maximising Swan River views, alongside an adults-only Enclave pool with private cabanas. Crown Towers Suites and Villas offer 24-hour butler service, wrap-around balconies, and marble baths with views of the Swan River and Perth skyline. The exclusive Crystal Club on the 15th floor provides personalised check-in, concierge services, and complimentary breakfast for Club Level guests. The hotel complex includes a casino, nightclub, upscale retail, and multiple restaurants.
Address: Great Eastern Hwy, Burswood WA 6100, Australia
Nearest Airports: PER · Perth · 13 km; JAD · Jandakot · 20 km

Hotel Tagline: The Level 3 pool deck opens directly onto the Perth CBD skyline, a rare city-centre facing position.
Summary: The open pool deck on Level 3 faces the Perth skyline directly — an unusual setup in a city where most hotel pools face inward. The Junior Suite on the upper floors brings the same panorama into the room. Northbridge’s restaurants and galleries start at the lobby door.
Description ⚙: DoubleTree by Hilton Perth Northbridge is a contemporary four-star hotel in Northbridge, Perth's cultural and dining precinct, steps from the Western Australian Museum, Art Gallery of WA, and Yagan Square. The hotel's open pool deck on Level 3 faces the Perth CBD skyline directly, an unusual configuration for a city-centre hotel. Junior Suites on the upper floors offer the same skyline panorama from the room. The 206 rooms and suites are within a 10-minute walk of Hay Street Mall, Murray Street Mall, and RAC Arena.
Address: 100 James St, Northbridge WA 6003, Australia

Hotel Tagline: Floor-to-ceiling glass frames the Swan River and the Perth Hills beyond, unobstructed.
Summary: Five kilometres east of the CBD, the Breezy rooms on the upper floors face the Swan River directly — floor-to-ceiling glass, no city obstruction, and the Perth Hills visible beyond. The rooftop ballroom holds the same angle for events; the pool and W XYZ bar sit below it.
Description ⚙: Aloft Perth is a four-star Marriott Bonvoy hotel at The Springs development in Rivervale, five kilometres east of the Perth CBD, walking distance from Crown Perth, Optus Stadium, and the Swan River. The 224 Breezy rooms on the upper floors feature floor-to-ceiling windows with direct views of the Swan River and the Perth Hills beyond, with no city obstruction. The Rooftop Ballroom holds unobstructed Swan River views. The hotel's W XYZ Bar, outdoor pool, and Springs Kitchen restaurant serve hotel guests and visitors. Aloft Perth was the first Aloft hotel in Western Australia.
Address: The Springs, 27 Rowe Ave, Rivervale WA 6103, Australia

Alt Text: Pan Pacific Perth two-room suite at dusk with Perth CBD skyline visible through living room window

Hotel Tagline: Upper-floor suites look straight out over the Swan River, the pool below sharing the same water view.
Summary: The River View suites face the Swan from the upper floors; the Pacific Club suites swap the water for the skyline. Both access the Level 7 lounge. The outdoor pool faces the river — the best public-facing view in the building for guests not staying in a suite.
Description ⚙: Pan Pacific Perth completed a multi-million-dollar renovation in May 2025, designed by FDAT Architects, updating its 488 rooms and suites, lobby, Pacific Club Lounge, and convention spaces with design inspiration drawn from Western Australia's natural landscapes and Pan Pacific's Asian heritage. The Pacific Club Rooms and Suites offer the best views in the building: River View suites face the Swan River from the upper floors, while Pacific Club suites face the Perth skyline. Both categories access the 7th-floor Pacific Club Lounge. The hotel's river-facing outdoor pool overlooks the Swan River. Pan Pacific Perth is a block from Hay Street and within walking distance of Langley Park, Queens Gardens, and the WACA.
Address: 207 Adelaide Terrace, Perth WA 6000, Australia

Alt Text: Duxton Hotel Perth room with dual windows framing Swan River and South Perth skyline

Images.alt: Duxton Hotel Perth room with dual windows framing Swan River and South Perth skyline

Hotel Tagline: The Swan River runs full width, unobstructed, from the waterfront terrace of St George's.
Summary: On the St George’s Terrace waterfront, the Duxton has been facing the Swan River since before most of Perth’s five-star corridor existed. The room to ask for is the Swan River Suite — full river width, nothing in the way. The rest of the hotel follows in the same reliable fashion.
Description ⚙: Duxton Hotel Perth is a five-star hotel on St George's Terrace at the Perth CBD waterfront, with direct Swan River views from many of its rooms and suites. The Swan River Suite is the standout accommodation, offering the full width of the river without obstruction. The hotel is adjacent to the Perth Concert Hall, Western Australia's Government House, and Langley Park. The Duxton is known for attentive staff, spacious rooms, and an established reputation in Perth's five-star corridor.
Address: 1 St Georges Terrace, Perth WA 6000, Australia
Nearest Airports: PER · Perth · 16 km; JAD · Jandakot · 20 km

Images.alt: The Surin Phuket beachfront terrace with sun loungers overlooking Surin Beach and Andaman Sea

Hotel Tagline: The Beach Cottages sit level with the shoreline, the Andaman Sea close enough to hear from inside.
Summary: Sitting directly on Surin Beach, The Surin Phuket places the Andaman a few steps from the terrace of every room. The Beach Cottages are the clearest read — private deck, sea-level view, the water close enough to hear from inside. One of the few Phuket resorts where the beach isn’t a walk.
Description ⚙: The Surin Phuket occupies a prime beachfront position directly on Surin Beach, one of Phuket's most picturesque stretches of coast on the island's northwestern shore. The resort's low-rise cottages and suites are built steps from the sand, giving every room category an unobstructed sightline to the Andaman Sea. The Beach Cottages sit closest to the water, with private terraces level with the shoreline. Upper-tier categories include Pool Suites and the Terrace Suite, which adds a private plunge pool facing the sea. Surin Beach itself is one of the calmer bays on the west coast with good snorkeling conditions off the rocks at its southern end. The resort's beachfront Catch restaurant serves Thai and seafood dishes at the water's edge; the main infinity pool echoes the sea horizon.
Address: 118 Soi Hat Surin 8, Tambon Choeng Thale, Amphoe Thalang, Chang Wat Phuket 83110, Thailand
Nearest Airports: HKT · Phuket · 22 km

Alt Text: Trisara Villas Phuket aerial view of jungle villa with rooftop pool above turquoise Andaman coastline

Images.alt: Trisara Villas Phuket aerial view of jungle villa with rooftop pool above turquoise Andaman coastline

Hotel Tagline: From a hillside above the bay, the Andaman fills the frame of every private pool.
Summary: Above a quiet bay in north Phuket, Trisara’s villas are built into a hillside with no neighbour in the sightline — just the Andaman from an elevated private pool. We’d book the Ocean Pool Villa for the angle: the sea fills the frame at every hour.
Description ⚙: Trisara Villas & Residences occupies a private hillside directly above Nai Thon Beach on Phuket's quieter northern coast, 20 minutes from the airport. The property has 39 pool villas and 5 residences arranged on terraces descending toward the beach, each designed so that the private pool faces the Andaman Sea without interruption. The Ocean Pool Villa is the entry category — a split-level space with a private deck and infinity-edge pool at treetop height above the bay. Jampa, the resort's main restaurant, is a terrace dining venue above the beach serving refined Thai and international cuisine. A beach club with sun loungers and sea-level pool access operates below the main estate. Trisara has been recognised by Travel + Leisure World's Best Awards and holds four stars from Forbes Travel Guide.
Address: 60 Cherngtalay 1 Srisoonthorn Road Tambon Choeng Thale, Amphoe Thalang, Chang Wat Phuket 83110, Thailand
Nearest Airports: HKT · Phuket · 12 km

Alt Text: Six Senses Yao Noi hilltop infinity pool with sun loungers and panoramic view of Phang Nga Bay karst islands

Images.alt: Six Senses Yao Noi hilltop infinity pool with sun loungers and panoramic view of Phang Nga Bay karst islands

Hotel Tagline: Limestone karsts of Phang Nga Bay rise from a hilltop infinity pool on Ko Yao Noi.
Summary: An hour by boat from Phuket, Six Senses Yao Noi frames the Andaman between limestone karsts from a hilltop infinity pool. Private villas have their own pools. The Hilltop restaurant and living room terrace deliver the most complete karst panorama on the island.
Description ⚙: Six Senses Yao Noi is an island resort on Ko Yao Noi, accessible by a one-hour boat ride from Phuket. The resort offers sweeping views over the Andaman Sea and enveloping jungle, with a hilltop infinity pool framing limestone karst formations of Phang Nga Bay. Private villas have their own pools, and the Hilltop restaurant provides the most complete karst panorama on the island. Amenities include private butler services, iconic floating breakfasts, an opulent spa, a fully equipped gym, and bonfires and movie screenings on the resort's private beach. Activities include Thai cooking classes and kayaking.
Address: 56, Tambon Ko Yao Noi, Amphoe Ko Yao, Chang Wat Phang-nga 82160, Thailand
Nearest Airports: HKT · Phuket · ~34 km

Alt Text: Paresa Resort Phuket hillside infinity pool at sunset with private dining table and Andaman Sea panoramic view

Images.alt: Paresa Resort Phuket hillside infinity pool at sunset with private dining table and Andaman Sea panoramic view

Hotel Tagline: Thirty-six private pools cantilevered over jungle, each aimed at the same unbroken Andaman horizon.
Summary: One hundred metres above Kamala Bay, Paresa’s 36 villas each have a private pool on a stepped hillside with an unobstructed Andaman horizon. Worth staying for the Sky Bar at sunset — the angle from here is the widest view available at any Phuket hotel.
Description ⚙: Paresa Resort Phuket is built into a steep hillside approximately 100 metres above sea level on the cape separating Kamala Bay from the next headland north. The resort's 36 pool villas are arranged on terraced levels, each constructed so that the private infinity pool cantilevers over the jungle slope with a direct, unobstructed sightline to the Andaman Sea below. The Ocean Grand Pool Villas occupy the highest elevations with a 180-degree panoramic angle from northwest to southwest, taking in the entire bay and the open ocean to the horizon. The Sky Bar at the resort's peak is the most elevated cocktail vantage point at any Phuket hotel. Infinity Restaurant serves Thai and international cuisine with the same sea view. A hillside infinity pool at the main terrace level is the social centrepoint; a beach shuttle runs to Kamala Beach below.
Address: 49, Tambon Kamala, Amphoe Kathu, Chang Wat Phuket 83150, Thailand
Nearest Airports: HKT · Phuket · 31 km

Alt Text: Anantara Layan Phuket Resort private beach dinner setup at sunset with canopy table torch lights and sea island view

Images.alt: Anantara Layan Phuket Resort private beach dinner setup at sunset with canopy table torch lights and sea island view

Hotel Tagline: Pool terraces open over the bay, ocean and mountain ridge caught in one westward sightline.
Summary: At the quiet northern end of Layan Beach, Anantara’s pool terraces open over the bay and the hills beyond. The west-facing rooms frame ocean and mountain ridge in one sightline — the better angle at late afternoon. Water sports depart from the beach below.
Description ⚙: Anantara Layan Phuket Resort is a beachfront five-star resort on the quiet northern end of Layan Beach, offering candle-lit beach dinners, couples spa treatments, and a stunning outdoor pool area with views over the ocean and surrounding mountains. Activities include windsurfing, canoeing, and snorkeling. The in-house restaurant serves traditional Thai cuisine. The resort's pool terraces open over the bay and the hills beyond, with west-facing rooms framing the ocean and mountain ridge in one sightline, particularly vivid at late afternoon. Shuttle services connect guests to Phuket Town and Patong Beach.
Address: 168 หมู่ที่ 6 หาด Soi Layan 4, Tambon Choeng Thale, Amphoe Thalang, Chang Wat Phuket 83110, Thailand
Nearest Airports: HKT · Phuket · 15 km

Hotel: The Naka Island, a Luxury Collection Resort & Spa, Phuket
Alt Text: The Naka Island Luxury Collection Phuket villa pool terrace with sun loungers and Andaman Sea karst islands view

Images.alt: The Naka Island Luxury Collection Phuket villa pool terrace with sun loungers and Andaman Sea karst islands view

Hotel Tagline: Limestone formations rise from Phang Nga Bay on every side, the Andaman framing the rest.
Summary: A 10-minute boat ride from the Phuket mainland, The Naka Island puts a Luxury Collection resort on its own island with the Andaman on every side. We’d request a Beach Pool Villa — level with the water, private terrace, no other hotel in the frame.
Description ⚙: The Naka Island, a Luxury Collection Resort & Spa, Phuket occupies its own private island — Naka Yai — approximately 10 minutes by speedboat from Ao Po Grand Marina on Phuket's northeast coast. The island setting means the Andaman Sea surrounds the property on all sides, with views shifting from the Phang Nga Bay limestone formations to the north to open ocean to the south and west. The resort has 67 villas and residences, all with private pools. Beach Pool Villas are positioned at sea level with direct beach access, while Hillside Pool Villas gain elevation and a panoramic angle over the bay. Camelia, the main restaurant, serves Thai and international cuisine on a beachside terrace. An overwater pavilion extends into the lagoon for private dining.
Address: 32 Moo 5 Tambol Paklok, Amphur Thalang, Naka Yai Island, Tambon Pa Klok, Phuket, Chang Wat Phuket 83110, Thailand
Nearest Airports: HKT · Phuket · ~17 km

Alt Text: The Shore At Katathani Phuket infinity pool edge at Kata Noi Beach with turquoise Andaman Sea and offshore island

Images.alt: The Shore At Katathani Phuket infinity pool edge at Kata Noi Beach with turquoise Andaman Sea and offshore island

Hotel Tagline: Private pool terraces perched above Kata Noi Beach, sightline open to the Andaman at sunset.
Summary: Adult-only and set above Kata Noi Beach, The Shore at Katathani has private pools on each villa terrace with a direct sightline to the Andaman. Sunset from the infinity pool is a reliable event — the bay curves west and the light hits it cleanly.
Description ⚙: The Shore at Katathani is an adult-only beachfront resort set above Kata Noi Beach, offering private pools on each villa terrace with a direct sightline to the Andaman Sea. The resort features private pools, picture-perfect sunset views over the ocean, private sun-decks, international gastronomy, and an in-house spa. Guests can take yoga and aqua aerobics classes, use the resort's infinity pool, and access the golden sands of the neighboring Kata Noi Beach. The bay curves west and the light hits it cleanly at sunset — the villa pool is the primary viewing position.
Address: 18 Kata Noi Rd, Tambon Karon, Maung, Chang Wat Phuket 83100, Thailand
Nearest Airports: HKT · Phuket · 46 km

Alt Text: COMO Point Yamu Phuket villa interior with floor-to-ceiling glass doors opening to infinity pool and Andaman Sea island view

Images.alt: COMO Point Yamu Phuket villa interior with floor-to-ceiling glass doors opening to infinity pool and Andaman Sea island view

Hotel Tagline: Karst formations and island silhouettes fill the frame from private terraces above the jungle canopy.
Summary: At the summit of Cape Yamu on the east coast, COMO Point Yamu looks over Phang Nga Bay rather than the Andaman proper — karst formations, Rang Yai and Coconut islands in the frame from private terraces above the jungle canopy. A quieter side of Phuket with one of its most distinctive sea views.
Description ⚙: COMO Point Yamu is a five-star seafront resort on the summit of Cape Yamu on Phuket's east coast, offering soaring views over the Andaman Sea, Phang Nga Bay, and nearby Rang Yai and Coconut islands. The resort is enveloped in a lush tropical jungle, making it ideal for hiking. Amenities include a lavish infinity pool, a spa and wellness center, private terraces, yoga classes, steam rooms, and a fully equipped fitness center. The in-house restaurants La Sirena and Naamyha offer selections of Thai, Italian, and healthy cuisines. The east-coast position provides a sheltered panorama with karst formations in the frame.
Address: 225 Tambon Pa Klok, Amphoe Thalang, Chang Wat Phuket 83110, Thailand
Nearest Airports: HKT · Phuket · 26 km

Hotel: Phuket Marriott Resort & Spa, Merlin Beach
Alt Text: Phuket Marriott Resort Spa Merlin Beach aerial view with private beach turquoise bay and jungle hillside backdrop

Images.alt: Phuket Marriott Resort Spa Merlin Beach aerial view with private beach turquoise bay and jungle hillside backdrop

Hotel Tagline: Between Tri Trang and Merlin Beach, the Andaman Sea fills every private balcony directly.
Summary: Between Tri-Trang and Merlin Beach, the Phuket Marriott occupies a stretch of shore removed from the Patong crowds. Private balconies face the Andaman directly, and eight dining options mean the sea is the default view from most of the table.
Description ⚙: The Phuket Marriott Resort & Spa, Merlin Beach occupies a beachfront position on the peaceful shores of Tri Trang and Merlin Beach, a short drive from Patong. The resort offers panoramic views over the Andaman Sea and enveloping mountains from multiple vantage points, including private balconies in each room. Amenities include several swimming pools, a kid's club, a luxurious spa, exclusive beach access, eight dining options, and water sports. Daily shuttle services connect guests to inner Patong and the Jungceylon Shopping Mall.
Address: 99 Muen-Ngoen Road, Tambon Patong, Phuket, Chang Wat Phuket 83150, Thailand
Nearest Airports: HKT · Phuket · 38 km

Alt Text: The Nai Harn Phuket Rock Salt beach bar at dusk with Nai Harn Bay and wooded island in background

Images.alt: The Nai Harn Phuket Rock Salt beach bar at dusk with Nai Harn Bay and wooded island in background

Hotel Tagline: Private balconies look out over Nai Harn Beach, the Andaman Sea, and Ko Man island beyond.
Summary: On one of Phuket’s quieter southern bays, The Nai Harn places private balconies above Nai Harn Beach at every room category. The rooftop pool and The Cosmo restaurant both face west — the island of Ko Man visible across the water on a clear day.
Description ⚙: The Nai Harn is a beachfront five-star hotel offering staggering vistas over the Andaman Sea, Nai Harn Beach, and the surrounding tropical hills and nearby Ko Man island. Private balconies connected to each suite are the primary viewing position. The hotel features a refreshing outdoor pool, a luxurious on-site spa, and beachside butler services. The rooftop pool and The Cosmo restaurant both face west — Ko Man island visible across the water on a clear day. Rock Salt, the beachside bar and restaurant, sits directly on Nai Harn Bay.
Address: 23/3 Moo1, Vises Road, Rawai, Muang District, ตำบล ราไวย์ Muang, ภูเก็ต 83100, Thailand
Nearest Airports: HKT · Phuket · 47 km

Alt Text: Diamond Cliff Resort Spa Phuket room with raised corner jacuzzi and balcony overlooking Andaman Sea and offshore island

Images.alt: Diamond Cliff Resort Spa Phuket room with raised corner jacuzzi and balcony overlooking Andaman Sea and offshore island

Hotel Tagline: From a hillside above Patong, every balcony frames the Andaman, Patong Bay, and Kalim Beach at once.
Summary: Set on a 20-acre hill above Patong, Diamond Cliff trades proximity to the beach for elevation — and the trade is worth it. Every room balcony faces the Andaman, Patong Bay, and Kalim Beach in a single frame. The sea-facing Jacuzzis are the clearest expression of that view.
Description ⚙: Diamond Cliff Resort & Spa sits on a stunning 20-acre garden above Patong with views over the Andaman Sea, Kalim Beach, and Patong Bay from every room's private balcony. Sunset views over the sea are a daily highlight. The resort offers spa and beauty treatments, a fitness center, tennis courts, diverse on-site eateries serving Thai, Japanese, and Italian cuisine, and sea-facing Jacuzzi suites at the step-up category. A daily shuttle service runs to Patong Centre, with Jungceylon Mall and Bangla Road nearby.
Address: 284 Phrabaramee Rd, Tambon Patong, Amphoe Kathu, Chang Wat Phuket 83150, Thailand
Nearest Airports: HKT · Phuket · 32 km

Alt Text: Renaissance Phuket Resort Spa beachfront villa bedroom with wood vaulted ceiling terrace and Andaman Sea view through pines

Images.alt: Renaissance Phuket Resort Spa beachfront villa bedroom with wood vaulted ceiling terrace and Andaman Sea view through pines

Hotel Tagline: Andaman Sea views open across an uncluttered lawn from the main pool.
Summary: On the long northern sweep of Mai Khao Beach, the Renaissance Phuket offers private pool villas with garden and ocean outlooks, and a main pool where the Andaman is visible across an uncluttered lawn. A quieter north-island option with a low-density feel.
Description ⚙: The Renaissance Phuket Resort & Spa is a beachfront resort on the quiet sands of Mai Khao Beach, featuring an earthy atmosphere with design blending into the tropical surroundings. The resort offers private pool villas, a selection of jogging, biking, and hiking trails, a beautiful outdoor pool with Andaman Sea views, and five dining options. The main pool faces the Andaman across an uncluttered lawn, and the resort's low-density setting on the north island provides a quieter alternative to the central resort corridors. The resort includes a luxe spa and wellness center and leisure activities including yoga, Thai boxing, and bicycle tours.
Address: 555, Tambon Mai Khao, Amphoe Thalang, Chang Wat Phuket 83110, Thailand
Nearest Airports: HKT · Phuket · 17 km

Alt Text: My Beach Resort Phuket terrace lounge at dusk with panoramic Andaman Sea and mountain silhouette through full-width glass wall

Images.alt: My Beach Resort Phuket terrace lounge at dusk with panoramic Andaman Sea and mountain silhouette through full-width glass wall

Hotel Tagline: Panwa Beach and Ko Lon's mountain silhouette frame the view west to open sea.
Summary: At Cape Panwa on Phuket’s east coast, My Beach Resort faces Panwa Beach with rooms and pool terraces that capture both the sea and the mountain silhouette behind Ko Lon island. The outdoor infinity pool faces west for the sunset — and the Michelin Guide has recognised the property consistently.
Description ⚙: My Beach Resort Phuket is a seafront five-star resort on Cape Panwa on Phuket's east coast, offering views of the Andaman Sea, Panwa Beach, and the mountain silhouette behind Ko Lon island from rooms and pool terraces. The resort features an outdoor infinity pool facing west for sunset, an award-winning Michelin Guide-recognised restaurant serving Asian, local, and Thai cuisines, private balconies in all rooms, and a fitness and wellness center. Recognised by the Michelin Guide for six consecutive years from 2019 to 2024, the property also holds Travellers' Choice Award from TripAdvisor and Gold Certification from Travelife for sustainable tourism.
Address: 105 Soi Ao-Yon Khaokhad, Tambon Wichit, Amphoe Mueang Phuket, Chang Wat Phuket 83000, Thailand
Nearest Airports: HKT · Phuket · 40 km

Images.alt: Le Meridien Phuket Beach Resort aerial view with Thai-style green roofs private Karon Noi beach and Andaman Sea

Hotel Tagline: Upper floors frame Karon Noi bay and the open Andaman beyond.
Summary: On a private bay at the southern end of Karon, Le Méridien Phuket has its own beach — Karon Noi — which most guests walk past without knowing exists. The upper-floor rooms span the bay and the Andaman, and the beach below stays quieter than its neighbours.
Description ⚙: Le Méridien Phuket Beach Resort is a secluded beachfront resort with its own private beach — Karon Noi — at the southern end of Karon. The resort offers fully equipped fitness facilities, a luxe spa, private beach access, tropical scenery, and ten unique dining options. Views span the Karon Noi coastline and the Andaman Sea from upper-floor rooms and resort spaces. Additional activities include squash and tennis, water sports, a kid's club, and tours to nearby Chalong Temple.
Address: 29 Soi Karon Nui, Tambon Karon, Amphoe Mueang Phuket, Chang Wat Phuket 83100, Thailand
Nearest Airports: HKT · Phuket · 42 km

Hotel: Mandarava Resort and Spa, Karon Beach
Alt Text: Mandarava Resort Spa Karon Beach curved freeform infinity pool surrounded by tropical palms with sea view

Images.alt: Mandarava Resort Spa Karon Beach curved freeform infinity pool surrounded by tropical palms with sea view

Hotel Tagline: Five pools step down the hillside, each one framing the Andaman Sea through tropical jungle.
Summary: On a hillside above Karon Beach, Mandarava’s 55 villas are arranged across five infinity pools at different elevations, each with a sea and jungle sightline. Chom Talay Restaurant at the summit adds the view to the meal — ocean and tropical hillside in the same frame.
Description ⚙: Mandarava Resort and Spa, Karon Beach is a 232-room luxury hillside resort above Karon Beach offering spectacular vistas over the Andaman Sea and tropical hills. The resort features five posh swimming pools across different elevations, five pool bars, a luxe wellness center, and a fitness center. Stand-alone villas provide ultimate privacy. Chom Talay Restaurant serves international and local gastronomy with ocean and tropical hillside views. Karon Beach is accessible via complimentary shuttle. The resort is situated a 10-minute drive from Patong Beach, Bangla Road, and the Jungceylon Shopping Centre.
Address: 14/2 Patak Rd, Tambon Karon, Amphoe Mueang Phuket, Chang Wat Phuket 83000, Thailand
Nearest Airports: HKT · Phuket · 45 km

Hotel: JW Marriott Phuket Resort and Spa
Alt Text: JW Marriott Phuket Resort aerial view of tropical garden pools with red umbrellas and Mai Khao beachfront

Images.alt: JW Marriott Phuket Resort aerial view of tropical garden pools with red umbrellas and Mai Khao beachfront

Hotel Tagline: Suite terraces look out over gardens, pools, and the Andaman Sea at Phuket's quiet northern tip.
Summary: Adjacent to Mai Khao Beach on Phuket’s quiet northern tip, the JW Marriott has eleven dining options and three pools — enough infrastructure to stay the week. Suite terraces face the ocean; the adults-only pool is the better vantage at low tide.
Description ⚙: JW Marriott Phuket Resort and Spa is a beachfront luxury resort adjacent to the glimmering sands of Mai Khao Beach, offering a tranquil sanctuary with suite balconies and terraces overlooking lush gardens, pools, and the Andaman Sea. The resort features eleven diverse dining options, three outdoor swimming pools including an adults-only pool, and recreational activities including yoga, Muay Thai, cooking classes, a fitness center, wellness center, and a games room. Daily shuttle services transport guests to Patong Beach and Phuket Town. The Splash Jungle Waterpark and Phuket Elephant Sanctuary are within driving distance.
Address: 231, Tambon Mai Khao, Amphoe Thalang, Chang Wat Phuket 83110, Thailand
Nearest Airports: HKT · Phuket · 15 km

Alt Text: Inn at the Cove Pismo Beach clifftop balcony rooms overlooking the Pacific Ocean

Images.alt: Inn at the Cove Pismo Beach clifftop balcony rooms overlooking the Pacific Ocean

Hotel Tagline: Clifftop above Shelter Cove, with the Pacific open in front and dolphins below.
Summary: Clifftop position above Shelter Cove, 52 rooms most with private balconies and uninterrupted Pacific views — dolphins included on a good morning. Direct beach access runs past the Dinosaur Caves below. The oceanfront pool faces the water, and a complimentary breakfast arrives with the same view every day.
Description ⚙: Inn at the Cove is a 3-star oceanfront hotel in Pismo Beach, California, set atop a cliff above Shelter Cove with direct access to a private beach via a path through the Dinosaur Caves area. The property offers 52 guest rooms, most with private balconies or patios overlooking the Pacific Ocean — dolphins are frequently spotted from the water-facing units. The hotel features a panoramic heated outdoor pool and hot tub facing the ocean, outdoor yoga sessions, free continental breakfast, complimentary Wi-Fi, and free self-parking. The clifftop position provides uninterrupted Pacific views from most rooms and common areas. Ranked #1 of 30 hotels in Pismo Beach on Tripadvisor, with a Booking.com score of 9.1.
Address: 2651 Price St, Pismo Beach, CA 93449, USA
Nearest Airports: SBP · San Luis Obispo · 17 km; SMX · Santa Maria · 45 km

Alt Text: SeaVenture Beach Hotel Pismo Beach oceanfront balcony with Pacific view at sunset

Images.alt: SeaVenture Beach Hotel Pismo Beach oceanfront balcony with Pacific view at sunset

Hotel Tagline: Sand underfoot, pier and 180 degrees of Pacific framed above from the top floor.
Summary: The only hotel in Pismo Beach planted directly on the sand — no cliff path, no steps to navigate. Rooms have private balconies, fireplaces, and in-room hot tubs. We’d time a dinner at SeaVenture Restaurant for sunset: panoramic windows on the top floor, 180 degrees of Pacific and pier in a single frame.
Description ⚙: SeaVenture Beach Hotel is the only full-service hotel in Pismo Beach planted directly on the sand, located south of the iconic Pismo Beach Pier with no cliff path or steps separating guests from the beach. Most guest rooms feature private balconies, in-room fireplaces, and private two-person hot tubs with ocean views. SeaVenture Restaurant on the top floor offers 180-degree panoramic views of the beach, ocean, and pier through large picture windows and outdoor decks; the restaurant serves California coastal cuisine and is a long-standing local dining destination. Booking.com score above 9.0.
Address: 100 Ocean View Ave, Pismo Beach, CA 93449, USA
Nearest Airports: SBP · San Luis Obispo · 14 km; SMX · Santa Maria · 42 km

Alt Text: Pismo Lighthouse Suites Pismo Beach facade overlooking the ocean

Images.alt: Pismo Lighthouse Suites Pismo Beach facade overlooking the ocean

Hotel Tagline: From the top floor, sunrise breaks over open Pacific and 22 miles of coastline.
Summary: Oceanfront suites with private balconies spanning the Pismo Beach Pier and 22 miles of coastline. The Play Deck offers beach games without leaving the view; hiking access to Pismo Preserve starts nearby. The room to ask for is a top-floor oceanfront suite — sunrise over open Pacific from the balcony.
Description ⚙: Pismo Lighthouse Suites is a 3-star all-suite oceanfront hotel in Pismo Beach, California, offering 70 spacious suites (860 to 1,100 sq ft) with private balconies or patios. The Oceanfront Suites deliver sweeping views spanning the Pismo Beach Pier and 22 miles of coastline stretching toward Shell Beach. The property features the Play Deck — an outdoor family amenity space with mini-golf, table tennis, badminton, and a pirate ship play structure — alongside a heated pool and hot tub with ocean views. Complimentary continental breakfast and direct beach access via stairs are included. Booking.com score above 9.0.
Address: 2411 Price St, Pismo Beach, CA 93449, USA
Nearest Airports: SBP · San Luis Obispo · 17 km; SMX · Santa Maria · 43 km

Alt Text: SeaCrest Oceanfront Hotel Pismo Beach room

Images.alt: SeaCrest Oceanfront Hotel Pismo Beach room

Hotel Tagline: White deck chairs and a firepit, the Pacific horizon uninterrupted before you.
Summary: Sister property of Inn at the Cove, 158 rooms and suites set directly on the beach, many with 180-degree balcony views. The outdoor SeaMist terrace — white deck chairs, a large firepit, Pacific horizon — is one of the better ways to spend a Pismo sunset without leaving the hotel grounds.
Description ⚙: SeaCrest Oceanfront Hotel is a 3-star beachfront property in Pismo Beach and a sister hotel of Inn at the Cove. The hotel offers 158 rooms and suites, many with private terraces or balconies with 180-degree views of the Pacific Ocean. Guests are surrounded by sand, sea, and palm trees with direct beach access. The outdoor SeaMist terrace features white deck chairs and a large firepit facing the Pacific — a popular spot for sunset viewing. A complimentary continental breakfast is included. Activities available nearby include horseback riding, hiking, and golfing. Walking distance to Downtown Pismo Beach shops, cafes, and restaurants. Booking.com score above 8.5.
Address: 2241 Price St, Pismo Beach, CA 93449, USA
Nearest Airports: SBP · San Luis Obispo · 17 km; SMX · Santa Maria · 43 km

Alt Text: Sandcastle Hotel on the Beach Pismo Beach The Deck ocean-view terrace at sunrise

Images.alt: Sandcastle Hotel on the Beach Pismo Beach The Deck ocean-view terrace at sunrise

Hotel Tagline: Above the breaking waves, the Pacific fills the view before the day begins.
Summary: 75 rooms and suites in Downtown Pismo Beach, many with panoramic ocean-view balconies. The Deck runs a sunrise and a sunset menu — starting the morning there, above the breaking waves with the Pacific laid out before the day begins, is the practical case for booking an ocean-facing room here.
Description ⚙: Sandcastle Hotel on the Beach is a 3-star beachfront property in Downtown Pismo Beach. The hotel offers 75 rooms and suites, many with ocean view balconies or panoramic terraces. The Deck, the hotel's outdoor dining terrace, serves a sunrise menu and a sunset menu with ocean views, making it a popular spot for early morning coffee above the breaking waves. Walking distance to nearby restaurants including The Oyster Loft and Pismo Fish & Chips. A 10-minute drive from the Oceano Dunes for dune buggy rides. Booking.com score above 8.5.
Address: 100 Stimson Ave, Pismo Beach, CA 93449, USA
Nearest Airports: SBP · San Luis Obispo · 14 km; SMX · Santa Maria · 42 km

Hotel: Vespera Resort on Pismo Beach, Autograph Collection
Alt Text: Vespera Resort on Pismo Beach Autograph Collection oceanfront room with balcony and beach view

Images.alt: Vespera Resort on Pismo Beach Autograph Collection oceanfront room with balcony and beach view

Hotel Tagline: Sand underfoot, the pier in sight, and the Pacific filling every ocean-facing window.
Summary: Beachfront Marriott Autograph Collection property with 124 rooms steps from the pier and boardwalk. The Pacific Suite has a full balcony, living room, and partial kitchen all facing the ocean. Pequín Coastal Cocina and the Star Bar & Pool hold the Pacific view from different angles of the same property.
Description ⚙: Vespera Resort on Pismo Beach, Autograph Collection is a 4-star Marriott Autograph Collection beachfront resort in Downtown Pismo Beach, California, located directly on the sand with boardwalk access and steps from the Pismo Beach Pier. The resort offers 124 rooms and suites across three floors. The Pacific 1-Bedroom Suite features a private balcony, full ocean view, separate living room with sofa bed, and partial kitchen. Péquin Coastal Cocina serves Baja-inspired cuisine with ocean views; Star Bar & Pool is the poolside cocktail bar. The resort fee includes daily wellbeing classes, beach chairs and umbrellas, boogie boards, fishing gear, and a shuttle service within Pismo city limits. Booking.com score of 8.9.
Address: 147 Stimson Ave, Pismo Beach, CA 93449, USA
Nearest Airports: SBP · San Luis Obispo · 14 km; SMX · Santa Maria · 42 km

Alt Text: Spyglass Inn Pismo Beach fire pit on a garden facing the Pacific at sunset

Images.alt: Spyglass Inn Pismo Beach fire pit on a garden facing the Pacific at sunset

Hotel Tagline: Fire pits line the cliff's edge where the balconies look straight out over the Pacific.
Summary: Clifftop position above Shell Beach, 82 rooms with ocean-view balconies pointing directly at the Pacific. Fire pits and lounge chairs line the walkway at the cliff’s edge. The Spyglass Inn Restaurant has held a view table above the surf since 1984 — the upper-floor ocean-view rooms confirm the address.
Description ⚙: Spyglass Inn is a 3-star oceanfront hotel in the Shell Beach section of Pismo Beach, positioned on a coastal bluff above the Pacific Ocean. The property offers 82 recently renovated guest rooms, many with ocean-view balconies or patios with direct views of the Pacific. Outdoor fire pits line the walkway at the cliff's edge; the hotel has a heated outdoor pool and hot tub also facing the water. Spyglass Inn Restaurant has served as a local dining destination with ocean views since 1984. Upper-floor ocean-view rooms and suites deliver the most unobstructed Pacific panoramas. Walking and biking trails along the bluff connect to Avila Beach to the north and Pismo Beach to the south.
Address: 2705 Spyglass Dr, Pismo Beach, CA 93449, USA
Nearest Airports: SBP · San Luis Obispo · 13 km; SMX · Santa Maria · 47 km

Images.alt: The Cliffs Hotel and Spa Pismo Beach blufftop pool and balcony overlooking Shell Beach at sunset

Hotel Tagline: A bluff 100 feet above Shell Beach, with the Pacific spread below every private balcony.
Summary: Set 100 feet above Shell Beach on its own bluff, 165 rooms all with a private balcony and most facing the Pacific. Marisol restaurant rings a bell at sunset daily as the Pacific drops below the horizon. The heated oceanfront pool and full-service spa share the same water view — the elevation is what distinguishes this address.
Description ⚙: The Cliffs Hotel and Spa is a 3-star independent hotel perched 100 feet above Shell Beach on its own coastal bluff in Pismo Beach, California. The property offers 165 guest rooms, all with private balconies or patios — most facing the Pacific Ocean. The heated outdoor oceanfront pool is positioned at the cliff's edge with sweeping ocean views. Marisol, the on-site restaurant, serves California-inspired market-driven cuisine with indoor and outdoor seating facing the water; the bar rings a bell daily to mark the sunset from the terrace. The Spa at The Cliffs provides full-service treatments. Direct beach access is available below the bluff. Complimentary shuttle service to San Luis Obispo Regional Airport and Amtrak station is provided on request. HotelsCombined score 9 out of 10 from 1,127 reviews.
Address: 2757 Shell Beach Rd, Pismo Beach, CA 93449, USA
Nearest Airports: SBP · San Luis Obispo · 13 km; SMX · Santa Maria · 47 km

Hotel: Inn at the Pier Pismo Beach, Curio Collection by Hilton
Alt Text: Inn at the Pier Pismo Beach Curio Collection room with two beds and ocean-view balcony

Images.alt: Inn at the Pier Pismo Beach Curio Collection room with two beds and ocean-view balcony

Hotel Tagline: Perched above Pier Plaza, with the Pismo Beach Pier and Pacific stretching below most of its 104 rooms.
Summary: Directly above Pier Plaza, with views of the Pismo Beach Pier, the beach, and the ocean from most of its 104 rooms. The Corner Ocean View Suite wraps a balcony around the exterior corners of the building. Cypress Beach House on the rooftop adds 360-degree coastline dining with the pier and Pacific below.
Description ⚙: Inn at the Pier Pismo Beach, Curio Collection by Hilton is a 4-star boutique hotel in Downtown Pismo Beach, located directly above Pier Plaza with views of the Pismo Beach Pier, the beach, and the Pacific Ocean from most of its 104 rooms. The Corner Ocean View Suite features a fully furnished balcony wrapping around the exterior of the building with panoramic Pacific views. Cypress Beach House, the rooftop restaurant and bar, offers 360-degree views of the coastline, pier, and ocean for dining and cocktails. All rooms include pillowtop Beautyrest beds by Simmons Hospitality, private balconies or patios, mini refrigerators, and free Wi-Fi. Booking.com score above 8.0.
Address: 601 Cypress St, Pismo Beach, CA 93449, USA

Hotel Tagline: Upper-floor suites face the Pacific directly, with the boardwalk below.
Summary: Fourteen suites in the heart of Downtown Pismo Beach, most with ocean views and kitchenettes. Compact and walkable — the boardwalk, Splash Café, and Old West Cinnamon Rolls are steps away. For the view, ask for an upper-floor suite facing the Pacific; several accommodate up to five guests.
Description ⚙: Beach House Inn & Suites is a 3-star boutique inn in the heart of Downtown Pismo Beach with 14 suites, most equipped with kitchenettes and ocean views of the Pacific. Several suites accommodate up to five guests, making it a practical family option. The property is within walking distance of the boardwalk, Splash Café, and Old West Cinnamon Rolls. The compact size ensures a quieter atmosphere compared to larger properties. Upper-floor suites facing the Pacific deliver the best views. Booking.com score above 8.5.
