Alt Text: Hôtel de Paris Saint-Tropez rooftop pool with parasols and bronze sculpture overlooking the bay and mountains

Images.alt: Hôtel de Paris Saint-Tropez rooftop pool with parasols and bronze sculpture overlooking the bay and mountains

Hotel Tagline: From the rooftop pool, the Mediterranean opens across the centre ville skyline.
Summary: The rooftop pool, heated year-round to 27°C, delivers the best panoramic Mediterranean views you’ll find in the centre ville. We’d book the Dolce Vita Suite: a duplex with a terrace, bay-facing jacuzzi, and private dinners above the rooftops.
Description ⚙: When speaking of luxury hotels in Saint-Tropez's centre ville, one name inevitably comes up: the almost centenarian Hôtel de Paris Saint-Tropez. Halfway between the Chanel Maison across the street and the private yachts on the nearby marina, the hotel's central location at the entrance of Saint-Tropez couldn't be more convenient. The rooftop pool, heated to a precise 27°C, unveils some of the most gorgeous Mediterranean vistas in town; no accommodation surpasses the Dolce Vita Suite, a duplex with a terrace offering sea views and a bay-facing jacuzzi.
Address: 1 Trav. de la Gendarmerie, 83990 Saint-Tropez, France
Nearest Airports: TLN · Toulon-Hyères · 51 km

Alt Text: Hotel la Ponche Saint-Tropez dining room with mural walls and French windows open to sea and mountain view at sunset

Images.alt: Hotel la Ponche Saint-Tropez dining room with mural walls and French windows open to sea and mountain view at sunset

Hotel Tagline: Terraces open directly over the bay, right where the old village meets the water.
Summary: Right on the bay in the old village, with terraces on some of the 21 rooms that open directly over the water. We’d request a sea-view room on the upper floors — Bardot, Sartre, and Picasso picked the same address, and the reason is still the same view.
Description ⚙: Directly located by the bay of Saint-Tropez, Hotel la Ponche is one of the finest hotels in the charming centre ville area, a brainchild of visionary Simone Duckstein. With as few as 21 rooms — some with terraces and a perfect sea view — this 5-star property is all about exclusivity and refinement; Brigitte Bardot, Simone de Beauvoir, Jean-Paul Sartre, and Pablo Picasso all called it home while staying in Saint-Tropez. The hotel's restaurant reflects Saint-Tropez's essence: maritime fragrance, a casual-chic atmosphere, and the freshest local ingredients.
Address: 5 Rue des Remparts, 83990 Saint-Tropez, France
Nearest Airports: TLN · Toulon-Hyères · 51 km

Alt Text: Le Yaca Saint-Tropez room with white-beamed ceiling terracotta floor and open balcony door overlooking the bay

Images.alt: Le Yaca Saint-Tropez room with white-beamed ceiling terracotta floor and open balcony door overlooking the bay

Hotel Tagline: Terracotta rooftops fall away to the marina, audible from a sea-facing balcony.
Summary: An 18th-century townhouse at the heart of old Saint-Tropez, with rooms that step onto sea-facing balconies above the terracotta rooftops. The room to ask for is any sea-view category — close enough to the marina to hear the boats, far enough for a quiet night.
Description ⚙: A luxury hotel in its purest, even rustic form: Le Yaca Saint-Tropez is a property dating back to the 18th century, conveniently located in Old Saint-Tropez at the heart of its center. Rooms with sea views offer an ideal opportunity to take in Saint-Tropez from the privacy of one's accommodation, and sea-facing balconies above the terracotta rooftops place the marina within earshot. The hotel's Le Patio restaurant specializes in Italian cuisine surrounded by a lush garden.
Address: 1 Bd d'Aumale, 83990 Saint-Tropez, France
Nearest Airports: TLN · Toulon-Hyères · 51 km

Alt Text: Hotel Byblos Saint-Tropez covered rooftop bar lounge at sunset with open terrace overlooking the Gulf of Saint-Tropez

Images.alt: Hotel Byblos Saint-Tropez covered rooftop bar lounge at sunset with open terrace overlooking the Gulf of Saint-Tropez

Hotel Tagline: From the rooftop bar, the Bay of Saint-Tropez turns gold at the hour the light drops.
Summary: Saint-Tropez’s most iconic address, steps from Place des Lices, with a new rooftop bar — the clearest panorama over the Bay of Saint-Tropez in the village. Worth staying for the pool scene alone, with the rooftop reserved for the hour the bay turns gold.
Description ⚙: Founded in 1967, Hotel Byblos Saint-Tropez is one of the most storied addresses on the French Riviera, reopening for the 2026 season with a refreshed set of suites overseen by architect Laura Gonzalez and designer Wanda Jelmini. The hotel's pool is a sun-drenched social institution in the heart of the village, while the new rooftop bar delivers sweeping panoramas over the Bay of Saint-Tropez — the clearest bay view available from within the village centre. Steps from Place des Lices and the port, the Byblos Spa by Sisley and a refined Italian restaurant complete the offer.
Address: 20 Av. Paul Signac, 83990 Saint-Tropez, France
Nearest Airports: TLN · Toulon-Hyères · 51 km

Alt Text: Althoff Villa Belrose Saint-Tropez panoramic view at dusk of the Gulf of Saint-Tropez with marina lights and sailboats

Images.alt: Althoff Villa Belrose Saint-Tropez panoramic view at dusk of the Gulf of Saint-Tropez with marina lights and sailboats

Hotel Tagline: From a private hill in Gassin, the bay and the Alps share the same sightline.
Summary: On a private hill in Gassin, five minutes from town, with uninterrupted Gulf views from every terrace and the panoramic Le Belrose restaurant. We’d request the new Suite Belrose — the only room in Saint-Tropez with a sightline that runs from the bay all the way to the Alps.
Description ⚙: Commanding a private hill in Gassin, the Althoff Villa Belrose completed a three-year renovation programme with the 2025 season reopening, unveiling the Suite Belrose — a new Signature Suite with panoramic views stretching from the Gulf of Saint-Tropez to the Alps — alongside 18 refurbished double rooms and a new fitness center. Every room terrace and the relaunched Le Belrose restaurant, under Chef Jimmy Coutel, share uninterrupted views of the bay and the Massif des Maures. The hotel is five minutes from the village by shuttle and operates seasonally from late April to early October.
Address: La Grande Bastide, Bd des Crêtes, 83580 Gassin, France
Nearest Airports: TLN · Toulon-Hyères · 49 km

Hotel: Airelles Saint-Tropez, Château de la Messardière
Alt Text: Airelles Château de la Messardière Saint-Tropez aerial view at golden hour with castle towers pool and Mediterranean sea

Images.alt: Airelles Château de la Messardière Saint-Tropez aerial view at golden hour with castle towers pool and Mediterranean sea

Hotel Tagline: Castle-height views over the Mediterranean, Ramatuelle vineyards, and the Provence mountains beyond.
Summary: A 19th-century castle above Pampelonne Bay, with sea, vineyard, and mountain views from its 86 rooms and suites. Ask for a sea-view suite on the upper floors — Jardin Tropézina beach below, Le Voltaire dinner terrace at dusk, Rolls-Royce Cullinan to the sand.
Description ⚙: A secluded 19th-century castle above the Pampelonne coast, Airelles Saint-Tropez, Château de la Messardière offers views over the Mediterranean sea, Saint-Tropez, Ramatuelle vineyards, and the surrounding Provence mountains from its 86 rooms and suites. Guests access the private beach Jardin Tropézina on Pampelonne via Rolls-Royce Cullinan or Mini-Moke, with the Valmont Spa and a multi-restaurant programme — including Le Voltaire for intimate Parisian-style dinners and Matsuhisa for Japanese-Peruvian fusion — rounding out the estate. A complimentary shuttle links the property to Saint-Tropez centre.
Address: 2 Rte de Tahiti, 83990 Saint-Tropez, France
Nearest Airports: TLN · Toulon-Hyères · 54 km

Alt Text: Kube Saint-Tropez private terrace with wooden sun loungers and hanging chair amid Mediterranean garden trees

Images.alt: Kube Saint-Tropez private terrace with wooden sun loungers and hanging chair amid Mediterranean garden trees

Hotel Tagline: Gulf-of-Saint-Tropez panoramas stretch from the infinity pool's edge to the open horizon.
Summary: A contemporary resort on the Route du Littoral with a sea-facing infinity pool and Gulf-of-Saint-Tropez panoramas from most rooms. The rooftop terrace at Moloko — Japanese cuisine, open sky, bay view — is the evening draw for guests and non-guests alike.
Description ⚙: A contemporary five-star resort on the Route du Littoral, Kube Saint-Tropez benefits from a privileged position on Bouillabaisse beach with omnipresent sea views and an extra-large sea-facing swimming pool. The property has 70 rooms and suites across minimalist villas set within a two-hectare Mediterranean park, with panoramic Gulf views and the restaurant Moloko — Japanese and Asian cuisine served on a rooftop terrace — as the evening draw. A 300 sqm spa and three pools, two of them heated, complete the resort offer.
Address: 319 RD 98A, 83580 Gassin, France
Nearest Airports: TLN · Toulon-Hyères · 50 km

Alt Text: Hôtel Les Bouis Ramatuelle room interior with wicker pendant lamp and balcony overlooking pine tree garden

Images.alt: Hôtel Les Bouis Ramatuelle room interior with wicker pendant lamp and balcony overlooking pine tree garden

Hotel Tagline: From a hilltop above Ramatuelle, every terrace looks out over Pampelonne beach to Cap Camarat.
Summary: Planted on a hilltop above Ramatuelle, with sweeping views from Pampelonne beach all the way to Cap Camarat — every room has a terrace. We’d request a first-floor room: the elevation opens the arc from the Pampelonne sand to the forest ridge and the sea beyond.
Description ⚙: Planted on a hilltop above Ramatuelle, this lovely family-owned boutique hotel offers sweeping views of Pampelonne beach all the way to Cap Camarat, the surrounding forest, mountains, and as far as the eye can see. All rooms feature a terrace and come with sea views; the first-floor rooms offer the widest arc from the Pampelonne sand to the forest ridge and the sea beyond. The large pool is where a generous breakfast is served each morning, and the property is less than 10 minutes from Saint-Tropez by car.
Address: 188 Chem. des Bouis, 83350 Ramatuelle, France
Nearest Airports: TLN · Toulon-Hyères · 56 km

Alt Text: Hotel Lou Pinet Saint-Tropez outdoor pool terrace with umbrella pines and view of the Gulf of Saint-Tropez with sailboats

Images.alt: Hotel Lou Pinet Saint-Tropez outdoor pool terrace with umbrella pines and view of the Gulf of Saint-Tropez with sailboats

Hotel Tagline: Garden greenery and pool light filter through from every angle.
Summary: A family-owned retreat outside the village buzz, with garden and pool views and one of the best restaurant addresses in Saint-Tropez — Beefbar, the Monte Carlo original. Worth staying for the spa alone, carved into the hillside like a private cave.
Description ⚙: The story of Hotel Lou Pinet and the Pariente family is the story of a love affair with Saint-Tropez: acquired in 2017, the property has since been transformed into one of the finest boutique addresses in the region, with 34 rooms and suites featuring views of the surrounding gardens and pool. The on-site restaurant Beefbar, a legendary place for meat lovers that originated in Monte Carlo, is recognized as one of Saint-Tropez's finest tables, and the hotel's spa — carved into the hillside in the likeness of a private cave — is a destination in its own right.
Address: 70 Chem. du Pinet, 83990 Saint-Tropez, France
Nearest Airports: TLN · Toulon-Hyères · 53 km

Alt Text: Hotel Sacher Salzburg terrace with rattan chairs overlooking Salzburg Cathedral domes, church spires, and Fortress Hohensalzburg under a clear blue sky

Images.alt: Hotel Sacher Salzburg terrace with rattan chairs overlooking Salzburg Cathedral domes, church spires, and Fortress Hohensalzburg under a clear blue sky

Hotel Tagline: Across the Salzach, the Fortress Hohensalzburg crowns the Old Town with cathedral domes rising beneath it.
Summary: The Sacher Sky Suite looks across the Salzach at the Fortress Hohensalzburg, with the cathedral domes rising behind it. River-facing rooms with balconies catch the same alignment. We’d request the highest floor with an Old Town orientation and keep the curtains open.
Description ⚙: Hotel Sacher Salzburg is a privately owned grand hotel dating back to 1866, situated on the north bank of the Salzach River in the heart of Mozart's city. The hotel looks directly across the river at Salzburg's Old Town (Altstadt), a UNESCO World Heritage Site, with the Fortress Hohensalzburg rising above the cathedral domes. The exclusive Sacher Sky Suite offers a waking view that includes the fortress and the Cathedral from a river-facing terrace. Rooms and suites with Old Town-facing balconies deliver the same sightline at lower categories. The hotel's spa operates inside a dedicated Health Club with a Nordic steam bath, sauna, and Life Fitness fitness center. Dining venues include the historic Zirbelzimmer (Gault Millau–awarded fine dining, preserved since 1866), the Sacher Grill (contemporary Austrian cuisine, Falstaff-awarded Wiener Schnitzel), and Café Sacher Salzburg (home of the Original Sacher-Torte).
Address: Schwarzstraße 5/7, 5020 Salzburg, Austria
Nearest Airports: SZG · Salzburg · 5 km

Alt Text: Hotel Schloss Mönchstein Salzburg curved outdoor infinity pool on a hilltop terrace with sunloungers, manicured gardens, and the city spread below the Alps

Images.alt: Hotel Schloss Mönchstein Salzburg curved outdoor infinity pool on a hilltop terrace with sunloungers, manicured gardens, and the city spread below the Alps

Hotel Tagline: From the Tower Room, Salzburg lies below and the Alps hold the horizon.
Summary: From the Tower Room on the sixth floor, the city lies at your feet — Mirabell Palace across the river, the Alps on the horizon. The infinity pool extends the same view horizontally. The highest vantage on Mönchstein Hill, earned without leaving the grounds.
Description ⚙: Hotel Schloss Mönchstein is a 13th-century castle set on the forested hill of Mönchstein above Salzburg's Old Town, operated as a five-star boutique hotel with commanding panoramic views over the city, Mirabell Palace, the surrounding gardens, and the Alps on the horizon. The Tower Room on the sixth floor offers the highest vantage point on the hill, giving the sensation of having Salzburg at one's feet. The Apollo Suite is the largest accommodation and features a Calacatta marble bathroom with a scenic freestanding bathtub. The hotel dedicates 300 sqm to the Mönchstein Spa with a full menu of massages, sauna, and gym facilities. A seasonal outdoor infinity pool overlooks the city. The Glass Garden restaurant, holding a Michelin star (2025) and four Gault Millau toques, serves under a distinctive glass dome with panoramic views of the Old Town. Access to the city centre is via a private lift through the Mönchsberg.
Address: Mönchsberg Park 26, 5020 Salzburg, Austria
Nearest Airports: SZG · Salzburg · 4 km

Alt Text: Hotel Bristol Salzburg balcony with red geranium flower boxes and open French doors framing Salzburg Cathedral towers and Fortress Hohensalzburg above the rooftops

Images.alt: Hotel Bristol Salzburg balcony with red geranium flower boxes and open French doors framing Salzburg Cathedral towers and Fortress Hohensalzburg above the rooftops

Hotel Tagline: From the Deluxe Suite terrace, Fortress Hohensalzburg fills the frame at close range.
Summary: The Deluxe Suite terrace frames the Fortress Hohensalzburg at close range. Select rooms look across to Salzburg Cathedral. Four Hübner generations have run this property — the views from the private balconies and the Polo Lounge remain its most consistent credential.
Description ⚙: Hotel Bristol Salzburg is a family-run five-star hotel in the heart of Salzburg's Old Town, managed by the Hübner family for four generations since 1903. Located on Makartplatz between Mirabell Palace and the Festival Houses, the hotel offers views over Salzburg Cathedral from various vantage points and select private balconies. The Deluxe Suite is the hotel's crown jewel, featuring a private terrace with direct views of the Fortress Hohensalzburg and Salzburg Cathedral domes. The historic building showcases an antiqued style with original artworks, paintings, and collectibles throughout. The Polo Lounge restaurant serves Austrian and international specialities for lunch and dinner. The Sketch Bar & Lounge provides cocktails and wines by the fire. Valet parking and concierge service are available.
Address: Makartplatz 4, 5020 Salzburg, Austria
Nearest Airports: SZG · Salzburg · 5 km

Alt Text: Sheraton Grand Salzburg twin-bed guest room with window view of Fortress Hohensalzburg rising above the city's green treetops

Images.alt: Sheraton Grand Salzburg twin-bed guest room with window view of Fortress Hohensalzburg rising above the city's green treetops

Hotel Tagline: From the seventh floor, Hohensalzburg Fortress rises directly ahead with Mirabell Gardens below.
Summary: The Sky Suites on the seventh floor (ETAGE7) face the Fortress Hohensalzburg directly, with Mirabell Gardens laid out below. The ETAGE7 Rooftop Lounge extends the same view into the evening. Worth requesting a garden-side suite and staying for the light change.
Description ⚙: Sheraton Grand Salzburg is a five-star hotel located directly opposite Mirabell Palace and its formal gardens in Salzburg's Neustadt district. The hotel's 70 rooms and suites include the seventh-floor Sky Suites (ETAGE7), which feature private balconies with direct views of the Fortress Hohensalzburg and the beautifully maintained Mirabell Gardens. Guests in ETAGE7 Sky Suites enjoy privileged access to the ETAGE7 Rooftop Lounge, which offers captivating city panoramas. The hotel's Restaurant Mirabell serves Austrian gastronomy overlooking the park gardens. The Piano Bar provides live music and cocktails. The fitness centre offers a sauna, steam bath, and massages on request. The hotel holds Green Key certification for sustainability practices and is within walking distance of the Old Town, Mozart's Birthplace, and Festspielhaus.
Address: Auerspergstraße 4, 5020 Salzburg, Austria
Nearest Airports: SZG · Salzburg · 5 km

Alt Text: Hotel Schloss Leopoldskron Salzburg Meierhof building entrance with the Leopoldskroner Weiher lake and snow-capped Alps visible through bare winter trees

Images.alt: Hotel Schloss Leopoldskron Salzburg Meierhof building entrance with the Leopoldskroner Weiher lake and snow-capped Alps visible through bare winter trees

Hotel Tagline: Across the Leopoldskroner Weiher, the Fortress Hohensalzburg sits on its ridge above the Alps.
Summary: The panoramic balcony and the lake-facing rooms look across the Leopoldskroner Weiher toward the Austrian Alps, with the Fortress Hohensalzburg visible on the ridge. The rococo palace dates from 1736 and served as a filming location for The Sound of Music. Worth a stay for the morning view alone.
Description ⚙: Hotel Schloss Leopoldskron is a rococo palace built in 1736, set on the shore of the Leopoldskroner Weiher lake on the southern outskirts of Salzburg. Previously owned by theatre director Max Reinhardt, co-founder of the Salzburg Festival, the palace reopened as a hotel in February 2014 and is a member of Historic Hotels of Europe. The hotel is also celebrated as a filming location for The Sound of Music (1965). Rooms and suites in the historic palace building and in the adjacent Meierhof building offer views over the formal gardens, the lake, and the Austrian Alps, with the Fortress Hohensalzburg visible on the ridge above the city. The hotel's panoramic balcony and lake-facing rooms provide morning views across the water toward the mountain scenery. A substantial breakfast is served in the palace dining hall. The hotel also serves as a venue for the Salzburg Global Seminar.
Address: Leopoldskronstraße 56/58, 5020 Salzburg, Austria
Nearest Airports: SZG · Salzburg · 4 km

Alt Text: IMLAUER HOTEL PITTER Salzburg rooftop restaurant at dusk with couple holding wine glasses at a glass railing, Fortress Hohensalzburg illuminated on the hillside behind

Images.alt: IMLAUER HOTEL PITTER Salzburg rooftop restaurant at dusk with couple holding wine glasses at a glass railing, Fortress Hohensalzburg illuminated on the hillside behind

Hotel Tagline: Fortress Hohensalzburg and the Cathedral share the same frame from the sixth floor.
Summary: The IMLAUER Sky Bar & Restaurant delivers the full Old Town skyline from six floors — Fortress Hohensalzburg and the Cathedral in the same frame. The Tower Suite on the fifth floor carries a quieter version of the same view from a private setting. The room to ask for.
Description ⚙: IMLAUER HOTEL PITTER Salzburg is a family-owned four-star hotel in Salzburg's city centre, close to the Mirabell Palace, Mozart Residence, and Salzburg Congress Convention Center. The hotel's principal view asset is the IMLAUER Sky Bar & Restaurant on the sixth floor, which delivers a full Old Town skyline panorama including the Fortress Hohensalzburg and Salzburg Cathedral. The Sky Bar is open for breakfast, lunch, and dinner, with the evening atmosphere particularly celebrated for romantic city views as the Old Town lights up at dusk. The Tower Suite on the fifth floor reproduces the same fortress-and-cathedral sightline from a private residential setting. The hotel features an on-site centenary beer cellar serving handcrafted beers and includes the Pitter Event Center. The property is adjacent to the Paracelsus Bad wellness and sauna facility.
Address: Rainerstraße 6, 5020 Salzburg, Austria
Nearest Airports: SZG · Salzburg · 5 km

Alt Text: Hotel Stein Salzburg rooftop terrace with glass railing and outdoor seating overlooking the Salzach River, Salzburg Cathedral domes, and Fortress Hohensalzburg on the hillside

Images.alt: Hotel Stein Salzburg rooftop terrace with glass railing and outdoor seating overlooking the Salzach River, Salzburg Cathedral domes, and Fortress Hohensalzburg on the hillside

Hotel Tagline: From the seventh-floor Steinterrasse, Fortress Hohensalzburg and the snow-capped Untersberg share the same frame.
Summary: The Steinterrasse opens year-round on the rooftop — Fortress Hohensalzburg, Salzburg Cathedral, St. Peter’s Abbey, and the snow-capped Untersberg visible simultaneously. The Honeymoon Suite below has the same Old Town orientation. We’d book a table at sunrise before the crowds arrive.
Description ⚙: Hotel Stein is a four-star adults-only boutique hotel on the north bank of the Salzach River in Salzburg's Old Town, with 56 rooms and suites. The hotel's flagship asset is the Steinterrasse, a rooftop bar and restaurant open year-round on the seventh floor, offering a panoramic view of Fortress Hohensalzburg, Salzburg Cathedral, St. Peter's Abbey, the Kollegienkirche, the Salzach River, and the Untersberg massif — all in the same frame. In winter, the snow-capped Untersberg provides a dramatic backdrop behind the fortress. The Honeymoon Suite on the second floor features Barovier & Toso artworks and captivating Old Town views from its windows. The hotel is steps from Linzer Gasse, a lively street of boutiques and cafés, and within easy walking distance of the Mozart Residence and Mirabell Palace. A spa area with sauna and gym is available on site.
Address: Giselakai 3, 5020 Salzburg, Austria
Nearest Airports: SZG · Salzburg · 5 km

Alt Text: COOL MAMA Salzburg freestanding white bathtub in a corner suite with floor-to-ceiling windows and snow-capped Alps in the background

Images.alt: COOL MAMA Salzburg freestanding white bathtub in a corner suite with floor-to-ceiling windows and snow-capped Alps in the background

Hotel Tagline: From the top floor, Hohensalzburg Fortress and the Alps share the same south-facing window.
Summary: The SKY RESTAURANT on the top floor frames the Fortress Hohensalzburg against the Alps through south-facing floor-to-ceiling glass. For the same angle in private, ask for a Superior Corner room on the 12th floor. The furthest hotel from the Old Town on this list — the view is the argument.
Description ⚙: COOL MAMA Salzburg is a contemporary four-star hotel housed in a 15-floor glass tower on the northern edge of Salzburg, offering 360-degree panoramic city and mountain views from its upper floors. The hotel's SKY RESTAURANT on the top floor features south-facing floor-to-ceiling windows framing a wide landscape that combines the Salzburg cityscape — including Fortress Hohensalzburg in the Old Town — with the Alps beyond. The restaurant attracts both hotel guests and local clientele. Superior Corner rooms on the 12th floor deliver a comparable angle from a private setting. The hotel's Technogym-equipped fitness centre is complimentary for all guests. A short stroll from the hotel, the Salzburgarena hosts concerts and cultural events. The city centre and Salzburg's Old Town are approximately 10 minutes by car or 25 minutes by public transport.
Address: Josef-Brandstätter-Straße 1, 5020 Salzburg, Austria
Nearest Airports: SZG · Salzburg · 8 km

Alt Text: arte Hotel Salzburg hu:goes14 rooftop bar interior with floor-to-ceiling windows framing snow-capped Alps and city rooftops at dusk

Images.alt: arte Hotel Salzburg hu:goes14 rooftop bar interior with floor-to-ceiling windows framing snow-capped Alps and city rooftops at dusk

Hotel Tagline: From the 14th floor, the Old Town, Fortress Hohensalzburg, and the Alps unfold below.
Summary: The rooftop bar hu:goes14 on the 14th floor sweeps across the Old Town to the Fortress Hohensalzburg and the Alps. The ‘Under the Sky’ rooms from the 9th to the 12th floor share the same orientation by day. Tallest hotel in the city — the elevation is deliberate.
Description ⚙: arte Hotel Salzburg, which opened in 2019, is the tallest hotel in Salzburg at approximately 60 meters, with 120 designer rooms and studios. The hotel's rooftop bar hu:goes14 occupies the 14th floor and offers sweeping city views spanning the Old Town, Fortress Hohensalzburg, and the Alps — the bar name is a tribute to Hugo von Hofmannsthal, co-founder of the Salzburg Festival, and the floor number. During the warmer months, an exclusively rentable roof terrace on the same level extends the panorama outdoors. The 'Under the Sky' room and studio category, occupying floors 9 to 12, provides elevated views of the city and the mountain range. The SkyBREAKFAST is served in the gallery on the 15th floor. The hotel is directly adjacent to Salzburg Hauptbahnhof train station, providing direct rail links to Munich, Linz, and Vienna. The property is within a 10-minute walk of Mirabell Palace.
Address: Rainerstraße 28, 5020 Salzburg, Austria
Nearest Airports: SZG · Salzburg · 4 km

Alt Text: Tower 23 Hotel Pacific Beach couple on balcony in hotel robes overlooking Crystal Pier and Pacific Ocean

Images.alt: Tower 23 Hotel Pacific Beach couple on balcony in hotel robes overlooking Crystal Pier and Pacific Ocean

Hotel Tagline: Crystal Pier frames the horizon from every balcony on the Pacific Beach boardwalk.
Summary: Standing directly on Pacific Beach with the Pacific off every balcony, Tower 23 puts Crystal Pier in the foreground at golden hour. JRDN, the hotel’s oceanfront restaurant, holds the same view at table level. Surf Pad and Sanctuary rooms face the water squarely — reserve early.
Description ⚙: Tower 23 Hotel is one of the best oceanfront hotels in San Diego, positioned directly on the Pacific Beach boardwalk with the ocean at arm's reach from every balcony. The modern building keeps its design minimal to favor what counts: the Pacific in full frame. Crystal Pier stands directly in front of the hotel and frames the most vivid sunsets. JRDN, the hotel's oceanfront restaurant, holds the same view at table level with contemporary surf-and-turf cuisine. Surf Pad, Sanctuary, and Sweet are the rooms to request — all with private patios or balconies facing the water.
Address: 723 Felspar St, San Diego, CA 92109, USA
Nearest Airports: SAN · San Diego International · 13 km; CLD · McClellan-Palomar · 47 km; TIJ · Tijuana · 52 km

Alt Text: Pacific Terrace Hotel San Diego outdoor pool at sunset with Crystal Pier extending into the Pacific Ocean

Images.alt: Pacific Terrace Hotel San Diego outdoor pool at sunset with Crystal Pier extending into the Pacific Ocean

Hotel Tagline: Nothing between the window and the Pacific — just open ocean from here to the horizon.
Summary: Pacific Terrace runs along Pacific Beach Park with direct beach access and rooms that face the full ocean breadth — no landscaping between the window and the water. Upper floors hold the clearest read; the Grand Pacific Suite takes the corner and the horizon with it.
Description ⚙: Pacific Terrace Hotel runs along Pacific Beach Park with direct beach access and ocean-facing rooms that offer an unobstructed Pacific view — no landscaping between the window and the water. The hotel is positioned close to Tourmaline Surfing Park Beach and Mission Beach. Ocean-view rooms on the upper floors hold the widest panorama; the Grand Pacific Suite takes the corner view. The property includes a heated outdoor pool, beach chair and towel service, and bicycle rentals.
Address: 610 Diamond St, San Diego, CA 92109, USA
Nearest Airports: SAN · San Diego International · 13 km; CLD · McClellan-Palomar · 47 km; TIJ · Tijuana · 52 km

Alt Text: Pantai Inn La Jolla balcony with wicker seating overlooking Scripps Park lawn and Pacific Ocean coastline

Images.alt: Pantai Inn La Jolla balcony with wicker seating overlooking Scripps Park lawn and Pacific Ocean coastline

Hotel Tagline: From the second-floor balcony, the Pacific and Children's Pool Beach fill the view below.
Summary: At La Jolla’s coast boulevard, above the cove where sea lions haul out on the rocks below, Pantai Inn keeps the Pacific front and center — Balinese-inspired rooms, nearly all ocean-facing, with second-floor balconies angled directly toward the water and Children’s Pool Beach in the near field.
Description ⚙: The oceanfront Pantai Inn is positioned on Coast Boulevard in La Jolla, a 5-minute walk from La Jolla Cove Beach where seals and sea lions gather on the rocks below. Nearly every room faces the Pacific Ocean, and second-floor rooms include balconies with direct views over the water and Children's Pool Beach. The boutique hotel is decorated with Balinese-inspired furnishings. Breakfast is included in the rate, and complimentary afternoon cookies are served daily. A rooftop terrace provides additional ocean vantage points.
Address: 1003 Coast Blvd, La Jolla, CA 92037, USA
Nearest Airports: SAN · San Diego International · 18 km; CLD · McClellan-Palomar · 42 km; TIJ · Tijuana · 57 km

Alt Text: Grande Colonial La Jolla hotel room with Pacific Ocean view through two windows and classic blue and gold decor

Images.alt: Grande Colonial La Jolla hotel room with Pacific Ocean view through two windows and classic blue and gold decor

Hotel Tagline: Pacific Ocean views appear from almost every windowed surface of this 1913 village hotel.
Summary: Open since 1913, the Grande Colonial is the oldest hotel in La Jolla Village — and still the one where the Pacific appears in almost every windowed surface. NINE-TEN Restaurant holds a Michelin distinction and an ocean-view terrace that makes dinner the right way to use an evening here.
Description ⚙: Born in 1913, the Grande Colonial La Jolla is the oldest hotel in La Jolla Village and the only AAA Four Diamond property in the area. The white, wood-framed building retains its original elegance while offering modern amenities, and Pacific Ocean views appear from almost every windowed surface. NINE-TEN Restaurant holds a Michelin distinction and an ocean-view terrace. The hotel is one block from the coast, within walking distance of Shell Beach, South Casa Beach, and Children's Pool Beach. Complimentary valet parking and complimentary in-room snacks and beverages are included in every stay.
Address: 910 Prospect St, La Jolla, CA 92037, USA
Nearest Airports: SAN · San Diego International · 18 km; CLD · McClellan-Palomar · 42 km; TIJ · Tijuana · 57 km

Alt Text: Cormorant Boutique Hotel La Jolla Birdseye rooftop terrace at sunset with dining tables and Pacific Ocean view

Images.alt: Cormorant Boutique Hotel La Jolla Birdseye rooftop terrace at sunset with dining tables and Pacific Ocean view

Hotel Tagline: From the rooftop, La Jolla Cove sits directly below and the Pacific opens to the horizon.
Summary: Twenty-six rooms above Prospect Street, with La Jolla Cove directly below and the open Pacific beyond: the Birdseye rooftop restaurant puts both in the same frame at elevation. Upper-floor rooms carry the same view into the bedroom. One of La Jolla’s most focused ocean-view addresses.
Description ⚙: The Cormorant Boutique Hotel sits on Prospect Street in La Jolla with La Jolla Cove directly below and the open Pacific beyond. The property offers 26 rooms and suites, most with Pacific Ocean views. The Birdseye rooftop restaurant and bar is the hotel's primary view asset: from that elevation, the Pacific spreads from the rocks below the cove to the open ocean horizon, and sunset visibility is clear on most evenings. Upper-floor rooms bring a version of the same view directly to the bedroom. La Jolla Village, Children's Pool Beach, and the Museum of Contemporary Art San Diego are all within walking distance.
Address: 1110 Prospect St, La Jolla, CA 92037, USA
Nearest Airports: SAN · San Diego International · 18 km; CLD · McClellan-Palomar · 42 km; TIJ · Tijuana · 57 km

Alt Text: La Valencia Hotel La Jolla ocean-view terrace with white pergola columns and Pacific Ocean through palm trees

Images.alt: La Valencia Hotel La Jolla ocean-view terrace with white pergola columns and Pacific Ocean through palm trees

Hotel Tagline: Upper-floor terraces look directly over La Jolla Cove to the open Pacific.
Summary: La Jolla’s Pink Lady since 1926 — a Mediterranean landmark on Prospect Street where upper-floor rooms and terraces look directly over La Jolla Cove to the open Pacific. The Whaling Bar, reborn in 2024 with chef Brian Redzikowski’s menu, gives the same ocean view a reason to linger after dark.
Description ⚙: La Valencia Hotel has anchored La Jolla's Prospect Street since 1926 under the local name The Pink Lady, its Mediterranean pink facade and arched terraces visible from the cove below. Upper-floor rooms and the main terrace look directly over La Jolla Cove to the open Pacific. The Whaling Bar, an institution first opened in 1949 and revived in 2024 with a new menu by executive chef Brian Redzikowski, anchors the hotel's evening offering. Cocktails include the Pink Royale, and dinner spans duck meatballs, Maine scallops, and prime New York striploin. La Jolla Village is immediately accessible on foot from the front door.
Address: 1132 Prospect St, La Jolla, CA 92037, USA
Nearest Airports: SAN · San Diego International · 18 km; CLD · McClellan-Palomar · 41 km; TIJ · Tijuana · 56 km

Images.alt: Loews Coronado Bay Resort Coronado suite with arched windows and direct San Diego Bay view

Hotel Tagline: Water on every side: the Coronado Bridge, city skyline, and bay.
Summary: On a 15-acre private peninsula with water on every side — San Diego Bay to the north, marina canals threading through, the Pacific visible from south-facing rooms — the Loews frames the Coronado Bridge and city skyline. Three pools and gondola rides through the Coronado Cays extend the experience.
Description ⚙: The Loews Coronado Bay Resort sits on a private 15-acre peninsula off the island of Coronado, with San Diego Bay to the north, marina canals threading through the grounds, and the Pacific Ocean visible from south-facing rooms. The property features three outdoor pools, a full-service marina, and gondola rides through the Coronado Cays waterways. Expansive vistas from the rooms include the Coronado Bridge, the San Diego skyline, and the bay. Silver Strand State Beach is a 10-minute drive. The Sea Spa spans 10,000 square feet with garden and hot tub access.
Address: 4000 Coronado Bay Rd, Coronado, CA 92118, USA

Images.alt: Manchester Grand Hyatt San Diego hotel room with panoramic San Diego Bay and Coronado Island view

Hotel Tagline: Forty floors above the Embarcadero, the Coronado Bridge arcs south-east across the bay toward the Pacific.
Summary: Forty floors above the Embarcadero: San Diego Bay to the west, the Coronado Bridge arcing south-east, Coronado Island beyond it, and the Pacific at the far edge of the frame. Top of Hyatt suspends the view at the summit; Sally’s waterfront restaurant brings the bay back to table level.
Description ⚙: The Manchester Grand Hyatt San Diego rises 40 floors above the Embarcadero, with San Diego Bay to the west, the Coronado Bridge arcing south-east, Coronado Island in the mid-distance, and the Pacific at the far edge of the frame. The Top of Hyatt Lounge and Bar occupies the upper floors and delivers the widest bay panorama in the building. Sally's, the hotel's waterfront restaurant recently redesigned with a Baja Med-inspired menu, occupies an expanded outdoor terrace directly over the water. The hotel is positioned next to Seaport Village, with the Gaslamp Quarter 15 minutes on foot and the light rail across the street.
Address: 1 Market Pl, San Diego, CA 92101, USA
Nearest Airports: SAN · San Diego International · 5 km; TIJ · Tijuana · 39 km; CLD · McClellan-Palomar · 56 km

Hotel: Hotel del Coronado, Curio Collection by Hilton
Alt Text: Hotel del Coronado Curio Collection by Hilton Coronado aerial view of Victorian building with red turrets and Pacific Ocean

Images.alt: Hotel del Coronado Curio Collection by Hilton Coronado aerial view of Victorian building with red turrets and Pacific Ocean

Hotel Tagline: Pacific horizon unbroken from Victorian rooms fronting Coronado Beach since 1888.
Summary: A National Historic Landmark since 1977, Hotel del Coronado has fronted Coronado Beach since 1888. Victorian rooms, restored in 2025 as the final phase of a $550 million revitalization, face the Pacific directly. Beach Village villas spread the same horizon from private terraces with full kitchens.
Description ⚙: Hotel del Coronado, Curio Collection by Hilton is a National Historic Landmark established in 1888 on Coronado Beach, designated a California Historic Landmark in 1970 and a National Historic Landmark in 1977. It is the second largest wooden structure in the United States. The hotel completed a six-year, $550 million revitalization in 2025, including the full restoration of the Victorian building and its guest rooms, the renovation of Beach Village, and the addition of Shore House. Ocean-view rooms in the Victorian building face the Pacific directly. Beach Village offers oceanfront cottages and villas with private terraces, full kitchens, and fireside verandas. Dining includes Nobu Del Coronado and Veranda, an al fresco restaurant with Pacific views.
Address: 1500 Orange Ave, Coronado, CA 92118, USA
Nearest Airports: SAN · San Diego International · 14 km; TIJ · Tijuana · 38 km; CLD · McClellan-Palomar · 63 km

Images.alt: InterContinental San Diego glass tower exterior with Embarcadero waterfront and San Diego Bay at sunset

Hotel Tagline: Coronado Island sits across the bay, visible from the rooftop bar to the yoga terrace below.
Summary: Downtown on the Embarcadero at five-star register: San Diego Bay from the upper-floor rooms, Coronado Island across the water, the Vistal rooftop bar and restaurant keeping the bay view at table level. The bay-facing wellness centre and outdoor yoga terrace put the same panorama to practical use.
Description ⚙: Downtown on the Embarcadero, the InterContinental San Diego is a five-star waterfront hotel where upper-floor rooms face San Diego Bay directly, with Coronado Island in the mid-distance and the Coronado Bridge visible to the south. Vistal, the hotel's rooftop bar and restaurant, keeps the bay panorama at table level throughout the evening. Garibaldi serves regional California cuisine at street level. The wellness centre features bay views integrated into the training floor and an outdoor yoga terrace facing the water. The hotel is 1.6 kilometres from the USS Midway Museum and four minutes from the International Cruise Ship Terminals.
Address: 901 Bayfront Ct, San Diego, CA 92101, USA

Images.alt: Coronado Island Marriott Resort Spa San Diego hotel room balcony with lounge chairs and San Diego skyline across the bay

Hotel Tagline: San Diego Bay opens before the rooms, the city skyline and Coronado Bridge directly across the water.
Summary: Sixteen waterfront acres on the Coronado peninsula: San Diego Bay from the rooms, the city skyline across the water, and the Coronado Bridge as the dominant feature of the eastern view. Three outdoor pools sit on the waterfront and let the bay view extend into the afternoon routine.
Description ⚙: Coronado Island Marriott Resort & Spa occupies 16 waterfront acres on the northern tip of the Coronado peninsula, with San Diego Bay and the city skyline directly across the water from the guest rooms. The Coronado Bridge arcs into view as the dominant eastern landmark. Three outdoor pools sit on the waterfront, and the resort grounds include a spa, bicycle rentals, and waterfront walking paths. The Balboa Park and San Diego Zoo are less than a 10-minute drive. The property offers a free shuttle to Coronado Village.

Hotel: Four Seasons Hotel San Francisco at Embarcadero
Alt Text: Four Seasons Hotel San Francisco at Embarcadero terrace at sunset with Golden Gate Bridge Alcatraz Transamerica Pyramid bay and skyline view

Images.alt: Four Seasons Hotel San Francisco at Embarcadero terrace at sunset with Golden Gate Bridge Alcatraz Transamerica Pyramid bay and skyline view

Hotel Tagline: From San Francisco's highest floors, the Golden Gate Bridge fits end to end in the same frame as Alcatraz.
Summary: San Francisco’s tallest hotel puts the Golden Gate Bridge, Bay Bridge, Alcatraz, and the Transamerica Pyramid in the same frame. The Golden Gate-View Corner Suite on the upper floors is the room to ask for — windows wide enough to hold the bridge end to end, with Alcatraz filling the eastern edge.
Description ⚙: The Four Seasons Hotel San Francisco at Embarcadero, formerly the Mandarin Oriental and Loews Regency Hotel, is San Francisco's tallest hotel at 48 floors above street level in the Financial District at 222 Sansome Street. Following an extensive renovation completed in 2022, the hotel delivers panoramic views of the Golden Gate Bridge, Bay Bridge, San Francisco Bay, Transamerica Pyramid, Coit Tower, Salesforce Tower, and Alcatraz. The Golden Gate-View Corner Suite on the upper floors frames the bridge end to end through expansive windows, with Alcatraz to the east. The Golden Gate Terrace Suite at 1,200 square feet is the hotel's flagship accommodation. The hotel is a short walk from the Moscone Center and central to the Financial District.
View Subjects: Golden Gate Bridge, San Francisco Bay, Alcatraz Island
Address: 222 Sansome St, San Francisco, CA 94104, USA
Nearest Airports: SFO · San Francisco · 23 km; OAK · Oakland · 32 km

Alt Text: Cavallo Point Sausalito Golden Gate Bridge view from guest room

Images.alt: Cavallo Point Sausalito Golden Gate Bridge view from guest room

Hotel Tagline: From the panoramic balconies, the Golden Gate Bridge fills the view from end to end.
Summary: The nearest hotel to the Golden Gate Bridge isn’t in San Francisco — it’s across the water at Fort Baker in Sausalito, where the contemporary rooms come with panoramic balconies and the bridge fills the view from end to end. Worth the short drive for a view the city hotels can’t match.
Description ⚙: Cavallo Point occupies the former military facilities at Fort Baker within the Golden Gate National Recreation Area in Sausalito, less than one mile from the north anchorage of the Golden Gate Bridge. It is the nearest hotel to the bridge. The historic rooms at a slightly lower elevation still deliver iconic views of the bridge, while the contemporary rooms — particularly the westernmost — allow guests to see the full structure from panoramic balconies. The property includes a Healing Arts Center and Spa offering holistic therapies, and on-site programming including cooking classes and scenic picnics. The adjacent Bay Area Discovery Museum is within walking distance.
Address: 601 Murray Cir, Sausalito, CA 94965, USA
Nearest Airports: SFO · San Francisco · 33 km; OAK · Oakland · 65 km

Alt Text: The St. Regis San Francisco SoMa skyline view from high-floor suite with floor-to-ceiling windows

Images.alt: The St. Regis San Francisco SoMa skyline view from high-floor suite with floor-to-ceiling windows

Hotel Tagline: From 40 floors up in SoMa, the San Francisco skyline sits at eye level.
Summary: The 40-floor tower in SoMa puts the evolving San Francisco skyline at eye level. We’d request the corner Metropolitan Suite or the Astor Suite — both include the St. Regis butler service — though the top-floor Presidential Suite, at 3,200 square feet, is the one worth clearing the calendar for.
Description ⚙: The St. Regis San Francisco is a 5-star hotel in a 40-story architectural landmark in SoMa designed by Skidmore, Owings & Merrill, opening in 2005. All 260 rooms and suites were renovated under Toronto-based Chapi Chapo Design, completed in 2020, with a subsequent lobby and bar refresh in 2022 led by London-based Blacksheep. The hotel offers commanding skyline views over San Francisco from its elevated position in the Yerba Buena cultural corridor, one block from the Moscone Center. The top-floor Presidential Suite spans 3,200 square feet with full cityscape views. The corner Metropolitan Suite and the Astor Suite — which includes the brand's Signature Butler Service — are the recommended rooms for the view. A heated infinity pool faces the San Francisco skyline. The ground floor of the building houses the Museum of the African Diaspora (MoAD), and SFMOMA is steps away.
Address: St. Regis Museum Tower, San Francisco, CA 94105, USA
Nearest Airports: SFO · San Francisco · 22 km; OAK · Oakland · 33 km

Alt Text: 1 Hotel San Francisco Embarcadero Bay Bridge view from Panoramic Waterfront suite

Images.alt: 1 Hotel San Francisco Embarcadero Bay Bridge view from Panoramic Waterfront suite

Hotel Tagline: Seven east-facing suites watch the Bay Bridge emerge from the water at sunrise.
Summary: The Bay Bridge at sunrise, framed through the Panoramic Waterfront suites of a hotel that opened on the Embarcadero in 2022 and earned a MICHELIN Key in 2025. The Terrene patio sits close enough to the water that the Ferry Building clock tower reads as a neighbour, not a landmark.
Description ⚙: 1 Hotel San Francisco opened in 2022 on the Embarcadero, steps from the Ferry Building. The hotel received a MICHELIN Key in the 2025 MICHELIN Guide. Its ethos of environmental sustainability extends from supply chain to a rooftop chef's garden and on-site beehives that supply the Terrene restaurant. The seven Panoramic Waterfront suites face east toward the Bay Bridge and offer sunrise views of the structure from the water's edge. The Terrene patio provides al fresco dining with direct views of the Bay Bridge and Ferry Building clock tower; fire pits extend its use into the cooler evenings. Executive Chef Eric Marting leads the restaurant's farm-to-table programme, sourcing ingredients within 100 miles.
Address: 8 Mission St, San Francisco, CA 94105, USA
Nearest Airports: SFO · San Francisco · 23 km; OAK · Oakland · 32 km

Alt Text: Fairmont San Francisco Nob Hill room with balcony overlooking Transamerica Pyramid and San Francisco Bay

Images.alt: Fairmont San Francisco Nob Hill room with balcony overlooking Transamerica Pyramid and San Francisco Bay

Hotel Tagline: From the 23rd floor, binoculars span the Golden Gate Bridge, Alcatraz, and the Bay Bridge unbroken.
Summary: The Fairmont survived the 1906 earthquake — just — and has been earning its position on Nob Hill ever since. In the tower building, the 23rd-floor Signature Golden Gate suite comes with binoculars and views that run from the bridge to Alcatraz and the Bay Bridge without interruption.
Description ⚙: The Fairmont San Francisco is a Beaux Arts landmark on Nob Hill, originally built in 1906 and rebuilt after the post-earthquake fire, reopening in 1907. Its 606 rooms and suites are distributed across the main building and the taller adjacent tower. In the main building, views improve significantly from the third floor upward; the sixth-floor Main Building Balcony Suite has an unobstructed view of the Transamerica Pyramid. The tower building delivers the strongest panoramas: the 23rd-floor Signature Golden Gate suite is equipped with binoculars and faces the Golden Gate Bridge, Bay Bridge, San Francisco Bay, Transamerica Pyramid, Coit Tower, Salesforce Tower, and Alcatraz. The hotel is associated with Tony Bennett, who is said to have performed 'I Left My Heart in San Francisco' for the first time in its ballroom.
View Subjects: Golden Gate Bridge, San Francisco Bay, Alcatraz Island
Address: 950 Mason St, San Francisco, CA 94108, USA
Nearest Airports: SFO · San Francisco · 23 km; OAK · Oakland · 33 km

Images.alt: Argonaut Hotel San Francisco Fisherman's Wharf Golden Gate Bridge and bay view from waterfront suite

Hotel Tagline: From the bay side, the Golden Gate Bridge and Alcatraz Island fill the frame.
Summary: A low-rise boutique on the Fisherman’s Wharf waterfront that frames the Golden Gate Bridge and Alcatraz from maritime-themed rooms and suites. We’d book the Alcatraz Suite — loft-style, panoramic views of the bridge, the bay, and the island across the water, in a building from 1907.
Description ⚙: The Argonaut Hotel is a boutique bayfront hotel in Fisherman's Wharf, housed in the historic 1907 Haslett Warehouse. It is an eco-certified Green Business. Maritime-themed rooms and suites on the bay side frame the Golden Gate Bridge, Alcatraz, San Francisco Bay, and Aquatic Park Cove. The Argonaut One-Bedroom Suite and Bay View King guestrooms face the Golden Gate Bridge and Alcatraz. The recently added Alcatraz Suite offers loft-style accommodation with panoramic views of the Golden Gate Bridge, San Francisco Bay, and Alcatraz Island. Southeast-facing rooms offer views of the Transamerica Pyramid along Columbus Avenue. The Blue Mermaid restaurant is the hotel's on-site dining venue. The hotel is steps from the Powell & Hyde Cable Car Turntable.
View Subjects: Golden Gate Bridge, Alcatraz Island, San Francisco Bay
Address: 495 Jefferson St, San Francisco, CA 94109, USA
Nearest Airports: SFO · San Francisco · 26 km; OAK · Oakland · 35 km

Hotel: InterContinental Mark Hopkins San Francisco, an IHG Hotel
Alt Text: InterContinental Mark Hopkins San Francisco Top of the Mark 19th floor panoramic lounge with city views

Images.alt: InterContinental Mark Hopkins San Francisco Top of the Mark 19th floor panoramic lounge with city views

Hotel Tagline: Golden Gate, Alcatraz, and the bay — framed from the 19th floor since 1939.
Summary: Top of the Mark has been framing San Francisco since 1939 — the 19th-floor sky lounge that turned panoramic views into a city institution. Golden Gate, Alcatraz, the bay: all visible from a room that shows its age, and remains, for that very reason, one of the addresses the city keeps coming back to.
Description ⚙: The InterContinental Mark Hopkins San Francisco, an IHG Hotel, is a historic luxury property at the crest of Nob Hill, opened in December 1926 on the site of the former Victorian mansion of railway magnate Mark Hopkins. The hotel has 383 rooms including 33 suites, and sits at the crossing of three cable car lines. Its defining feature is Top of the Mark, the 19th-floor sky lounge opened in 1939 — San Francisco's original penthouse cocktail lounge, known as the city's favourite penthouse cocktail lounge for over 80 years. The lounge delivers 360-degree panoramic views including partial views of the Golden Gate Bridge to the west, Alcatraz and San Francisco Bay to the north, the Marin Headlands, and the full city skyline. Top of the Mark was rated No. 1 Best Hotel Bar in California and San Francisco by USA Today's 10 Best, and No. 2 in the nation. The hotel's 100 Martinis menu and Saturday evening live entertainment are longstanding traditions. Guest rooms on upper floors offer skyline and bay views. The Nob Hill Club provides on-site dining. In December 2026, the property will mark its centennial year. The hotel has been voted among the Best 5 Hotels in San Francisco by Travel + Leisure.
View Subjects: Golden Gate Bridge, Alcatraz Island, San Francisco Bay
Address: 999 California St, San Francisco, CA 94108, USA
Nearest Airports: SFO · San Francisco · 23 km; OAK · Oakland · 33 km

Alt Text: LUMA Hotel San Francisco Mission Bay guest room with San Francisco skyline view

Images.alt: LUMA Hotel San Francisco Mission Bay guest room with San Francisco skyline view

Hotel Tagline: Fire pits on the 17th floor, Oracle Park below, Bay Bridge straight ahead.
Summary: Mission Bay’s first hotel opened in December 2022 with floor-to-ceiling bay and skyline views across most of its 299 rooms. The Cavaña rooftop on the 17th floor — fire pits, Bay Bridge, Oracle Park below — makes the case for the neighbourhood most San Francisco hotels still haven’t discovered.
Description ⚙: LUMA Hotel San Francisco is the first hotel built in Mission Bay, opening in December 2022. Designed by Cole Martinez Curtis & Associates with an exterior by Hornberger + Worstell, the 17-floor property earned LEED Silver certification. Its 299 rooms feature floor-to-ceiling windows with motorized shades, with Premier rooms offering panoramic views of either the San Francisco skyline or San Francisco Bay. A 16th-floor penthouse suite includes a soaking tub and wet bar. The 17th-floor Cavaña rooftop bar and lounge has a wraparound patio with fire pit seating and confirmed views of the Bay Bridge, the city skyline, and Oracle Park directly below. The hotel is adjacent to Chase Center (Golden State Warriors) and Oracle Park (San Francisco Giants), with access to the Central Subway. Public spaces feature commissioned art installations by San Francisco artists Jim Campbell and Adia Millett. AperiBar operates at lobby level.
View Subjects: San Francisco Skyline, San Francisco Bay
Address: 100 Channel St, San Francisco, CA 94158, USA
Nearest Airports: SFO · San Francisco · 22 km; OAK · Oakland · 33 km

Hotel: The Clift Royal Sonesta San Francisco
Alt Text: The Clift Royal Sonesta San Francisco guest room with San Francisco skyline view

Images.alt: The Clift Royal Sonesta San Francisco guest room with San Francisco skyline view

Hotel Tagline: San Francisco's skyline, Salesforce Tower included, fills the city-view rooms and suites.
Summary: The Clift completed a full renovation in 2020 and brings San Francisco skyline vistas — Salesforce Tower included — to its city-view rooms and suites. The One-Bedroom suite for the view; the restored Art Deco Redwood Room, with its 800-year-old redwood bar and handcrafted cocktails, for the evening.
Description ⚙: The Clift Royal Sonesta San Francisco is a historic hotel originally built in 1915 for the Panama-Pacific International Exposition. The hotel completed a full renovation designed by Gensler in January 2020 and fully reopened in 2021 following a pandemic closure. All 372 guestrooms and suites were updated to a neutral handcrafted aesthetic. City-view rooms and suites offer San Francisco skyline vistas including the Salesforce Tower; the One-Bedroom suite is the recommended room for the view. Dining and drinking venues include Fredericks, a breakfast and café eatery named for original owner Frederick C. Clift, and the restored Art Deco Redwood Room — a San Francisco institution with original redwood panelling and a bar manufactured from an 800-year-old redwood tree. The hotel is one block from Union Square and near the Curran Theatre.
Address: 495 Geary St, San Francisco, CA 94102, USA
Nearest Airports: SFO · San Francisco · 23 km; OAK · Oakland · 33 km

Hotel: The Fairmont Heritage Place Ghirardelli Square
Alt Text: Fairmont Heritage Place Ghirardelli Square San Francisco bay view from residence room

Images.alt: Fairmont Heritage Place Ghirardelli Square San Francisco bay view from residence room

Hotel Tagline: Alcatraz sits directly ahead, the Golden Gate Bridge sweeping left across the bay.
Summary: The former Ghirardelli chocolate factory, now a five-star all-suite hotel, faces Alcatraz directly ahead. The Signature Three-Bedroom Bay View Residence — fireplace, bay windows, the full sweep of the waterfront — is best suited to a stay of more than one night.
Description ⚙: The Fairmont Heritage Place Ghirardelli Square is a five-star all-suite hotel in a former chocolate factory founded by Domingo Ghirardelli, a landmark red-brick building in Ghirardelli Square recognisable by its historic Ghirardelli sign. The bay-front location delivers views of the Golden Gate Bridge to the left and Alcatraz Island directly ahead. The One-Bedroom Residence and the Signature Three-Bedroom Bay View Residence offer expansive vistas of San Francisco Bay with romantic fireplaces in all living rooms. The hotel is particularly suited to longer stays by the nature of its all-suite configuration. The San Francisco Maritime National Historical Park is across the street; Fisherman's Wharf is within a 15-minute walk. The Ghirardelli Chocolate Experience is part of the same complex.
View Subjects: Golden Gate Bridge, Alcatraz Island, San Francisco Bay
Address: 900 North Point St # D100, San Francisco, CA 94109, USA

Hotel: InterContinental San Francisco, an IHG Hotel
Alt Text: InterContinental San Francisco SoMa high-floor suite at night with city skyline view

Images.alt: InterContinental San Francisco SoMa high-floor suite at night with city skyline view

Hotel Tagline: Thirty-two floors above SoMa, floor-to-ceiling glass holds the San Francisco skyline.
Summary: Thirty-two floors above SoMa, most of the 550 rooms have floor-to-ceiling windows looking into San Francisco’s skyline. The high-floor Bay View and Terrace suites add the bay angle — a different read on the city than what the towers around Union Square offer from the same altitude.
Description ⚙: The InterContinental San Francisco, an IHG Hotel, rises 32 floors above SoMa at 888 Howard Street, near Moscone Center. Most of its 550 rooms and suites include floor-to-ceiling windows with city views. The high-floor Bay View and Terrace suites offer bay views alongside the skyline panorama. The hotel holds LEED Gold certification. On-site dining is available at Bistro 888, the hotel's bar and restaurant. The InterContinental is within walking distance of Union Square, SFMOMA, the Contemporary Jewish Museum, and Moscone Center.

Images.alt: San Francisco Marriott Union Square upper floor room bathroom with city views

Hotel Tagline: Thirty-nine floors above Union Square, the skyline stretches to Coit Tower.
Summary: Thirty-nine floors above Union Square, city views run from the room or from the 28th-floor M Club Lounge — a panoramic space open to all guests. We’d time a late afternoon in the Lounge before a walk to SFMOMA or the Warfield; the view at dusk earns its own visit.
Description ⚙: The San Francisco Marriott Union Square is a 39-story hotel at 480 Sutter Street, steps from Union Square. City-view rooms on upper floors deliver San Francisco skyline views including Coit Tower. The 28th-floor M Club Lounge is open to all hotel guests and offers panoramic city views. The hotel is within walking distance of SFMOMA, the Warfield theatre, and Moscone Center.

Alt Text: Silhouette of a guest on a Regent Santa Monica Beach terrace at sunset, the Santa Monica Pier Ferris wheel and roller coaster lit in the pink-orange sky behind

Images.alt: Silhouette of a guest on a Regent Santa Monica Beach terrace at sunset, the Santa Monica Pier Ferris wheel and roller coaster lit in the pink-orange sky behind

Hotel Tagline: Most rooms face the Pacific directly, with the Santa Monica Pier visible below.
Summary: Opened in October 2024, the Regent set a new floor for ocean-view hotels in Santa Monica — most of its 167 rooms face the Pacific directly, with the Pier visible below. For the full version: the two-story Oceanfront Atrium Suite, unobstructed from both floors.
Description ⚙: Regent Santa Monica Beach opened in October 2024 following a $150 million transformation of the former Loews Santa Monica Beach. The 167-room beachfront resort, steps from the Santa Monica Pier, features most rooms facing the Pacific directly. The two-story Oceanfront Atrium Suite spans 2,180 square feet across the second and third floors with unobstructed ocean and Pier views from both levels. The Santa Monica Presidential Suite extends to 3,200 square feet with panoramic ocean terraces. The Azure Pool sits on the fourth floor, elevated above the beach with thirteen fire-pit stations. Dining centers on Orla by Michael Mina and the Sweet July Café. A 10,000-square-foot Guerlain Spa and dedicated beach butler service complete the resort.
Address: 1700 Ocean Ave, Santa Monica, CA 90401, USA
Nearest Airports: SMO · Santa Monica · 7 km; LAX · Los Angeles · 19 km; HHR · Hawthorne · 24 km; VNY · Van Nuys · 30 km; BUR · Burbank · 38 km; LGB · Long Beach · 52 km

Alt Text: Shutters On The Beach guest room with mahogany four-poster bed and plantation shutters open to a balcony facing the Pacific Ocean and Santa Monica Pier

Images.alt: Shutters On The Beach guest room with mahogany four-poster bed and plantation shutters open to a balcony facing the Pacific Ocean and Santa Monica Pier

Hotel Tagline: Sand underfoot, the Pacific directly ahead from an upper-floor balcony.
Summary: The only hotel standing directly on the sand in Santa Monica — not steps from it, on it. Cape Cod design, mahogany floors, art that runs to David Hockney. Upper-floor ocean-view balcony rooms face the Pacific; the beach concierge handles everything below.
Description ⚙: Shutters On The Beach has been Santa Monica's coveted seaside retreat for over two decades. Under the same management as Casa Del Mar and exuding a distinct boutique charm with a Cape Cod-inspired design, this is the only hotel directly on the beach; it was crafted by Michael S. Smith, famed for his work with celebrities and political dignitaries. Rooms offer a private beach house vibe, with walnut furnishings, Tibetan rugs, contemporary art, and balconies. The bathrooms are equipped with luxurious hydrothermal massage tubs. Upper-floor ocean-view rooms face the Pacific directly. The hotel features an outdoor swimming pool, spa, fitness center, and a beach concierge service.
Address: 1 Pico Blvd, Santa Monica, CA 90405, USA
Nearest Airports: SMO · Santa Monica · 6 km; LAX · Los Angeles · 19 km; HHR · Hawthorne · 24 km; VNY · Van Nuys · 30 km; BUR · Burbank · 38 km; LGB · Long Beach · 52 km

Alt Text: Casa Del Mar’s poolside terrace framed by the hotel’s Italian Renaissance brick wings, palm trees, and Santa Monica Beach stretching to the Pacific

Images.alt: Casa Del Mar’s poolside terrace framed by the hotel’s Italian Renaissance brick wings, palm trees, and Santa Monica Beach stretching to the Pacific

Hotel Tagline: Panoramic ocean views stretch from Palos Verdes to Malibu on the upper floors.
Summary: Built in 1926 and listed on the National Register of Historic Places, Casa Del Mar frames panoramic ocean views from Palos Verdes to Malibu from the upper floors. The secluded pool and hot tub face the beach; waves are audible at night from most rooms.
Description ⚙: Casa Del Mar in Santa Monica is a beacon of luxury on Santa Monica Beach. Built in 1926, this Italian Renaissance-inspired building with Art Deco elements is listed on the US National Register of Historic Places. It boasts 129 rooms and 16 suites offering panoramic ocean views from Palos Verdes to Malibu. The hotel features a secluded pool and large hot tub, both with views of Santa Monica's beach. Dining options include Terrazza, a Mediterranean-California restaurant with 180-degree ocean views and live music, and the seasonal beachfront Patio del Mar.
Address: 1910 Ocean Way, Santa Monica, CA 90405, USA
Nearest Airports: SMO · Santa Monica · 6 km; LAX · Los Angeles · 19 km; HHR · Hawthorne · 24 km; VNY · Van Nuys · 30 km; BUR · Burbank · 38 km; LGB · Long Beach · 52 km

Hotel: Oceana Santa Monica, LXR Hotels & Resorts
Alt Text: Oceana Santa Monica’s outdoor terrace lounge at dusk — teak decking, blue sofas, and a glass railing open to the Pacific and palm trees at golden hour

Hotel Tagline: Palms and open ocean share the same balcony view from the Oceanfront Signature Suite.
Summary: Suite-only hotel steps from the Pacific — the Oceanfront Signature Suite places palms and open ocean on the same balcony. La Monique, the French brasserie that opened here in October 2025, has become one of Santa Monica’s most talked-about dinner destinations.
Description ⚙: Oceana Santa Monica, associated with LXR Hotels and Resorts, is a suite-only luxury retreat steps from the Pacific Ocean. The hotel features generously sized suites with ocean views, including the Oceanfront Signature Suite with balcony views of palms and open ocean. La Monique, a French brasserie designed by Martin Brudnizki Design Studio, opened at the hotel in October 2025 and features A5 wagyu, fresh seafood towers, and panoramic ocean views. The Sunset Terrace rooftop lounge offers Pacific views at golden hour. A freeform heated heart-shaped pool, poolside Veranda dining, and proximity to Palisades Park complete the property.
Address: 849 Ocean Ave, Santa Monica, CA 90403, USA
Nearest Airports: SMO · Santa Monica · 10 km; LAX · Los Angeles · 21 km; HHR · Hawthorne · 26 km; VNY · Van Nuys · 32 km; BUR · Burbank · 40 km; LGB · Long Beach · 54 km

Images.alt: Aerial view of The Georgian Hotel’s turquoise Art Deco façade and rooftop sign, with Santa Monica Pier and the Pacific Ocean extending behind

Hotel Tagline: From Ocean Avenue, select rooms look straight out at the Pier and the Pacific.
Summary: Turquoise Art Deco on Ocean Avenue since 1933, reopened in March 2023 after a full renovation by BLVD Hospitality. Select rooms and suites face the Pier and the Pacific head-on; Sirena on the terrace for all-day coastal Italian, the Georgian Room below for late-night jazz.
Description ⚙: The Georgian Hotel is a turquoise Art Deco landmark on Ocean Avenue, originally opened in 1933 and fully renovated by BLVD Hospitality in March 2023. The ten-story building features 84 rooms and suites; select rooms and suites provide Pacific Ocean and Santa Monica Pier views. The hotel houses two distinct dining venues: Sirena, a coastal Italian restaurant on the terrace level, and the Georgian Room, a subterranean Italian steakhouse with leather booths and live jazz Wednesday through Saturday.
Address: 1415 Ocean Ave, Santa Monica, CA 90401, USA
Nearest Airports: SMO · Santa Monica · 8 km; LAX · Los Angeles · 19 km; HHR · Hawthorne · 25 km; VNY · Van Nuys · 31 km; BUR · Burbank · 38 km; LGB · Long Beach · 52 km

Alt Text: Fairmont Miramar hotel room with grasscloth walls and Eames lounge chair, balcony doors open to a view of Santa Monica Beach and the Pier

Images.alt: Fairmont Miramar hotel room with grasscloth walls and Eames lounge chair, balcony doors open to a view of Santa Monica Beach and the Pier

Hotel Tagline: From the bluffs above Santa Monica Beach, the Pacific spreads from Malibu to the Pier.
Summary: On the bluffs above the beach — not on the sand, but above it, with an elevated angle on the Pacific that reaches from Malibu to the Pier. Ocean Tower balcony rooms deliver that wide-angle horizon. On the five-acre property: 32 private garden bungalows beneath the historic fig tree.
Description ⚙: The Fairmont Miramar Hotel and Bungalows has stood atop the Santa Monica bluffs since 1921. The property occupies five lush acres above Santa Monica Beach with three distinct vignettes: the mid-century Ocean Tower with Pacific-view balcony rooms, the historic Palisades Wing, and 32 private garden bungalows with French doors opening onto private patios. Ocean Tower rooms deliver elevated panoramic views spanning Malibu to the Santa Monica Pier. The historic Moreton Bay Fig Tree, planted in the 1870s, anchors the entrance. Facilities include FIG Restaurant, The Bungalow outdoor bar with Pacific views, Exhale Mind Body Spa, an outdoor pool, and complimentary house car service.
Address: 101 Wilshire Blvd, Santa Monica, CA 90401, USA
Nearest Airports: SMO · Santa Monica · 9 km; LAX · Los Angeles · 21 km; HHR · Hawthorne · 26 km; VNY · Van Nuys · 32 km; BUR · Burbank · 40 km; LGB · Long Beach · 53 km

Alt Text: Viceroy Santa Monica suite with surfboard wall art and a striped rug, glass balcony doors open to the Pacific Ocean at dusk

Images.alt: Viceroy Santa Monica suite with surfboard wall art and a striped rug, glass balcony doors open to the Pacific Ocean at dusk

Hotel Tagline: Ocean Avenue positions these rooms face-to-face with the Pacific.
Summary: A $21 million renovation completed in 2023 restored the Viceroy’s edge on Ocean Avenue. Ocean-view rooms and junior suites face the Pacific directly; two outdoor pools, Sugar Palm’s wraparound bar, and private cabanas anchor a beach hotel that earns its place on the list.
Description ⚙: The Viceroy Santa Monica underwent a $21 million renovation completed in 2023, restoring its position on Ocean Avenue. The hotel offers 169 suites including ocean-view rooms and junior suites facing the Pacific directly. Each room is adorned with original art by local artists. The property features two outdoor pools with private cabanas, a fitness center, and Sugar Palm restaurant and bar offering indoor and outdoor coastal dining. The Viceroy has received recognition in the Forbes Travel Guide Star Award Winners and Conde Nast Traveler Top Hotels in Southern California lists.
Address: 1819 Ocean Ave, Santa Monica, CA 90401, USA
Nearest Airports: SMO · Santa Monica · 7 km; LAX · Los Angeles · 19 km; HHR · Hawthorne · 24 km; VNY · Van Nuys · 30 km; BUR · Burbank · 38 km; LGB · Long Beach · 51 km

Images.alt: Huntley Santa Monica hotel room with crystal chandelier and king bed, large window framing the Pacific coastline and the mountains of the Palos Verdes peninsula

Hotel Tagline: Eighteen floors up, the Pacific stretches to the horizon in every direction.
Summary: Eighteen floors above Santa Monica, The Penthouse restaurant and lounge delivers 360-degree panoramic views over the Pacific and the Promenade — open for breakfast, lunch, and dinner. Guest rooms, designed by Thomas Schoos, look out over the ocean from the fourth floor upward.
Description ⚙: The Huntley Santa Monica Beach features 204 upscale guest rooms, 12 suites, and a Presidential suite, all designed by Thomas Schoos to provide panoramic views of the Pacific Ocean and Santa Monica. The hotel's 18th-floor Penthouse restaurant and lounge delivers 360-degree panoramic views over the Pacific Ocean and the Santa Monica Promenade, open for breakfast, lunch, dinner, and cocktails. Guest rooms look out over the ocean from the fourth floor upward. The hotel offers airport shuttle service, a fitness center, and private parking.
Address: 1111 2nd St, Santa Monica, CA 90401, USA

Images.alt: Row of Hotel Erwin balconies with yellow chairs and glass railings looking out over the Venice Beach boardwalk, palm trees, and the Pacific at sunset

Hotel Tagline: From the rooftop, the boardwalk, the Pacific, and the coastal range unfold in one sweep.
Summary: The original boutique hotel on the Venice Beach Boardwalk — 119 rooms, some with Pacific-facing balconies. On the roof: Kassi Venice Beach, opened in July 2025, a Greek-inflected bar with sweeping views of the boardwalk, the Pacific, and the coastal range on clear days.
Description ⚙: Hotel Erwin Venice Beach is the original boutique hotel on the Venice Beach Boardwalk. The property features 119 rooms, some with balconies offering Pacific Ocean views over the boardwalk. Kassi Venice Beach, a Greek-inflected rooftop bar and restaurant from the Wish You Were Here Group, opened on the hotel's roof in July 2025, offering sweeping views of Venice Beach, the Pacific, and the coastal range. Barlo Kitchen serves breakfast and light fare. The hotel is steps from the Venice Beach Boardwalk, Muscle Beach, and local attractions.
Address: 1697 Pacific Ave, Venice, CA 90291, USA
Nearest Airports: SMO · Santa Monica · 5 km; LAX · Los Angeles · 12 km; HHR · Hawthorne · 20 km; VNY · Van Nuys · 33 km; BUR · Burbank · 41 km; LGB · Long Beach · 47 km

Alt Text: Venice V Hotel room window framing the Venice Beach skate park, palm-lined boardwalk, and the Pacific Ocean beyond

Images.alt: Venice V Hotel room window framing the Venice Beach skate park, palm-lined boardwalk, and the Pacific Ocean beyond

Hotel Tagline: Seven penthouse bungalows look down over the boardwalk, the promenade, and the Pacific beyond.
Summary: Seven penthouse bungalows look out over the boardwalk and Venice Beach from a full upper-floor perspective — the Clara Bow suite delivers the best angle on the promenade. Housed in a 1915 brick building with original wooden staircases; Great White, the neighborhood café, is at the door.
Description ⚙: The Venice V Hotel stands on the Venice Beach Boardwalk in a 1915 brick building, retaining its vintage charm with original rustic elements while introducing contemporary comforts. The boutique hotel features unique rooms including seven penthouse bungalows with expansive beach and promenade views, particularly the bohemian-styled Clara Bow penthouse. Art and history are woven throughout, with tributes to local icons including facade murals of Charlie Chaplin and Clara Bow. The hotel's prime beachfront location ensures easy access to the Venice Beach scene, from surfing to street art.
Address: 5 Westminster Ave, Venice, CA 90291, USA
Nearest Airports: SMO · Santa Monica · 5 km; LAX · Los Angeles · 12 km; HHR · Hawthorne · 20 km; VNY · Van Nuys · 33 km; BUR · Burbank · 40 km; LGB · Long Beach · 47 km
