Images.alt: Perivolas Hotel Oia infinity pool with silhouetted figure facing caldera and Thirassia island

Hotel Tagline: Twenty cliff-carved houses look out over the caldera, where the infinity pool meets the Aegean without a seam.
Summary: Twenty private houses carved into the Oia cliff, each with a terrace facing the caldera. The infinity pool sits at the edge — water and Aegean merge without a seam. We’d book a cliff suite for the morning light over the volcano, and dinner at the restaurant for the Cycladic menu.
Description ⚙: The Perivolas Hotel impresses visitors with its commanding caldera views from 20 private houses carved into the Oia cliff, many with panoramic terraces and private pools. The hotel's infinity pool provides the illusion of blending in with the Aegean Sea below. Mornings begin with a breakfast of natural Greek yogurts, dried fruits, and locally sourced honey; the restaurant specializes in flavors from the Cyclades. This romantic boutique hotel is within walking distance of Oia.
Address: Oia 847 02, Greece
Nearest Airports: JTR · Santorini · 19 km

Alt Text: Grace Hotel Auberge Collection Imerovigli aerial view of cliff-side hotel with multiple pools at sunset

Images.alt: Grace Hotel Auberge Collection Imerovigli aerial view of cliff-side hotel with multiple pools at sunset

Hotel Tagline: At 363 metres above the waterline, the caldera fills every view north to Oia.
Summary: The highest caldera position in Imerovigli belongs to Grace Hotel, at 363 metres above the waterline. Its adults-only 23 rooms each face the caldera with a private plunge pool; the infinity pool's view extends north to Oia. The 363 Bar stays open until the last colour leaves the sky.
Description ⚙: The adults-only Grace Hotel, Auberge Collection, named No. 1 Resort in Europe and No. 1 Resort in Greece by Travel + Leisure World's Best Awards 2025, is a five-star 23-room property in Imerovigli. Rooms and suites feature plunge or private pools with caldera views; Varoulko Santorini restaurant is under Michelin-awarded chef Lefteris Lazarou. The 363 Bar, perched 363 metres above sea level, serves cocktails during the full sunset sequence. The hotel claims the largest infinity pool on Santorini and holds Boutique Hotel certification from the Hellenic Chamber of Hotels.
Address: Imerovigli 847 00, Greece
Nearest Airports: JTR · Santorini · 12 km

Alt Text: Canaves Oia Suites Oia bright suite interior with floor-to-ceiling windows opening to private pool and caldera

Images.alt: Canaves Oia Suites Oia bright suite interior with floor-to-ceiling windows opening to private pool and caldera

Hotel Tagline: Carved into the northwest cliffs of Oia, where the infinity pool ends and the Aegean begins.
Summary: Carved into the northwest cliffs of Oia, the infinity pool suite pushes its edge over the caldera with nothing between the water and the Aegean. Alfresco spa massages face the same view. The lift — rare at this altitude — means the caldera arrives without the climb.
Description ⚙: Canaves Oia Suites is a fabulous boutique hotel carved into the northwest cliffs of Oia with top-notch caldera vistas. All elegant suites feature private pools — the infinity pool suite delivers an infinity-edge pool and panoramic caldera views. Honeymoon suites are equipped with plunge pools and rain showers. A lift to each suite level is rare at this altitude on Santorini. The exceptional spa offers alfresco massages with caldera vistas, and the property is within walking distance of the village of Oia.
Address: Main Street, Oía 847 02, Greece
Nearest Airports: JTR · Santorini · 20 km

Alt Text: Cavo Tagoo Santorini Imerovigli infinity pool at night with moonlit caldera and volcanic island view

Images.alt: Cavo Tagoo Santorini Imerovigli infinity pool at night with moonlit caldera and volcanic island view

Hotel Tagline: Above the caldera at Imerovigli's highest ridge, the volcano sits framed by the Aegean below.
Summary: One of the most photographed pools in Santorini floats above the caldera at Imerovigli’s highest ridge. Cave suites and villa-style rooms each frame the volcano differently. Request a suite on the upper level — the caldera reads clearest at sunset from there, the Aegean going gold below.
Description ⚙: Cavo Tagoo Santorini features one of the most photographed infinity pools on the island, suspended directly above the caldera at Imerovigli's highest ridge. Cave suites and villa-style rooms frame the volcano from different angles, with contemporary design setting the property apart. Honeymoon suites and pool-equipped villas deliver the caldera view at close range. The restaurant and pool bar maintain the same panorama throughout the day and into the evening.
Address: Imerovigli 847 00, Greece
Nearest Airports: JTR · Santorini · 12 km

Alt Text: Kivotos Santorini Imerovigli suite terrace with plunge pool and Skaros Rock caldera view

Images.alt: Kivotos Santorini Imerovigli suite terrace with plunge pool and Skaros Rock caldera view

Hotel Tagline: The highest point of the caldera in Imerovigli, where the sunset arrives first.
Summary: Dark volcanic stone instead of white plaster — Kivotos occupies the most elevated point of the caldera in Imerovigli. The Signature Suite adds a heated plunge pool, premium sound and light. Every suite comes with its own indoor or outdoor pool. Worth staying for the sunset from this elevation.
Description ⚙: Kivotos Santorini, opened in 2019, occupies the most elevated point of the caldera in Imerovigli, with dark volcanic stone construction creating a clear distinction from other Santorini hotels. The property does not require guests to climb stairs to access its premises. The Signature Suite category features heated plunge pools, superior sound systems, advanced lighting, and a fully stocked bar. All suites at Kivotos Santorini include their own indoor or private outdoor pool, with butler service available via WhatsApp.
Address: Imerovigli 847 00, Greece
Nearest Airports: JTR · Santorini · 11 km

Images.alt: Katikies Santorini Oia shaded terrace with private pool and caldera cliffs view

Hotel Tagline: From a 92-metre cliff in Oia, the caldera and Aegean stretch below the infinity pool's edge.
Summary: The infinity pool hangs from a 92-metre cliff in Oia, caldera and Aegean below. Three restaurants, the Main Suite with an open-air plunge pool at the edge. Guests with spa appointments are transferred to sister Katikies Kirini and back. The view at breakfast — champagne included — is the argument.
Description ⚙: Katikies Santorini is perched on the cliffs of Oia, 300 feet above the blue waters of the Aegean, with an infinity pool at the edge of a 92-metre cliff and sweeping views of the caldera. The Main Suite features an open-air plunge pool. Three restaurants serve breakfast with champagne included, and guests with spa appointments receive complimentary transfer to sister property Katikies Kirini Santorini. Katikies Santorini is a member of The Leading Hotels of the World and holds the MICHELIN One Key distinction. Cape Columbo Beach is approximately 3km away.
Address: Nik. Nomikou, Oía 847 02, Greece
Nearest Airports: JTR · Santorini · 20 km

Alt Text: Santorini Princess Spa Hotel Imerovigli multi-level pool terrace and caldera panorama at sunset

Images.alt: Santorini Princess Spa Hotel Imerovigli multi-level pool terrace and caldera panorama at sunset

Hotel Tagline: From every suite terrace, the caldera stretches toward Oia on the right.
Summary: Imerovigli’s caldera panorama includes Oia to the right from every suite terrace. The pool is heated year-round to a precise 29°C — the season matters less. The Grand Honeymoon Villa is the reason to push the budget; a cave massage at sunset is the reason to stay in the spa.
Description ⚙: The Santorini Princess Spa Hotel in Imerovigli presents guests with spacious white-washed rooms and suites featuring private, panoramic terraces facing the caldera, with views extending to Oia. The Grand Honeymoon Villa is the property's premium accommodation. The infinity pool is heated year-round to a precise 29°C. The cave spa offers hot stone massages and treatments in a secluded volcanic cave setting. The hotel is frequently cited for its exceptional service and WhatsApp concierge response.
Address: Imerovigli 847 00, Greece
Nearest Airports: JTR · Santorini · 12 km

Alt Text: Andronis Luxury Suites Oia private terrace and plunge pool with caldera cliff view

Images.alt: Andronis Luxury Suites Oia private terrace and plunge pool with caldera cliff view

Hotel Tagline: Caldera and volcano framed from a clifftop in Oia, the Aegean below.
Summary: Clifftop suites in Oia, each private pool angled toward the caldera. Lycabettus Restaurant — recognised by National Geographic for its location — serves dinner with the volcano in the frame. Mare Sanus Spa operates from a cave in the same cliff. We’d request the upper cave suite.
Description ⚙: Andronis Luxury Suites is an exceptional five-star boutique hotel in Oia, Santorini, with 39 acclaimed suites and villas perched atop cliffs offering views of the Aegean Sea and volcanic caldera. Private infinity pools, cave pools, and heated hot tubs are featured throughout. Lycabettus Restaurant, recognised by National Geographic as among the most beautiful dining positions in the world, serves dinner with the volcano in frame. Mare Sanus Spa operates from a cave in the same cliff. The hotel has been three times awarded by Forbes Travel Guide and accommodates guests aged 13 and above.
Address: Oia 847 02, Greece
Nearest Airports: JTR · Santorini · 20 km

Images.alt: Katikies Kirini Santorini Oia cave-style suite bedroom with vaulted ceiling and pool caldera view through arch

Hotel Tagline: Caldera views open from both the indoor jacuzzi and the plunge pool outside.
Summary: The room to ask for is the Kirini Suite — indoor jacuzzi, outdoor plunge pool, caldera view from both. Therasia Restaurant pairs Michelin-starred cuisine by chef Ettore Botrini with the same panorama at dinner. The spa cave pool is the quietest place on this stretch of the Oia cliff.
Description ⚙: Katikies Kirini Santorini, a member of The Leading Hotels of the World and MICHELIN One Key holder, features 26 suites on the Oia caldera. The Kirini Suite includes an indoor jacuzzi and outdoor plunge pool, both facing the caldera. Therasia Restaurant, led by Michelin-starred chef Ettore Botrini, serves Mediterranean cuisine with a caldera view at dinner. The Katikies Lounge serves breakfast with caldera vistas. The spa cave pool and a three-day wellness programme at ZOE complete the offering. Yacht charters and transfers to the volcanic islands of Nea Kameni and Palia Kameni can be arranged.
Address: Main Street, Oía 847 02, Greece
Nearest Airports: JTR · Santorini · 19 km

Hotel: Phos The Boutique Luxury Hotel & Villas
Alt Text: Phos The Boutique Santorini rooftop terrace with plunge pool and sun lounger overlooking caldera

Images.alt: Phos The Boutique Santorini rooftop terrace with plunge pool and sun lounger overlooking caldera

Hotel Tagline: West-facing across the Aegean, the caldera unfolds from the Akrotiri cliffs in the quiet south.
Summary: South Santorini’s caldera without Oia’s crowds — Phos sits above the Akrotiri cliffs with an infinity pool and a west-facing view across the Aegean. Owner-run and small, which shows in the service. Red Beach and the Akrotiri archaeological site are minutes away.
Description ⚙: Phos The Boutique Luxury Hotel & Villas is a small, owner-run property on the Akrotiri cliffs with an infinity pool and a west-facing caldera view across the Aegean Sea. Suites feature private pools and terraces; breakfast is served poolside each morning. The hotel's secluded position in the south of the island, away from Oia's tourist concentrations, makes it one of the quietest caldera properties on Santorini. Red Beach is a short drive away, as is the Akrotiri archaeological site, one of the best-preserved Bronze Age settlements in the world.
Address: Caldera, Ακρωτήρι 847 00, Greece
Nearest Airports: JTR · Santorini · 17 km

Hotel: Mystique, a Luxury Collection Hotel, Santorini
Alt Text: Mystique Luxury Collection Hotel Santorini Oia cave pool leading to open terrace with volcanic island view

Images.alt: Mystique Luxury Collection Hotel Santorini Oia cave pool leading to open terrace with volcanic island view

Hotel Tagline: Forty-two suites face the caldera, with the volcano sitting across open water.
Summary: Forty-two suites and villas on the Oia caldera, each with sea views across to the volcano. Lure restaurant delivers dinner against the caldera; Charisma takes over for breakfast and lunch by the infinity pool. The Mystery Villa has its own infinity pool and a private fitness room.
Description ⚙: Mystique, a Luxury Collection Hotel, Santorini, was named among the World's Best Hotels in the Condé Nast Traveler Readers' Choice Awards 2025 and ranked No. 1 in Intent to Recommend among all Marriott Luxury Brand Hotels in the EMEA region. Following an extensive refurbishment for the 2024 season by Interior Design Laboratorium, the 42 suites and villas boast panoramic caldera views. The Mystery Villa features a private infinity pool and an ensuite fitness room. Lure restaurant serves dinner overlooking the caldera; Charisma restaurant covers breakfast and lunch by the infinity pool. The 150-year-old Secret Wine Cave and Elios Spa are accessible to guests aged 14 and above.
Address: Island, Οία 847 02, Greece
Nearest Airports: JTR · Santorini · 20 km

Alt Text: San Antonio an SLH Hotel Imerovigli cave suite with vaulted ceiling and Aegean view through open terrace doors

Images.alt: San Antonio an SLH Hotel Imerovigli cave suite with vaulted ceiling and Aegean view through open terrace doors

Hotel Tagline: A hundred metres above the sea, the caldera fills every unobstructed view.
Summary: Cave-carved rooms 100 metres above the caldera, and sunset dining at tables set directly on the cliff wall — some of the most memorable seats on the island. The spa operates from a volcanic cave. Forty-five minutes’ walk to Imerovigli’s centre; the views along the way compensate.
Description ⚙: San Antonio, an SLH Hotel, is a boutique property with 21 rooms and suites carved into volcanic rock 100 metres above the sea, between Oia and Imerovigli, with unobstructed caldera views. Cave rooms are luxurious and intimate; the spa operates from a volcanic cave with jacuzzi and sauna. Cliff-wall dining tables face the caldera at sunset — among the most memorable dining positions on the island. The hotel is a member of Small Luxury Hotels of the World. Fira is 5km away; the centre of Imerovigli is a 45-minute walk.
Address: Imerovigli 847 00, Greece
Nearest Airports: JTR · Santorini · 14 km

Alt Text: Astarte Suites Santorini infinity pool with champagne glasses overlooking caldera and cruise ship in bay

Images.alt: Astarte Suites Santorini infinity pool with champagne glasses overlooking caldera and cruise ship in bay

Hotel Tagline: From Akrotiri's quiet southern tip, the caldera opens wide from Fira to Oia.
Summary: Thirteen suites in Akrotiri’s southwest corner, each with a private jacuzzi or pool and a caldera view that sweeps from Fira to Oia. The Astarte Suite adds a panoramic private pool. Red Beach is a ten-minute drive; the Akrotiri ruins, less. Privacy, in exchange for the crowds of Oia.
Description ⚙: Astarte Suites is located in Santorini's southwestern region in Akrotiri, a quiet and private alternative to the Oia caldera properties. The 13 suites each have a private jacuzzi or pool and a terrace with caldera vistas; the Astarte Suite features a panoramic private pool. The caldera view sweeps from Fira to Oia, one of the broadest panoramas from the southern tip of the island. Red Beach is a ten-minute drive, the Akrotiri archaeological site is nearby, and the Akrotiri Lighthouse is five minutes away.
Address: Caldera, Ακρωτήρι 847 03, Greece
Nearest Airports: JTR · Santorini · 15 km

Alt Text: Katikies Chromata Santorini cave-style suite interior with blue-framed door and window open to caldera and volcanic island view

Images.alt: Katikies Chromata Santorini cave-style suite interior with blue-framed door and window open to caldera and volcanic island view

Hotel Tagline: From Imerovigli's highest point, every suite faces the caldera and volcano across 180 degrees.
Summary: Perched at Imerovigli's highest point, Katikies Chromata delivers 180° caldera and volcano views from every suite. Koukoumavlos restaurant — revived here in 2023 under Michelin-starred chef Ettore Botrini — is the most ambitious dining position on the Imerovigli cliff.
Description ⚙: Katikies Chromata Santorini occupies the highest point of Imerovigli with 180-degree caldera and volcano views from every suite and the shared infinity pool. The 26 rooms and suites cascade down the cliffside in contemporary monochromatic design. Koukoumavlos, one of Santorini's most acclaimed restaurants, returned in 2023 under Michelin-starred chef Ettore Botrini in collaboration with chef Nikos Pouliasis, and is located within the hotel. All-day Mediterranean dining is available at Chroma restaurant, with a sushi lounge and cave pool also on site. A member of The Leading Hotels of the World.
Address: Imerovigli 847 00, Greece
Nearest Airports: JTR · Santorini · 12 km

Alt Text: Canaves Ena Santorini infinity pool terrace with Aegean Sea view and outdoor lounge seating

Images.alt: Canaves Ena Santorini infinity pool terrace with Aegean Sea view and outdoor lounge seating

Hotel Tagline: From the highest entry point of Oia's caldera path, the Aegean opens without obstruction.
Summary: Renovated in 2024 from 17th-century wine caves, Canaves Ena's 18 suites sit at the highest entry point of Oia's caldera path. The River Pool Suite carves its pool into original cave rock; the shared infinity pool holds the caldera and Aegean without obstruction.
Description ⚙: Canaves Ena is an 18-suite boutique hotel in Oia, renovated in 2024 from 17th-century wine caves at the highest entry point of Oia's caldera path, with minimal steps to every suite. The River Pool Suite features a river pool jacuzzi carved into original cave rock. The shared infinity pool faces the caldera and Aegean without obstruction. Adami restaurant serves Greek cuisine. A member of Small Luxury Hotels of the World, the hotel is adults-only for guests aged 13 and above.
Address: Main Street, Οία 847 02, Greece
Nearest Airports: JTR · Santorini · 20 km

Alt Text: Hotel Fasano São Paulo Itaim rooftop infinity pool with sun loungers and panoramic city skyline view

Images.alt: Hotel Fasano São Paulo Itaim rooftop infinity pool with sun loungers and panoramic city skyline view

Hotel Tagline: From the rooftop pool, the Jardins canopy and São Paulo's skyline spread unbroken to the horizon.
Summary: The rooftop pool at Fasano Itaim, opened in May 2023, delivers one of the widest city panoramas in São Paulo — the Jardins canopy and the skyline spread out from the water’s edge. Ask for a high-floor suite to hold that view indoors; the Gero restaurant downstairs is reason enough to stay in.
Description ⚙: A city like São Paulo surely deserves a rooftop panoramic pool with extensive views of its ever-expanding skyline. With this and other thoughts in mind, the visionary team behind the luxury hospitality label Fasano came up in May 2023 with one of the most exciting hotel openings in the city in recent years: the exceptional Hotel Fasano São Paulo Itaim. As the name hints, this lavishly appointed property is located in one of São Paulo's most desirable areas, Itaim-Bibi, where the city strikes the right balance of fashionable shops, hip restaurants, and executives going about their lives following a loose, smart-casual dress code. The landscaped, heated rooftop pool offers the finest viewpoint of the city within the hotel, which includes the affluent Jardins area and countless high-rise buildings. Under the close watch of a team combining acclaimed architect Marcio Kogan and aflalo/gasperini studio, this five-star real estate project, the brand's second in the city, soon evolved into one of the best hotels in São Paulo.
Address: R. Pedroso Alvarenga, 706 - Itaim Bibi, São Paulo - SP, 04531-010, Brazil
Nearest Airports: CGH · Congonhas · 7 km; GRU · Guarulhos · 32 km

Alt Text: Hotel Unique São Paulo rooftop pool and lounge at night with illuminated city skyline and broadcast towers

Images.alt: Hotel Unique São Paulo rooftop pool and lounge at night with illuminated city skyline and broadcast towers

Hotel Tagline: From the 7th-floor terrace, São Paulo's skyline wraps around a red jacuzzi on three sides.
Summary: The room to ask for is the 7th-floor Oasis Suite — circular windows, private terrace, and a red jacuzzi with the skyline on three sides. The rooftop Skye bar and pool deliver the same panorama to anyone who shows up; no room key required to secure a table.
Description ⚙: Mention the words hotel, view, and rooftop to any Paulista, and chances are you'll hear an instant reply with Hotel Unique. Consistently praised as one of the best hotels in São Paulo, the hotel name perfectly matches what guests expect from their stay: unconventional architecture, an unparalleled rooftop bar and pool, and second-to-none skyline vistas. When the hotel debuted in São Paulo's luxury hospitality scene, it was received with mixed reactions — some compared it to a watermelon slice, others to an oddly shaped submarine. Despite the lack of consensus, the urban landscape of the posh Jardins area had changed forever, thanks to the late Ruy Othake, one of Brazil's most respected modernist architects, who came up with the concept of a red pool that instantly became one of the hotel's stand-out features. Of the 80 rooms and 12 suites, the 7th-floor Oasis Suite takes the prize for the best quarters in the house — sweeping city vistas through circular windows and a private terrace with a small red jacuzzi.
Address: Av. Brigadeiro Luís Antônio, 4700 - Jardim Paulista, São Paulo - SP, 01402-002, Brazil
Nearest Airports: CGH · Congonhas · 8 km; GRU · Guarulhos · 33 km

Alt Text: Grand Hyatt São Paulo suite bathroom with bathtub facing the illuminated Estaiada Bridge and city skyline at night

Images.alt: Grand Hyatt São Paulo suite bathroom with bathtub facing the illuminated Estaiada Bridge and city skyline at night

Hotel Tagline: Panoramic bathtubs face the Ponte Estaiada directly, with the Pinheiros River held in the same corner frame.
Summary: Corner suites facing the Estaiada Bridge come with panoramic bathtubs positioned directly across the river — a setup few hotels in the world match at this scale. The Diplomatic Suite, placed at the building’s corner, holds both the bridge and the Pinheiros River in the same frame.
Description ⚙: Does your idea of a luxurious hotel stay in São Paulo involve a panoramic bathtub facing the city's most iconic bridge, the Ponte Estaiada Octavio Frias de Oliveira? If so, we are glad to introduce you to the Grand Hyatt São Paulo, regarded as one of the best five-star hotels in São Paulo. Contemporary, spacious, and elegant rooms with ample windows feature modern technology and soothing beige and white tones. All suites facing the bridge are considered the hotel's most premium accommodations; among these, the Diplomatic Suite, ideally placed on the building's corner and featuring separate dining and living rooms, rewards guests with the finest cityscape views. This property faces the Pinheiros River, and the hotel collects the preferences of executive travelers attending meetings in Berrini, the neighboring WTC, or the many large corporate events on its premises. For guests wishing to balance their stay with leisure, the hotel offers an outdoor swimming pool, an excellent spa with an indoor pool, and a generous 24/7 fitness room.
Address: Av. das Nações Unidas, 13.301 - Vila Leopoldina, São Paulo - SP, 04578-000, Brazil
Nearest Airports: CGH · Congonhas · 9 km; GRU · Guarulhos · 49 km

Images.alt: W São Paulo hotel lounge with floor-to-ceiling windows overlooking the city skyline at sunset

Hotel Tagline: From the 40th-floor infinity pool, São Paulo's skyline stretches unobstructed in every direction.
Summary: Rooms at Brazil’s first W Hotel, which opened in December 2024, begin on the 25th floor of a 40-storey tower in Vila Olímpia. The WET Deck infinity pool on the 40th floor — shared with the L40 restaurant — delivers the widest unobstructed skyline in São Paulo from above water level.
Description ⚙: Brazil's first W Hotel made its São Paulo debut in December 2024, occupying the upper half of a glass tower designed by local firm aflalo/gasperini arquitetos in Vila Olímpia. The hotel's 179 rooms and 16 suites all begin from the 25th floor, ensuring uninterrupted views of São Paulo's skyline and the Pinheiros River below. Interior design by Portuguese designer Nini Andrade Silva draws on Brazilian modernist references — bold colors, rich textures, and curated local elements. The 40th floor hosts the hotel's twin centrepieces: the WET Deck, an infinity-edge outdoor pool with a 360-degree sweep of the skyline, and L40 Cozinha de Latitude, a restaurant merging Brazilian produce with the culinary traditions of regions along the same parallel. The AWAY Spa occupies the 39th floor with three treatment rooms, while the FIT gym features floor-to-ceiling windows framing the São Paulo skyline during every workout.
Address: R. Funchal, 65 - Vila Olímpia, São Paulo - SP, 04551-060, Brazil
Nearest Airports: CGH · Congonhas · 5 km; GRU · Guarulhos · 39 km

Alt Text: Tivoli Mofarrej São Paulo Seen Restaurant interior with arched windows and São Paulo skyline at dusk

Hotel Tagline: From the highest dining room in Jardins, São Paulo's skyline ignites after dark.
Summary: The 23rd-floor Seen Restaurant looks out over the São Paulo skyline from the highest dining room in Jardins; the bar extends that view well into the night. On the 21st floor, a Deluxe Room City View captures the same panorama without the suite premium — the hotel’s best trade-off.
Description ⚙: Tivoli Mofarrej São Paulo is an iconic luxury hotel that has become the preferred residence for visiting heads of state and international celebrities, including Mick Jagger and Lady Gaga, who famously used the hotel's 22nd-floor Presidential Suite — dubbed as Latin America's largest — as the backdrop for a music video. All 218 rooms and suites reflect the hotel's commitment to luxury, with generous layouts and elegant design. It only takes booking a 21st-floor Deluxe Room City View to sleep next to stunning panoramic views of São Paulo. Among the upscale highlights is Seen, a rooftop restaurant on the 23rd and top floor, offering the opportunity to sample sushi next to jaw-dropping urban vistas — visiting at night and witnessing the scintillating skyline from above is particularly rewarding. The Anantara Spa and the circular outdoor pool, unshadowed between the high-rises, provide a peaceful retreat from the city's hustle and bustle.
Address: Alameda Santos, 1437 - Cerqueira César, São Paulo - SP, 01419-001, Brazil
Nearest Airports: CGH · Congonhas · 10 km; GRU · Guarulhos · 29 km

Hotel Tagline: Four stone-framed windows on the rooftop hold the Jardins canopy and São Paulo's skyline.
Summary: Suite Deluxe floors look out across the Jardins canopy and São Paulo’s skyline through full-height windows. Lower floors aren’t overlooked: the rooftop indoor pool’s four stone-framed windows frame the same cityscape — one of the city’s original luxury landmarks, open since 2003.
Description ⚙: The Fasano Group's first hotel, Hotel Fasano São Paulo, opened in 2003 in the charming homonymous Vitório Fasano street, only steps away from the happening Oscar Freire. To this day, the five-star hotel still occupies a noteworthy position in the best São Paulo hotels list. With core values such as Italian-inspired elegance, timeless design, warm wood tones, and high hospitality standards, the hotel instantly became a reference in São Paulo's luxury hotel scene. Visionary founder Rogério Fasano — whose personal nickname gave rise to the Gero restaurant brand — brought together architects Isay Weinfeld and Marcio Kogan, whose work laid the foundation for the Fasano brand's expansion. Guests occupying the higher-floor rooms and suites — the spacious Suite Deluxe is a good example — enjoy perfect views of the Jardins neighbourhood and the cityscape. The hotel's top-floor indoor pool, sheltered by stone walls, unveils four large windows that beautifully frame the affluent Jardins neighborhood and the São Paulo skyline.
Address: R. Vitório Fasano, 88 - Cerqueira César, São Paulo - SP, 01414-020, Brazil
Nearest Airports: CGH · Congonhas · 10 km; GRU · Guarulhos · 30 km

Summary: North-facing suites in the upper floors reveal the Estaiada Bridge and the Pinheiros River in the same frame. Below, the glass-walled outdoor pool delivers an underwater city vista unlike anything else in São Paulo. The Presidential Suite commands both perspectives simultaneously.
Description ⚙: Only a couple of years after its debut, the first Four Seasons in Brazil gave way to the luxurious JW Marriott Hotel São Paulo, one of the city's tallest hotels. The five-star hotel has cemented its position as one of the finest addresses in the metropolis. The hotel's 258 rooms and suites are spread across the first 14 floors; for the most impressive views, the higher accommodations — including a stunning Presidential Suite and the Deluxe High Floor and Premium with Bathtub categories — reveal iconic panoramas of the Estaiada Bridge and the Pinheiros River from north-facing units. The hotel's outdoor pool, with a partially indoor section, causes awe with an exterior wall of reinforced glass, resulting in an unusual underwater vista. Located in Zona Sul, part of the business cluster of Avenida Nações Unidas, the hotel is primarily chosen by those on work trips to São Paulo.
Address: Torre Hotel - Av. das Nações Unidas, 14401 - Chácara Santo Antônio, São Paulo - SP, 04794-000, Brazil
Nearest Airports: CGH · Congonhas · 9 km; GRU · Guarulhos · 50 km

Summary: Worth staying for the 28th-floor pool alone: an enclosed panoramic glass structure with Estaiada Bridge views and a wide sweep of the city’s high-rise concentration. Higher rooms mirror that view from private windows; executive lounge access adds the same panorama from a quieter setting.
Description ⚙: Amidst the effervescent environment of São Paulo's financial district, the five-star Hilton São Paulo Morumbi is a welcoming retreat for business travelers who need to slow down the pace. A good example is the 28th-floor indoor rooftop pool it offers to its guests, encapsulated by a panoramic glass structure that displays sweeping views of the city's immense concentration of skyscrapers and São Paulo's most famous suspension structure, the Estaiada Bridge, which is particularly handsome at nighttime. A similar vista can be appreciated from the exceptional fitness center and some of the more than 500 comfortable rooms; higher-floor units allow access to a premium executive lounge with the same bridge and skyline panorama.
Address: Av. das Nações Unidas, 12901 - Brooklin, São Paulo - SP, 04578-000, Brazil
Nearest Airports: CGH · Congonhas · 7 km; GRU · Guarulhos · 48 km

Description ⚙: A long-time favourite by business travelers on a visit to São Paulo, the five-star Renaissance São Paulo Hotel's success is explained by the many boxes it checks. Its location next to Avenida Paulista puts guests in one of the city's most important arteries, where culture, finance, and shopping opportunities converge. The hotel was subject to a renovation in 2022, resulting in an almost brand-new lobby and restaurant. The eye-catching urban views the hotel offers from its 25 floors include sweeping panoramas from the 23rd-floor Club Lounge. For an enhanced experience, Club Rooms and suites such as the Waverley and the Mayflower are positioned on the hotel's highest floors and reward those who hold their keys with magnificent sights of São Paulo's spectacular skyline.
Address: Alameda Santos, 2233 - Jardim Paulista, São Paulo - SP, 01419-002, Brazil

Alt Text: Palácio Tangará São Paulo guest room window opening onto lush Atlantic Forest garden of Parque Burle Marx

Images.alt: Palácio Tangará São Paulo guest room window opening onto lush Atlantic Forest garden of Parque Burle Marx

Hotel Tagline: Every room looks out over 11 hectares of Atlantic rainforest in the middle of São Paulo.
Summary: Every room faces Parque Burle Marx — 11 hectares of Atlantic rainforest surrounded by one of the world’s most frenetic cities. The Grand Suite São Paulo adds a private terrace directly above the gardens. The Michelin-starred Tangará Jean-Georges keeps guests anchored at the table.
Description ⚙: When staying at the aristocratic Palácio Tangará, the postcard image of a São Paulo filled with thousands of high-rise buildings couldn't be more disconnected from the truth. This grand six-story neoclassical hotel of 141 rooms and 59 suites rivals São Paulo's best. The soothing view here is towards Parque Burle Marx, a public 11-hectare green space with an Atlantic rainforest, lush lawns, towering palm trees, and iconic landscaping — available from all accommodations. As one feels immersed in this nature-surrounded property, it is almost hard to believe that one of the world's busiest cities is only minutes away. The Palácio Tangará's top-grade amenities set it apart, including a 20-meter outdoor pool, a 25-meter heated indoor pool, a fitness center, and a Sisley spa. Exceptional food is another reason to stay at this exclusive address, with the Michelin-starred Tangará Jean-Georges restaurant having been recognised with multiple awards.
Address: R. Dep. Laércio Corte, 1501 - Panamby, São Paulo - SP, 05706-290, Brazil
Nearest Airports: CGH · Congonhas · 13 km; GRU · Guarulhos · 55 km

Summary: The infinity pool sits on the bank of Oak Creek with Snoopy Rock filling the horizon — that view is the resort’s centrepiece. Rooms have balconies facing the same formation. At SaltRock Southwest Kitchen, the patio puts the Cleopatra Red Rock Formation front and center.

Summary: Perched on Airport Mesa, 500 feet above town, Sky Ranch Lodge has been framing Snoopy Rock and the Red Rocks since 1982. The outdoor area reads more like a viewing platform than a hotel patio — one guests are reluctant to leave when the evening light hits the rock.

Summary: Every room comes with a balcony or terrace, and every one of those terraces faces Oak Creek Canyon. Summary: Bell Rock, the vortex site the resort is named for, is visible from every balcony. All 221 rooms have a private patio and a fireplace; the most sought-after face the red rocks directly. Summary: A roadside property that conceals its best feature at the back: panoramic balconies with a direct line to Snoopy Rock. We’d go straight for a balcony room — the view alone justifies the upgrade. The property also sits directly on Oak Creek, with indoor and outdoor pools and trail access steps away.

Alt Text: Signiel Seoul high-floor suite bedroom with Han River bridges and Seoul mountains view through floor-to-ceiling windows

Images.alt: Signiel Seoul high-floor suite bedroom with Han River bridges and Seoul mountains view through floor-to-ceiling windows

Hotel Tagline: From the 76th floor up, Han River and Seoul's mountains spread across the full skyline.
Summary: Between floors 76 and 101 of Lotte World Tower, the panorama here is total: Han River, the full Seoul skyline, and mountains on clear mornings. The room to request is any suite facing west — at this altitude, city lights at night are a different category of hotel view.
Description ⚙: Imagine staying in one of Korea's tallest buildings with a view of the Han River, Seoul's skyline, and mountains. That's precisely what you'll get when booking into the exclusive Signiel Seoul, a prestigious hotel in Seoul that sits between the 76th and 101st floors of the sky-scraping Lotte World Tower in Jamsil-dong. In this complex, guests will find a selection of restaurants, a mall, a folk museum, and even an aquarium — and all this while being surrounded by the beautiful Songpa Naru Park or Seokchonhosu Lake, the ideal place for a lakeside morning jog. Savoring refined flavors at the onsite French Restaurant STAY and discovering Korean cuisine at BICENA — holder of a Michelin star for nine consecutive years — are among the indulgences available at this five-star hotel. The afternoon tea is served at The Lounge, while patrons can enjoy a selection of liquors and spirits with an incredible 81st-floor sky view at Bar 81.
Address: 300 Olympic-ro, Songpa District, Seoul, South Korea
Nearest Airports: GMP · Gimpo · ~28 km

Alt Text: Four Seasons Hotel Seoul lounge area with floor-to-ceiling window view of Gyeongbokgung Palace illuminated at night

Images.alt: Four Seasons Hotel Seoul lounge area with floor-to-ceiling window view of Gyeongbokgung Palace illuminated at night

Hotel Tagline: Palace-View Executive Suites look directly over the 600-year-old royal palace — higher floors fill the window.
Summary: Rooms facing Gyeongbokgung are what set this hotel apart editorially — the Palace-View Executive Suites look directly over the 600-year-old royal palace in the heart of Seoul’s historical core. Ask for a high floor; the palace fills more of the window.
Description ⚙: Guests looking for a pampered holiday in stylish and elegant accommodation need to look no further than the Four Seasons Hotel Seoul. Located near the Gyeongbokgung Palace and Cheonggyecheon Stream, this five-star hotel in Jongno-gu caters to just about everything one needs for a comfortable and luxurious stay. The elegant rooms and suites reward guests with panoramic vistas, especially those over the Gyeongbokgung Palace from the Palace-View Executive Suites. The signature breakfast buffet is a magnificent spread, and the onsite dining is spectacular, with cuisines ranging from Cantonese to Japanese, Korean, and Italian.
Address: 97 Saemunan-ro, Dangju-dong, Jongno District, Seoul, South Korea
Nearest Airports: GMP · Gimpo · ~16 km

Alt Text: Conrad Seoul suite bedroom at night with Han River reflections and N Seoul Tower in panoramic city view

Images.alt: Conrad Seoul suite bedroom at night with Han River reflections and N Seoul Tower in panoramic city view

Hotel Tagline: At night, the Han River lights up alongside the N Seoul Tower silhouette, thirty-eight floors below.
Summary: Thirty-eight floors in Yeouido’s financial district, positioned directly on the Han River. The corner suites and 37th-floor executive suites deliver Seoul from multiple angles simultaneously. Worth staying for the evening skyline alone, when the river lights up alongside the N Seoul Tower silhouette.
Description ⚙: The Conrad Seoul is positioned directly on the Han River in Yeouido — Seoul's financial island — across 38 floors. The corner suites and 37th-floor executive suites deliver Seoul from multiple angles simultaneously, including Han River and N Seoul Tower. The hotel has 434 large rooms and suites, a spa, male and female saunas, a fitness center, and a 25-meter heated indoor pool. Adjacent to IFC Mall and across the street from The Hyundai Seoul department store, with Yeouido Hangang Park nearby.
View Subjects: Han River, Namsan Tower (N Seoul Tower)
Address: 10 Gukjegeumyung-ro, Yeongdeungpo District, Seoul, South Korea
Nearest Airports: GMP · Gimpo · ~13 km

Hotel: Grand InterContinental Seoul Parnas, an IHG Hotel
Alt Text: Grand InterContinental Seoul Parnas marble bathroom with freestanding bathtub and window overlooking Seoul skyline and mountains

Images.alt: Grand InterContinental Seoul Parnas marble bathroom with freestanding bathtub and window overlooking Seoul skyline and mountains

Hotel Tagline: From the upper floors, the full Seoul skyline spreads wide across Gangnam.
Summary: Five hundred fifty rooms in the core of Gangnam, with the top-floor units collecting the most rewarding sightlines. The hotel connects directly to Parnas Mall — convenient, but the view from the upper floors over the wider Seoul skyline is the actual reason to book.
Description ⚙: One of the best hotels in Seoul, the Grand InterContinental Seoul Parnas is a flagship choice for top-notch lodging in South Korea's capital. The hotel has 550 rooms and suites, with top-floor units offering the most rewarding sightlines over the Seoul skyline. Connected directly to the upscale Parnas Mall, ensuring guests easy access to global fashion brands and eateries. Located in the heart of Gangnam near the COEX convention complex.
Address: Teheran-ro, 521 Gangnam District, Seoul, South Korea
Nearest Airports: GMP · Gimpo · ~24 km

Images.alt: Hotel Naru Seoul MGallery 20th-floor outdoor infinity pool overlooking Han River with Bamseom Island and city skyline

Hotel Tagline: From the 20th floor, the infinity pool dissolves into the Han River below.
Summary: Positioned on the Han River in Mapo, this is Seoul’s clearest river-facing hotel at scale. Premier River rooms above the 12th floor have the best angle; the Bamseom Suite adds Namsan Tower to the frame with a private terrace. At dusk, the 20th-floor infinity pool dissolves into the river below.
View Subjects: Han River, Namsan Tower (N Seoul Tower)
Address: 8 Mapo-daero, Mapo-gu, Seoul, South Korea
Nearest Airports: GMP · Gimpo · ~14 km

Alt Text: Park Hyatt Seoul minimalist guest room with floor-to-ceiling windows overlooking Gangnam cityscape and distant Seoul mountains

Images.alt: Park Hyatt Seoul minimalist guest room with floor-to-ceiling windows overlooking Gangnam cityscape and distant Seoul mountains

Hotel Tagline: Floor-to-ceiling glass frames the Gangnam grid from the top of the tower.
Summary: The Lounge sits on the 24th floor — the top of the building — and frames the Gangnam grid and Seoul skyline through floor-to-ceiling glass. All 185 rooms share the same panoramic logic; the Park Suite or any corner suite captures Teheran-ro on two sides. Samseong Station is a one-minute walk.
Description ⚙: The Park Hyatt Seoul rises over Teheran-ro — Gangnam's financial spine — as a 24-floor glass-and-stone tower where the reception and lobby sit on the uppermost floors. Each of the 185 rooms and suites faces the city through floor-to-ceiling windows. The Lounge on the 24th floor serves modern Korean cuisine with panoramic city views. The Timber House runs a premium whisky and cocktail program with live music nightly. The 23rd-floor spa and 17-meter heated indoor pool deliver city views while swimming. Samseong Station on Line 2 is less than a one-minute walk.
Address: 606 Teheran-ro, Gangnam District, Seoul, South Korea
Nearest Airports: GMP · Gimpo · ~24 km

Alt Text: The Westin Seoul Parnas curved suite living room with direct view over Bongeunsa Temple rooftops and Gangnam towers

Images.alt: The Westin Seoul Parnas curved suite living room with direct view over Bongeunsa Temple rooftops and Gangnam towers

Hotel Tagline: From the 30th floor, the Han River stretches beyond Bongeunsa Temple sitting directly below.
Summary: Fully renovated and reopened in September 2025, this former Gangnam landmark now runs Seoul’s largest hotel club lounge on the 30th floor. The view combines the Han River with the ancient Bongeunsa Temple directly below — a rare juxtaposition in Gangnam. Corner suites carry the same sightline.
Description ⚙: The Westin Seoul Parnas reopened in September 2025 after a complete renovation of a building that operated as a landmark Gangnam hotel for 25 years. Under Marriott International and Parnas Hotel, the rebuilt 30-floor property runs 564 rooms along a wellness-centered brief. The Westin Club Lounge on the 30th floor — Korea's largest hotel club space at 702 square meters — delivers panoramic views of the Han River and Bongeunsa Temple directly below. The Cosmopolitan Fitness Club on the third floor includes a pool, sauna, yoga studio, and golf simulators. Connected directly to COEX Mall and the COEX Convention Center.
Address: 524 Bongeunsa-ro, Gangnam District, Seoul, South Korea
Nearest Airports: GMP · Gimpo · ~24 km

Alt Text: Grand Hyatt Seoul guest room with large window view of N Seoul Tower above Namsan Mountain

Images.alt: Grand Hyatt Seoul guest room with large window view of N Seoul Tower above Namsan Mountain

Hotel Tagline: From a Namsan hillside, the Han River and Seoul skyline fill the floor-to-ceiling windows.
Summary: Set on a Namsan hillside in Hannam-dong, the hotel commands a view that most central Seoul properties can’t match: Han River, city skyline, and Namsan Mountain from floor-to-ceiling windows. The Poolside Barbecue garden is the place to be in summer when the city glitters after dark.
Description ⚙: Sitting next to Mount Namsan and N Seoul Tower, the Grand Hyatt Seoul is a quiet oasis in the bustling capital of South Korea, reigning over the city from its hilltop position in Yongsan. Impressive views over the Han River, Seoul skyline, and Namsan Mountain can be admired by guests from the expansive, floor-to-ceiling windows of the rooms and suites. During summertime, The Poolside Barbecue in the hotel's beautiful garden offers the city lights backdropped by majestic mountains. In wintertime, the outdoor pool transforms into an ice rink.
View Subjects: Han River, Namsan Tower (N Seoul Tower)
Address: 322 Sowol-ro, Yongsan District, Seoul, South Korea
Nearest Airports: GMP · Gimpo · ~18 km

Alt Text: The Shilla Seoul outdoor pool terrace with cabanas and N Seoul Tower above Namsan forest treeline

Images.alt: The Shilla Seoul outdoor pool terrace with cabanas and N Seoul Tower above Namsan forest treeline

Hotel Tagline: From a leafy Namsan slope, N Seoul Tower fills the frame of most rooms.
Summary: On a leafy slope at the foot of Namsan, the Shilla keeps its distance from the city deliberately. N Seoul Tower is the dominant frame from most rooms. The spa — Asia’s first Guerlain Spa — and the manicured garden make the hotel as much a retreat as a base for exploring the city.
Description ⚙: The Shilla Seoul, the first luxury hotel in Seoul and one of the most iconic hotels in the city, was awarded the title of the first five-star hotel in South Korea by Forbes in 2019. The hotel harbors an exceptional spa overlooking the lush landscape of Mount Namsan — Asia's first Guerlain Spa — an inner golf court, a state-of-the-art gym, a beautiful garden, a high-end mall, and six eateries. With Mount Namsan and N Seoul Tower as the backdrop, Urban Island on the third floor is an idyllic wellness oasis. A free shuttle bus connects guests to the city.
Address: 249 Dongho-ro, Jung District, Seoul, South Korea
Nearest Airports: GMP · Gimpo · ~19 km

Alt Text: Lotte Hotel Seoul suite bedroom with N Seoul Tower and Namsan Mountain view through large window

Images.alt: Lotte Hotel Seoul suite bedroom with N Seoul Tower and Namsan Mountain view through large window

Hotel Tagline: From selected upper floors, N Seoul Tower rises above Myeongdong's dense skyline.
Summary: Myeongdong at its most central — 1,120 rooms across two towers, most facing the skyline with N Seoul Tower visible from selected upper floors. The Executive Tower hosts Pierre Gagnaire à Seoul on the 35th floor. Main Tower rooms are in phased renovation through September 2026.
Description ⚙: Set in the bustling Myeongdong neighborhood, the Lotte Hotel Seoul has two towers with 1,120 well-appointed rooms and suites. Through large windows, guests can absorb views of Seoul's high-rises and the iconic N Seoul Tower from selected upper floors. The Executive Tower hosts Pierre Gagnaire à Seoul on the 35th floor — a Michelin-recognized contemporary French restaurant. Additional dining options include Korean at Mugunghwa, Japanese at Momoyama, Chinese at Toh Lim, and an international buffet at La Seine. Note: Main Tower rooms on floors 7 to 25 are undergoing renovation through September 2026; the Executive Tower remains fully operational.
Address: 30 Eulji-ro, Jung District, Seoul, South Korea
Nearest Airports: GMP · Gimpo · ~17 km

Alt Text: RYSE Autograph Collection Seoul contemporary suite with Seoul city view copper pendant lights and original artwork

Images.alt: RYSE Autograph Collection Seoul contemporary suite with Seoul city view copper pendant lights and original artwork

Hotel Tagline: From the 20th floor, Seoul spreads wide beneath a penthouse with a rooftop perch above Hongdae.
Summary: The Executive Producer Suite on the 20th floor is a penthouse with commanding Seoul views, a soaking tub, DJ table, and private bar — the most editorial room in the Hongdae portfolio. Side Note Club on the rooftop completes the picture with vistas over one of Seoul’s most creative neighborhoods.
Description ⚙: The RYSE, Autograph Collection Seoul is found in the hip, youthful Hongdae neighborhood, moments away from the Hongik Arts University. Built with globetrotters in mind and designed for art and culture lovers, guests can discover independent artworks at the DIS.PLAY popup space. The Executive Producer Suite on the 20th floor is a penthouse with commanding views over Seoul, a kitchen, a soaking tub, a DJ table, a lounge area, and a bar. The rooftop Side Note Club offers vistas over one of Seoul's most creative neighborhoods. Hongik University Station is steps away.
Address: South Korea, Seoul, Mapo-gu, 130 Yanghwa-ro, RYSE, Autograph Collection
Nearest Airports: GMP · Gimpo · ~12 km

Alt Text: JW Marriott Hotel Seoul guest room with Han River and N Seoul Tower view through wide panoramic window

Images.alt: JW Marriott Hotel Seoul guest room with Han River and N Seoul Tower view through wide panoramic window

Hotel Tagline: From the top floors, the Han River and N Seoul Tower share the same frame.
Summary: The Seocho location delivers Han River views from the top-floor accommodations, framing the N Seoul Tower and the river at once. Corner rooms and penthouses carry the widest angle. The Marquis Fitness Club — with its 85-meter indoor running track — is the unexpected amenity that defines a stay here.
Description ⚙: Rising above the luxurious Shinsegae Department Store Gangnam, the JW Marriott Hotel Seoul has 379 soundproofed rooms, suites, and penthouses. The sweeping views over Seoul from the top-floor accommodations illuminate the city's impressive skyline, the N Seoul Tower, and the Han River. The hotel is within walking distance of the Banpo Bridge Moonlight Rainbow Fountain. The Marquis Fitness Club features a heated indoor pool and an 85-meter indoor running track.
View Subjects: Han River, Namsan Tower (N Seoul Tower)
Address: 176 Sinbanpo-ro, Seocho District, Seoul, South Korea
Nearest Airports: GMP · Gimpo · ~20 km

Alt Text: LOTTE City Hotel Myeongdong Seoul rooftop terrace restaurant overlooking Seoul city skyline at dusk

Images.alt: LOTTE City Hotel Myeongdong Seoul rooftop terrace restaurant overlooking Seoul city skyline at dusk

Hotel Tagline: From the 27th floor, Seoul's high-rises spread across the skyline in every direction.
Summary: The C’café buffet on the 27th floor — the hotel’s top level — is where the skyline view earns its keep: a sweep of Seoul’s high-rises without the five-star rate. Rooms throughout the 27-floor tower face city panoramas. Myeongdong and the Cheonggyecheon Stream are both within easy walking distance.
Description ⚙: The LOTTE City Hotel Myeongdong operates on a 27-floor tower in the heart of Myeongdong. The C'café buffet restaurant on the top floor offers sweeping views of Seoul's skyline. The rooms have city views throughout the building. The hotel is conveniently located near the Cheonggyecheon Stream and within walking distance of Myeongdong's shopping and dining streets.
Address: 362 Samil-daero, Jung District, Seoul, South Korea
Nearest Airports: GMP · Gimpo · ~17 km

Alt Text: L7 Myeongdong by LOTTE Seoul guest room at night with illuminated N Seoul Tower in window view

Images.alt: L7 Myeongdong by LOTTE Seoul guest room at night with illuminated N Seoul Tower in window view

Hotel Tagline: South-facing rooms frame N Seoul Tower; north-facing rooms hold Seoul's high-rise skyline entire.
Summary: North-facing rooms get the skyscraper panorama; south-facing rooms frame N Seoul Tower and Namsan Mountain. Floating, the rooftop bar, is the most direct way to see both in one evening — seven signature cocktails and the city’s two defining silhouettes in the same frame.
Description ⚙: The contemporary L7 Myeongdong by LOTTE is one of Seoul's best-located design hotels, steps from Shinsegae Department Store and Myeongdong's main streets. North-facing rooms have the best views of Seoul's high-rise skyline; south-facing rooms offer panoramas of Mount Namsan and N Seoul Tower. The rooftop bar Floating awes guests with scenic vistas over Seoul. Airport bus stops adjacent to the hotel.
Address: 137 Toegye-ro, Jung District, Seoul, South Korea
Nearest Airports: GMP · Gimpo · ~17 km

Alt Text: Westin Josun Seoul Hotel guest room with direct window view of traditional Korean pavilion Hwangudan Shrine

Images.alt: Westin Josun Seoul Hotel guest room with direct window view of traditional Korean pavilion Hwangudan Shrine

Hotel Tagline: Steps from Deoksugung Palace and Seoul City Hall, the city unfolds outside.
Summary: Seoul’s oldest luxury hotel, operating since 1914 in its current Myeongdong address. The Junior Suites are the pick: city views, musical bathrooms, and access to the City Athletic Club with its heated indoor pool. The 462-room property sits steps from Deoksugung Palace and Seoul City Hall.
Description ⚙: The Westin Josun Hotel Seoul has been around since 1914, welcoming influential guests to its premises in central Seoul. Each of its 462 contemporary rooms and suites features an elegant décor with clean-lined aesthetics. The Junior Suites feature city views and musical bathrooms. The City Athletic Club is an eye-catching asset with state-of-the-art equipment, a full-service spa, an indoor heated pool, saunas, and Korean baths. Steps from Seoul City Hall, the Deoksugung Palace, and the Hwangudan Shrine.
Address: 106 Sogong-ro, Jung District, Seoul, South Korea
Nearest Airports: GMP · Gimpo · ~17 km

Alt Text: L7 Hongdae by LOTTE Seoul rooftop pool at night with city lights and poolside bar

Images.alt: L7 Hongdae by LOTTE Seoul rooftop pool at night with city lights and poolside bar

Hotel Tagline: From the 22nd-floor rooftop pool, Seoul's skyline spreads open overhead.
Summary: The 22nd-floor rooftop pool is the headline: open-air swimming over Hongdae’s skyline, with the Floating bar alongside. The Studio Suite Room — 50 square meters, the largest in the hotel — is the right call for longer stays. Hongik University Station is seconds from the entrance.
Description ⚙: The hip L7 Hongdae by Lotte is an exceptional hotel in the heart of Hongdae, one of Seoul's most artistic and youthful districts. The 22nd-floor rooftop swimming pool allows for commanding views of Seoul's skyscrapers — the ideal setting paired with cocktails from the Floating bar. The Studio Suite Room is the hotel's largest at 50 square meters with city views. The Place Italian restaurant is on-site, and Hongik University Station is moments away.
Address: 141 Yanghwa-ro, Mapo-gu, Seoul, South Korea
Nearest Airports: GMP · Gimpo · ~12 km

Hotel: Four Points by Sheraton Josun, Seoul Myeongdong
Alt Text: Four Points by Sheraton Josun Seoul Myeongdong guest room with N Seoul Tower and Namsan Mountain view

Images.alt: Four Points by Sheraton Josun Seoul Myeongdong guest room with N Seoul Tower and Namsan Mountain view

Hotel Tagline: Floor-to-ceiling windows frame Seoul's skyline and mountains from the high floors.
Summary: High-floor Deluxe King Rooms have floor-to-ceiling windows and expansive vistas of Seoul — more view-per-won than most options in this part of Jung-gu. The Evolution restaurant serves a breakfast buffet with robot waiters. Euljiro 3-ga Station is directly across the street.
Description ⚙: Located at the intersection of Eulji-ro and Supyo-ro in central Seoul, the Four Points by Sheraton Josun, Seoul Myeongdong is a well-appointed hotel with skyline and mountain views from high-floor Deluxe King Rooms, which feature floor-to-ceiling windows. The Evolution restaurant serves a breakfast buffet with a Korean touch and robot waiters. Euljiro 3-ga Station is directly across the street, and the hotel is within walking distance of Myeongdong.
Address: 36 Samil-daero 10-gil, Jung District, Seoul, South Korea
Nearest Airports: GMP · Gimpo · ~18 km

Alt Text: Querencia de Sevilla Autograph Collection Seville rooftop terrace with cocktails and La Giralda tower and Cathedral in the background

Images.alt: Querencia de Sevilla Autograph Collection Seville rooftop terrace with cocktails and La Giralda tower and Cathedral in the background

Hotel Tagline: Directly opposite the Gothic Cathedral, upper floors meet La Giralda at eye level.
Summary: The room to ask for is a Terrace suite: upper floors face the top of La Giralda from this converted Banco de Andalucía building, reopened in 2022. The rooftop pool at El Mirador de Querencia delivers 360° Cathedral and city views that get better after dark.
Description ⚙: Housed in the former Banco de Andalucía headquarters, converted in a 35-million-euro renovation and opened in April 2022 as a Marriott Autograph Collection property. The 95 rooms sit directly opposite the Gothic Cathedral on Seville's most storied square. Upper-floor Terrace suites face the top of La Giralda; the rooftop pool at El Mirador de Querencia delivers 360-degree Cathedral and city views. La Maestría restaurant serves traditional Andalusian cuisine, including oxtail stew and gazpacho; Bar La Maestría specialises in the city's finest Sherry wines.
Address: C. Fernández y González, 4, Casco Antiguo, 41001 Sevilla, Spain
Nearest Airports: SVQ · Seville · 16 km

Alt Text: EME Catedral Mercer Hotel Seville rooftop pool with La Giralda tower and Cathedral facade at close range

Images.alt: EME Catedral Mercer Hotel Seville rooftop pool with La Giralda tower and Cathedral facade at close range

Hotel Tagline: La Giralda stands across a street's width from the Gran Deluxe suite balcony.
Summary: Ask for a Gran Deluxe Views suite: the Cathedral fills your private balcony at arm’s length. Above, La Terraza del EME keeps the same landmark in frame over cocktails; the rooftop pool is the quieter alternative for guests who’d rather take it in without a crowd.
Description ⚙: Located in a 16th-century Andalusian building immediately adjacent to Seville Cathedral, with La Giralda separated from the Gran Deluxe Views suite balconies by the width of a street. La Terraza del EME rooftop terrace offers 360-degree city views with a cocktail bar; the rooftop pool is available for in-house guests. Mi Arma restaurant serves contemporary local cuisine from a terrace at the foot of La Giralda; Al Lado offers Italian and Mediterranean options. The M SPA provides a full thermal circuit.
Address: C. Alemanes, 27, Casco Antiguo, 41004 Sevilla, Spain
Nearest Airports: SVQ · Seville · 16 km

Alt Text: Hotel Colón Gran Meliá Seville illuminated rooftop infinity pool at night with Old Town skyline and church domes

Images.alt: Hotel Colón Gran Meliá Seville illuminated rooftop infinity pool at night with Old Town skyline and church domes

Hotel Tagline: La Giralda and the Cathedral fill the view from a private whirlpool on the terrace.
Summary: The Grand Premium RedLevel Room with Terrace earns its price: a private whirlpool with unobstructed La Giralda and Cathedral views, and access to the RedLevel Lounge. The top-floor infinity pool frames the same panorama from its longest side.
Description ⚙: A long-standing reference for luxury in Seville and one of the leading hotels of the world. The pristine white facade with Andalusian awnings opens to marble floors, red carpets, golden chandeliers, and a bar under a magnificent dome. The Grand Premium RedLevel Room with Terrace features a private whirlpool with unobstructed views of La Giralda and Seville Cathedral. The top-floor infinity pool overlooks the city skyline. Room doors purposely resemble paintings, creating an optical illusion across the hotel's gallery-like corridors. Located moments from Calle Sierpes and high-end boutiques.
Address: C. Canalejas, 1, Casco Antiguo, 41001 Sevilla, Spain
Nearest Airports: SVQ · Seville · 15 km

Hotel: Hotel Alfonso XIII, a Luxury Collection Hotel, Seville
Alt Text: Hotel Alfonso XIII Seville illuminated facade at dusk with palm trees and La Giralda tower in background

Images.alt: Hotel Alfonso XIII Seville illuminated facade at dusk with palm trees and La Giralda tower in background

Hotel Tagline: La Giralda rises into view from the terrace and the Reales Alcazares suite.
Summary: Worth staying for the architecture alone — the atrium blends Mudéjar, Gothic, and Renaissance craftsmanship in a building inaugurated by King Alfonso XIII in 1929. For views, the Reales Alcazares suite and Grand Deluxe with Terrace both reach La Giralda.
Description ⚙: Inaugurated in 1929 by King Alfonso XIII for the Ibero-American Exposition, this landmark property blends Mudéjar, Gothic, and Renaissance architecture in a building designed by José Espiau y Muñoz. The grand atrium, lined with Arabic-style tiles and lit by chandeliers, is among Seville's most significant interiors. The Reales Alcazares suite and Grand Deluxe with Terrace categories both deliver direct La Giralda views. Restaurante San Fernando serves Andalusian classics in the colonnaded inner courtyard; Bar Americano is the hotel's Art Deco cocktail bar. Owned by the City of Seville, managed by Marriott's Luxury Collection.
Address: C. San Fernando, 2, Casco Antiguo, 41004 Sevilla, Spain
Nearest Airports: SVQ · Seville · 23 km

Alt Text: CoolRooms Palacio Villapanés Seville rooftop terrace at sunset with La Giralda tower and Baroque church domes

Images.alt: CoolRooms Palacio Villapanés Seville rooftop terrace at sunset with La Giralda tower and Baroque church domes

Hotel Tagline: From a private terrace in the dome, the Cathedral and Giralda Tower fill the view.
Summary: The room to ask for is Suite El Torreón — 85m² in the dome of an 18th-century baroque palace, with coffered ceilings and a private terrace facing the Cathedral. A rooftop pool overlooks terracotta tiles in every direction, and the CoolSpa by Alqvimia handles the rest.
Address: C. Santiago, 31, Casco Antiguo, 41003 Sevilla, Spain
Nearest Airports: SVQ · Seville · 12 km

Alt Text: Palacio Pinello Seville rooftop terrace at golden hour with Moorish pavilion bar and La Giralda tower and Cathedral

Images.alt: Palacio Pinello Seville rooftop terrace at golden hour with Moorish pavilion bar and La Giralda tower and Cathedral

Hotel Tagline: At night, La Giralda and the Cathedral glow at close range from the rooftop.
Summary: Rated 9.4 on Booking.com and just 200 metres from the Cathedral, this 15th-century Santa Cruz palace keeps things deliberately small — 21 rooms, all for adults. The rooftop terrace has La Giralda and the Cathedral lit up at close range; the private tower can be reserved for dinner.
Description ⚙: A 15th-century palace in the heart of Santa Cruz, 200 metres from Seville Cathedral, operating as a 21-room adults-only boutique hotel. The building features hand-carved wooden doors, ornate coffered ceilings, terracotta floors, and medieval courtyards. The rooftop terrace offers direct views of La Giralda and the Cathedral, lit up at close range; the private tower can be reserved exclusively for intimate dinners. Selected rooms have private balconies facing La Giralda. Rated 9.4 on Booking.com, among the highest guest scores of any hotel in Seville.
Address: C. Segovias, 1, Casco Antiguo, 41004 Sevilla, Spain
Nearest Airports: SVQ · Seville · 17 km

Alt Text: Hotel Casa 1800 Sevilla rooftop pool with La Giralda tower and Cathedral reflected in the water

Images.alt: Hotel Casa 1800 Sevilla rooftop pool with La Giralda tower and Cathedral reflected in the water

Hotel Tagline: Jacuzzis on the top-floor terraces face the Cathedral and La Giralda directly.
Summary: Worth requesting a top-floor room: the terraces come equipped with jacuzzis positioned to face the Cathedral and La Giralda directly — adjustable to temperature year-round. The rooftop pool below delivers the same sightline for guests across any category.
Description ⚙: A boutique hotel in Santa Cruz a stone's throw from Calle Mateos Gago, La Giralda, and Seville Cathedral. The 33 rooms reflect Seville's aristocratic character with exposed stone walls, adorned headboards, and tones of beige and gold. Top-floor rooms feature private terraces with jacuzzis positioned to face the Cathedral and La Giralda directly, adjustable to temperature year-round. The year-round rooftop pool delivers the same Cathedral sightline for guests in all categories. Complimentary afternoon snacks are served daily on the romantic interior patio.
Address: C. Rodrigo Caro, 6, Casco Antiguo, 41004 Sevilla, Spain
Nearest Airports: SVQ · Seville · 16 km

Alt Text: Meliá Sevilla outdoor pool at sunset with Plaza de España pavilion and towers in the background

Images.alt: Meliá Sevilla outdoor pool at sunset with Plaza de España pavilion and towers in the background

Hotel Tagline: Plaza de España's Renaissance towers rise directly beyond the largest outdoor pool in central Seville.
Summary: The pool here faces a different Seville — Plaza de España and the María Luisa Park rather than the Cathedral quarter. At 130m², it’s the largest outdoor pool in any central hotel; The Level rooms add private terraces with whirlpool access and the same panorama.
Description ⚙: Located directly alongside the Plaza de España and the María Luisa Park, offering a view axis entirely different from the Cathedral-quarter hotels. The 365 rooms span standard Meliá categories to the exclusive The Level floors, where guests access a private lounge with open bar, daily cocktails, and concierge services. The Level room categories include private terraces with whirlpool baths facing Plaza de España. The outdoor pool measures 130 square metres — the largest of any central Seville hotel — with sun loungers facing the pavilion and Renaissance towers of the square. Mosaico restaurant serves an international breakfast buffet; Quimera covers Mediterranean à la carte at dinner.
Address: Calle Dr. Pedro de Castro, 1, 41004 Sevilla, Spain
Nearest Airports: SVQ · Seville · 13 km

Alt Text: Hotel Posada del Lucero Seville rooftop terrace with sun loungers and Parroquia de San Pedro Apóstol tower

Images.alt: Hotel Posada del Lucero Seville rooftop terrace with sun loungers and Parroquia de San Pedro Apóstol tower

Hotel Tagline: The rooftop pool looks out over the Parroquia de San Pedro Apóstol Tower and the Old Town roofline.
Summary: The rooftop pool sits at terrace level with views of the Parroquia de San Pedro Apóstol Tower and the Old Town roofline — ask for a session at sunset. The hotel operates inside a 16th-century national monument, two minutes’ walk from the Setas de Sevilla.
Description ⚙: A boutique hotel operating inside an impeccably restored 16th-century national monument, two minutes' walk from the Setas de Sevilla. Sister property to Hotel Rey Alfonso X and Hotel Fernando III. The rooftop pool sits at terrace level with views of the Parroquia de San Pedro Apóstol Tower and the Old Town roofline. Rooms and suites are elegant, most facing Andalusian courtyards; some categories feature outward-facing terraces. The hotel's exceptional rooftop is among the most distinctive view terraces in the northern quarter of the Old Town.
Address: C. Almte. Apodaca, 7, Casco Antiguo, 41003 Sevilla, Spain
Nearest Airports: SVQ · Seville · 13 km

Alt Text: Mercer Plaza Sevilla 5 GL rooftop terrace with ornamental stone balustrade and La Giralda tower and Cathedral across the skyline

Images.alt: Mercer Plaza Sevilla 5 GL rooftop terrace with ornamental stone balustrade and La Giralda tower and Cathedral across the skyline

Hotel Tagline: Three rooftop levels over Seville's spires, directly facing the ornate 16th-century Ayuntamiento façade.
Summary: Opened in April 2023 on Plaza San Francisco, this 25-room Mercer property keeps its rooftop — Terrace 1912 — among the quieter view terraces in the city: three levels over Seville’s spires and tiled rooflines, with a plunge pool for guests and tapas throughout.
Description ⚙: Opened in April 2023 on Plaza San Francisco, directly opposite Seville's Ayuntamiento. The fifth Mercer Hotels property in Spain, with 25 rooms and suites across categories from Deluxe to the Mercer Suite. The Premium Views category overlooks the ornate 16th-century city hall façade. Terrace 1912, the hotel's rooftop, is distributed across three levels over Seville's spires and terracotta rooflines, with a guest-only plunge pool and cocktail bar. Bar Plaza restaurant serves Andalusian cuisine at ground level with a street terrace facing the square.
Address: Pl. de S. Francisco, 11-12, Casco Antiguo, 41004 Sevilla, Spain
Nearest Airports: SVQ · Seville · 16 km

Alt Text: Hotel Fernando III Seville rooftop pool at sunset with La Giralda tower and church spires over the Old Town

Images.alt: Hotel Fernando III Seville rooftop pool at sunset with La Giralda tower and church spires over the Old Town

Hotel Tagline: Rooftop pool and terrace bar, with La Giralda rising above the Old Town domes.
Summary: The outdoor rooftop pool looks out over domes, minarets, and La Giralda in the middle distance; La Terraza bar shares the same level and serves tapas alongside. Worth asking about the Penthouse Apartment on Calle Céspedes — a private terrace with an Old Town sweep.
Description ⚙: A four-star hotel dating to 1969 and among Seville's most consistently reviewed properties for central location and rooftop views. The outdoor pool looks across Old Town domes, minarets, and La Giralda in the middle distance. La Terraza rooftop bar occupies the same level, serving tapas and cocktails alongside the same city panorama. A Penthouse Apartment on adjacent Calle Céspedes offers a private terrace with expansive Old Town vistas. Sister property to Hotel Posada del Lucero and Hotel Rey Alfonso X.
Address: C. San José, 21, Casco Antiguo, 41004 Sevilla, Spain
Nearest Airports: SVQ · Seville · 12 km

Alt Text: Hotel Casa Del Poeta Seville rooftop terrace at twilight with La Giralda tower illuminated at dusk

Images.alt: Hotel Casa Del Poeta Seville rooftop terrace at twilight with La Giralda tower illuminated at dusk

Hotel Tagline: La Giralda rises above the rooftop terrace, with balcony rooms facing it directly.
Summary: Request a room with a private balcony: selected categories face La Giralda, and the rooftop terrace extends the same sightline to all guests. The 17th-century inner patio is the other argument — live guitar in the evening, Andalusian tile underfoot, views above.
Description ⚙: An 18-room boutique hotel in central Seville in a 17th-century palace with a distinctive Arabic look and feel. The magnificent inner courtyard, featuring original Moorish tile patterns and traditional arches, is the hotel's architectural centrepiece, with live guitar in the evenings. Selected private balcony rooms face La Giralda; the rooftop terrace extends the same Cathedral and La Giralda sightline to all guests. Walking distance from Seville Cathedral, the Royal Alcázar, Plaza de España, and the Torre del Oro.
Address: C. Don Carlos Alonso Chaparro, 3, Casco Antiguo, 41004 Sevilla, Spain
Nearest Airports: SVQ · Seville · 12 km

Alt Text: Eurostars Torre Sevilla hotel upper-floor lounge at night with panoramic view of Guadalquivir River and city lights

Images.alt: Eurostars Torre Sevilla hotel upper-floor lounge at night with panoramic view of Guadalquivir River and city lights

Hotel Tagline: From 180 metres up, the historic centre, the Guadalquivir, and the Aljarafe hills spread 360 degrees below.
Summary: All 244 rooms have city views — the only decision is orientation. The Terraza Atalaya on the 37th floor is the highest rooftop bar in Andalusia: 180 metres above ground, 360° over the historic centre, the Guadalquivir, and the Aljarafe hills at sunset.
Description ⚙: Occupying the top 19 floors of Torre Sevilla, the tallest building in Andalusia at 180 metres. All 244 rooms and suites face the city; orientation — historic centre, the Guadalquivir River, or the Aljarafe hills — is the principal choice. Designed by GCA Arquitectos Asociados, the tower has become an icon of Seville's contemporary skyline. The Terraza Atalaya on the 37th floor is the highest rooftop bar in Andalusia, offering 360-degree views at its most dramatic at sunset. The hotel includes a spa and indoor pool on floor 35. The Torre Sevilla shopping mall is directly adjacent.
Address: Torre Sevilla, Pl. Alcalde Sánchez Monteseirín, 2 edificio, 41092 Sevilla, Spain
Nearest Airports: SVQ · Seville · 16 km

Alt Text: J Hotel Shanghai Tower Yi Lounge golden mesh ceiling installation with Oriental Pearl Tower visible below through panoramic windows at sunset

Images.alt: J Hotel Shanghai Tower Yi Lounge golden mesh ceiling installation with Oriental Pearl Tower visible below through panoramic windows at sunset

Hotel Tagline: From the 98th floor, the Oriental Pearl Tower sits below eye level against the full sweep of the Huangpu River.
Summary: Opened in June 2021, J Hotel occupies floors 86 to 98 of China’s tallest building — the Pearl Tower sits below. The Shanghai Suite on the 98th floor delivers the definitive read. Above: Heavenly Jin on the 120th floor, the highest restaurant in any building in the world.
Description ⚙: J Hotel Shanghai Tower opened in June 2021 on the topmost hotel floors of the Shanghai Tower, China's tallest building and the second-tallest in the world at 632 meters. Rooms and suites occupy floors 86 through 98, placing the hotel in a category of its own: at these altitudes, the Oriental Pearl Tower, the Jin Mao Tower, and the Shanghai World Financial Center are all visible at or below eye level, and the full sweep of Pudong's skyline unfolds with the Huangpu River and the Bund beyond. Every one of the 165 rooms and 34 suites has floor-to-ceiling panoramic windows and personal butler service included around the clock. The Shanghai Suite on the 98th floor is the hotel's signature accommodation — 380 square meters of curved parlor, bedroom, dressing room, study, and physiotherapy area, with an exclusive panoramic view of Shanghai. Seven restaurants and bars are distributed across multiple floors. Heavenly Jin on the 120th floor, 556 meters above ground, is the highest restaurant within a building in the world. Jin Yan on the 103rd floor specializes in Cantonese cuisine; Kinnjyou Inaka on the 104th floor offers kaiseki and teppanyaki. Centouno on the 101st floor brings Mediterranean cuisine to a dining room by Italian artist Edoardo Tresoldi. The Yi Lounge on the 84th floor is the hotel's bar and live jazz venue. The Reiki Spa and a 160-meter skyline swimming pool occupy floors 84 and 85.
View Subjects: Oriental Pearl Tower, Huangpu River, Pudong Skyline
Address: Shanghai Tower, No, 126 东台路陆家嘴浦东新区 China, 200120
Nearest Airports: SHA · Hongqiao · 25 km; PVG · Pudong · 39 km

Alt Text: Bvlgari Hotel Shanghai restaurant dining table set for two with floor-to-ceiling view of Pudong skyline and Oriental Pearl Tower at golden hour

Images.alt: Bvlgari Hotel Shanghai restaurant dining table set for two with floor-to-ceiling view of Pudong skyline and Oriental Pearl Tower at golden hour

Hotel Tagline: From Suzhou Creek, the Bund and Pudong skyline share a single, unbroken frame.
Summary: From Suzhou Creek, the full Bund and Pudong skyline appear in a single frame. Ask for a Premium Bund View room on the 41st floor or above. Dinner at Il Ristorante – Niko Romito on the 47th floor, Michelin-starred, makes the views an accompaniment rather than the main event.
Description ⚙: Bvlgari Hotel Shanghai opened in 2018 on the banks of Suzhou Creek in Jing'an, occupying the top eight floors of a 48-story tower — floors 41 through 48 — with Bund and Pudong skyline views that differ from any hotel on the eastern bank. The 82 rooms and 19 suites all have floor-to-ceiling windows. The Bvlgari Suite extends to 400 square meters with a direct view over the Huangpu River; Premium Bund View rooms are positioned for simultaneous sightlines to the historic waterfront and the Oriental Pearl Tower. The building was designed by ACPV Architects — Antonio Citterio and Patricia Viel — and connects at ground level to the restored Shanghai Chamber of Commerce, originally completed in 1916. Il Ristorante – Niko Romito on the 47th floor received a Michelin star in the 2024 Michelin Guide Shanghai. The Bvlgari Bar shares the 47th floor and offers a panoramic view of the Bund riverfront and Pudong skyline. The Bvlgari Spa extends across 2,000 square meters with an indoor pool, hammam, and sauna. Bvlgari Hotel Shanghai was included in the Conde Nast Traveler Gold List in 2020 and is listed in the MICHELIN Guide.
View Subjects: The Bund, Pudong Skyline, Oriental Pearl Tower
Address: Shang Hai Bao Ge Li Jiu Dian, 杨树浦 Jing An Qu, Shang Hai Shi, China, 200085
Nearest Airports: SHA · Hongqiao · 22 km; PVG · Pudong · 46 km

Alt Text: The Peninsula Shanghai Sir Elly’s rooftop terrace at dusk with staff serving tables and panoramic view of Oriental Pearl Tower and Pudong skyline across the Huangpu River

Images.alt: The Peninsula Shanghai Sir Elly’s rooftop terrace at dusk with staff serving tables and panoramic view of Oriental Pearl Tower and Pudong skyline across the Huangpu River

Hotel Tagline: From Sir Elly's rooftop terrace, the Oriental Pearl Tower, Jin Mao Tower, and Shanghai Tower align across the Huangpu.
Summary: Sir Elly’s rooftop terrace puts the Oriental Pearl Tower, Jin Mao Tower, and Shanghai Tower in one panoramic sweep — Pudong’s skyline still carries the energy of a city mid-sprint. We’d request a Grand Luxe River Room facing Pudong for the unobstructed read from the bedroom window.
Description ⚙: The Peninsula Shanghai, a glamorous luxury hotel on the Bund, offers breathtaking views of Shanghai's skyline and the Huangpu River. The hotel is beside the historic former British Consulate and is praised for its panoramic scenes of Pudong landmarks across the river, including the Oriental Pearl Tower, Jin Mao Tower, and Shanghai Tower. Sir Elly's Restaurant, Bar, and Terrace serves contemporary French dishes, and its rooftop terrace provides some of the city's most scenic skyline views. Yi Long Court, a Cantonese restaurant with a Michelin star in the 2024 Michelin Guide Shanghai, combines traditional Chinese techniques with modern flair. Designed by New York's BBG and French designer Pierre-Yves Rochon, guest rooms reflect Art Deco elegance. Spacious rooms feature large windows with city or river views. The Astor Suite, equipped with a panoramic terrace and a whirlpool, delivers vistas of the Pudong skyline. The hotel also features a 25-meter indoor heated pool.
View Subjects: Oriental Pearl Tower, Pudong Skyline, Huangpu River
Address: 32 Zhong Shan Dong Yi Lu, Waitan, Huang Pu Qu, China, 200002
Nearest Airports: SHA · Hongqiao · 23 km; PVG · Pudong · 42 km

Hotel: The St. Regis on the Bund, Shanghai
Alt Text: The St. Regis on the Bund Shanghai corner guest room with floor-to-ceiling windows and view of the Huangpu River, Oriental Pearl Tower and Pudong skyline
