Alt Text: Nobu Hotel Toronto suite with light wood paneling and floor-to-ceiling windows showing the CN Tower and Lake Ontario against a blue sky

Images.alt: Nobu Hotel Toronto suite with light wood paneling and floor-to-ceiling windows showing the CN Tower and Lake Ontario against a blue sky

Hotel Tagline: Floor-to-ceiling glass on the 41st to 45th floors frames Lake Ontario and the CN Tower.
Summary: Opened in June 2025 atop the Entertainment District’s west tower, Nobu fills 36 suites on floors 41–45 with Lake Ontario and CN Tower views. The hinoki soaking tub is set against the floor-to-ceiling glass — any suite works; there is no unfavorable orientation in the building.
Description ⚙: Opened in June 2025, Nobu Hotel Toronto occupies the 41st to 45th floors of the west tower at 33 Mercer Street in the Entertainment District, marking the brand's first hotel in Canada. The 36 suites — each with floor-to-ceiling windows framing Lake Ontario and the downtown skyline — feature hinoki wood soaking tubs positioned directly against the glass. Guests have priority access to Nobu Restaurant Toronto (opened August 2024), the Sakura Lounge for private breakfast and events, and a 24-hour fitness centre with Technogym and Peloton equipment.
View Subjects: Lake Ontario, CN Tower, Toronto Skyline
Address: 33 Mercer St, Toronto, ON M5V 1H2, Canada
Nearest Airports: YTZ · Billy Bishop · 3 km; YYZ · Pearson · 30 km

Alt Text: Park Hyatt Toronto Writers Room rooftop bar terrace at twilight with lounge chairs, lanterns, and the Toronto skyline with an illuminated CN Tower against a violet dusk sky

Images.alt: Park Hyatt Toronto Writers Room rooftop bar terrace at twilight with lounge chairs, lanterns, and the Toronto skyline with an illuminated CN Tower against a violet dusk sky

Hotel Tagline: From the 17th floor, floor-to-ceiling glass frames the CN Tower over the financial district.
Summary: The Writers Room, on the 17th floor, frames the CN Tower and the financial district through floor-to-ceiling glass — the clearest elevated panorama in Yorkville. We’d request a suite facing south; from below, the Royal Ontario Museum’s crystalline edges add a second landmark to the skyline.
Description ⚙: Park Hyatt Toronto, reopened after a four-year renovation at Avenue Road and Bloor Street West, commands views of the CN Tower and the Royal Ontario Museum from select rooms. The 219 rooms and suites feature Art Deco touches, walnut floors, and white marble bathrooms stocked with Le Labo amenities, designed by Studio Munge. The 17th-floor Writers Room bar frames the CN Tower through floor-to-ceiling glass. Joni restaurant serves globally influenced cuisine. The 8,000-square-foot Stillwater Spa anchors the wellness program.
Address: 4 Avenue Rd, Toronto, ON M5R 2E8, Canada
Nearest Airports: YTZ · Billy Bishop · 6 km; YYZ · Pearson · 33 km

Alt Text: 1 Hotel Toronto rooftop pool at dusk with lush greenery and pink flowers, Toronto skyline and CN Tower lit by golden evening light in the background

Images.alt: 1 Hotel Toronto rooftop pool at dusk with lush greenery and pink flowers, Toronto skyline and CN Tower lit by golden evening light in the background

Hotel Tagline: The CN Tower rises close enough at Harriet's Rooftop to read its lattice, Lake Ontario catching light behind it.
Summary: Harriet’s Rooftop Bar puts the CN Tower close enough to read the structure’s lattice at arm’s length, with Lake Ontario catching the light behind it. The rooftop pool amplifies the effect at sunset; the Terrace Studio Suites earn the same view from a private outdoor terrace below.
Description ⚙: 1 Hotel Toronto occupies the King West neighbourhood with 112 rooms designed around biophilic principles and reclaimed materials. Harriet's Rooftop Bar places the CN Tower at arm's length over a rooftop pool facing Lake Ontario. The Terrace Studio Suites offer private outdoor spaces with city views; the Birch House suite covers 2,000 square feet of floor-to-ceiling glass. The hotel's culinary program includes 1 Kitchen for farm-to-table dining and Casa Madera for Mexican-Mediterranean cuisine.
Address: 550 Wellington St W, Toronto, ON M5V 2V4, Canada
Nearest Airports: YTZ · Billy Bishop · 2 km; YYZ · Pearson · 30 km

Alt Text: The Ritz-Carlton Toronto indoor upper-floor pool with the CN Tower and Rogers Centre dome visible through floor-to-ceiling windows

Images.alt: The Ritz-Carlton Toronto indoor upper-floor pool with the CN Tower and Rogers Centre dome visible through floor-to-ceiling windows

Hotel Tagline: Floor-to-ceiling glass frames Lake Ontario to the south, the CN Tower rising alongside.
Summary: Worth staying for Club Level — floors 17–20 deliver the hotel’s clearest sightlines, Lake Ontario to the south and the city grid to the north. Ask for a Simcoe Suite for dual-aspect views of both; the sixth-floor rooms with private balconies are the most direct at ground-adjacent altitude.
Description ⚙: The Ritz-Carlton, Toronto commands the corner of Wellington Street through a KPF-designed neomodern tower. The 263 rooms feature floor-to-ceiling windows with Lake Ontario and CN Tower views from southern exposures. Club Level (floors 17–20) delivers panoramic sightlines alongside lounge access. Sixth-floor rooms include private balconies. TOCA restaurant serves handcrafted Italian cuisine alongside Canada's only hotel cheese cave. The 23,000-square-foot Spa My Blend by Clarins includes a saltwater pool facing the CN Tower.
Address: 181 Wellington St W, Toronto, ON M5V 3C7, Canada
Nearest Airports: YTZ · Billy Bishop · 3 km; YYZ · Pearson · 31 km

Alt Text: The St. Regis Toronto guest room with king bed and arched window overlooking Toronto skyscrapers bathed in golden sunset light

Images.alt: The St. Regis Toronto guest room with king bed and arched window overlooking Toronto skyscrapers bathed in golden sunset light

Hotel Tagline: From the 31st floor, the saltwater pool hangs directly above Toronto's grid.
Summary: The 31st floor concentrates everything: Louix Louis opens onto the skyline as a two-story bar, the saltwater infinity pool hangs above the grid, and the Iridium Spa pairs panoramic views with every treatment. The Caroline Astor and John Jacob Astor suites on the 30th floor are the argument for the room itself.
Description ⚙: The St. Regis Toronto rises 900 feet in the Financial District with 258 rooms and suites featuring 14-foot ceilings and oversized windows commanding downtown views. The 30th-floor Caroline Astor and John Jacob Astor suites showcase glacier-patterned carpets and Rocky Mountain-inspired marble finishes. The 31st floor houses Louix Louis, a dramatic two-story bar with over 500 dark spirits, a saltwater infinity pool, and the Iridium Spa. The daily 6 p.m. champagne sabering in the Astor Lounge maintains the brand's signature tradition.
Address: 325 Bay St., Toronto, ON M5H 4G3, Canada
Nearest Airports: YTZ · Billy Bishop · 4 km; YYZ · Pearson · 31 km

Alt Text: Fairmont Royal York Hotel Toronto renovated guest room with king bed and window framing the CN Tower against the downtown skyline

Images.alt: Fairmont Royal York Hotel Toronto renovated guest room with king bed and window framing the CN Tower against the downtown skyline

Hotel Tagline: From the 18th-floor lounge, the CN Tower rises to the southwest over the Financial District.
Summary: Ask for Fairmont Gold above the 13th floor: the 18th-floor private lounge frames the CN Tower to the southwest and the Financial District in every direction. Toronto’s most storied address since 1929 — south-facing rooms above the midpoint earn the view this building has always promised.
Description ⚙: Opened in June 1929 by the Canadian Pacific Railway, Fairmont Royal York Hotel is one of Toronto's most enduring landmarks, standing at 28 floors opposite Union Station. The 1,365 rooms and suites retain the proportions of a grand railway hotel. A major renovation completed in 2019 transformed the lobby, dining venues, and Fairmont Gold floors (13–18), which include an 18th-floor private lounge with Financial District and CN Tower views. REIGN Restaurant + Bar + Bakery serves modern Canadian cuisine; the Library Bar is among the most characterful hotel bars in Canada. Direct PATH underground network access connects to Union Station.
Address: 100 Front St W, Toronto, ON M5J 1E3, Canada
Nearest Airports: YTZ · Billy Bishop · 4 km; YYZ · Pearson · 31 km

Alt Text: Shangri-La Toronto suite bathroom with freestanding soaking tub overlooking University Avenue and the downtown Toronto tower grid in autumn

Images.alt: Shangri-La Toronto suite bathroom with freestanding soaking tub overlooking University Avenue and the downtown Toronto tower grid in autumn

Hotel Tagline: University Avenue stretches south toward the CN Tower, Queen's Park closing the frame to the north.
Summary: The Premier View Rooms face University Avenue’s full southward corridor — the CN Tower enters the frame to the right, Queen’s Park closes it to the north. The suite argument is the bathroom: a deep soaking tub with the glass towers changing colour in the last hour of light.
Description ⚙: Shangri-La Toronto anchors the corner of University Avenue and Adelaide Street with 202 rooms channeling Asian minimalism through floor-to-ceiling windows. Premier View Rooms capture University Avenue's southward corridor toward Queen's Park; suites feature deep soaking tubs facing the tower grid. The Miraj Hammam Spa offers Middle Eastern wellness treatments. bosk restaurant serves refined Northern Italian cuisine with locally sourced ingredients; Mott 32, the acclaimed Hong Kong fine dining institution, occupies an adjacent three-story glass space. A 20-metre pool has city views.
Address: 188 University Ave, Toronto, ON M5H 0A3, Canada
Nearest Airports: YTZ · Billy Bishop · 3 km; YYZ · Pearson · 31 km

Alt Text: Four Seasons Hotel Toronto guest room with green velvet sofa, king bed, and floor-to-ceiling windows overlooking the midtown Toronto residential skyline

Images.alt: Four Seasons Hotel Toronto guest room with green velvet sofa, king bed, and floor-to-ceiling windows overlooking the midtown Toronto residential skyline

Hotel Tagline: From a high floor on the Rosedale side, the CN Tower rises behind the skyline above the tree canopy.
Summary: We’d book a higher-floor suite on the Rosedale side — the tree canopy at eye level, the CN Tower behind the skyline in the distance, and Yorkville quietening below after dark. The two-story spa, among the most expansive in the Four Seasons global portfolio, is the second reason to stay.
Description ⚙: Four Seasons Hotel Toronto rises from Yorkville — the neighbourhood where founder Isadore Sharp launched the global brand in 1960. Designed by Architects-Alliance, the tower's floor-to-ceiling windows frame either the Rosedale canopy or the Toronto skyline with the CN Tower in the distance, depending on orientation. The 21st-floor Royal Suite features a fully equipped kitchen and eight-person dining room. The two-story spa includes nearly 20 treatment rooms. Café Boulud by chef Daniel Boulud and d|bar serve the hotel's culinary program.
Address: 60 Yorkville Ave, Toronto, ON M4W 0A4, Canada
Nearest Airports: YTZ · Billy Bishop · 14 km; YYZ · Pearson · 41 km

Hotel: BISHA, a Luxury Collection Hotel, Toronto
Alt Text: BISHA Luxury Collection Hotel Toronto rooftop infinity pool with the CN Tower rising directly behind and Lake Ontario and Rogers Centre dome in the background

Images.alt: BISHA Luxury Collection Hotel Toronto rooftop infinity pool with the CN Tower rising directly behind and Lake Ontario and Rogers Centre dome in the background

Hotel Tagline: From the 44th floor, the CN Tower and Lake Ontario share the same south-facing frame.
Summary: KŌST on the 44th floor earns the reservation for its rooftop infinity pool as much as its Bajan menu — the CN Tower and Lake Ontario in the same south-facing frame, the city grid spreading east. The 7th-floor Kravitz suites deliver the same skyline from a private terrace.
Description ⚙: BISHA, a Luxury Collection Hotel, Toronto — Canada's first Luxury Collection property — occupies the Entertainment District with 96 rooms featuring floor-to-ceiling windows framing CN Tower and Lake Ontario views. The hotel earned a MICHELIN One Key distinction in 2024. The 7th floor houses fourteen Kravitz Design suites. KŌST on the 44th floor serves Bajan cuisine alongside a rooftop infinity pool with CN Tower and lake panoramas. The Akira Back restaurant brings Japanese-Korean cuisine to a lower level; French Made café occupies the street-level ground floor.
Address: 80 Blue Jays Way, Toronto, ON M5V 0L7, Canada
Nearest Airports: YTZ · Billy Bishop · 3 km; YYZ · Pearson · 30 km

Hotel: Hotel X Toronto, a Destination by Hyatt Hotel
Alt Text: Hotel X Toronto suite with tall leather headboard and city-view window showing the CN Tower and Toronto skyline above Exhibition grounds parkland

Images.alt: Hotel X Toronto suite with tall leather headboard and city-view window showing the CN Tower and Toronto skyline above Exhibition grounds parkland

Hotel Tagline: Lake Ontario stretches on three sides from Valerie, the CN Tower anchoring the northeast skyline.
Summary: Valerie spans floors 27–29 with Lake Ontario on three sides and the CN Tower anchoring the skyline to the northeast. The 28th-floor guest pool floats above the same panorama — on a clear evening, the view from the waterfront starts at the window and holds to the horizon.
Description ⚙: Hotel X Toronto, a Destination by Hyatt Hotel, joined the Destination by Hyatt brand in March 2025 as the brand's debut in Canada. The 30-story tower on the Exhibition Place grounds features 404 rooms with floor-to-ceiling windows spanning Lake Ontario and the downtown Toronto skyline. The 28th-floor pool floats between the lake and the sky, reserved for hotel guests. Valerie, the three-level rooftop restaurant on floors 27–29, serves Japanese-inspired cuisine with panoramic views. The 8,300-square-metre 10XTO athletic club includes indoor tennis courts, squash, and Topgolf Swing Suites. The first Guerlain Spa in Canada operates on site.
View Subjects: Lake Ontario, CN Tower, Toronto Skyline
Address: 111 Princes' Blvd, Toronto, ON M6K 3C3, Canada
Nearest Airports: YTZ · Billy Bishop · 3 km; YYZ · Pearson · 28 km

Alt Text: Fairmont Pacific Rim Vancouver hotel room with floor-to-ceiling window view of Coal Harbour marina, forested North Shore, and snow-capped mountains

Images.alt: Fairmont Pacific Rim Vancouver hotel room with floor-to-ceiling window view of Coal Harbour marina, forested North Shore, and snow-capped mountains

Hotel Tagline: Seaplanes cross Burrard Inlet at window level, Stanley Park and the North Shore beyond.
Summary: From floors 6 to 22, every room has Burrard Inlet in the frame — seaplanes crossing the water, Stanley Park stretching west, the North Shore beyond. We’d book a Signature Harbour Mountain View corner suite for the ofuro soaking tub positioned directly at the window.
Description ⚙: Downtown Vancouver's relationship with art begins at street level outside the Fairmont Pacific Rim, where two-foot letters by Liam Gillick climb the 48-story tower. From floors 6 to 22, rooms frame Vancouver's natural drama. Corner suites place deep ofuro soaking tubs by windows where guests watch seaplanes cross Burrard Inlet above the Convention Centre's living roof. The Signature Harbour Mountain View rooms capture Coal Harbour's activity, Stanley Park's expanse, and the North Shore Mountains' grandeur. On the 20th floor, Fairmont Gold guests enjoy a private lounge with some of the hotel's most commanding views. The sixth-floor terrace holds a year-round heated pool and hot tub, with five cabanas offering private city views. The Fairmont Spa, a Forbes Five-Star award holder, is undergoing significant upgrades and is scheduled to reopen in May 2026. Botanist restaurant spreads across four spaces celebrating Pacific Northwest ingredients, while the Lobby Lounge and RawBar serves Vancouver's fully Ocean Wise sushi.
View Subjects: Burrard Inlet, Stanley Park, North Shore Mountains
Address: 1038 Canada Pl, Vancouver, BC V6C 0B9, Canada
Nearest Airports: CXH · Vancouver Harbour · 4 km; YVR · Vancouver · 15 km

Alt Text: Hyatt Vancouver Downtown Alberni hotel room balcony with guest in robe overlooking West End towers and downtown Vancouver street scene at golden hour

Images.alt: Hyatt Vancouver Downtown Alberni hotel room balcony with guest in robe overlooking West End towers and downtown Vancouver street scene at golden hour

Hotel Tagline: City blocks spread below, English Bay glitters west, and the North Shore peaks rise above the rooftop line.
Summary: The tallest building in Vancouver, transitioning to Park Hyatt in 2026. Ask for a high-floor suite: city blocks spread below, English Bay glitters west, and the North Shore peaks rise above the rooftop line. Carlino’s fresh pasta is the reason to dine in.
Description ⚙: The tallest building in Vancouver — 200 metres of glass above West Georgia Street — entered the Hyatt portfolio on July 1, 2025, when Shangri-La Group transferred management to Hyatt Hotels Corporation. The property now operates as Hyatt Vancouver Downtown Alberni while a multi-million-dollar redesign unfolds ahead of its relaunch as Park Hyatt Vancouver in 2026. Floor-to-ceiling windows in all 119 rooms and suites frame city panoramas from above Alberni Street's luxury corridor; higher floors extend the view toward English Bay and the North Shore Mountains. The Michelin-recognized restaurant Carlino celebrates northern Italian cuisine with pasta made fresh in-house daily and a menu calibrated to Pacific Northwest seasons and suppliers. An outdoor pool, wellness spa, and fitness facilities operate throughout the renovation period.
Address: 1128 W Georgia St, Vancouver, BC V6E 0A8, Canada
Nearest Airports: CXH · Vancouver Harbour · 3 km; YVR · Vancouver · 14 km

Alt Text: JW Marriott Parq Vancouver hotel suite with floor-to-ceiling windows overlooking False Creek waterway with Science World geodesic dome and south Vancouver skyline

Images.alt: JW Marriott Parq Vancouver hotel suite with floor-to-ceiling windows overlooking False Creek waterway with Science World geodesic dome and south Vancouver skyline

Hotel Tagline: From a wedge-tower corner above the 20th floor, BC Place's dome and the North Shore Mountains share one frame.
Summary: The “-01” suites above the 20th floor command 270-degree views — the North Shore Mountains, False Creek, BC Place’s dome, and Science World glowing against the night sky all in a single frame. We’d request one of these wedge-tower corners for the evening light.
Description ⚙: Rising distinctively in copper-toned glass, the JW Marriott Parq Vancouver stands in the heart of the city's entertainment district. The "-01" suites, perched on the 20th floor and above the wedge-shaped tower, command 270-degree views spanning downtown Vancouver, the North Shore Mountains, False Creek waterfront, and BC Place's iconic dome. Many rooms also capture Science World's geodesic sphere, which glows against the night sky. Studio Munge's design brings natural light into all 329 rooms through floor-to-ceiling windows. Eight restaurants and lounges create distinct atmospheres throughout the hotel. Canada's first Spa by JW occupies the 17th floor, where pod-like chairs let guests gaze over Vancouver during treatments. The 4,240-square-foot fitness center wraps around three sides of windows, staying open 24 hours.
Address: 39 Smithe St, Vancouver, BC V6B 0R3, Canada
Nearest Airports: CXH · Vancouver Harbour · 5 km; YVR · Vancouver · 13 km

Alt Text: Pan Pacific Vancouver outdoor pool deck with views of Burrard Inlet harbour and snow-capped North Shore Mountains under blue sky

Images.alt: Pan Pacific Vancouver outdoor pool deck with views of Burrard Inlet harbour and snow-capped North Shore Mountains under blue sky

Hotel Tagline: Above Canada Place, cruise ships and the North Shore Mountains fill every window.
Summary: Above Canada Place, all 503 rooms face the harbour, Stanley Park, or the North Shore Mountains. The top-floor Pacific Club rooms are the reason to upgrade — as close to the waterfront as you can get without boarding a ship, with the saltwater pool below adding a second vantage point.
Description ⚙: Floor-to-ceiling windows frame Vancouver's harbour from the Pan Pacific Vancouver, perched at the city's waterfront above Canada Place. The North Shore Mountains rise behind cruise ships, while Stanley Park stretches west along the shoreline — vistas that take center stage in all 503 rooms. The top-floor Pacific Club rooms dial up the luxury with the most dramatic vistas in downtown Vancouver. At Oceans 999, Pacific Northwest dishes come with a side of mountain scenery. The restaurant's Sunday Brunch has become a local tradition, while Coal Harbour Bar mixes cocktails against a backdrop of passing ships. The eighth floor holds one of Vancouver's most picturesque pools — a heated saltwater sanctuary with panoramic views of the harbour.
View Subjects: Burrard Inlet, Stanley Park, North Shore Mountains
Address: 999 Canada Pl #300, Vancouver, BC V6C 3B5, Canada
Nearest Airports: CXH · Vancouver Harbour · 4 km; YVR · Vancouver · 15 km

Alt Text: Hyatt Regency Vancouver guestroom at night with downtown skyline view featuring Paradox Hotel tower and dark silhouette of North Shore Mountains

Images.alt: Hyatt Regency Vancouver guestroom at night with downtown skyline view featuring Paradox Hotel tower and dark silhouette of North Shore Mountains

Hotel Tagline: Thirty-four floors up on Burrard Street, the North Shore peaks rise beyond the downtown grid.
Summary: Thirty-four floors along Burrard Street put the North Shore peaks squarely in frame from Mountain View rooms, while City View accommodations survey the downtown grid below. The Regency Club lounge on the upper floors is worth requesting for the elevated sightlines alone.
Description ⚙: Through floor-to-ceiling windows, the Hyatt Regency Vancouver's 34 floors capture the city's diverse panorama. In Mountain View rooms, the North Shore peaks rise beyond the urban landscape, while City View accommodations survey downtown's dynamic streetscape. The top floors house Regency Club rooms, where an exclusive lounge offers elevated perspectives of Vancouver. Contemporary simplicity defines the 644 rooms and suites, letting the dramatic views take center stage. The fourth-floor outdoor heated pool offers swimmers a refreshing cityscape perspective, while the 24-hour fitness center pairs workouts with panoramic views.
Address: 655 Burrard St, Vancouver, BC V6C 2R7, Canada
Nearest Airports: CXH · Vancouver Harbour · 4 km; YVR · Vancouver · 14 km

Alt Text: Fairmont Waterfront Vancouver rooftop terrace at sunset with Coal Harbour, Vancouver Convention Centre living roof, and North Shore Mountains in pink evening light

Images.alt: Fairmont Waterfront Vancouver rooftop terrace at sunset with Coal Harbour, Vancouver Convention Centre living roof, and North Shore Mountains in pink evening light

Hotel Tagline: Cruise ships manoeuvre directly below while Stanley Park and the North Shore Mountains fill the horizon beyond.
Summary: The room to ask for here is the Signature Harbour View Suite — private terrace, unobstructed water views, and cruise ships manoeuvring directly below. Standard rooms across the hotel already face the harbour or Stanley Park through wall-to-wall windows.
Description ⚙: Soaring above Vancouver's vibrant waterfront, the Fairmont Waterfront commands some of the best views in the city through dramatic wall-to-wall windows. From the North Shore Mountains to Stanley Park's verdant expanse, each room frames an iconic slice of the landscape. Luxury seekers gravitate to the high-floor accommodations and Signature Harbor View Suite, where private terraces deliver unobstructed views of the waterfront and the bustling cruise port below. At ARC Restaurant, the kitchen works a Province to Plate menu drawing on produce from the hotel's own rooftop herb garden and honeybee apiary — one of Vancouver's first green roofs. The heated outdoor pool provides a serene vantage point for mountain gazing. The hotel holds a prestigious 5 Green Key environmental rating.
View Subjects: Burrard Inlet, Stanley Park, North Shore Mountains
Address: 900 Canada Pl, Vancouver, BC V6C 3L5, Canada
Nearest Airports: CXH · Vancouver Harbour · 4 km; YVR · Vancouver · 14 km

Alt Text: Sheraton Vancouver Wall Centre corner room with wraparound floor-to-ceiling windows showing West End skyline, English Bay, and North Shore Mountains

Images.alt: Sheraton Vancouver Wall Centre corner room with wraparound floor-to-ceiling windows showing West End skyline, English Bay, and North Shore Mountains

Hotel Tagline: From the 34th floor, city lights and snow-capped mountains fill the glass on all sides.
Summary: The two towers rise to form one of the city’s most recognizable silhouettes, with 746 rooms facing either downtown or the Pacific. Corner Suites on upper floors offer the clearest read of both: city lights in one direction, ocean and snow-capped mountains in the other.
Description ⚙: From a commanding position on Burrard Street, the Sheraton Vancouver Wall Centre rises in two towers, with the taller One Wall Centre standing as a city landmark. The 746 rooms stretch skyward, their floor-to-ceiling windows framing Vancouver's panorama — from the city skyline to the Pacific Ocean and the snow-capped North Shore Mountains. Deluxe Rooms capture either city or ocean perspectives, while Corner Suites offer wraparound views through glass walls. For events, the hotel offers 55,000 square feet of versatile space, crowned by a 34th-floor venue where floor-to-ceiling windows and an outdoor patio showcase sweeping city views.
Address: 1000 Burrard St, Vancouver, BC V6Z 2S5, Canada
Nearest Airports: CXH · Vancouver Harbour · 4 km; YVR · Vancouver · 13 km

Alt Text: Auberge Vancouver Hotel indoor pool with glass ceiling and floor-to-ceiling windows showing Coal Harbour and snow-capped North Shore Mountains at dusk

Images.alt: Auberge Vancouver Hotel indoor pool with glass ceiling and floor-to-ceiling windows showing Coal Harbour and snow-capped North Shore Mountains at dusk

Hotel Tagline: Seaplanes skim the harbour below as cruise ships pass within easy view of the upper floors.
Summary: Worth staying for the indoor pool with harbour and mountain views — a rare combination in the city. Select rooms face the Vancouver Lookout and Burrard Inlet, where seaplanes skim the water and cruise ships pass in easy view from the upper floors.
Description ⚙: Through dramatic windows, the Auberge Vancouver Hotel captures Burrard Inlet's changing moods, the North Shore Mountains, and city lights. Select rooms face the Vancouver Lookout, while others showcase the waterfront panorama. Seaplanes skim the harbour below as cruise ships glide past. The long indoor pool commands partial views of the harbour and mountains, complemented by a whirlpool, sauna, and steam room. Four regulation squash courts and a professional-grade fitness center are available to guests.
Address: 837 W Hastings St, Vancouver, BC V6C 1B6, Canada
Nearest Airports: CXH · Vancouver Harbour · 4 km; YVR · Vancouver · 14 km

Alt Text: Westin Bayshore Vancouver hotel room with balcony railing and direct view of Coal Harbour marina sailboats and forested North Shore Mountains

Images.alt: Westin Bayshore Vancouver hotel room with balcony railing and direct view of Coal Harbour marina sailboats and forested North Shore Mountains

Hotel Tagline: Where Coal Harbour's seaplanes meet the forested edge of Stanley Park.
Summary: The only downtown Vancouver hotel with its own marina — Harbour View rooms open onto Juliet balconies above the Coal Harbour docks. The circular outdoor pool is the best perch for seaplane-watching, and Stanley Park’s trails begin at the front entrance.
Description ⚙: Positioned where Coal Harbour meets the entrance to Stanley Park, The Westin Bayshore is Vancouver's only downtown hotel with its own marina. Floor-to-ceiling sliding glass doors open to Juliet balconies in all 499 rooms and suites; Harbour View accommodations face the marina and the seaplanes crossing Burrard Inlet, while Premium Tower rooms on higher floors extend the panorama to Stanley Park's forested headland and the North Shore Mountains. The International Suite adds a private rooftop balcony and a soaking tub positioned toward the water. H2 Rotisserie and Bar serves Pacific Northwest dishes through floor-to-ceiling windows overlooking Coal Harbour. Vida Spa, cedar barrel saunas, and outdoor and indoor pools are available to guests.
View Subjects: Coal Harbour, Burrard Inlet, Stanley Park
Address: 1601 Bayshore Dr., Vancouver, BC V6G 2V4, Canada

Alt Text: Paradox Hotel Vancouver suite bathroom with freestanding soaking tub at floor-to-ceiling windows overlooking downtown Vancouver glass tower skyline

Images.alt: Paradox Hotel Vancouver suite bathroom with freestanding soaking tub at floor-to-ceiling windows overlooking downtown Vancouver glass tower skyline

Hotel Tagline: From high floors, the North Shore Mountains and Vancouver Harbour appear at angles no other tower repeats.
Summary: Arthur Erickson’s twisting 63-story tower means no two rooms share the same orientation — some face the North Shore, others Vancouver Harbour, others the downtown skyline. We’d request a high-floor king with a soaker tub to make the most of the rotated geometry.
Description ⚙: From the twisting silhouette of Arthur Erickson's 63-story tower, the Paradox Hotel Vancouver makes its mark on the city skyline. The first 21 floors house 147 rooms and suites, each with floor-to-ceiling windows framing unique views — some face the North Shore Mountains, others look toward Vancouver Harbour or across the downtown landscape. This architectural feat means no two rooms share the same perspective of Vancouver. Higher-floor king rooms and suites add freestanding soaker tubs positioned for skyline gazing, and select rooms open onto private balconies. At street level, Mott 32 has carved out a reputation among Vancouver's finest restaurants with its Cantonese menu and signature Peking duck. The Xylia Natural Spa offers forest-inspired treatments.
Address: 1161 W Georgia St, Vancouver, BC V6E 0C6, Canada
Nearest Airports: CXH · Vancouver Harbour · 3 km; YVR · Vancouver · 14 km

Alt Text: Sutton Place Hotel Vancouver king bedroom with window overlooking downtown Vancouver towers and low-rise heritage buildings below

Images.alt: Sutton Place Hotel Vancouver king bedroom with window overlooking downtown Vancouver towers and low-rise heritage buildings below

Hotel Tagline: From floors 15 to 21, downtown Vancouver spreads across every floor-to-ceiling window.
Summary: The Deluxe and Premium rooms between floors 15 and 21 deliver the most elevated city perspectives at this address. A 2024 renovation refreshed every room with rain showers, Nespresso machines, and 55-inch TVs — the European atmosphere is still there, just updated.
Description ⚙: Floor-to-ceiling windows in The Sutton Place Hotel Vancouver's 397 rooms offer city views. The Deluxe and Premium Rooms, positioned between floors 15 and 21, give guests elevated perspectives of downtown. A 2024 renovation brought modern comforts: 55-inch TVs with Chromecast, Nespresso machines, and minibars in every room. Boulevard Kitchen and Oyster Bar emphasizes fresh seafood and local ingredients. In Gerard Lounge, wood paneling and a fireplace recreate an English club's warmth. Natural light streams through a dramatic skylight above the indoor pool, and Vida Spa offers traditional and Ayurvedic treatments.
Address: 845 Burrard St, Vancouver, BC V6Z 2K6, Canada
Nearest Airports: CXH · Vancouver Harbour · 4 km; YVR · Vancouver · 14 km

Alt Text: Wedgewood Hotel Spa Vancouver bedroom with private balcony and seating area overlooking downtown Vancouver skyline with high-rise towers

Images.alt: Wedgewood Hotel Spa Vancouver bedroom with private balcony and seating area overlooking downtown Vancouver skyline with high-rise towers

Hotel Tagline: Private balconies look directly over Robson Square and the Vancouver Art Gallery below.
Summary: All 83 rooms and suites have private balconies looking over Robson Square and the Vancouver Art Gallery. The upper-floor terrace suites add the most usable outdoor space — breakfast above one of the city’s most elegant civic squares is the draw.
Description ⚙: The Wedgewood Hotel & Spa brings old-world European charm to Vancouver's downtown as a Relais & Chateaux member. Each of its 83 rooms and suites pairs custom furniture and antiques with private balconies that gaze over Robson Square. The attention to detail extends to amenities like L'Occitane bath products and plush bathrobes. In Bacchus Restaurant, chandeliers cast a warm glow over French cuisine while a pianist plays in the adjacent lounge. The spa creates an intimate retreat with its eucalyptus steam room and couple's treatment suites. Set across from the Vancouver Art Gallery and minutes from Robson Street's boutiques, the hotel holds a prime spot in Vancouver's cultural heart.
Address: 845 Hornby St, Vancouver, BC V6Z 1V1, Canada
Nearest Airports: CXH · Vancouver Harbour · 4 km; YVR · Vancouver · 14 km

Alt Text: Fairmont Hotel Vancouver suite sitting room with crystal chandelier and arched ceiling with multi-pane windows and downtown Vancouver city view

Images.alt: Fairmont Hotel Vancouver suite sitting room with crystal chandelier and arched ceiling with multi-pane windows and downtown Vancouver city view

Hotel Tagline: From the ninth floor, the North Shore Mountains rise beyond a downtown anchored by gallery and couture.
Summary: The ninth-floor Fairmont Gold rooms are the specific target here: North Shore Mountain views from a heritage copper-roofed landmark that has anchored downtown since 1939. Below, Canada’s first Dior boutique and the Vancouver Art Gallery mark the neighbourhood’s tone.
Description ⚙: The copper-roofed silhouette of the Fairmont Hotel Vancouver has graced downtown since 1939, when King George VI and Queen Elizabeth opened this Castle in the City. A $75 million renovation preserved its Chateauesque architecture and Renaissance details while adding modern comforts. The ninth-floor Fairmont Gold rooms offer the best views, looking out to the North Shore Mountains. Dark wood furnishings fill the 557 rooms, from snug 275-square-foot spaces to the sprawling 1,250-square-foot Lieutenant Governor's Suite. Train car-inspired booths and Art Deco details in Notch8 Restaurant recall Vancouver's railway history. A bright indoor pool on the second floor pairs with a well-equipped fitness center.
Address: 900 W Georgia St, Vancouver, BC V6C 2W6, Canada
Nearest Airports: CXH · Vancouver Harbour · 4 km; YVR · Vancouver · 14 km

Alt Text: Hilton Vancouver Downtown outdoor pool terrace at dusk with BC Place stadium white dome and surrounding city lights in background

Images.alt: Hilton Vancouver Downtown outdoor pool terrace at dusk with BC Place stadium white dome and surrounding city lights in background

Hotel Tagline: North-facing balconies frame Vancouver Harbour and the North Shore Mountains above Library Square.
Summary: Every one of the 206 all-suite accommodations comes with a kitchenette and soaker tub; north-facing rooms frame the harbour and North Shore Mountains from private balconies. The third-floor outdoor saltwater pool faces the city — a practical bonus above Library Square.
Description ⚙: From its ideal location on Robson and Homer Streets, the Hilton Vancouver Downtown lifts its all-suite accommodations into the city skyline. North-facing rooms frame Vancouver Harbour and the North Shore Mountains, while others overlook BC Place and the urban landscape. Each of the 206 suites comes with a kitchenette, flat-screen TV, and luxurious soaker tub. The Deluxe King and Queen Suites with City View offer striking perspectives of Vancouver's towers against their mountain backdrop. The third-floor outdoor deck holds a heated saltwater pool and whirlpool with city views, while a 24-hour fitness center keeps health routines on track.
Address: 433 Robson St, Vancouver, BC V6B 6L9, Canada
Nearest Airports: CXH · Vancouver Harbour · 4 km; YVR · Vancouver · 14 km

Alt Text: Londra Palace Venezia balcony on Riva degli Schiavoni with San Giorgio Maggiore view

Images.alt: Londra Palace Venezia balcony on Riva degli Schiavoni with San Giorgio Maggiore view

Hotel Tagline: Gondolas pass beneath the balconies as San Giorgio Maggiore and the Salute dome frame the lagoon.
Summary: Balconies and loggias along the Riva degli Schiavoni — San Giorgio Maggiore across the water, the Salute dome to the west. The 52 rooms and suites reopened in March 2024 after a full renovation by Studio Ruberti Cutillo. We’d request a Deluxe Lagoon room for the three-aspect view.
Description ⚙: Time slows down along the Riva degli Schiavoni, where Londra Palace Venezia presides over one of Venice's most coveted viewpoints. Savvy travelers linger at their balconies here, watching gondolas glide past against the backdrop of San Giorgio Maggiore island, while the dome of Santa Maria delle Salute Church punctuates the western horizon. The hotel's position, just moments from St. Mark's Square and the Doge's Palace, places guests at the crossroads of Venice's grandeur, with St. Zacharias' Church beckoning around the corner. Behind the historic façade of this 19th-century merger between the Angleterre and Beau Rivage hotels, 52 rooms and suites unfold like chapters in a Venetian novel. Each space tells its own tale through thoughtfully curated elements — tapestries dance at windows, brocade embraces walls, and authentic Biedermeier furniture grounds the historical narrative. Some guests swear the lagoon views are most magical from the balconies and loggias, where purple, grey, or ivory color schemes create serene retreats from Venice's bustle. The top-floor rooms reveal their age proudly through exposed wooden beams, while pink Carrara marble bathrooms catch the perfume of lagoon breezes through generous windows. LPV Ristorante at Londra Palace Venezia orchestrates a culinary journey through Venice's rich gastronomic heritage. Throughout the day, LondraBar's veranda becomes a front-row seat to the theater of Venetian life unfolding along the Riva. Those in the know whisper about the rooftop altana terrace, where intimate gatherings of up to eight guests can dine under the stars, surrounded by Venice's illuminated spires. The hotel reopened in March 2024 following an extensive renovation by Studio Ruberti Cutillo, refreshing the lobby, restaurant-bar, and terrace while preserving the soul of this historic haven.
Address: Riva degli Schiavoni, 4171, 30122 Venezia VE, Italy
Nearest Airports: VCE · Marco Polo · 20 km; TSF · Treviso · 43 km

Alt Text: The St. Regis Venice Monet Suite terrace overlooking the Grand Canal

Images.alt: The St. Regis Venice Monet Suite terrace overlooking the Grand Canal

Hotel Tagline: From a private terrace, the Grand Canal and Santa Maria della Salute fill the horizon.
Summary: The Grand Canal from a private terrace — that is the Monet Suite’s opening argument. At Gio’s Restaurant, chef Giuseppe Ricci’s menus extend the view to the water’s edge. The hotel inhabits the Grand Hotel Britannia, rebuilt from 1895 and transformed in 2019.
Description ⚙: Morning light dances across the Grand Canal, where The St. Regis Venice claims Venice's most impressive waterfront. Since its 2019 metamorphosis from the historic Grand Hotel Britannia of 1895, this architectural masterpiece frames postcard-perfect views — the Santa Maria della Salute Basilica rising majestically across the water, contemporary art finding harbor at Punta della Dogana Museum, and San Giorgio Maggiore's bell tower piercing the horizon. In the 163 guestrooms and suites, Sagrada design studio's vision captures Venice's legendary light through contemporary eyes. Some fortunate guests wake to Grand Canal panoramas from private terraces, while others overlook the hotel's secret Italianate garden or Venice's timeless terracotta roofscape. The Monet Suites tell their artistic tale — their color palettes echo the same views that inspired the master's brush during his Venetian sojourns. Chef Giuseppe Ricci orchestrates culinary theater at Gio's Restaurant & Terrace, where innovative Italian cuisine meets Grand Canal drama. The Arts Bar writes its contemporary narrative through cocktails that pay tribute to provocateurs like Jeff Koons and Banksy. Art flows through The St. Regis Venice like another canal — Ai Weiwei's White Chandelier commands the lobby's heights. Through its artist-in-residence program, the hotel keeps company with creativity just as it did when J.M.W. Turner and John Singer Sargent found inspiration within these walls. The hotel holds Green Key certification and operates Venice's first electric boat charging station.
Address: P.za San Marco, 2159, 30124 Venezia VE, Italy
Nearest Airports: VCE · Marco Polo · 19 km; TSF · Treviso · 42 km

Hotel: The Gritti Palace, a Luxury Collection Hotel, Venice
Alt Text: The Gritti Palace Venice terrace on the Grand Canal at sunset

Images.alt: The Gritti Palace Venice terrace on the Grand Canal at sunset

Hotel Tagline: From the terrace, the dome of Santa Maria della Salute rises across the water at sunset.
Summary: Five centuries of Grand Canal presence, and the Gritti Terrace earns its reputation at sunset. The Hemingway Suite opens floor-to-ceiling onto the water; Club del Doge does the same at table height. Chef Alberto Fol leads the Epicurean School in the kitchen of this 15th-century palazzo.
Description ⚙: From its commanding position on the Grand Canal, The Gritti Palace, a Luxury Collection Hotel, Venice whispers stories of five centuries of Venetian grandeur. The 15th-century Gothic palazzo, refreshed by an artful 2013 restoration, presents a theater of Venice's most enchanting views — the dome of Santa Maria della Salute Basilica rising like a dream across the water, gondolas gliding past in graceful procession, and the vibrant waterfront life unfolding just minutes from St. Mark's Square and Teatro La Fenice. The 82 rooms and suites read like chapters from Venice's golden age. Those who secure the coveted Landmark Grand Canal rooms wake to vistas stretching from the Salute's magnificent dome to the avant-garde treasures of the Peggy Guggenheim Collection. Literary souls gravitate to the Hemingway Suite, where floor-to-ceiling French doors open to balconies suspended over the Grand Canal. Culinary artistry takes center stage at Club del Doge Restaurant, where authentic Venetian cuisine pairs with Grand Canal panoramas. The Gritti Terrace captures Venice's most sought-after sunsets, while Bar Longhi enchants with its hand-sculpted mirrors. Since 1975, the hotel has shared its culinary secrets through the Gritti Epicurean School — the world's first palace hotel cooking school — today led by Executive Chef Alberto Fol. The Gritti SPA is branded by Sisley Paris.
Address: Campo Santa Maria Del Giglio, 2467, 30124 Venezia VE, Italy
Nearest Airports: VCE · Marco Polo · 19 km; TSF · Treviso · 41 km

Alt Text: Baglioni Hotel Luna Venice room with lagoon view toward San Giorgio Island

Images.alt: Baglioni Hotel Luna Venice room with lagoon view toward San Giorgio Island

Hotel Tagline: Lagoon views from St. Mark's Square stretch across the water to San Giorgio Island.
Summary: Steps from St. Mark’s Square, lagoon views across to San Giorgio Island. Worth staying for the San Giorgio Terrace Suite — a private box above the water — or the Tiziano Lagoon View Suite, which reads closer to a stateroom. Canova Restaurant menus are by Michelin-starred Claudio Sadler.
Description ⚙: Just a whisper away from St. Mark's Square, Baglioni Hotel Luna is a testament to Venice's enduring romance. Where Knights Hospitaller once found refuge in 1118, today's guests discover a palazzo where history seeps through every stone while lagoon views stretch to San Giorgio Island's distant silhouette. Within the 91 rooms and suites, Venetian craftsmanship takes center stage. Silk-draped walls catch the light from Murano glass chandeliers, while Italian marble bathrooms provide spaces of gleaming sanctuary. Those who secure the San Giorgio Terrace Suite find themselves with a private theater box overlooking the lagoon's daily performance. Among the most distinguished suites is the Tiziano Lagoon View Suite, offering panoramic water views. The Marco Polo Ballroom transforms breakfast into a museum visit, where 18th-century frescoes by Tiepolo's pupils float overhead like painted clouds. In the acclaimed Canova Restaurant by Sadler, Michelin-starred chef Claudio Sadler's menus are realized by resident chef Gennaro Balice. Luna Bistro caters to more casual moments, while Caffè Baglioni faces the lagoon. A refresh by The One Atelier modernized the lobby, restaurant, and bar. The hotel dates to the 12th century and is a member of The Leading Hotels of the World.
Address: P.za San Marco, 1243, 30124 Venezia VE, Italy
Nearest Airports: VCE · Marco Polo · 20 km; TSF · Treviso · 42 km

Hotel: Hotel Cipriani, A Belmond Hotel, Venice
Alt Text: Hotel Cipriani Belmond Venice public hotel area with telescope on Giudecca Island

Images.alt: Hotel Cipriani Belmond Venice public hotel area with telescope on Giudecca Island

Hotel Tagline: From Cip's Club deck, St. Mark's Square and the Doge's Palace rise across the lagoon.
Summary: Giudecca Island’s easternmost tip, four minutes from San Marco by private launch. The Cip’s Club deck hovers above the laguna; the Palladio Suite adds a private heated plunge pool and 180-degree water views. Michelin-starred Oro is led by chef Vania Ghedini with Massimo Bottura as culinary director.
Description ⚙: Venice reveals its most intimate face at Hotel Cipriani, A Belmond Hotel, Venice, where the easternmost tip of Giudecca Island cradles one of the city's most storied retreats. Early risers gathering at the wooden deck of Cip's Club swear the morning light here transforms the lagoon into liquid gold, with St. Mark's Square and the Doge's Palace emerging from the morning mist like a Renaissance painting come to life. A private launch whisks guests across to San Marco in four minutes. The 94 rooms and suites split between the main Cipriani building and Palazzo Vendramin, each offering their interpretation of Venetian grandeur. Those in the know request the Premium St. Mark's View rooms in Palazzo Vendramin; the Palladio Suite adds a 180-degree water view and private heated plunge pool. Michelin-starred Oro Restaurant is led by Chef Vania Ghedini with Massimo Bottura as culinary creative director. Cip's Club offers lagoon-side dining overlooking St. Mark's Square; Il Porticciolo serves poolside; Bar Gabbiano honors tradition with Bellinis following Giuseppe Cipriani's original 1948 recipe. The grounds feature the only Olympic-sized seawater pool in Venice, maintained at 29°C year-round, and the Casanova Gardens. In 2025, architect Peter Marino oversaw a reimagined interior covering the lobby and 13 guestrooms.
Address: Giudecca, 10, 30133 Venezia VE, Italy
Nearest Airports: VCE · Marco Polo · 20 km; TSF · Treviso · 42 km

Hotel: Danieli, A Four Seasons Hotel, Venice
Alt Text: Danieli Four Seasons Venice romantic restaurant at night above the lagoon

Images.alt: Danieli Four Seasons Venice romantic restaurant at night above the lagoon

Hotel Tagline: From the rooftop terrace, San Giorgio Maggiore floats across the Venetian Lagoon.
Summary: Three Gothic palaces on the Riva degli Schiavoni, the rooftop Terrazza Danieli above the lagoon. 2026 is a landmark year for this address: under Four Seasons management and following a restoration by Pierre-Yves Rochon, Danieli reopens and reclaims its place among Venice’s finest.
Description ⚙: On the storied Riva degli Schiavoni, Danieli, A Four Seasons Hotel, Venice rises among the city's grandest canal-view hotels. Three interconnected palaces form this Gothic masterpiece — the 15th-century Palazzo Dandolo, the 19th-century Palazzo Casa Nuova, and Palazzo Danieli Excelsior (1950) — just steps from St. Mark's Square and the Bridge of Sighs. The hotel is reopening in 2026 following a USD 34 million restoration by French interior designer Pierre-Yves Rochon, who preserved the four-storey atrium with pink marble columns and the gilded staircase while introducing Murano glass chandeliers, terrazzo floors, and a palette of soft pinks, lagoon blues, and warm terracottas. Opening with 120 rooms and suites, expanding to 176 by 2027. Lagoon-facing rooms look out across the Venetian Lagoon to San Giorgio Maggiore. Terrazza Danieli, the rooftop restaurant led by Executive Chef Adriano Rausa, offers panoramic views over the lagoon and the dome-studded skyline. Bar Dandolo, off the lobby in the original Palazzo Dandolo, provides coffee, tea, and cocktails. The Danieli Spa opens late 2026 with three treatment rooms and a sauna and hammam. General Manager Christian Zandonella leads the team for the property's new chapter under Four Seasons.
Address: Riva degli Schiavoni, 4196, 30122 Venezia VE, Italy
Nearest Airports: VCE · Marco Polo · ~8 km

Alt Text: Ca' Sagredo Venice Grand Canal view from room balcony opposite Rialto Market

Images.alt: Ca' Sagredo Venice Grand Canal view from room balcony opposite Rialto Market

Hotel Tagline: From water level, the Grand Canal fills the window opposite the Rialto Market.
Summary: A 15th-century Italian National Monument opposite the Rialto Market — Grand Canal rooms at water level, a rooftop terrace above. The Library Suite once held Galileo’s 10,000-volume collection. L’Alcova Restaurant’s terrace creates the effect of dining aboard a private yacht above the canal.
Address: Campo Santa Sofia, 4198/99, 30121 Venezia VE, Italy
Nearest Airports: VCE · Marco Polo · ~7 km

Alt Text: Hotel Rialto Venice close-range Rialto Bridge view from hotel terrace

Images.alt: Hotel Rialto Venice close-range Rialto Bridge view from hotel terrace

Hotel Tagline: The Rialto Bridge stands at close range from the room, the breakfast terrace, and the rooftop above.
Summary: The Rialto Bridge at close range — from the room, from breakfast, from the rooftop terrace. Of the 79 rooms, 28 overlook the Grand Canal directly; the Honeymoon Suite adds a private balcony to the equation. Worth timing a stay around the early-morning market on the opposite bank.
Description ⚙: Hotel Rialto occupies the Riva del Vin on the Grand Canal, directly facing the Rialto Bridge — one of the most cinematically specific positions in Venice. The four-star property has 79 individually furnished rooms and suites, 28 of which overlook the Grand Canal with direct sightlines to the bridge's white Istrian stone arch. The interiors blend traditional Venetian and contemporary styles. The recommended categories for view are the Double Classic with Grand Canal view, with the Rialto Bridge framed directly in the window, and the Honeymoon Junior Suite, which adds a private balcony over the canal. A Deluxe Apartment with a separate entrance is also available for canal-view stays. The rooftop terrace restaurant and bar offers an unobstructed view of the bridge and the canal traffic below. From April through October, breakfast is served on the ground-floor terrace with the bridge as a direct backdrop. The vaporetto stop for lines 1 and 2 is directly outside the hotel door. St. Mark's Square is a five-minute walk via the Mercerie; the Rialto Market is immediately across the bridge.
Address: Riva del Ferro, 5149, 30124 Venezia VE, Italy
Nearest Airports: VCE · Marco Polo · ~8 km

Alt Text: Hotel Metropole Venezia room on Riva degli Schiavoni near San Marco

Images.alt: Hotel Metropole Venezia room on Riva degli Schiavoni near San Marco

Hotel Tagline: From the Riva degli Schiavoni, the Venetian Lagoon unfolds without interruption.
Summary: On the Riva degli Schiavoni between the Biennale gardens and San Marco, the Metropole is an opulent cabinet of curiosities under Gloria Beggiato’s stewardship. The Exclusive lagoon-view damasco suite frames the water without interruption. Vivaldi’s former chapel is now the Oriental Bar & Bistrot.
Description ⚙: Along Venice's historic Riva degli Schiavoni, Hotel Metropole Venezia claims its place among the city's most distinctive luxury hotels. What began as a humble convent and orphanage now enchants visitors with its prime position between Piazza San Marco and the leafy Giardini della Biennale gardens. Here, the Venetian Lagoon unfolds its daily theater. Rooms and suites feel less like hotel accommodations and more like the private chambers of a Venetian collector. The luxurious Exclusive lagoon-view damasco suite captures uninterrupted vistas of the waterways. The crowning roof terrace suite offers perhaps the most coveted vantage point. Within these historic walls, the former chapel where Antonio Vivaldi once taught music to orphans has been transformed into the Oriental Bar & Bistrot. Under Gloria Beggiato's family stewardship, the hotel has evolved into something extraordinary — an opulent cabinet of curiosities where every floor reveals a different collection. Vintage Belle Époque evening bags share space with Art Deco feathers, while assemblages of corkscrews and crucifixes speak to the family's eclectic tastes. Sigmund Freud and Marcel Proust are among the illustrious guests of the past.
Address: Riva degli Schiavoni, 4149, 30122 Venezia VE, Italy
Nearest Airports: VCE · Marco Polo · 20 km; TSF · Treviso · 43 km

Alt Text: Ca'di Dio Venice room with lagoon view from Patricia Urquiola conversion

Images.alt: Ca'di Dio Venice room with lagoon view from Patricia Urquiola conversion

Hotel Tagline: A rooftop terrace above San Giorgio, the lagoon wrapping 360 degrees around you.
Summary: Patricia Urquiola’s conversion of a former monastery, completed in autumn 2021 — 66 rooms, 430 windows, and an Altana Suite with 360-degree lagoon views. VERO Restaurant extends to the water’s edge. We’d book the Altana Suite for the private rooftop terrace above San Giorgio.
Address: Riva Ca' di Dio, 2183, 30122 Venezia VE, Italy
Nearest Airports: VCE · Marco Polo · 20 km; TSF · Treviso · 43 km

Alt Text: San Clemente Palace Venice private island with view of the Venice skyline

Images.alt: San Clemente Palace Venice private island with view of the Venice skyline

Hotel Tagline: Across fifteen acres of lagoon island, the full Venice skyline stretches unbroken to the horizon.
Summary: San Clemente Palace sits on its own island — 15 acres, a 12th-century church, and a view of the entire Venice skyline across the laguna. The complimentary shuttle runs to San Marco in ten minutes. We’d arrive by water taxi and let the view reset expectations for everything that follows.
Description ⚙: San Clemente Palace Venice is a five-star hotel on the private island of San Clemente, a ten-minute complimentary shuttle boat ride from Piazza San Marco. The property spans 15 acres on a 900-year-old island that includes a 12th-century church, botanical gardens, a 1.5 km jogging path, tennis courts, and a putting green. The hotel has 170 rooms and suites in beautifully restored monastery buildings with high Venetian ceilings and traditional décor. Views from the lagoon-facing rooms extend over the water to the full Venice skyline: the Grand Canal palazzo sequence, the dome of Santa Maria della Salute, San Giorgio Maggiore, and the Campanile. The San Clemente Suite has an almost complete wall of windows over the laguna; Grand Deluxe Lagoon View and Deluxe Lagoon View rooms offer the same panorama; the Laguna Suites are dedicated lagoon-facing accommodation. Insieme Restaurant serves breakfast with views of Venice; Acquerello Restaurant includes a terrace overlooking the private dock and the laguna; La Dolce Restaurant operates poolside throughout the season. The outdoor pool sits in the gardens with the city's profile visible across the water. The Longevity Spa offers comprehensive wellness treatments. The hotel operated as San Clemente Palace Kempinski until 2025, when it became fully independent.
Address: Isola di San Clemente, 1, 30124 Venezia VE, Italy
Nearest Airports: VCE · Marco Polo · 20 km; TSF · Treviso · 42 km

Alt Text: Sina Palazzo Sant'Angelo Grand Canal room between Rialto and Accademia

Images.alt: Sina Palazzo Sant'Angelo Grand Canal room between Rialto and Accademia

Hotel Tagline: Between the Rialto and Accademia, the Grand Canal runs past your balcony.
Summary: Twenty-six rooms in a late-19th-century palazzo, directly on the Grand Canal between the Rialto and Accademia bridges. The Deluxe Suite has its own balcony over the water; the bar faces the same canal from a lower angle. The Sant’Angelo vaporetto stop is across the street.
Address: Fondamenta Narisi, 3878b, 30124 Venezia VE, Italy
Nearest Airports: VCE · Marco Polo · 19 km; TSF · Treviso · 41 km

Alt Text: The Venice Venice Hotel avant-garde room in Ca' da Mosto facing Rialto Bridge

Images.alt: The Venice Venice Hotel avant-garde room in Ca' da Mosto facing Rialto Bridge

Hotel Tagline: Room 41's window frames the Rialto Bridge arc directly over the Grand Canal.
Summary: Cannaregio’s 13th-century Ca’ da Mosto reborn as an avant-garde hotel by Alessandro Gallo of Golden Goose. Room 41’s window frames the Rialto Bridge arc directly and shares a rooftop altanella with Room 43. The ground floor flows canal-side, where the concept store meets the cocktail bar.
Description ⚙: In Venice's ancient Cannaregio district, The Venice Venice Hotel makes a striking statement from its perch on the Grand Canal. Housed in the 13th-century Ca' da Mosto, one of the city's oldest palazzos, this avant-garde property was conceived by Alessandro Gallo — co-founder of Golden Goose and former artistic director of the Biennale's Venice Pavilion — as the first venture for his eRose lifestyle brand. Inside, architect Alessandro Pedron channels the spirit of Carlo Scarpa, breathing contemporary life into medieval bones. Rooms speak a different language through bold arrangements of glass, metal, and ceramic in place of the usual Venetian brocades. Room 41 frames the Rialto Bridge's timeless arc directly and shares a secret rooftop altanella with neighboring Room 43. Each room includes a chrome bar trolley stocked for impromptu cocktail hours. Additional rooms in the adjacent Ca' Dolfin palazzo echo the same innovative design. The ground floor flows canal-side, where a concept store meets the cocktail bar, a moka bar mingles with the bitter club, and the reception hall opens onto a canal-side terrace. The dining room operates under Venini glass chandeliers and transforms at night into an intimate supper club.
Address: Sestiere Cannaregio, 5631, 30121 Venezia VE, Italy
Nearest Airports: VCE · Marco Polo · ~7 km

Alt Text: Hotel Palazzo Stern Venice Grand Canal room in Dorsoduro

Images.alt: Hotel Palazzo Stern Venice Grand Canal room in Dorsoduro

Hotel Tagline: Grand Canal gondolas drift past below, the Dolomites visible beyond Venice's spires from the rooftop.
Summary: Twenty-three rooms in a 15th-century neo-Gothic palazzo on the Grand Canal in Dorsoduro — Proust, Fauré, and D’Annunzio knew the salons. Many rooms face the canal directly; the rooftop Jacuzzi on a clear day takes in the Dolomites beyond Venice’s spires. The room to ask for is the Suite with Terrace.
Description ⚙: Along the Grand Canal in Venice's artistic Dorsoduro district, Hotel Palazzo Stern tells stories of grand salons and creative souls within its neo-Gothic walls. The 15th-century palazzo, transformed by visionaries Raffaele Mainella and Giuseppe Berti, stands as more than just a hotel — it's a chapter of Venice's cultural narrative brought to life. These rooms once echoed with the conversations of Marcel Proust, Gabriel Fauré, and Gabriele D'Annunzio, drawn to the magnetic presence of Ernesta Hierschel Stern's legendary salon. The palazzo's evolution continued under painter Samuel Finkelstein, whose addition of a workshop and exhibition space helped shape the building's distinctive character. The 23 rooms and suites feel less like hotel accommodations and more like private chambers in a noble Venetian home. Many rooms offer front-row seats to the Grand Canal's daily theater, where water buses and gondolas weave their timeless dance below. Mornings begin on the ground floor terrace, where breakfast arrives with Grand Canal views. As sunset approaches, the rooftop terrace reveals its trump card — a Jacuzzi with views stretching beyond Venice's spires to the distant Euganean Hills and, on clear days, the snow-capped Dolomites. The hotel's preservation follows architect Camillo Boito's principles. The Gallerie dell'Accademia and the Peggy Guggenheim Collection are a short walk away.
Address: Sestiere Dorsoduro, 2792/A, 30123 Venezia VE, Italy
Nearest Airports: VCE · Marco Polo · 18 km; TSF · Treviso · 41 km

Alt Text: Nolinski Venezia terrace in Venice former Art Deco stock exchange

Images.alt: Nolinski Venezia terrace in Venice former Art Deco stock exchange

Hotel Tagline: Upper-floor rooms open onto St. Mark's Campanile rising above Venice's rooftops.
Summary: Venice’s former stock exchange — a 1929 Art Deco building — converted into one of the city’s newest luxury hotels by Evok. Upper-floor rooms wake to St. Mark’s Campanile. The Palais Royal restaurant opened in April 2024 under a De Chirico-esque rotunda, a breakfast destination for locals and an evening venue.
Description ⚙: Among Venice's newest luxury hotels, Nolinski Venezia writes its own chapter in an unexpected setting — the city's former Borsa, or stock exchange. French hospitality group Evok chose this 1929 architectural gem for its Venetian debut. Design duo Le Coadic/Scotto wove together Art Deco glamour with nostalgic nods to Italy's white telephone films era, preserving original ironwork, restored moldings, and marble features. The ground floor includes a Brunello Cucinelli boutique and the glittering Caffè Nolinski, whose terrace tables offer some of the neighborhood's best people-watching. Rooms and suites on the upper floors wake to iconic vistas of St. Mark's Campanile. Custom Murano glass pieces from Avem scatter light like the lagoon. The Palais Royal restaurant opened in April 2024 under a De Chirico-esque rotunda and arches, serving as Venice's most elegant breakfast venue — with pastries that locals line up for — and an atmospheric dinner destination. Hidden on the third floor, La Colline Spa provides beauty treatments and meditation spaces, with a gold mosaic Jacuzzi.
Address: Calle Larga XXII Marzo, 2032, 30124 Venezia VE, Italy
Nearest Airports: VCE · Marco Polo · 19 km; TSF · Treviso · 42 km

Hotel Tagline: From the Penthouse terrace, the State Opera and St. Stephen's spire share the same roofline.
Summary: The Penthouse terrace frames the State Opera and the Steffl with nothing in between. Lower floors look across the Albertina’s neoclassical profile or the Opera’s façade. Reserve a higher floor — the view spans Philharmonikerstrasse, one of Vienna’s most storied sightlines.
Description ⚙: The family-owned 1876 landmark at Philharmonikerstrasse 4 faces the Vienna State Opera and the Ringstrasse. The seventh-floor Penthouse suite has a private rooftop terrace with panoramic views of Vienna's cultural landmarks, including St. Stephen's Cathedral spire. The Grüne Bar, with its original 1883 Lobmeyr chandeliers, and the Rote Bar with terrace views of the Opera anchor the ground floor.
Address: Philharmoniker Str. 4, 1010 Wien, Austria
Nearest Airports: VIE · Vienna · 22 km

Summary: We’d request an eighth-floor table at Atmosphere Rooftop Bar, where spires and domes fill the horizon and the city’s musical geography becomes visible. Below, sixth-floor balcony rooms angle down to Beethoven Park and the curve of the Ringstrasse — the most architectural view in the city center.
Description ⚙: A Ringstrasse palais at Schubertring 5-7 with Atmosphere Rooftop Bar on the eighth floor, where spires and domes fill the horizon and the Vienna Hills are visible in the distance. Sixth-floor balcony rooms angle down to Beethoven Park and the curve of the Ringstrasse. The Rasul Spa, indoor pool, and fitness center complete the property.

Hotel Tagline: Private balconies face the White House North Lawn, with the Washington Monument rising behind it.
Summary: Private balconies looking directly at the White House — morning coffee with arguably the most iconic backdrop in American politics. Rooms facing Lafayette Square are worth requesting too, especially at night when the floodlit façade holds its own against any other view in the city.
Description ⚙: On Lafayette Square directly across from the White House, The Hay-Adams opened in 1928 on the former site of the homes of statesman John Hay and historian Henry Adams. Private balconies on the White House-facing side frame the North Lawn, the Washington Monument, and the spire of St. John's Church. The Lafayette restaurant is a Washington institution for power breakfast and Sunday brunch; the Off the Record bar is the capital's most storied political gathering point. Les Cles d'Or concierges arrange monument tours and dining reservations.
Address: 800 16th St NW, Washington, DC 20006, USA
Nearest Airports: DCA · Reagan National · 9 km; IAD · Dulles · 48 km; BWI · Baltimore/Washington · 60 km
